general.g_text: 지금은 동전과 지폐를 모두 사용합니다. 하지만 전에는 동전만 사용했습니다. 종이로 만든 지폐는 쉽게 찢어지고 더러워져서( ㉠ )못합니다.  그리고 가짜 돈을 만들기도 쉽습니다. 그래서 동전보다 지폐를 늦게 사용한 것입니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Bây giờ chúng ta dùng cả tiền xu và tiền giấy. Nhưng trước đây lại chỉ dùng tiền xu. Tiền làm từ giấy rất dễ bị rách và bẩn nên không thể ( ㉠ ) được. Và nó cũng rất dễ để làm giả. Vì vậy mà tiền giấy được dùng muộn hơn tiền xu.
g_text_translate.en: We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.fr:
Nous utilisons maintenant à la fois des pièces de monnaie et des billets de banque. Mais avant, seules les pièces étaient utilisées. Les billets de banque sont facilement déchirés et sales, ils ne durent donc pas longtemps. Et c'est facile à contrefaire. C'est pourquoi les billets ont été utilisés plus tard que les pièces.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.es:
Ahora usamos tanto monedas como billetes. Pero antes, solo se usaban monedas. Los billetes se rompen y ensucian con facilidad, por lo que no duran mucho. Y es fácil de falsificar. Es por eso que los billetes de banco se usaron más tarde que las monedas.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.id:
Kami sekarang menggunakan koin dan uang kertas. Tapi sebelumnya, hanya koin yang digunakan. Uang kertas mudah sobek dan kotor sehingga tidak tahan lama. Dan mudah dipalsukan. Itulah sebabnya uang kertas digunakan lebih lambat daripada koin.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.ja:
現在、硬貨と紙幣の両方を使用しています。しかし、以前はコインのみが使用されていました。紙幣は破れやすく、汚れやすいので、長持ちしません。そして、偽造するのは簡単です。紙幣が硬貨よりも後に使われたのはそのためです。

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.de:
Wir verwenden jetzt sowohl Münzen als auch Banknoten. Aber vorher wurden nur Münzen verwendet. Banknoten können leicht zerrissen und verschmutzt werden, sodass sie nicht lange halten. Und es ist leicht zu fälschen. Deshalb wurden Geldscheine erst später als Münzen verwendet.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我们现在使用硬币和纸币。但在此之前，只使用硬币。纸币很容易被撕破和弄脏，所以它们不会持续很长时间。而且很容易伪造。这就是为什么纸币的使用晚于硬币的原因。

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我們現在使用硬幣和紙幣。但在此之前，只使用硬幣。紙幣很容易被撕破和弄髒，所以它們不會持續很長時間。而且很容易偽造。這就是為什麼紙幣的使用晚於硬幣的原因。

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.it:
Ora usiamo sia monete che banconote. Ma prima venivano usate solo monete. Le banconote si strappano e si sporcano facilmente, quindi non durano a lungo. Ed è facile da contraffare. Ecco perché le banconote sono state utilizzate più tardi delle monete.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.ru:
Сейчас мы используем и монеты, и банкноты. А ведь раньше использовались только монеты. Банкноты легко рвутся и пачкаются, поэтому долго не служат. И его легко подделать. Именно поэтому банкноты стали использовать позже, чем монеты.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.th:
ตอนนี้เราใช้ทั้งเหรียญและธนบัตร แต่ก่อนใช้แต่เหรียญเท่านั้น ธนบัตรฉีกขาดง่ายและสกปรกจึงอยู่ได้ไม่นาน และง่ายต่อการปลอมแปลง นั่นคือสาเหตุที่ธนบัตรถูกใช้ช้ากว่าเหรียญ

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.pt:
Agora usamos moedas e notas. Mas antes, apenas moedas eram usadas. As notas rasgam-se e sujam-se facilmente, por isso não duram muito. E é fácil falsificar. É por isso que as notas foram usadas depois das moedas.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.hi:
अब हम सिक्के और नोट दोनों का उपयोग करते हैं। लेकिन पहले सिर्फ सिक्कों का ही इस्तेमाल होता था. बैंकनोट आसानी से फटे और गंदे होते हैं, इसलिए वे लंबे समय तक नहीं टिकते। और इसकी नकल करना आसान है. इसीलिए सिक्कों की तुलना में बैंकनोटों का उपयोग बाद में किया जाने लगा।

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.
g_text_translate.tr:
Artık hem madeni para hem de banknot kullanıyoruz. Ancak daha önce sadece madeni paralar kullanılıyordu. Banknotlar kolayca yırtılır ve kirlenir, dolayısıyla uzun süre dayanmazlar. Ve sahtesini yapmak kolaydır. Bu nedenle banknotlar madeni paralardan daha sonra kullanılmaya başlandı.

#######

We now use both coins and banknotes. But before, only coins were used. Banknotes are easily torn and dirty, so they don't last long. And it's easy to counterfeit. That is why banknotes were used later than coins.

general.g_text: 식혜는 한국의 전통 음료수입니다. 보통 모임이나 잔치에서 ( ㉠ ) 식혜를 마십니다. 이것은 식혜가 소화를 도와주기 때문입니다. 식혜는 달고 맛있어서 많은 사람들이 좋아합니다. 시원하게 마시면 더 좋습니다. 저는 식혜를 만드는 방법이 간단해서 자주 만들어 먹습니다. 하지만 만드는 데 시간이 오래 걸립니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Sikhye là một loại đồ uống truyền thống của Hàn Quốc. Mọi người thường uống Sikhye trong các buổi họp mặt hoặc các bữa tiệc ( ㉠ ). Điều này là do Sikhye giúp hỗ trợ tiêu hóa. Sikhye ngọt và ngon nên mọi người rất thích. Nếu uống lạnh thì sẽ càng ngon hơn. Cách làm Sikhye cũng đơn giản nên tôi thường tự làm và uống. Nhưng tốn khá nhiều thời gian để làm Sikhye.
g_text_translate.en: Sikhye is a traditional Korean beverage. Sikhye is usually drunk after eating food at a meeting or feast after eating food. Because Sikhye aids digestion. Sikhye is sweet and delicious, so many people like it. It is better to drink it cold. The method of making sikhye is simple, so I often make it myself and drink. But it takes a long time to make.
g_text_translate.fr:
Sikhye est une boisson coréenne traditionnelle. Sikhye est généralement ivre après avoir mangé de la nourriture lors d'une réunion ou d'un festin après avoir mangé de la nourriture. Parce que Sikhye facilite la digestion. Sikhye est doux et délicieux, tant de gens l'aiment. Il vaut mieux le boire froid. La méthode de fabrication du sikhye est simple, donc je le fais souvent moi-même et je bois. Mais c'est long à faire.

#######

Sikhye is a traditional Korean beverage. Sikhye is usually drunk after eating food at a meeting or feast after eating food. Because Sikhye aids digestion. Sikhye is sweet and delicious, so many people like it. It is better to drink it cold. The method of making sikhye is simple, so I often make it myself and drink. But it takes a long time to make.
g_text_translate.es:
Sikhye es una bebida tradicional coreana. Sikhye generalmente se bebe después de comer en una reunión o fiesta después de comer. Porque Sikhye ayuda a la digestión. Sikhye es dulce y delicioso, a mucha gente le gusta. Es mejor beberlo frío. El método para hacer sikhye es simple, por lo que a menudo lo hago yo mismo y lo bebo. Pero se necesita mucho tiempo para hacer.

#######

Sikhye adalah minuman tradisional Korea. Sikhye biasanya diminum setelah makan makanan pada pertemuan atau pesta setelah makan makanan. Karena Sikhye membantu pencernaan. Sikhye manis dan lezat, sehingga banyak orang menyukainya. Lebih baik diminum dalam keadaan dingin. Cara membuat sikhye sederhana, jadi saya sering membuatnya sendiri dan minum. Tapi butuh waktu lama untuk membuatnya.

Aber die Herstellung dauert lange.

general.g_text: 문제를 풀기 어려울 때는 책상 앞에만 앉아 있지 마십시오. 계속 앉아 있으면 좋은 생각이( ㉠ )않습니다. 그럴 때는 일어나서 걷는 것이 좋습니다. 걸으려고 꼭 밖으로 ( ㉡ ). 집 안도 좋고 사무실 안도 괜찮 습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Khi khó có thể giải quyết vấn đề đừng nên chỉ ngồi trước bàn làm việc. Nếu cứ liên tục ngồi trước bàn làm việc thì sẽ không ( ㉠ ) sáng kiến hay. Những lúc như vậy nên đứng dậy và đi bộ. Nếu muốn đi bộ thì ( ㉡ ). Ở trong nhà hay ở trong văn phòng cũng được.
g_text_translate.en: Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.fr:
Ne restez pas assis à votre bureau pour résoudre des problèmes. Si vous restez assis tout le temps, aucune bonne idée n'apparaîtra. Dans ce cas, il vaut mieux se lever et marcher. C'est bien de ne pas sortir pour marcher. Ni à la maison ni au bureau.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.es:
No se limite a sentarse en su escritorio cuando esté resolviendo problemas. Si sigues sentado todo el tiempo, no aparecerá una buena idea. En ese caso, es mejor levantarse y caminar. Está bien no salir a caminar. Ni en casa ni en la oficina.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.id:
Jangan hanya duduk di meja Anda saat memecahkan masalah. Jika Anda terus duduk sepanjang waktu, ide bagus tidak akan muncul. Dalam hal ini, lebih baik bangun dan berjalan. Tidak apa-apa untuk tidak pergi keluar untuk berjalan-jalan. Baik di rumah maupun di kantor.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.ja:
問題を解決するときは、机に座っているだけではいけません。ずっと座っていては、いいアイデアは浮かびません。その場合は、起き上がって歩くのがよいでしょう。散歩に出なくても大丈夫です。家でもオフィスでもない。

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.de:
Sitzen Sie nicht nur an Ihrem Schreibtisch, wenn Sie Probleme lösen. Wenn Sie die ganze Zeit sitzen bleiben, wird eine gute Idee nicht erscheinen. In diesem Fall ist es besser, aufzustehen und zu gehen. Es ist in Ordnung, nicht spazieren zu gehen. Weder zu Hause noch im Büro.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
解决问题时不要只是坐在办公桌前。如果你一直坐着，好主意就不会出现。在这种情况下，最好站起来走路。不出去走走也没关系。无论是在家里还是在办公室。

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
解決問題時不要只是坐在辦公桌前。如果你一直坐著，好主意就不會出現。在這種情況下，最好站起來走路。不出去走走也沒關係。無論是在家裡還是在辦公室。

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.it:
Non limitarti a sederti alla tua scrivania quando risolvi i problemi. Se rimani seduto tutto il tempo, la buona idea non apparirà. In tal caso, è meglio alzarsi e camminare. Va bene non uscire a camminare. Né a casa né in ufficio.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.ru:
Не сидите просто за столом, решая проблемы. Если вы будете все время сидеть, хорошая идея не появится. В этом случае лучше встать и пойти. Это нормально - не выходить гулять. Ни дома, ни в офисе.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.th:
อย่ามัวแต่นั่งที่โต๊ะเมื่อต้องแก้ไขปัญหา ถ้ามัวแต่นั่งเฉยๆ ความคิดดีๆ ก็จะไม่ปรากฏ ในกรณีนี้ควรลุกขึ้นเดินจะดีกว่า ไม่เป็นไรที่จะออกไปเดินเล่น ทั้งที่บ้านหรือในสำนักงาน

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.pt:
Não fique apenas sentado em sua mesa para resolver problemas. Se você ficar sentado o tempo todo, uma boa ideia não aparecerá. Nesse caso, é melhor levantar e caminhar. Não há problema em não sair para passear. Nem em casa nem no escritório.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.hi:
समस्याएँ सुलझाते समय केवल अपने डेस्क पर बैठे न रहें। अगर आप हर समय बैठे रहेंगे तो अच्छा विचार सामने नहीं आएगा। ऐसे में उठकर चलना ही बेहतर है। टहलने के लिए बाहर न निकलना ठीक है। न घर पर, न दफ्तर में.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.
g_text_translate.tr:
Sorunları çözerken sadece masanızda oturmayın. Sürekli oturursanız iyi bir fikir ortaya çıkmayacaktır. Bu durumda kalkıp yürümek daha iyidir. Yürüyüşe çıkmamak sorun değil. Ne evde, ne ofiste.

#######

Don't just sit at your desk when solving problems. If you keep sitting all the time,  good idea won't appear. In that case, it is better to get up and walk.  It's okay not to go out to walk. Neither at home nor in the office.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉡
1. Định đi ra ngoài
2. Có thể ra ngoài
3. Không ra ngoài cũng được
4. Quyết định không ra ngoài
--------------------
V + 려고 하다: Định làm gì
V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다: Có thể làm gì
V지 않아도 되다: Không làm gì cũng được
V기로 하다: Quyết định làm gì 

집 안도 좋고 사무실 안도 괜찮습니다: Ở trong nhà cũng được hay ở trong văn phòng cũng được. 

Như vậy thì đi bộ trong nhà cũng được chứ không nhất thiết phải ra ngoài.
explain.en:
Fill in <g>㉡</g> with an appropriate phrase:
1. Go out
2. Be able to go out
3. It's okay not to go out
4. Decide not to go out
--------------------
<g>V + 려고 하다</g>: Intend to, plan to
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다</g>: Can do something
<g>V + 지 않아도 되다</g>: Don't have to
<g>V + 기로 하다</g>: Decide to, promise to

<g>집 안도 좋고 사무실 안도 괜찮습니다</g>: It's okay to stay at home or in the office.

So it's okay to walk indoors, not necessarily outside.
explain.fr:

<g>V + 려고 하다</g>: avoir l'intention de, projeter de
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다</g>: Peut faire quelque chose
<g>V + 지 않아도 되다</g>: ne pas avoir à
<g>V + 기로 하다</g>: Décider de, promettre de

<g>집 안도 좋고 사무실 안도 괜찮습니다</g>: Vous pouvez rester à la maison ou au bureau.

Il est donc normal de marcher à l'intérieur, pas nécessairement à l'extérieur.

general.g_text: 우리 가족은( ㉠ )적이 없습니다. 그래서 저는 그동안 할머니께서 노래를 좋아하는 것을 몰랐습니다. 그런데 어젯밤에 할머니께서 공연 초대장을 주셨습니다. 그 공연에서 할머니가 노래를 하실 것입니다. 우리 가족은 공연에 가려고 합니다. 거기에서 할머니의 노래를 처음 듣게 될 것입니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Gia đình tôi chưa từng được ( ㉠ ). Vì vậy mà suốt thời gian qua tôi đã không biết bà tôi thích hát. Nhưng đêm hôm qua, bà đã cho tôi một tờ giấy mời đi xem biểu diễn. Bà tôi sẽ hát ở đó. Gia đình tôi định đi tới buổi biểu diễn này. Đó sẽ là nơi lần đầu tiên gia đình tôi được nghe bà hát.
g_text_translate.en: My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.fr:
Ma famille n'a jamais entendu grand-mère chanter. Alors pendant tout ce temps, je ne savais pas que ma grand-mère aimait chanter. Hier soir, elle m'a invité à sa représentation. Elle chantera à ce spectacle. Ma famille va à ce spectacle. C'est l'endroit où ma famille entendra notre grand-mère chanter pour la première fois.

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.es:
Mi familia nunca ha oído cantar a la abuela. Entonces, en todo ese tiempo, no sabía que a mi abuela le gustaba cantar. Anoche me invitó a su actuación. Ella cantará en ese show. Mi familia va a este espectáculo. Es el lugar donde mi familia escuchará cantar a nuestra abuela por primera vez.

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.id:
Keluarga saya belum pernah mendengar nenek bernyanyi. Jadi selama itu, saya tidak tahu nenek saya suka menyanyi. Tadi malam, dia memberi saya undangan untuk penampilannya. Dia akan bernyanyi di acara itu. Keluarga saya akan pergi ke acara ini. Ini adalah tempat di mana keluarga saya akan mendengar nenek kami bernyanyi untuk pertama kalinya.

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.ja:
私の家族はおばあちゃんが歌うのを聞いたことがありません。だからずっと、祖母が歌うのが好きだなんて知らなかった。昨夜、彼女は私に彼女のパフォーマンスへの招待をくれました。彼女はそのショーで歌います。私の家族はこのショーに行きます。私の家族が祖母の歌を初めて聞く場所です。

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.de:
Meine Familie hat Oma noch nie singen gehört. In all der Zeit wusste ich nicht, dass meine Großmutter gerne singt. Letzte Nacht hat sie mich zu ihrem Auftritt eingeladen. Sie wird bei dieser Show singen. Meine Familie geht zu dieser Show. Es ist der Ort, an dem meine Familie zum ersten Mal unsere Großmutter singen hören wird.

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我的家人从未听过奶奶唱歌。所以在那段时间里，我不知道我的祖母喜欢唱歌。昨晚，她邀请我去看她的演出。她将在那个节目中唱歌。我的家人要去看这个节目。这是我的家人第一次听到祖母唱歌的地方。

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:

#######

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. My family is going to this show. It is place where my family will hear our grandmother sing for the first time.
g_text_translate.it:

My family has never heard grandma sing. So in all that time, I didn't know my grandmother likes singing. Last night, she gave me an invitation to her performance. She will sing at that show. explain.vi:
Thông tin có thể biết được từ đoạn văn này là gì? 
1. Bà tôi thích hát. 
2. Gia đình tôi cùng nhau tập hát. 
3. Thỉnh thoảng bà mời chúng tôi tới buổi biểu diễn. 
4. Gia đình tôi đã đi xem buổi biểu diễn của bà tôi. 
--------------------
연습하다: Tập luyện, thực hành

할머니께서 노래를 좋아하는 것을 몰랐습니다: Chưa bao giờ nghe bà hát, vì vậy không biết bà thích hát.
explain.en:
What can we know from this passage?
1. My grandmother likes singing.
2. My family practices singing together.
3. Sometimes grandmother invites us to the performance.
4. My family went to see my grandmother's performance.
--------------------
<g>연습하다</g>: To practice

<g>할머니께서 노래를 좋아하는 것을 몰랐습니다</g> => I've never heard her sing, so I don't know if she likes singing.
explain.fr:
Que peut-on savoir de ce passage ?
1. Ma grand-mère aime chanter.
2. Ma famille pratique le chant ensemble.
3. Parfois, grand-mère nous invite au spectacle.
4. Ma famille est allée voir le spectacle de ma grand-mère.
--------------------
<g>연습하다</g>: S'entraîner

<g>할머니께서 노래를 좋아하는 것을 몰랐습니다</g>=> Je ne l'ai jamais entendue chanter, donc je ne sais pas si elle aime chanter.

general.g_text: 인주시청 앞 도로는 주말에 차가 다닐 수 없습니다. 복잡한 길을 걷기편한 거리로 ( ㉠ )인주시가 이곳을 ‘차 없는 거리’로 만든 것입니다.  사람들은 주말마다 이곳에서 자기가 안 쓰는 물건이나 직접 만든 물건을 사고 팝니다. 배가 고프면 길에서 김밥이나 아이스크림을 사 먹을 수도 있습니다.  자유롭고 밝은 분위기 때문에 젊은 사람들이 이곳을 많이 찾고 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Mọi người không thể đi lại trên con đường trước Tòa thị chính thành phố Inju vào cuối tuần. Thành phố Inju đã biến nơi này thành "Con đường không xe hơi" (   ㉠   ) con đường phức tạp đông đúc này thành con đường dễ đi bộ. Vào mỗi cuối tuần, ở đây mọi người bán và mua những thứ mình không dùng nữa hoặc những thứ mình tự làm. Nếu đói thì họ có thể mua và ăn kimbap hoặc kem ở trên con đường này. Vì bầu không khí rất tự do, thoải mái nên nhiều bạn trẻ đang tìm tới đây.
g_text_translate.en: People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. The city of Inju has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" in order to change this busy complicated road into an easy walkable street. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les gens ne peuvent pas marcher sur la route devant l'hôtel de ville d'Inju le week-end. La ville d'Inju a transformé cet endroit en une "route sans voiture" afin de transformer cette route compliquée et fréquentée en une rue piétonne facile. Chaque week-end, ici, les gens vendent et achètent des choses qu'ils n'utilisent plus ou qu'ils fabriquent eux-mêmes. S'ils ont faim, ils peuvent acheter et manger du kimbap ou de la glace dans cette rue. Parce que l'atmosphère est très libre et confortable, beaucoup de jeunes viennent ici.

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. The city of Inju has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" in order to change this busy complicated road into an easy walkable street. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.es:
La gente no puede caminar por la calle frente al Ayuntamiento de Inju los fines de semana. La ciudad de Inju ha convertido este lugar en una "carretera sin automóviles" para convertir esta concurrida y complicada calle en una calle fácil de caminar. Todos los fines de semana, aquí la gente vende y compra cosas que ya no usa o cosas que ellos mismos hacen. Si tienen hambre, pueden comprar y comer kimbap o helado en esta calle. Debido a que el ambiente es muy libre y cómodo, muchos jóvenes vienen aquí.

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. The city of Inju has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" in order to change this busy complicated road into an easy walkable street. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.id:
Orang tidak bisa berjalan di jalan di depan Balai Kota Inju pada akhir pekan. Kota Inju telah mengubah tempat ini menjadi "Jalan Bebas Mobil" untuk mengubah jalan rumit yang sibuk ini menjadi jalan yang mudah dilalui dengan berjalan kaki. Setiap akhir pekan, di sini orang-orang menjual dan membeli barang-barang yang sudah tidak digunakan lagi atau barang-barang yang mereka buat sendiri. Jika mereka lapar, mereka bisa membeli dan makan kimbap atau es krim di jalan ini. Karena suasananya yang sangat bebas dan nyaman, banyak anak muda yang datang ke sini.

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. The city of Inju has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" in order to change this busy complicated road into an easy walkable street. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.ja:
週末は仁州市役所前の道路を歩くことができません。インジュ市は、この交通量の多い複雑な道路を歩きやすい通りに変えるために、この場所を「自動車のない道路」に変えました。毎週末、使わなくなったものや自分で作ったものを売り買いします。お腹がすいたら、この通りでキムパプやアイスクリームを買って食べることができます。とても自由で居心地の良い雰囲気のため、多くの若者が訪れています。

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.de:
An Wochenenden dürfen Menschen nicht auf der Straße vor dem Rathaus von Inju laufen. Die Stadt Inju hat diesen Ort in eine „autofreie Straße“ verwandelt, um diese geschäftige, komplizierte Straße in eine leicht begehbare Straße zu verwandeln. Hier werden jedes Wochenende Dinge verkauft und gekauft, die sie nicht mehr brauchen oder selbst herstellen. Wenn sie hungrig sind, können sie in dieser Straße Kimbap oder Eis kaufen und essen. Da die Atmosphäre sehr frei und gemütlich ist, kommen viele junge Leute hierher.

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
周末，人们不能在仁州市市政厅前的路上行走。仁州市将这里变成了“无车路”，目的是将这条繁忙复杂的道路变成一条方便步行的街道。每个周末，人们在这里买卖不再使用的东西或自己制造的东西。如果他们饿了，他们可以在这条街上购买和吃紫菜包饭或冰淇淋。因为这里的气氛很自由舒适，所以很多年轻人都慕名而来。

#######

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
週末，人們不能在仁州市市政廳前的路上行走。仁州市將這裡變成了“無車路”，目的是將這條繁忙複雜的道路變成一條方便步行的街道。每個週末，人們在這裡買賣不再使用的東西或自己製造的東西。如果他們餓了，他們可以在這條街上購買和吃紫菜包飯或冰淇淋。因為這裡的氣氛很自由舒適，所以很多年輕人都慕名而來。

#######

g_text_translate.it:
Le persone non possono camminare sulla strada davanti al municipio di Inju nei fine settimana. La città di Inju ha trasformato questo luogo in una "strada senza auto" per trasformare questa strada trafficata e complicata in una strada facilmente percorribile. Ogni fine settimana qui le persone vendono e comprano cose che non usano più o cose che fanno da sé. Se hanno fame, possono comprare e mangiare kimbap o gelato in questa strada. Poiché l'atmosfera è molto libera e confortevole, molti giovani vengono qui.

#######

g_text_translate.ru:
По выходным люди не могут ходить по дороге перед мэрией Инджу. Город Инджу превратил это место в «Дорогу без автомобилей», чтобы превратить эту оживленную сложную дорогу в удобную для пешеходов улицу. Каждые выходные здесь люди продают и покупают вещи, которыми больше не пользуются, или вещи, которые делают сами. Если они голодны, они могут купить и съесть кимбап или мороженое на этой улице. Поскольку атмосфера очень свободная и комфортная, сюда приезжает много молодежи.

#######

ผู้คนไม่สามารถเดินบนถนนหน้าศาลาว่าการอินจูในช่วงสุดสัปดาห์ได้ เมืองอินจูได้เปลี่ยนสถานที่แห่งนี้ให้เป็น "ถนนปลอดรถยนต์" เพื่อเปลี่ยนถนนที่ซับซ้อนอันวุ่นวายนี้ให้กลายเป็นถนนที่สามารถเดินได้สบายๆ ทุกสุดสัปดาห์ ผู้คนจะขายและซื้อสิ่งที่พวกเขาไม่ได้ใช้แล้วหรือสิ่งที่พวกเขาทำเอง หากพวกเขาหิวก็สามารถซื้อและกินคิมบับหรือไอศกรีมได้บนถนนสายนี้ เนื่องจากมีบรรยากาศที่ว่างและสบายมาก จึงมีคนหนุ่มสาวจำนวนมากมาที่นี่

#######

As pessoas não podem andar na estrada em frente à Prefeitura de Inju nos finais de semana. A cidade de Inju transformou este lugar em uma "estrada sem carros", a fim de transformar esta estrada movimentada e complicada em uma rua fácil de percorrer. Todo fim de semana, aqui as pessoas vendem e compram coisas que não usam mais ou coisas que elas mesmas fazem. Se tiverem fome, podem comprar e comer kimbap ou sorvete nesta rua. Como o ambiente é muito livre e confortável, muitos jovens vêm para cá.

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. The city of Inju has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" in order to change this busy complicated road into an easy walkable street. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.hi:
सप्ताहांत में लोग इंजू सिटी हॉल के सामने सड़क पर नहीं चल सकते। इस व्यस्त जटिल सड़क को आसान चलने योग्य सड़क में बदलने के लिए इंजू शहर ने इस जगह को "कार-मुक्त सड़क" में बदल दिया है। हर सप्ताहांत, यहां लोग ऐसी चीजें बेचते और खरीदते हैं जिनका वे अब उपयोग नहीं करते या जो चीजें वे खुद बनाते हैं। यदि वे भूखे हैं, तो वे इस सड़क पर किम्बैप या आइसक्रीम खरीद और खा सकते हैं। चूँकि वातावरण बहुत स्वतंत्र और आरामदायक है, इसलिए कई युवा यहाँ आ रहे हैं।

#######

People cannot walk on the road in front of Inju City Hall on weekends. The city of Inju has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" in order to change this busy complicated road into an easy walkable street. Every weekend, here people sell and buy things they no longer use or things they make themselves. If they are hungry, they can buy and eat kimbap or ice cream on this street. Because the atmosphere is very free and comfortable, many young people are coming here.
g_text_translate.tr:
İnsanlar hafta sonları Inju Belediye Binası önündeki yolda yürüyemiyor. Inju şehri, bu yoğun ve karmaşık yolu kolay yürünebilir bir caddeye dönüştürmek için burayı "Arabasız Yol" haline getirdi. Her hafta sonu burada insanlar artık kullanmadıkları veya kendi yaptıkları şeyleri satıyor ve satın alıyorlar. Açlarsa bu sokakta kimbap veya dondurma alıp yiyebilirler. Atmosfer çok özgür ve rahat olduğundan pek çok genç buraya geliyor.

<g>복잡한 길을 걷기편한 거리로 ( 바꾸려고 ) 인주시가 이곳을 ‘차 없는 거리’로 만든 것입니다</g>: Inju Şehri, bu yoğun ve karmaşık yolu yürünebilir bir caddeye dönüştürmek için burayı "Arabasız Yol"a dönüştürdü.

#######

Fill in <g>㉠</g> with an appropriate phrase:
1. If you want to change
2. Despite the change
3. In order to change
4. Change but
--------------------
<g>걷기편한</g>: Easy to walk
<g>복잡하다</g>: Be complicated, crowded

<g>V + (으)려고</g>: Intend to, plan to

<g>복잡한 길을 걷기편한 거리로 ( 바꾸려고 ) 인주시가 이곳을 ‘차 없는 거리’로 만든 것입니다</g>: Inju City has turned this place into a "Car-Free Road" to change this busy complicated road into a walkable street.

general.g_text: 다음 달 15일부터 경기도 부천에서 국제만화축제가 열립니다. 축제에서는여러 나라의 만화를 볼 수 있습니다. 어릴 때 본 추억의 만화책부터 요즘 유행하는 만화책까지 다양하게 ( ㉠ ). 또 유명한 만화가의 사인도 받을 수 있습니다. 그리고 만화가들이 축제에 참가하는 사람들의 얼굴을 그려줍니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Từ ngày 15 tháng sau, Lễ hội Truyện tranh Quốc tế sẽ được tổ chức tại Bucheon, Gyeonggi. Tại lễ hội, khách tham quan có thể xem những bộ truyện tranh đến từ nhiều quốc gia khác nhau. Từ những bộ truyện chứa đựng ký ức tuổi thơ cho đến những bộ truyện tranh đang nổi tiếng gần đây ( ㉠ ) rất đa dạng, phong phú. Hơn nữa, khách tới tham quan cũng có thể xin được chữ ký từ những họa sĩ truyện tranh nổi tiếng này. Và họ cũng sẽ vẽ chân dung những người tham gia lễ hội.
g_text_translate.en: From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. They prepared a variety of comic books from childhood memories to popular comic books . Moreover, visitors can also get autographs from these famous manga artists. And they will also paint portraits of festival-goers.
g_text_translate.fr:
À partir du 15 du mois prochain, le Festival international de la bande dessinée se tiendra à Bucheon, Gyeonggi. Au festival, les visiteurs peuvent voir des bandes dessinées de nombreux pays différents. Ils ont préparé une variété de bandes dessinées allant des souvenirs d'enfance aux bandes dessinées populaires. De plus, les visiteurs peuvent également obtenir des autographes de ces célèbres artistes de manga. Et ils peindront aussi des portraits de festivaliers.

#######

From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. They prepared a variety of comic books from childhood memories to popular comic books . Moreover, visitors can also get autographs from these famous manga artists. And they will also paint portraits of festival-goers.
g_text_translate.es:
A partir del 15 del próximo mes, se llevará a cabo el Festival Internacional de Cómic en Bucheon, Gyeonggi. En el festival, los visitantes pueden ver cómics de muchos países diferentes. Prepararon una variedad de cómics, desde recuerdos de la infancia hasta cómics populares. Además, los visitantes también pueden obtener autógrafos de estos famosos artistas de manga. Y también pintarán retratos de asistentes al festival.

#######

From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. They prepared a variety of comic books from childhood memories to popular comic books . Moreover, visitors can also get autographs from these famous manga artists. And they will also paint portraits of festival-goers.
g_text_translate.id:
Mulai tanggal 15 bulan depan, Festival Komik Internasional akan diadakan di Bucheon, Gyeonggi. Di festival tersebut, pengunjung dapat melihat komik dari berbagai negara. Mereka menyiapkan berbagai buku komik dari kenangan masa kecil hingga buku komik populer. Selain itu, pengunjung juga bisa mendapatkan tanda tangan dari seniman manga terkenal ini. Dan mereka juga akan melukis potret pengunjung festival.

#######

From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. They prepared a variety of comic books from childhood memories to popular comic books . Moreover, visitors can also get autographs from these famous manga artists. And they will also paint portraits of festival-goers.
g_text_translate.ja:
来月15日から京畿道富川で国際漫画祭が開かれる。フェスティバルでは、来場者はさまざまな国の漫画を見ることができます。子供の頃の思い出から人気の漫画まで、様々な漫画を用意しました。さらに、来場者は有名漫画家のサインをもらうこともできます。また、彼らは祭りの来場者の肖像画も描きます。

#######

From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. They prepared a variety of comic books from childhood memories to popular comic books . Moreover, visitors can also get autographs from these famous manga artists. And they will also paint portraits of festival-goers.
g_text_translate.de:
Ab dem 15. nächsten Monats findet das Internationale Comic-Festival in Bucheon, Gyeonggi, statt. Auf dem Festival können die Besucher Comics aus vielen verschiedenen Ländern sehen. Sie bereiteten eine Vielzahl von Comics vor, von Kindheitserinnerungen bis hin zu beliebten Comics. Darüber hinaus können Besucher auch Autogramme von diesen berühmten Manga-Künstlern bekommen. Und sie werden auch Porträts von Festivalbesuchern malen.

#######

From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. g_text_translate.zh-CN:
下月15日起，国际漫画节将在京畿道富川市举行。在电影节上，游客可以看到来自许多不同国家的漫画。他们准备了从童年回忆到流行漫画的各种漫画书。此外，参观者还可以得到这些著名漫画家的签名。他们还将为参加节日的人画肖像。

g_text_translate.th:
ตั้งแต่วันที่ 15 ของเดือนหน้า เทศกาลการ์ตูนนานาชาติจะจัดขึ้นที่เมืองบูชอน จังหวัดคยองกี ในเทศกาลนี้ นักท่องเที่ยวสามารถชมการ์ตูนจากหลากหลายประเทศได้ พวกเขาเตรียมหนังสือการ์ตูนหลากหลายตั้งแต่ความทรงจำในวัยเด็กไปจนถึงหนังสือการ์ตูนยอดนิยม นอกจากนี้ ผู้เยี่ยมชมยังสามารถรับลายเซ็นต์จากนักวาดการ์ตูนชื่อดังเหล่านี้ได้อีกด้วย และพวกเขาจะวาดภาพเหมือนของผู้ที่มาร่วมงานเทศกาลด้วย

g_text_translate.pt:
A partir do dia 15 do próximo mês, o Festival Internacional de Quadrinhos será realizado em Bucheon, Gyeonggi. No festival, os visitantes podem ver quadrinhos de diversos países. Eles prepararam uma variedade de histórias em quadrinhos, desde memórias de infância até histórias em quadrinhos populares. Além disso, os visitantes também podem obter autógrafos desses famosos artistas de mangá. E também pintarão retratos de festivaleiros.

g_text_translate.hi:
अगले महीने की 15 तारीख से, अंतर्राष्ट्रीय हास्य महोत्सव बुचेन, ग्योंगगी में आयोजित किया जाएगा। महोत्सव में आगंतुक कई अलग-अलग देशों की कॉमिक्स देख सकते हैं। उन्होंने बचपन की यादों से लेकर लोकप्रिय कॉमिक पुस्तकों तक विभिन्न प्रकार की कॉमिक पुस्तकें तैयार कीं। इसके अलावा, आगंतुक इन प्रसिद्ध मंगा कलाकारों से ऑटोग्राफ भी प्राप्त कर सकते हैं। और वे उत्सव में आने वाले लोगों के चित्र भी बनाएंगे।

#######

From the 15th of next month, the International Comic Festival will be held in Bucheon, Gyeonggi. At the festival, visitors can see comics from many different countries. They prepared a variety of comic books from childhood memories to popular comic books . Moreover, visitors can also get autographs from these famous manga artists. And they will also paint portraits of festival-goers.
g_text_translate.tr:
Gelecek ayın 15'inden itibaren Uluslararası Çizgi Roman Festivali Bucheon, Gyeonggi'de düzenlenecek. Festivalde ziyaretçiler birçok farklı ülkeden çizgi romanları görebilecek. Çocukluk anılarından popüler çizgi romanlara kadar çok çeşitli çizgi romanlar hazırladılar. Ayrıca ziyaretçiler bu ünlü manga sanatçılarından da imza alabiliyor. Ayrıca festivale katılanların portrelerini de çizecekler.

general.g_text: 김지호 씨는 미용사입니다. 도시의 큰 미용실에서 일하고 있습니다. 손님이 많고 바쁘지만 한 달에 한 번은 시골의 작은 마을을 찾아갑니다. 거기서 사람들의 머리를 예쁘게 잘라 줍니다. 돈은 ( ㉠ ). 그 대신 마을사람들의 집에서 식사를 하면서 재미있는 이야기를 듣습니다. 김지호 씨는 그곳에 가는 날이 즐겁습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Kim Jiho là một thợ làm tóc. Cô ấy làm việc tại một tiệm làm tóc lớn trên thành phố. Dù tiệm rất đông khách và cô ấy cũng rất bận nhưng mỗi tháng Jiho vẫn về thăm ngôi làng nhỏ ở quê một lần. Tại đó, cô ấy cắt tóc thật đẹp cho mọi người. Và ( ㉠ ) tiền. Thay vào đó Jiho ăn cơm ở nhà những người dân trong làng và nghe những câu chuyện thú vị họ kể. Kim Jiho rất vui khi được đến đó.
g_text_translate.en: Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.
g_text_translate.fr:
Kim Jiho est coiffeuse. Elle travaille dans un grand salon de coiffure de la ville. Bien que le salon soit très fréquenté et qu'elle soit également très occupée, Jiho visite toujours le petit village de sa ville natale une fois par mois. Là, elle coupe magnifiquement les cheveux de tout le monde. Et elle n'accepte pas d'argent. Au lieu de cela, Jiho mange dans les maisons des villageois et entend des histoires intéressantes qu'ils ont racontées. Kim Jiho aime y aller.

#######

Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.
g_text_translate.es:
Kim Jiho es peluquera. Trabaja en una gran peluquería de la ciudad. Aunque el salón está muy lleno y ella también está muy ocupada, Jiho todavía visita el pequeño pueblo de su ciudad natal una vez al mes. Allí, ella les corta el cabello a todos maravillosamente. Y ella no acepta dinero. En cambio, Jiho come en las casas de los aldeanos y escucha historias interesantes que cuentan. Kim Jiho disfruta yendo allí.

Kim Jiho adalah seorang penata rambut. Dia bekerja di salon rambut besar di kota. Meski salonnya sangat ramai dan dia juga sangat sibuk, tapi Jiho tetap mengunjungi desa kecil di kampung halamannya sebulan sekali. Di sana, dia memotong rambut semua orang dengan indah. Dan dia tidak menerima uang. Sebaliknya, Jiho makan di rumah penduduk desa dan mendengar cerita menarik yang mereka ceritakan. Kim Jiho senang pergi ke sana.

g_text_translate.ja:
キム・ジホは美容師。彼女は都内の大手美容院で働いています。サロンはとても混んでいて、彼女もとても忙しいですが、ジホは今でも月に一度、故郷の小さな村を訪れています.そこで、彼女はみんなの髪を美しくカットします。そして彼女はお金を受け取りません。代わりに、ジホは村人の家で食事をし、彼らが語った興味深い話を聞きます.キム・ジホはそこに行くのが好きです。

Ким Джихо — парикмахер. Она работает в большой парикмахерской в ​​городе. Хотя в салоне очень многолюдно и она тоже очень занята, Джихо все равно раз в месяц посещает небольшую деревню в своем родном городе. Там она всем красиво стрижёт. И она не принимает деньги. Вместо этого Джихо ест в домах жителей деревни и слушает интересные истории, которые они рассказывают. Ким Джихо любит туда ходить.

#######

Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.
g_text_translate.th:
คิมจีโฮเป็นช่างทำผม เธอทำงานที่ร้านทำผมขนาดใหญ่ในเมือง แม้ว่าร้านเสริมสวยจะแน่นไปด้วยผู้คนและเธอก็ยุ่งมากเช่นกัน แต่จีโฮก็ยังคงไปเยี่ยมหมู่บ้านเล็กๆ ในบ้านเกิดของเธอเดือนละครั้ง ที่นั่นเธอตัดผมของทุกคนอย่างสวยงาม และเธอไม่รับเงิน จีโฮกลับไปกินข้าวที่บ้านของชาวบ้านและฟังเรื่องราวที่น่าสนใจที่พวกเขาเล่าให้ฟัง คิมจีโฮสนุกกับการไปที่นั่น

#######

Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.
g_text_translate.pt:
Kim Jiho é cabeleireira. Ela trabalha em um grande salão de cabeleireiro da cidade. Embora o salão esteja muito lotado e ela também esteja muito ocupada, Jiho ainda visita a pequena vila em sua cidade natal uma vez por mês. Lá, ela corta lindamente o cabelo de todo mundo. E ela não aceita dinheiro. Em vez disso, Jiho come nas casas dos moradores e ouve histórias interessantes que eles contam. Kim Jiho gosta de ir para lá.

#######

Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.
g_text_translate.hi:
किम जिहो एक हेयरड्रेसर हैं। वह शहर के एक बड़े हेयर सैलून में काम करती है। हालाँकि सैलून में बहुत भीड़ होती है और वह बहुत व्यस्त भी रहती है, लेकिन जिहो अभी भी महीने में एक बार अपने गृहनगर के छोटे से गाँव में जाती है। वहां वह सबके बाल खूबसूरती से काटती हैं. और वह पैसे नहीं लेती. इसके बजाय, जिहो ग्रामीणों के घरों में खाना खाता है और उनके द्वारा बताई गई दिलचस्प कहानियाँ सुनता है। किम जिहो को वहां जाना अच्छा लगता है.

#######

Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.
g_text_translate.tr:
Kim Jiho bir kuafördür. Şehirdeki büyük bir kuaförde çalışıyor. Salon çok kalabalık olmasına ve kendisi de çok meşgul olmasına rağmen Jiho yine de ayda bir memleketindeki küçük köyü ziyaret ediyor. Orada herkesin saçını güzelce kesiyor. Ve para kabul etmiyor. Bunun yerine Jiho, köylülerin evlerinde yemek yiyor ve onların anlattıkları ilginç hikayeleri dinliyor. Kim Jiho oraya gitmekten hoşlanıyor.

#######

Kim Jiho is a hairdresser. She works at a big hair salon in the city. Although the salon is very crowded and she is also very busy, but Jiho still visits the small village in her hometown once a month. There, she cuts everyone's hair beautifully. And she doesn't accept money. Instead, Jiho eats at the villagers' houses and hears interesting stories they told. Kim Jiho enjoys going there.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 김지호 씨는 바쁠 때 시골에 가지 못합니다.
도시보다 시골의 작은 마을에 손님이 더 많습니다.
마을 사람들은 김지호 씨 이야기를 재미있게 듣습니다.
김지호 씨는 시골 사람들과 함께 있는 시간을 좋아합니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn. 
1. Khi bận Kim Jiho không thể về quê được. 
2. Những ngôi làng nhỏ ở nông thôn có nhiều khách hơn là ở thành phố. 
3. Dân làng thích thú nghe câu chuyện của Kim Jiho. 
4. Jiho Kim thích dành thời gian với những người dân vùng nông thôn. 
--------------------
김지호 씨는 그곳에 가는 날이 즐겁습니다. 

Jiho rất vui khi được tới và ở đó cùng với những người dân vùng thôn quê.
explain.en:

1. When Kim Jiho is busy, he can't go back to his hometown.
2. Small villages in the countryside have more visitors than in the cities.
3. Villagers enjoyed hearing Kim Jiho's story.
4. Jiho Kim likes to spend time with the people in the countryside.
--------------------
<g>김지호 씨는 그곳에 가는 날이 즐겁습니다. </g>

general.g_text: 우리 집에는 나무가 하나 있습니다. 제가 태어났을 때 우리 아버지가 심으신 것입니다. 그래서 저하고 나이가 같습니다. 어릴 때는 그 나무가 저보다 작았는데 지금은 저보다 큽니다. 제가 물을 주고 키워서 나무와정이 많이 들었습니다. 그러나 이제 그 나무와 헤어져야 합니다. 다음 주에 우리 가족이 이사를 하기 때문입니다. 저는 그 나무가 무척 ( ㉠ ).

g_text_translate.vi: Nhà tôi có một cái cây. Đây là cái cây bố tôi trồng khi tôi được sinh ra. Vì vậy nó bằng tuổi với tôi. Khi còn nhỏ, cái cây thấp hơn tôi nhưng bây giờ nó đã cao hơn tôi rồi. Tôi đã tưới nước và chăm sóc cái cây nên có rất nhiều tình cảm với nó. Nhưng bây giờ tôi sắp phải chia tay với cây. Bởi vì tháng sau gia đình tôi sẽ chuyển nhà. Tôi ( ㉠ ) cái cây đó.
g_text_translate.en: I have a tree in my house. This is the tree my father planted when I was born. So it's the same age as me. When I was a child, the tree was shorter than me but now it is taller than me. I have watered and taken care of the tree, so I have a lot of love for it. But now, I am about to part with the tree. Because next month my family will move this house. I will miss that tree.
g_text_translate.fr:
J'ai un arbre chez moi. C'est l'arbre que mon père a planté quand je suis né. C'est donc le même âge que moi. Quand j'étais enfant, l'arbre était plus petit que moi mais maintenant il est plus grand que moi. J'ai arrosé et pris soin de l'arbre, donc j'ai beaucoup d'amour pour lui. Mais maintenant, je suis sur le point de me séparer de l'arbre. Parce que le mois prochain ma famille déménagera cette maison. Cet arbre va me manquer.

#######

I have a tree in my house. This is the tree my father planted when I was born. So it's the same age as me. When I was a child, the tree was shorter than me but now it is taller than me. I have watered and taken care of the tree, so I have a lot of love for it. But now, I am about to part with the tree. Because next month my family will move this house. I will miss that tree.
g_text_translate.es:
Tengo un árbol en mi casa. Este es el árbol que plantó mi padre cuando nací. Así que tiene la misma edad que yo. Cuando era niño, el árbol era más bajo que yo, pero ahora es más alto que yo. He regado y cuidado el árbol, así que le tengo mucho cariño. Pero ahora, estoy a punto de separarme del árbol. Porque el próximo mes mi familia mudará esta casa. Echaré de menos ese árbol.

#######

I have a tree in my house. This is the tree my father planted when I was born. So it's the same age as me. When I was a child, the tree was shorter than me but now it is taller than me. I have watered and taken care of the tree, so I have a lot of love for it. But now, I am about to part with the tree. Because next month my family will move this house. I will miss that tree.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya punya pohon di rumah saya. Ini adalah pohon yang ditanam ayahku ketika aku lahir. Jadi seumuran denganku. Ketika saya masih kecil, pohon itu lebih pendek dari saya tetapi sekarang lebih tinggi dari saya. Saya telah menyiram dan merawat pohon itu, jadi saya sangat menyukainya. Tapi sekarang, saya akan berpisah dengan pohon itu. Karena bulan depan keluarga saya akan pindah rumah ini. Aku akan merindukan pohon itu.

Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠
1. Sẽ (rất) nhớ
2. Đã (rất) nhớ
3. Đang trở nên (rất) đẹp hơn

Çocukluğundan beri ağacı sulayan ve ona bakan karakter, bu yüzden ev taşımak zorunda kalıp ağaçtan ayrılmak zorunda kaldığında çok üzülüyor.

#######

Choose the answer that matches the passage's content:
1. I will move house and plant trees.
2. I'm sad to have to part with the tree.
3. I can't move house because of the tree.
4. I will go to that house when I miss the tree.
--------------------
The character watered and cared for the tree since he was a child, so he is very sad when he has to move house and part with the tree.

general.g_text: 저는 어제 친구하고 재미있는 옷 가게에 갔습니다. 그 가게에서는 우리가 티셔츠의 그림을 직접 그릴 수 있습니다. 그림을 그려서 주면 그것을 티셔츠로 만들어 줍니다. 어제 우리는 티셔츠를 하나씩 만들어 입었습니다. 같은 티셔츠를 입으니까 친구가 더 소중하게 느껴졌습니다. 그 옷을( ㉠ ) 친구가 생각날 것 같습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm qua tôi đã cùng bạn đi tới một cửa hàng quần áo rất thú vị. Ở cửa hàng đó, chúng tôi có thể tự tay vẽ bức tranh sẽ hiện lên trên chiếc áo phông của mình. Nếu vẽ một bức tranh và đưa nó cho cửa hàng, họ sẽ biến nó thành một chiếc áo. Hôm qua chúng tôi đã làm cho mỗi người một chiếc áo phông rồi mặc. Vì cùng mặc chiếc áo phông giống nhau nên tôi cảm thấy trân quý bạn của mình hơn. ( ㉠ ) mặc chiếc áo đó tôi sẽ nhớ tới bạn của mình.
g_text_translate.en: I went to a fun clothing store with a friend yesterday. In that store, we can draw our own drawings of t-shirts. If you draw a picture and give it to the store, they turn it into a T-shirt. Yesterday we made and wore T-shirts one by one. Wearing the same T-shirt made my friend feel more precious. Every time I wear that T-shirt, I think of my friend.
g_text_translate.fr:
Je suis allé dans un magasin de vêtements amusant avec un ami hier. Dans ce magasin, nous pouvons dessiner nos propres dessins de t-shirts. Si vous faites un dessin et que vous le donnez au magasin, ils le transforment en t-shirt. Hier, nous avons fabriqué et porté des T-shirts un par un. Porter le même T-shirt a rendu mon ami plus précieux. Chaque fois que je porte ce T-shirt, je pense à mon ami.

#######

I went to a fun clothing store with a friend yesterday. In that store, we can draw our own drawings of t-shirts. If you draw a picture and give it to the store, they turn it into a T-shirt. Yesterday we made and wore T-shirts one by one. Wearing the same T-shirt made my friend feel more precious. Every time I wear that T-shirt, I think of my friend.
g_text_translate.es:
Fui a una tienda de ropa divertida con un amigo ayer. En esa tienda podemos dibujar nuestros propios dibujos de camisetas. Si haces un dibujo y lo das a la tienda, lo convierten en una camiseta. Ayer hicimos y vestimos camisetas una a una. Usar la misma camiseta hizo que mi amiga se sintiera más preciosa. Cada vez que me pongo esa camiseta, pienso en mi amigo.

#######

I went to a fun clothing store with a friend yesterday. In that store, we can draw our own drawings of t-shirts. If you draw a picture and give it to the store, they turn it into a T-shirt. Yesterday we made and wore T-shirts one by one. Wearing the same T-shirt made my friend feel more precious. Every time I wear that T-shirt, I think of my friend.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya pergi ke toko pakaian yang menyenangkan dengan seorang teman kemarin. Di toko itu, kita bisa menggambar gambar kaos kita sendiri. Jika Anda menggambar dan memberikannya ke toko, mereka mengubahnya menjadi T-shirt. Kemarin kami membuat dan memakai kaos satu per satu. Mengenakan T-shirt yang sama membuat teman saya merasa lebih berharga. Setiap kali saya memakai T-shirt itu, saya memikirkan teman saya.

#######

I went to a fun clothing store with a friend yesterday. In that store, we can draw our own drawings of t-shirts. If you draw a picture and give it to the store, they turn it into a T-shirt. Yesterday we made and wore T-shirts one by one. Wearing the same T-shirt made my friend feel more precious. Every time I wear that T-shirt, I think of my friend.
g_text_translate.ja:
昨日、友達と楽しい衣料品店に行きました。その店では、Tシャツに自分の絵を描くことができます。描いた絵をお店に渡すと、Tシャツにしてくれます。昨日はTシャツを一枚ずつ作って着ました。同じTシャツを着ていると、友達がより貴重な気分になりました.そのTシャツを着るたびに、友達のことを考えます。

#######

I went to a fun clothing store with a friend yesterday. In that store, we can draw our own drawings of t-shirts. If you draw a picture and give it to the store, they turn it into a T-shirt. Yesterday we made and wore T-shirts one by one. Wearing the same T-shirt made my friend feel more precious. Every time I wear that T-shirt, I think of my friend.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich war gestern mit einem Freund in einem lustigen Bekleidungsgeschäft. In diesem Geschäft können wir unsere eigenen T-Shirt-Zeichnungen zeichnen. Wenn du ein Bild zeichnest und es dem Laden gibst, verwandeln sie es in ein T-Shirt. Gestern haben wir eins nach dem anderen T-Shirts gemacht und getragen. Dasselbe T-Shirt zu tragen gab meinem Freund das Gefühl, wertvoller zu sein. Jedes Mal, wenn ich dieses T-Shirt trage, denke ich an meinen Freund.

g_text_translate.hi:
मैं कल एक दोस्त के साथ एक मज़ेदार कपड़ों की दुकान पर गया था। उस स्टोर में, हम टी-शर्ट के अपने चित्र बना सकते हैं। यदि आप कोई चित्र बनाकर स्टोर को देते हैं, तो वे उसे टी-शर्ट में बदल देते हैं। कल हमने एक-एक करके टी-शर्ट बनाई और पहनी। वही टी-शर्ट पहनने से मेरे दोस्त को और भी कीमती महसूस हुआ। जब भी मैं वह टी-शर्ट पहनता हूं, मैं अपने दोस्त के बारे में सोचता हूं।

Dün tişörtleri tek tek yapıp giydik. Aynı tişörtü giymek arkadaşımın kendisini daha değerli hissetmesini sağladı. O tişörtü her giydiğimde aklıma arkadaşım geliyor.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 저는 친구의 티셔츠를 사러 가게에 갔습니다.
가게에서 우리가 원하는 그림을 그려 주었습니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn. 
1. Hôm qua tôi đã đi xem áo phông với bạn. 
2. Tôi đến cửa hàng để mua áo thun của bạn tôi. 
3. Cửa hàng đã vẽ cho chúng tôi bức tranh chúng tôi muốn. 
4. Chúng tôi mặc những chiếc áo thun giống nhau và cảm thấy gần gũi hơn. 
--------------------

general.g_text: 저는 자기 전에 하루를 정리하면서 메모를 합니다. 먼저 오늘 일어난 일 중에서 잘 한 일 세 가지를 씁니다. 그렇게 하면 힘든 하루를 조금 잊을 수 있습니다. 그 다음에는 내일 할 일을 ( ㉠ ). 그러면 중요한 일을 잊어버리지 않아서 좋습니다. 이렇게 메모를 하면 생각만 할 때보다 하루 하루를 훨씬 더 잘 정리할 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trước khi đi ngủ tôi thường sắp xếp lại một ngày của mình và ghi chú lại. Đầu tiên, tôi viết 3 việc mình đã làm tốt trong những việc xảy ra ngày hôm nay. Nếu làm vậy tôi có thể quên đi một chút về một ngày mệt mỏi của mình. Sau đó tôi sẽ ( ㉠ ) việc của ngày mai. Sẽ tốt hơn khi làm vậy vì tôi sẽ không quên những việc quan trọng. Nếu ghi chú như vậy tôi có thể sắp xếp một ngày của mình hiệu quả hơn nhiều so với việc chỉ nghĩ về nó.
g_text_translate.en: Before going to bed, I usually organize my day and take notes. First, I write down 3 things I did well in today's events. If I do that, I can forget a bit about my tiring day. Then I will try noting tomorrow's work. It's better to do that because I won't forget the important things. If I take notes like that, I can organize my day much more effectively than just thinking about it.
g_text_translate.fr:
Avant d'aller me coucher, j'organise généralement ma journée et je prends des notes. Tout d'abord, j'écris 3 choses que j'ai bien faites dans les événements d'aujourd'hui. Si je fais ça, je peux oublier un peu ma journée fatigante. Ensuite, je vais essayer de noter le travail de demain. C'est mieux de faire ça parce que je n'oublierai pas les choses importantes. Si je prends des notes comme ça, je peux organiser ma journée beaucoup plus efficacement que de simplement y penser.

#######

Before going to bed, I usually organize my day and take notes. First, I write down 3 things I did well in today's events. If I do that, I can forget a bit about my tiring day. Then I will try noting tomorrow's work. It's better to do that because I won't forget the important things. If I take notes like that, I can organize my day much more effectively than just thinking about it.
g_text_translate.es:
Antes de acostarme, suelo organizar mi día y tomar notas. Primero, escribo 3 cosas que hice bien en los eventos de hoy. Si hago eso, puedo olvidarme un poco de mi agotador día. Entonces intentaré anotar el trabajo de mañana. Es mejor hacer eso porque no olvidaré las cosas importantes. Si tomo notas así, puedo organizar mi día de manera mucho más efectiva que solo pensar en ello.

#######

Jika saya melakukan itu, saya bisa melupakan sedikit tentang hari saya yang melelahkan. Kemudian saya akan mencoba mencatat pekerjaan besok. Lebih baik melakukan itu karena saya tidak akan melupakan hal-hal penting. Jika saya membuat catatan seperti itu, saya dapat mengatur hari saya jauh lebih efektif daripada hanya memikirkannya.

g_text_translate.ja:

#######

Es ist besser, das zu tun, weil ich die wichtigen Dinge nicht vergesse. Wenn ich mir solche Notizen mache, kann ich meinen Tag viel effektiver gestalten, als nur darüber nachzudenken.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn. 
1. (Nhân vật) viết những việc đã làm sai trong ngày rồi sắp xếp lại. 
2. (Nhân vật) thức dậy vào buổi sáng và viết những việc mình sẽ làm hôm nay. 
3. (Nhân vật) ghi lại những việc mình đã quên trước khi đi ngủ. 
4. (Nhân vật) vừa ghi chú vừa nghĩ về những việc trong ngày. 
--------------------
Ghi lại những việc mình đã làm tốt trong ngày khiến tâm trạng của nhân vật trở nên tốt hơn (tức là nhân vật ghi và nghĩ về chúng). 
Hoặc có thể dùng phương pháp loại trừ, ba đáp án trên đều khác với nội dung đoạn văn.
explain.en:
Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage.
1. I write down the things I did wrong during the day and rearrange them.
2. I wake up in the morning and write down what I want to do today.
3. I take notes of things I forgot before going to bed.
4. I take notes and think about the day's work. 
--------------------
Jot down things the character did well during the day that made his mood better (i.e., the character records and thinks about them).
Or you can use the exclusion method, the three answers above are all different from the content of the passage.
explain.fr:
Choisissez la réponse qui correspond au contenu du passage.
1. J'écris les choses que j'ai mal faites pendant la journée et je les réorganise.
2. Je me lève le matin et j'écris ce que je veux faire aujourd'hui.
3. Je note les choses que j'ai oubliées avant d'aller me coucher.
4. Je prends des notes et je réfléchis au travail de la journée.
--------------------
Notez les choses que le personnage a bien faites pendant la journée et qui ont amélioré son humeur (c'est-à-dire que le personnage les enregistre et y pense).
Ou vous pouvez utiliser la méthode d'exclusion, les trois réponses ci-dessus sont toutes différentes du contenu du passage.

#######

2. I wake up in the morning and write down what I want to do today.
3. I take notes of things I forgot before going to bed.
4. I take notes and think about the day's work. 
--------------------

Or you can use the exclusion method, the three answers above are all different from the content of the passage.

1. Escribo las cosas que hice mal durante el día y las reorganizo.

3. Tomo notas de las cosas que olvidé antes de acostarme.
4. Tomo notas y pienso en el trabajo del día.
--------------------
Anote las cosas que el personaje hizo bien durante el día que mejoraron su estado de ánimo (es decir, el personaje las registra y piensa en ellas).
O puede usar el método de exclusión, las tres respuestas anteriores son todas diferentes del contenido del pasaje.

explain.id:
Pilihlah jawaban yang sesuai dengan isi bacaan.
1. Saya menulis kesalahan yang saya lakukan sepanjang hari dan mengaturnya kembali.
2. Saya bangun di pagi hari dan menuliskan apa yang ingin saya lakukan hari ini.
3. Saya mencatat hal-hal yang saya lupa sebelum tidur.
4. Saya mencatat dan memikirkan pekerjaan hari itu.
--------------------
Catat hal-hal yang dilakukan karakter dengan baik sepanjang hari yang membuat suasana hatinya lebih baik (yaitu, karakter merekam dan memikirkannya).
Atau Anda bisa menggunakan metode eksklusi, ketiga jawaban di atas semuanya berbeda dengan isi bacaan.

explain.de:

--------------------

Oder Sie können die Ausschlussmethode verwenden, die drei obigen Antworten unterscheiden sich alle vom Inhalt der Passage.

记下角色在白天做得好的使他的心情更好的事情（即角色记录和思考它们）。
或者你可以使用排除法，以上三个答案都与文章内容不同。

general.g_text: 꽃이나 나무가 오래 살려면 물과 공기, 햇빛이 중요합니다. ( ㉠ )막으려면 화분을 한곳에 모아 놓아야 합니다. 물에 젖은 수건을 화분 아래에 놓는 것도 좋은 방법입니다. 또 집안에서 공기가 잘 통할 수 있게 방문을 열어 놓으면 좋습니다. 마지막으로, 여행을 오래 할 때는 햇빛이 잘 들어오지 않는 곳에 화분을 놓는 것이 좋습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Nước, không khí và ánh sáng rất quan trọng để hoa hoặc cây cối có thể sống lâu. Nếu muốn ngăn ( ㉠ ) thì phải gom các chậu hoa lại về một chỗ. Đặt khăn ướt dưới chậu hoa cũng là một phương pháp không tồi. Ngoài ra bạn nên mở cửa phòng để không khí trong nhà được thông thoáng. Cuối cùng, nếu đi du lịch dài ngày, bạn nên đặt chậu cây ở nơi nhận được ít ánh sáng mặt trời.
g_text_translate.en: Water, air and light are important for a flower or a plant to live a long time. If you want to prevent water from evaporating quickly, you have to gather the flower pots in one place. Putting wet towels under the flower pots is also a good method. In addition, you should open the room door to let the indoor air circulate. Finally, if you are traveling for a long time, you should put the potted plant in a place that receives little sunlight.
g_text_translate.fr:
L'eau, l'air et la lumière sont importants pour qu'une fleur ou une plante vive longtemps. Si vous voulez éviter que l'eau ne s'évapore rapidement, vous devez rassembler les pots de fleurs en un seul endroit. Mettre des serviettes humides sous les pots de fleurs est également une bonne méthode. De plus, vous devez ouvrir la porte de la pièce pour laisser circuler l'air intérieur. Enfin, si vous voyagez longtemps, placez la plante en pot dans un endroit peu ensoleillé.

#######

Water, air and light are important for a flower or a plant to live a long time. If you want to prevent water from evaporating quickly, you have to gather the flower pots in one place. Putting wet towels under the flower pots is also a good method. In addition, you should open the room door to let the indoor air circulate. Finally, if you are traveling for a long time, you should put the potted plant in a place that receives little sunlight.
g_text_translate.es:
El agua, el aire y la luz son importantes para que una flor o una planta viva mucho tiempo. Si quieres evitar que el agua se evapore rápidamente, tienes que juntar las macetas en un solo lugar. Poner toallas mojadas debajo de las macetas también es un buen método. Además, debe abrir la puerta de la habitación para que circule el aire interior. Por último, si vas a viajar durante mucho tiempo, debes colocar la planta en maceta en un lugar que reciba poca luz solar.

#######

Menempatkan handuk basah di bawah pot bunga juga merupakan metode yang baik. Selain itu, Anda harus membuka pintu kamar agar udara dalam ruangan bersirkulasi. Terakhir, jika Anda bepergian untuk waktu yang lama, sebaiknya letakkan tanaman pot di tempat yang sedikit mendapat sinar matahari.

Auch nasse Tücher unter die Blumentöpfe zu legen, ist eine gute Methode. Außerdem sollten Sie die Zimmertür öffnen, um die Raumluft zirkulieren zu lassen. Wenn Sie längere Zeit unterwegs sind, sollten Sie die Topfpflanze schließlich an einen Ort stellen, der wenig Sonnenlicht erhält.

g_text_translate.tr:
Bir çiçeğin veya bitkinin uzun süre yaşayabilmesi için su, hava ve ışık önemlidir. Suyun çabuk buharlaşmasını önlemek istiyorsanız saksıları tek bir yerde toplamalısınız. Saksıların altına ıslak havlu koymak da iyi bir yöntemdir. Ayrıca oda kapısını açarak içerideki havanın dolaşmasını sağlamalısınız. Son olarak uzun süre seyahat ediyorsanız saksı bitkisini az güneş ışığı alan bir yere koymalısınız.

#######

Water, air and light are important for a flower or a plant to live a long time. If you want to prevent water from evaporating quickly, you have to gather the flower pots in one place. Putting wet towels under the flower pots is also a good method. In addition, you should open the room door to let the indoor air circulate. Finally, if you are traveling for a long time, you should put the potted plant in a place that receives little sunlight.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn. 
1. Phải đặt khăn trong chậu hoa. 
2. Phải chia chậu hoa ra nhiều phòng. 
3. Phải mở cửa để không khí được thông thoáng. 
4. Trước khi đi du lịch phải để chậu hoa dưới ánh nắng mặt trời. 
--------------------
공기가 잘 통하다: Thoáng khí, thoáng gió

V + 아/어야 하다: Phải làm gì
V + 게 하다: Để
explain.en:
Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage.
1. Have to put the towel in the flower pot.
2. Have to divide the flower pot into many rooms.
3. Doors must be opened for ventilation.
4. Before traveling, you must leave the flower pot under the sun.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Breathable

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: What should be done
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (do something) - Express purpose.
explain.fr:
Choisissez la réponse qui correspond au contenu du passage.
1. Il faut mettre la serviette dans le pot de fleurs.
2. Vous devez diviser le pot de fleurs en plusieurs pièces.
3. Les portes doivent être ouvertes pour la ventilation.
4. Avant de voyager, vous devez laisser le pot de fleurs au soleil.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Respirant

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: Qu'est-ce qui devrait être fait
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: Pour (faire quelque chose) - Exprimer un but.

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: What should be done
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (do something) - Express purpose.

เลือกคำตอบที่ตรงกับเนื้อหาของข้อความ
1.ต้องเอาผ้าเช็ดตัวไปวางในกระถาง
2.ต้องแบ่งกระถางเป็นหลายห้อง
3. ต้องเปิดประตูเพื่อการระบายอากาศ
4.ก่อนเดินทางต้องทิ้งกระถางไว้กลางแดด
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: ระบายอากาศได้

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: ควรทำอย่างไร
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: เพื่อ (ทำบางสิ่ง) - วัตถุประสงค์ด่วน

#######

Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage.
1. Have to put the towel in the flower pot.
2. Have to divide the flower pot into many rooms.
3. Doors must be opened for ventilation.
4. Before traveling, you must leave the flower pot under the sun.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Breathable

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: What should be done
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (do something) - Express purpose.
explain.pt:
Escolha a resposta que corresponde ao conteúdo da passagem.
1. Tem que colocar a toalha no vaso de flores.
2. Tem que dividir o vaso de flores em vários quartos.
3. As portas devem ser abertas para ventilação.
4. Antes de viajar, você deve deixar o vaso ao sol.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Respirável

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: O que deveria ser feito
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: Para (fazer algo) - Expressar propósito.

#######

Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage.
1. Have to put the towel in the flower pot.
2. Have to divide the flower pot into many rooms.
3. Doors must be opened for ventilation.
4. Before traveling, you must leave the flower pot under the sun.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Breathable

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: What should be done
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (do something) - Express purpose.
explain.hi:
वह उत्तर चुनें जो अनुच्छेद की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।
1. गमले में तौलिया लगाना है.
2. फ्लावर पॉट को कई कमरों में बांटना है.
3. वेंटिलेशन के लिए दरवाजे खुले होने चाहिए।
4. यात्रा से पहले आपको गमले को धूप में जरूर रखना चाहिए।
------------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: सांस लेने योग्य

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: क्या किया जाए
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: करना (कुछ करना) - उद्देश्य व्यक्त करना।

#######

Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage.
1. Have to put the towel in the flower pot.
2. Have to divide the flower pot into many rooms.
3. Doors must be opened for ventilation.
4. Before traveling, you must leave the flower pot under the sun.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Breathable

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: What should be done
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (do something) - Express purpose.
explain.tr:
Parçanın içeriğine uygun cevabı seçin.
1. Havluyu saksıya koymalısınız.
2. Saksıyı birçok odaya bölmek zorundasınız.
3. Havalandırma için kapılar açılmalıdır.
4. Seyahate çıkmadan önce saksıyı güneş altında bırakmalısınız.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Nefes alabilir

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: Ne yapılmalı
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (bir şey yapmak) - Amacı ifade etmek.

#######

Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage.
1. Have to put the towel in the flower pot.
2. Have to divide the flower pot into many rooms.
3. Doors must be opened for ventilation.
4. Before traveling, you must leave the flower pot under the sun.
--------------------
<g>공기가 잘 통하다</g>: Breathable

<g>V + 아/어야 하다</g>: What should be done
<g>V + 게 하다</g>: To (do something) - Express purpose.

general.g_text: 저는 지난 주말에 아주 특별한 사진관에 갔습니다. 그 사진관에는 사진을 찍기 위한 모든 준비가 다 되어 있었습니다. 사진을 찍기 전에 화장도 해 주고 머리도 해 주었습니다. 그리고 저에게 어울리는 옷도 빌려 주었습니다.  거울 속의 제 모습이 마음에 들었습니다. 이렇게 멋진 모습으로 사진을 ( ㉠ ) 친구들에게도 소개할 생각입니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Cuối tuần trước tôi đã đến một tiệm chụp ảnh rất đặc biệt. Tại tiệm đó, mọi thứ đều được chuẩn bị sẵn sàng cho việc chụp ảnh. Trước khi chụp, họ đã trang điểm và làm tóc cho tôi. Và họ cũng cho tôi mượn quần áo phù hợp với mình. Tôi rất hài lòng với dáng vẻ của mình trong gương. ( ㉠ ) với dáng vẻ tuyệt vời như thế này nên tôi sẽ giới thiệu (tiệm chụp hình này) với bạn bè.
g_text_translate.en: Last weekend I went to a very special photography studio. At that studio, everything is prepared for the photo shoot. Before the shoot, they did my makeup and did my hair. And they also lent me clothes that fit me. I am very satisfied with how I look in the mirror. Because you can take pictures with such a great figure, I will recommend this photo studio to my friends.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le week-end dernier, je suis allé dans un studio de photographie très spécial. Dans ce studio, tout est préparé pour la séance photo. Avant le tournage, ils m'ont maquillé et coiffé. Et ils m'ont aussi prêté des vêtements qui me vont. Je suis très satisfait de la façon dont je regarde dans le miroir. Parce que vous pouvez prendre des photos avec une si belle silhouette, je recommanderai ce studio photo à mes amis.

#######

Last weekend I went to a very special photography studio. At that studio, everything is prepared for the photo shoot. Before the shoot, they did my makeup and did my hair. And they also lent me clothes that fit me. I am very satisfied with how I look in the mirror. Because you can take pictures with such a great figure, I will recommend this photo studio to my friends.
g_text_translate.es:
El fin de semana pasado fui a un estudio de fotografía muy especial. En ese estudio, todo está preparado para la sesión de fotos. Antes de la sesión, me maquillaron y me peinaron. Y también me prestaron ropa que me queda bien. Estoy muy satisfecho con cómo me veo en el espejo. Debido a que puedes tomar fotografías con una figura tan grandiosa, recomendaré este estudio fotográfico a mis amigos.

#######

g_text_translate.id:

Dan mereka juga meminjamkan saya pakaian yang cocok untuk saya. Saya sangat puas dengan penampilan saya di cermin. Karena Anda bisa berfoto dengan sosok yang begitu hebat, saya akan merekomendasikan studio foto ini kepada teman-teman saya.

สุดสัปดาห์ที่ผ่านมาฉันไปสตูดิโอถ่ายภาพที่พิเศษมาก ที่สตูดิโอนั้น ทุกอย่างก็ถูกจัดเตรียมไว้สำหรับการถ่ายภาพ ก่อนการถ่ายทำ พวกเขาแต่งหน้าและทำผมให้ฉัน และพวกเขายังให้ฉันยืมเสื้อผ้าที่เหมาะกับฉันด้วย ฉันพอใจกับการมองตัวเองในกระจกมาก เพราะหุ่นเป๊ะขนาดนี้ถ่ายรูปได้ เลยอยากแนะนำสตูดิโอถ่ายภาพนี้ให้เพื่อนดู

g_text_translate.hi:
पिछले सप्ताहांत मैं एक बहुत ही खास फोटोग्राफी स्टूडियो में गया। उस स्टूडियो में फोटो शूट के लिए सब कुछ तैयार किया जाता है। शूटिंग से पहले, उन्होंने मेरा मेकअप किया और मेरे बाल संवारे। और उन्होंने मुझे ऐसे कपड़े भी उधार दिये जो मुझ पर फिट आते थे। मैं आईने में जैसा दिखता हूं उससे बहुत संतुष्ट हूं। क्योंकि आप इतने शानदार फिगर के साथ तस्वीरें ले सकते हैं, मैं अपने दोस्तों को इस फोटो स्टूडियो की सिफारिश करूंगा।

Ayrıca bana bedenime uygun kıyafetleri de ödünç verdiler. Aynada nasıl göründüğümden çok memnunum. Harika bir figürle fotoğraf çekebildiğiniz için bu fotoğraf stüdyosunu arkadaşlarıma tavsiye edeceğim.

3. Vì phải chụp hình

--------------------

Cevap 3 doğru cevaptır çünkü fotoğraf stüdyosunda müşterilere uygun kuaförlük ve ödünç verme hizmetleri bulunmaktadır. Bu yüzden dikkatli hazırlanmalarına gerek yok.

#######

What can be learned from the passage?
1. You can learn how to take pictures at a photo booth.
2. If you are not satisfied with the photo, you can take it again.
3. Customers can come to the photo booth without any special preparation.
4. Customers can take pictures without waiting.
--------------------
<g>사진관</g>: Photo studio
<g>빌려 주다</g>: To lend

<g>V + 아/어 있다</g>: Available, in status
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 생각이다</g>: To think, to intend

Answer 3 is the correct answer because the photo studio has hairdressing and lending services suitable for customers. So they don't need to prepare carefully.

general.g_text: 제 이름은 김둘입니다. 할아버지께서는 제 옆에 항상 친구가 있기를 바라셨습니다. 그래서 숫자 2로 이름을 지어 주셨습니다. 이 특별한 이름 덕분에 사람들이 저를 잘 기억합니다. 그리고 다른 사람들과 쉽게 친구가 될 수 있습니다. 할아버지께서 지어 주신 이름의 의미처럼 제 옆에는 항상 친구가 있습니다. 그래서 ( ㉠ ) 행복합니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Tôi tên là KimDul. Ông tôi luôn mong muốn tôi có bạn bè bên cạnh. Vì vậy ông đặt tên tôi là số 2. Nhờ tên đặc biệt mà mọi người luôn nhỡ rõ tên tôi. Và tôi có thể dễ dàng làm bạn với người khác. Giống như ý nghĩa tên mà ông đặt cho tôi, bên cạnh tôi luôn có những người bạn. Vì vậy ( ㉠ )  tôi rất hạnh phúc. 
--------------------
께서: Hình thức kính ngữ của tiểu từ 은/는, thể hiện sự kính trọng. 
V + 시다: Hình thức kính ngữ, thể hiện sự kính trọng.
g_text_translate.en: My name is KimDul. My grandfather always wished I had a friend by my side. So he named me number 2. Thanks to my special name, people always remember my name clearly. And I can easily make friends with other people. Like the meaning of the name that my grandfather gave me, there are always friends by my side. So I am not lonely and I'm very happy.
g_text_translate.fr:
Je m'appelle KimDul. Mon grand-père a toujours souhaité que j'aie un ami à mes côtés. Alors il m'a nommé numéro 2. Grâce à mon nom spécial, les gens se souviennent toujours clairement de mon nom. Et je peux facilement me lier d'amitié avec d'autres personnes. Comme la signification du nom que mon grand-père m'a donné, il y a toujours des amis à mes côtés. Je ne suis donc pas seul et je suis très heureux.


#######

g_text_translate.es:
Mi nombre es KimDul. Mi abuelo siempre deseó tener un amigo a mi lado. Entonces me nombró número 2. Gracias a mi nombre especial, la gente siempre recuerda mi nombre con claridad. Y puedo hacer amigos fácilmente con otras personas. Como el significado del nombre que me dio mi abuelo, siempre hay amigos a mi lado. Así que no estoy solo y soy muy feliz.

Dan saya dapat dengan mudah berteman dengan orang lain. Seperti arti nama yang diberikan kakekku, selalu ada teman di sisiku. Jadi saya tidak kesepian dan saya sangat bahagia.

explain.fr:
Choisissez la réponse qui correspond au contenu du passage :
1. Le nom de mon grand-père est KimDul.
2. Les gens oublient souvent mon nom.
3. Mon nom a une signification particulière.
4. À cause de mon nom, il m'est difficile de me faire des amis.
--------------------
<g>잊어버리다</g>: Oublier
<g>특별하다</g>: Soyez spécial.

#######

Choose the answer that matches the content of the passage:
1. My grandfather's name is KimDul.
2. People often forget my name.
3. My name has a special meaning.
4. Because of my name, it's hard for me to make friends.
--------------------
<g>잊어버리다</g>: To forget
<g>특별하다</g>: Be special.
