general.g_text: 저는 ( ㉠ ) 오랫동안 생각만 하고 빨리 결정하지 못합니다. 결정하는 것이 어려워서 혼자서는 필요한 물건을 잘 고르지 못합니다. 그래서 저는 친구가 옆에 있으면 친구가 하는 것을 따라 합니다. 그렇게 하면 제가 결정하지 않아도 돼서 마음이 편합니다. 하지만 지금부터는 제가 작은 일부터 하나씩 결정해 보려고 합니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
( ㉠ ), tôi suy nghĩ rất lâu và không thể quyết định nhanh được. Việc quyết định với tôi khá khó khăn nên tôi không thể một mình chọn lựa những đồ cần thiết. Vì vậy nếu có bạn bè ở bên thì tôi làm theo bạn. Như vậy tôi không cần phải quyết định nên tâm trạng cũng thoải mái. Tuy nhiên từ bây giờ tôi sẽ tập đưa ra quyết định bắt đầu từ những việc nhỏ. 
--------------------
V + (으)려고 하다: Định làm gì đó. 
V + (으)면: Nếu.
g_text_translate.en: When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.
g_text_translate.fr:
Lorsque je choisis quelque chose, je réfléchis longtemps et je ne peux pas prendre de décision rapide. La décision a été assez difficile pour moi, je n'ai donc pas pu choisir seul les éléments nécessaires. Donc si j'ai des amis autour, je suis mes amis. Comme ça, je n'ai pas à prendre de décision, donc je suis de bonne humeur. Cependant, à partir de maintenant, je m'entraînerai à prendre des décisions en commençant par de petites choses.


#######

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.
g_text_translate.es:
Al elegir algo, pienso durante mucho tiempo y no puedo tomar una decisión rápida. La decisión fue bastante difícil para mí, por lo que no podía elegir solo los artículos necesarios. Entonces, si tengo amigos cerca, sigo a mis amigos. De esa manera no tengo que tomar una decisión, así que estoy de buen humor. Sin embargo, de ahora en adelante practicaré tomando decisiones comenzando con cosas pequeñas.


#######

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.
g_text_translate.id:
Ketika memilih sesuatu, saya berpikir lama dan tidak bisa mengambil keputusan dengan cepat. Keputusan itu cukup sulit bagiku, jadi aku tidak bisa memilih item yang diperlukan sendirian. Jadi jika saya punya teman di sekitar, saya mengikuti teman-teman saya. Dengan begitu saya tidak perlu membuat keputusan, jadi saya dalam suasana hati yang baik. Namun, mulai sekarang saya akan berlatih membuat keputusan dimulai dari hal-hal kecil.


#######

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.
g_text_translate.ja:
何かを選ぶとき、私は長い間考え、すぐに決断することができません。その判断は私にはかなり難しかったので、必要なものだけを選ぶことはできませんでした。だから、周りに友達がいれば、友達をフォローします。そうすれば決断しなくていいので、機嫌がいいです。でも、これからは小さなことから判断する練習をしていきます。


#######

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.
g_text_translate.de:
Wenn ich mich für etwas entscheide, denke ich lange nach und kann mich nicht schnell entscheiden. Die Entscheidung ist mir ziemlich schwer gefallen, sodass ich die notwendigen Artikel nicht alleine auswählen konnte. Wenn ich also Freunde in der Nähe habe, folge ich meinen Freunden. So muss ich mich nicht entscheiden und habe gute Laune. Von nun an werde ich jedoch üben, Entscheidungen zu treffen, beginnend mit kleinen Dingen.


#######

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在选择某样东西的时候，我想了很久，不能很快做出决定。这个决定对我来说相当困难，所以我无法单独选择必要的物品。所以如果我身边有朋友，我会关注我的朋友。这样我就不用做决定了，所以我心情很好。但是，从现在开始，我将练习从小事做起决定。


#######

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. So if I have friends around, I follow my friends. That way I don't have to make a decision, so I'm in a good mood. However, from now on I will practice making decisions starting with small things.

When choosing something, I think for a long time and can't make a quick decision. The decision was quite difficult for me, so I couldn't choose the necessary items alone. g_text_translate.it:
Quando scelgo qualcosa, penso a lungo e non riesco a prendere una decisione rapida. La decisione è stata abbastanza difficile per me, quindi non potevo scegliere da solo gli articoli necessari. Quindi, se ho amici in giro, seguo i miei amici. In questo modo non devo prendere una decisione, quindi sono di buon umore. Tuttavia, d'ora in poi mi eserciterò a prendere decisioni partendo da piccole cose.

Поэтому, если у меня есть друзья, я подписываюсь на своих друзей. Таким образом, мне не нужно принимать решение, и у меня хорошее настроение. Однако с этого момента я буду практиковаться в принятии решений, начиная с мелочей.

Yani eğer etrafımda arkadaşlarım varsa, arkadaşlarımı takip ederim. Böylece bir karar vermek zorunda kalmıyorum, bu yüzden iyi bir ruh halindeyim. Ancak bundan sonra küçük şeylerden başlayarak karar verme pratiği yapacağım.

general.g_text: 사람들은 결혼할 때 보통 많은 사람들을 초대합니다. 다른 사람들에게 결혼하는 모습을 보여 주고 싶기 때문입니다. 그런데 요즘에는 가족과 가까운 친구들만 ( ㉠ ) ‘작은 결혼식’을 하는 사람들이 생겼습니다.  이런 결혼식을 하는 사람들은 적은 돈으로 결혼을 준비합니다. 이렇게 하면서 가까운 사람들과 함께 결혼의 기쁨을 나눕니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Mọi người thường mời rất nhiều người khi kết hôn. Bởi vì họ muốn cho người khác thấy hình ảnh kết hôn của mình. Tuy nhiên dạo này có nhiều người tổ chức "hôn lễ nhỏ" ( ㉠ ) bạn bè thân thiết và gia đình. Những người tổ chức hôn lễ như vậy chỉ cần chuẩn bị kết hôn với số tiền nhỏ. Vừa tổ chức hôn lễ như vậy vừa chia sẻ niềm vui với những người thân thiết.
g_text_translate.en: People usually invite a lot of people when they get married. Because they want to show others that they are getting married. These days, however, many people hold "small weddings" and invite only close friends and family. Such wedding organizers only need to prepare to get married with a small amount of money. Just organize such a wedding and share the joy with close people.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les gens invitent généralement beaucoup de monde lorsqu'ils se marient. Parce qu'ils veulent montrer aux autres qu'ils vont se marier. De nos jours, cependant, de nombreuses personnes organisent des « petits mariages » et n'invitent que des amis proches et de la famille. Ces organisateurs de mariage n'ont qu'à se préparer à se marier avec une petite somme d'argent. Organisez simplement un tel mariage et partagez la joie avec des personnes proches.

#######

People usually invite a lot of people when they get married. Because they want to show others that they are getting married. These days, however, many people hold "small weddings" and invite only close friends and family. Such wedding organizers only need to prepare to get married with a small amount of money. Just organize such a wedding and share the joy with close people.
g_text_translate.es:
La gente suele invitar a mucha gente cuando se casa. Porque quieren mostrar a los demás que se van a casar. En estos días, sin embargo, muchas personas celebran "pequeñas bodas" e invitan solo a amigos cercanos y familiares. Dichos organizadores de bodas solo necesitan prepararse para casarse con una pequeña cantidad de dinero. Simplemente organice una boda de este tipo y comparta la alegría con las personas cercanas.

#######

People usually invite a lot of people when they get married. Because they want to show others that they are getting married. These days, however, many people hold "small weddings" and invite only close friends and family. Such wedding organizers only need to prepare to get married with a small amount of money. Just organize such a wedding and share the joy with close people.
g_text_translate.id:
Orang biasanya mengundang banyak orang ketika mereka menikah. Karena mereka ingin menunjukkan kepada orang lain bahwa mereka akan menikah. Namun dewasa ini, banyak orang mengadakan "pernikahan kecil" dan hanya mengundang teman dekat dan keluarga. Penyelenggara pernikahan seperti itu hanya perlu mempersiapkan pernikahan dengan sedikit uang. Atur saja pernikahan seperti itu dan bagikan kegembiraan dengan orang-orang terdekat.

#######

People usually invite a lot of people when they get married. Because they want to show others that they are getting married. These days, however, many people hold "small weddings" and invite only close friends and family. Such wedding organizers only need to prepare to get married with a small amount of money. Just organize such a wedding and share the joy with close people.
g_text_translate.ja:
結婚すると、人はたいていたくさんの人を招待します。彼らは結婚していることを他の人に見せたいからです。しかし最近では、親しい友人や家族だけを招待して「少人数の結婚式」を行う人も少なくありません。そのような結婚式の主催者は、わずかなお金で結婚式を準備するだけで済みます。そのような結婚式を企画し、親しい人と喜びを分かち合うだけです。

#######

People usually invite a lot of people when they get married. Because they want to show others that they are getting married. These days, however, many people hold "small weddings" and invite only close friends and family. Such wedding organizers only need to prepare to get married with a small amount of money. Just organize such a wedding and share the joy with close people.
g_text_translate.de:
Leute laden normalerweise viele Leute ein, wenn sie heiraten. Weil sie anderen zeigen wollen, dass sie heiraten. Heutzutage veranstalten viele Menschen jedoch "kleine Hochzeiten" und laden nur enge Freunde und Familie ein. Solche Hochzeitsorganisatoren müssen sich nur darauf vorbereiten, mit einem kleinen Geldbetrag zu heiraten. Organisieren Sie einfach eine solche Hochzeit und teilen Sie die Freude mit nahen Menschen.

#######

People usually invite a lot of people when they get married. Because they want to show others that they are getting married. These days, however, many people hold "small weddings" and invite only close friends and family. Such wedding organizers only need to prepare to get married with a small amount of money. Just organize such a wedding and share the joy with close people.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
人们通常在结婚时邀请很多人。因为他们想向别人表明他们要结婚了。然而，这些天来，许多人举行“小型婚礼”，只邀请亲密的朋友和家人。这样的婚礼组织者只需要准备少量的钱就可以结婚。只需举办这样一场婚礼，与亲近的人分享喜悦。

#######

g_text_translate.it:
Le persone di solito invitano molte persone quando si sposano. Perché vogliono mostrare agli altri che si stanno per sposare. Tali organizzatori di matrimoni devono solo prepararsi a sposarsi con una piccola somma di denaro. Basta organizzare un matrimonio del genere e condividere la gioia con le persone vicine.

general.g_text: 아버지는 요리에 관심이 없어서 거의 요리를 하지 않으셨습니다. 그런데 지난달에 어머니가 다리를 다쳐서 요리를 못 하게 되었습니다. 그때부터 아버지는 요리를 ( ㉠ ). 아버지의 요리는 맛있을 때도 있고 맛없을 때도 있었습니다. 그런데 음식의 맛과 관계없이 어머니는 항상 맛있게 드셨습니다. 그 후로 아버지는 요리하는 것을 좋아하게 되셨습니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Bố tôi không mấy quan tâm đến việc nấu ăn nên hầu như không nấu. Tuy nhiên, tháng trước mẹ tôi bị thương ở chân nên không thể nấu ăn được. Kể từ đó bố tôi đã  ( ㉠ ) nấu ăn. Món ăn bố tôi nấu lúc ngon, lúc không ngon. Nhưng bất kể mùi vị có ra sao thì mẹ tôi luôn ăn rất ngon miệng. Sau đó bố tôi rất thích nấu ăn. 
--------------------
드시다 (Ăn): Kính ngữ của từ 먹다.
g_text_translate.en: My father was not interested in cooking, so he rarely cooks. But last month, mother injured her leg, it prevented her from cooking. From then on, my father started cooking. My father's dishes are delicious but sometimes bad. However, regardless of the taste of the food, my mother always enjoys it. After that, my father loves cooking.
g_text_translate.fr:
Mon père n'était pas intéressé par la cuisine, donc il cuisine rarement. Mais le mois dernier, maman s'est blessée à la jambe, ça l'a empêchée de cuisiner. Dès lors, mon père a commencé à cuisiner. Les plats de mon père sont délicieux mais parfois mauvais. Cependant, quel que soit le goût de la nourriture, ma mère l'apprécie toujours. Après cela, mon père adore cuisiner.


#######

My father was not interested in cooking, so he rarely cooks. But last month, mother injured her leg, it prevented her from cooking. From then on, my father started cooking. My father's dishes are delicious but sometimes bad. However, regardless of the taste of the food, my mother always enjoys it. After that, my father loves cooking.
g_text_translate.es:
Mi padre no estaba interesado en cocinar, por lo que rara vez cocina. Pero el mes pasado, la madre se lastimó la pierna, le impedía cocinar. A partir de entonces, mi padre empezó a cocinar. Los platos de mi padre son deliciosos pero a veces malos. Sin embargo, independientemente del sabor de la comida, mi madre siempre la disfruta. Después de eso, a mi padre le encanta cocinar.


#######

My father was not interested in cooking, so he rarely cooks. But last month, mother injured her leg, it prevented her from cooking. From then on, my father started cooking. My father's dishes are delicious but sometimes bad. However, regardless of the taste of the food, my mother always enjoys it. After that, my father loves cooking.
g_text_translate.id:
Ayah saya tidak tertarik memasak, jadi dia jarang memasak. Tapi bulan lalu, ibu terluka kakinya, itu membuatnya tidak bisa memasak. Sejak saat itu, ayah saya mulai memasak. Masakan ayahku enak tapi terkadang buruk. Namun, terlepas dari rasa makanannya, ibu saya selalu menikmatinya. Setelah itu, ayah saya suka memasak.


#######

My father was not interested in cooking, so he rarely cooks. But last month, mother injured her leg, it prevented her from cooking. From then on, my father started cooking. My father's dishes are delicious but sometimes bad. However, regardless of the taste of the food, my mother always enjoys it. After that, my father loves cooking.
g_text_translate.ja:
父は料理に興味がなかったので、めったに料理をしませんでした。でも先月、母が足を怪我して、料理ができなくなった。それ以来、父は料理を始めました。父の料理は美味しいけど、たまにまずい。しかし、食べ物の味に関係なく、母はいつもそれを楽しんでいます。その後、父は料理が大好きになりました。


#######

My father was not interested in cooking, so he rarely cooks. But last month, mother injured her leg, it prevented her from cooking. From then on, my father started cooking. My father's dishes are delicious but sometimes bad. However, regardless of the taste of the food, my mother always enjoys it. After that, my father loves cooking.
g_text_translate.de:
Mein Vater interessierte sich nicht fürs Kochen, also kocht er selten. Aber letzten Monat verletzte sich Mutter am Bein, das hinderte sie am Kochen. Von da an begann mein Vater zu kochen. Die Gerichte meines Vaters sind köstlich, aber manchmal schlecht. Aber unabhängig vom Geschmack des Essens schmeckt es meiner Mutter immer. Danach liebt mein Vater das Kochen.


#######

g_text_translate.zh-CN:

I piatti di mio padre sono deliziosi ma a volte pessimi. Tuttavia, indipendentemente dal gusto del cibo, a mia madre piace sempre. Dopo di che, mio ​​padre adora cucinare.

Блюда моего отца вкусные, но иногда плохие. Однако, независимо от вкуса еды, маме она всегда нравится. После этого мой отец любит готовить.

g_text_translate.hi:
मेरे पिता को खाना बनाने में कोई दिलचस्पी नहीं थी, इसलिए वह कम ही खाना बनाते थे। लेकिन पिछले महीने माँ के पैर में चोट लग गई, इससे वह खाना नहीं बना पाई। तभी से मेरे पिता ने खाना बनाना शुरू कर दिया. मेरे पिता के व्यंजन स्वादिष्ट तो होते हैं लेकिन कभी-कभी ख़राब भी। हालाँकि, भोजन के स्वाद की परवाह किए बिना, मेरी माँ हमेशा इसका आनंद लेती हैं। उसके बाद, मेरे पिता को खाना बनाना बहुत पसंद है।

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠: 
1. Không thể
2. Có lẽ
3. Bắt đầu
4. Chưa từng
--------------------
V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다: Không thể làm gì đó. 
V + (으)ㄹ 것 같다: Hình như đã thực hiện hành động nào đó. 
V + 기 시작하다: Bắt đầu làm việc gì đó. 
V + (ㅇ)ㄴ 적이 없다: Chưa từng làm việc gì đó.
explain.en:
Fill the suitable phrase in <g>㉠</g>: 
1. Cannot
2. Maybe
3. Started
4. Never
--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다</g>: Cannot do something
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 것 같다</g>: Maybe have done something
<g>V + 기 시작하다</g>: Start doing something
<g>V + (ㅇ)ㄴ 적이 없다</g>: Never do something.
explain.fr:
Remplissez la phrase appropriée dans<g>㉠</g>:
1. Impossible
2. Peut-être
3. Commencé
4. Jamais
--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다</g>: Impossible de faire quelque chose
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 것 같다</g>: Peut-être avoir fait quelque chose
<g>V + 기 시작하다</g>: commencer à faire quelque chose
<g>V + (ㅇ)ㄴ 적이 없다</g>: Ne fais jamais rien.

#######

Fill the suitable phrase in <g>㉠</g>: 
1. Cannot
2. Maybe
3. Started
4. Never
--------------------
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 없다</g>: Cannot do something
<g>V + (으)ㄹ 것 같다</g>: Maybe have done something
<g>V + 기 시작하다</g>: Start doing something

<g>점점</g>: Gradually.
explain.hi:
हम पैराग्राफ की सामग्री से क्या सीख सकते हैं?
1. आजकल मेरे पापा को खाना बनाने का शौक है.
2. बहुत समय पहले मेरे पिता ने अकादमी में खाना बनाना सीखा था।
3. माँ खाना बनाने में पिताजी की मदद करती हैं।
4. मेरे पिता जो व्यंजन बनाते हैं वे और भी स्वादिष्ट होते जा रहे हैं।
------------------------
<g>관심을 갖다</g>: बारे में चिंतित होना
<g>학원</g>: केंद्र, अकादमी
<g>점점</g>: धीरे-धीरे।


#######

What can we learn from the paragraph's content?
1. These days my father is interested in cooking.
2. A long time ago my father studied cooking at the academy.
3. Mom helps dad cook.
4. The dishes my father makes are getting more and more delicious.
--------------------
<g>관심을 갖다</g>: Be concerned about
<g>학원</g>: Center, academy
<g>점점</g>: Gradually.
explain.tr:
Paragrafın içeriğinden ne öğrenebiliriz?
1. Bu aralar babam yemek pişirmeye meraklı.
2. Uzun zaman önce babam akademide yemek pişirme eğitimi aldı.
3. Anne, babanın yemek pişirmesine yardım eder.
4. Babamın yaptığı yemekler giderek daha lezzetli oluyor.
--------------------
<g>관심을 갖다</g>: Endişelenmek
<g>학원</g>: Merkez, akademi
<g>점점</g>: Gitgide.

general.g_text: 요즘 옛날 영화를 다시 보여 주는 극장이 많습니다. 10년 전 영화인 ‘첫사랑’도 다음 주부터 여러 극장에서 볼 수 있습니다. ‘첫사랑’은 내용이 아름다워서 많은 사람들이 잊지 못하는 영화입니다. ( ㉠ )영화에 나온 음악은 요즘에도 인기가 많습니다. 이번에 크고 좋은 화면으로 이 영화를 다시 볼 수 있어서 사람들이 많이 기다리고 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Dạo này có rất nhiều rạp chiếu phim cho xem lại những bộ phim cũ. Từ tuần sau chúng ta có thể được xem bộ phim 'Mối tình đầu' từ 10 năm trước tại nhiều rạp chiếu. 'Mối tình đầu' là bộ phim có nội dung rất hay nên nhiều người không thể quên được.  ( ㉠ ) những bài nhạc xuất hiện trong bộ phim dạo này vẫn rất phổ biến. Lần này có thể xem lại bộ phim trên màn ảnh rộng và (chất lượng) tốt nên mọi người rất mong chờ. 
--------------------
A/V/Mệnh đề + 는 + N: Hình thức danh từ hóa; động từ, tính từ, mệnh đề trước 는 bổ nghĩa cho danh từ đứng sau. 
V + (ㅇ)ㄹ 수 있다/없다: Có thể/Không thể làm gì.
g_text_translate.en: There are many theaters these days that re-show old movies. The movie 'First Love' from 10 years ago will also be available in various theaters from next week. ‘First Love’ is a film that many people can’t forget because of its beautiful content. And music in movies is very popular these days. A lot of people are looking forward to seeing this movie again this time on a big and good screen.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il existe de nos jours de nombreux cinémas qui rediffusent de vieux films. Le film "First Love" d'il y a 10 ans sera également disponible dans divers cinémas à partir de la semaine prochaine. "First Love" est un film que beaucoup de gens ne peuvent pas oublier à cause de son beau contenu. Et la musique dans les films est très populaire de nos jours. Beaucoup de gens ont hâte de revoir ce film cette fois sur un grand et bon écran.


#######

There are many theaters these days that re-show old movies. The movie 'First Love' from 10 years ago will also be available in various theaters from next week. ‘First Love’ is a film that many people can’t forget because of its beautiful content. And music in movies is very popular these days. A lot of people are looking forward to seeing this movie again this time on a big and good screen.
g_text_translate.es:
Hay muchos teatros en estos días que vuelven a mostrar películas antiguas. La película 'First Love' de hace 10 años también estará disponible en varios cines a partir de la próxima semana. ‘First Love’ es una película que mucha gente no puede olvidar por su hermoso contenido. Y la música en las películas es muy popular en estos días. Mucha gente está deseando volver a ver esta película esta vez en una pantalla grande y buena.


#######

Banyak orang menantikan untuk melihat film ini lagi kali ini di layar yang besar dan bagus.

आजकल ऐसे कई थिएटर हैं जो पुरानी फिल्में दोबारा दिखाते हैं। 10 साल पहले की फिल्म 'फर्स्ट लव' भी अगले हफ्ते से विभिन्न सिनेमाघरों में उपलब्ध होगी। 'फर्स्ट लव' एक ऐसी फिल्म है जिसे कई लोग अपने खूबसूरत कंटेंट की वजह से नहीं भूल सकते। और आजकल फिल्मों में संगीत बहुत लोकप्रिय है। बहुत से लोग इस फिल्म को इस बार फिर से बड़े और अच्छे पर्दे पर देखने का इंतजार कर रहे हैं।

Ve filmlerde müzik bugünlerde çok popüler. Pek çok insan bu filmi bu sefer büyük ve güzel bir ekranda tekrar izlemeyi sabırsızlıkla bekliyor.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn: 
1. "Mối tình đầu" là bộ phim mới ra mắt. 
2. Có rất nhiều rạp chiếu phim "Mối tình đầu". 
3. Mọi người không quan tâm đến bộ phim "Mối tình đầu". 
4. Dạo này mọi người không hay nghe nhạc xuất hiện trong bộ phim "Mối tình đầu". 
--------------------
N + 에 관심이 있다/없다: Có/Không quan tâm về.
explain.en:

1. "First love" is a new film coming out.
2. There are many theatre premiering "First love".
3. Everyone does not care about "First love" film.
4. Currently, people do not listen to the OSTs of "First love".
--------------------

general.g_text: 어렸을 때 우리 어머니는 저에게 노래를 자주 불러 주셨습니다. 제가 울 때는 재미있고 신나는 노래를 불러 주셨습니다. 그리고 잘 때는 제 침대에 같이 누워서 조용한 노래를 불러 주셨습니다. 저는 어머니의 노래를 ( ㉠ )잠이 더 잘 왔습니다. 저는 아직도 어머니가 불러 준 노래들을 기억합니다. 그리고 지금은 그 노래들을 제 아이한테 불러 줍니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Khi còn nhỏ, mẹ tôi thường hát cho tôi nghe. Khi tôi khóc, mẹ hát cho tôi một bài hát hay và sôi động. Và khi ngủ, mẹ nằm trên giường cùng tôi và hát một bài hát trầm lắng. Tôi ngủ ngon hơn ( ㉠ ) bài hát của mẹ. Tôi vẫn còn nhớ những bài hát mà mẹ tôi đã hát cho tôi. Và bây giờ tôi sẽ hát những bài hát đó cho con tôi. 
--------------------
V + 시다: Hình thức kính ngữ, thể hiện sự kính trọng.
g_text_translate.en: When I was young, my mother often sang to me. When I cried, she sang a fun and uplifting song. And when I slept, she laid down on my bed with me and sang a quiet song. I fell asleep better when I listened to my mother's song. I still remember the songs my mother sang. And now I sing those songs to my child.
g_text_translate.fr:
Quand j'étais jeune, ma mère chantait souvent pour moi. Quand j'ai pleuré, elle a chanté une chanson amusante et édifiante. Et quand j'ai dormi, elle s'est allongée sur mon lit avec moi et a chanté une chanson douce. Je me suis mieux endormi en écoutant la chanson de ma mère. Je me souviens encore des chansons que chantait ma mère. Et maintenant je chante ces chansons à mon enfant.


#######

When I was young, my mother often sang to me. When I cried, she sang a fun and uplifting song. And when I slept, she laid down on my bed with me and sang a quiet song. I fell asleep better when I listened to my mother's song. I still remember the songs my mother sang. And now I sing those songs to my child.
g_text_translate.es:
Cuando era joven, mi madre me cantaba a menudo. Cuando lloré, ella cantó una canción divertida y edificante. Y cuando dormí, ella se acostó en mi cama conmigo y cantó una canción tranquila. Me dormía mejor cuando escuchaba la canción de mi madre. Todavía recuerdo las canciones que cantaba mi madre. Y ahora le canto esas canciones a mi hijo.


#######

g_text_translate.id:
Ketika saya masih muda, ibu saya sering bernyanyi untuk saya. Ketika saya menangis, dia menyanyikan lagu yang menyenangkan dan membangkitkan semangat. Dan ketika saya tidur, dia berbaring di tempat tidur saya dan menyanyikan lagu yang tenang. Saya tertidur lebih nyenyak ketika saya mendengarkan lagu ibu saya. Saya masih ingat lagu-lagu yang dinyanyikan ibu saya. Dan sekarang saya menyanyikan lagu-lagu itu untuk anak saya.


#######

When I was young, my mother often sang to me. When I cried, she sang a fun and uplifting song. And when I slept, she laid down on my bed with me and sang a quiet song. 私が幼い頃、母はよく私に歌を歌ってくれました。私が泣いたとき、彼女は楽しく元気になる歌を歌ってくれました。そして、私が眠るとき、彼女は私と一緒に私のベッドに横になり、静かな歌を歌いました.母の歌を聞くとよく眠れました。母が歌っていた歌を今でも覚えています。そして今、私はそれらの歌を子供に歌っています。


#######

Ich schlief besser ein, wenn ich das Lied meiner Mutter hörte. Ich erinnere mich noch an die Lieder, die meine Mutter sang. Und jetzt singe ich diese Lieder meinem Kind vor.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠: 
1. Nghe nhưng mà
2. Nghe hoặc là
3. Nếu nghe
4. Định nghe
--------------------
V + 지만: Tuy nhiên. 
V + 거나: Cấu trúc thể hiện sự lựa chọn. Hoặc là (cái này), hoặc là (cái kia). 
V + (으)면: Cấu trúc nếu - thì. 
V + (으)려고: Định làm gì đó.
explain.en:
Fill the suitable phrase in <g>㉠</g>: 
1. But listen to
2. Or listened to
3. When I listened to
4. Will listen
--------------------
<g>V + 지만</g>: However.
<g>V + 거나</g>: Structure expressing choice. Either (this), or (that).
<g>V + (으)면</g>: If - then structure.
<g>V + (으)려고</g>: To do something.
explain.fr:
Remplissez la phrase appropriée dans<g>㉠</g>:
1. Mais écoutez

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn: 
1. Tôi đã quên mất bài hát mà mẹ tôi đã hát cho tôi. 
2. Khi tôi ngủ, tôi đã hát với mẹ. 
3. Mẹ tôi đã hát một bài hát trầm lắng khi tôi khóc. 
4. Tôi cũng hát cho con tôi giống như mẹ tôi. 
--------------------
기억하다: Nhớ >< 잊어버리다: Quên

N + 처럼: Giống, giống như, như. 
N + 와/과 함께: Cùng với N.

<g>N+ 와/과 함께</g>: Together, with N.

explain.th:
เลือกคำตอบให้เหมาะสมกับเนื้อเรื่อง:
1. ฉันลืมเพลงที่แม่ร้องให้ฟัง
2.เวลานอนฉันร้องเพลงกับแม่
3. แม่ของฉันร้องเพลงเบา ๆ เมื่อฉันร้องไห้
4. ฉันร้องเพลงให้ลูกเหมือนแม่ด้วย
--------------------
<g>기억하다</g>: ที่จะจำ ><<g>잊어버리다</g>: ลืม

<g>N + 처럼</g>: ชอบบางสิ่งบางอย่าง/บางคน
<g>N+ 와/과 함께</g>: ร่วมกับ เอ็น.

#######

Choose the answer that is suitable for the passage:
1. I forgot the song my mother sang to me.
2. When I slept, I sang with my mother.
3. My mother sang a quiet song when I cried.
4. I also sing for my children like my mother.
--------------------
<g>기억하다</g>: To remember >< <g>잊어버리다</g>: To forget

<g>N + 처럼</g>: Like something/ someone
<g>N+ 와/과 함께</g>: Together, with N.
explain.pt:

1. Esqueci a música que minha mãe cantou para mim.
2. Quando dormia, cantava com minha mãe.
3. Minha mãe cantou uma música tranquila quando eu chorei.
4. Também canto para meus filhos como minha mãe.
--------------------
<g>기억하다</g>: Para lembrar ><<g>잊어버리다</g>: Esquecer

<g>N + 처럼</g>: Como algo/alguém
<g>N+ 와/과 함께</g>: Juntos, com N.

explain.hi:
वह उत्तर चुनें जो परिच्छेद के लिए उपयुक्त हो:
1. मैं वह गाना भूल गया जो मेरी माँ ने मेरे लिए गाया था।
2. जब मैं सोया तो मैंने अपनी मां के साथ गाना गाया.
3. जब मैं रोया तो मेरी माँ ने एक शांत गाना गाया।
4. मैं भी अपनी मां की तरह अपने बच्चों के लिए गाता हूं.
------------------------
<g>기억하다</g>: याद रखना ><<g>잊어버리다</g>: भूल जाने के लिए

<g>N + 처럼</g>: कुछ/किसी की तरह

general.g_text: 얼마 전 인주시에서는 사용하지 않는 기찻길 주변을 공원으로 새롭게 만들었습니다. 사람들은 공원을 산책하거나 기찻길을 따라 걸으면서 사진을 찍습니다. 기찻길 옆에는 오래된 기차를 고쳐서 만든 카페가 하나 있습니다. 그 카페 안에는 ( ㉠ )많이 있습니다. 그래서 그 카페에 들어가면 옛날 분위기를 느낄 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Cách đây không lâu, ở thành phố Inju họ đã làm mới lại khu vực xung quanh đường tàu hỏa không được sử dụng thành công viên. Mọi người đi dạo trong công viên hoặc đi bộ dọc theo đường tàu để chụp ảnh. Bên cạnh đường tàu có một quán cà phê được làm bằng cách sửa chữa lại những toa tàu cũ. Trong quán cà phê đó có rất nhiều ( ㉠ ). Vậy nên khi bước vào quán cà phê, các bạn có thể cảm nhận được không khí ngày xưa. 
--------------------
V + 거나: Cấu trúc thể hiện sự lựa chọn. Hoặc là (cái này), hoặc là (cái kia). 
V + (으)면서: Cấu trúc vừa - vừa. 
A/V/Mệnh đề + 는 + N: Hình thức danh từ hóa; động từ, tính từ, mệnh đề trước 는 bổ nghĩa cho danh từ đứng sau.
g_text_translate.en: Recently, Inju City made a new park around the unused train tracks. People take pictures as they stroll through the park or along the railroad tracks. Next to the railroad tracks, there is a cafe built from an old train. There are many old stuffs in that cafe. So when you enter the cafe, you can feel the old-fashioned atmosphere.
g_text_translate.fr:
Récemment, la ville d'Inju a créé un nouveau parc autour des voies ferrées inutilisées. Les gens prennent des photos en se promenant dans le parc ou le long des voies ferrées. À côté des voies ferrées, il y a un café construit à partir d'un ancien train. Il y a beaucoup de vieux trucs dans ce café. Ainsi, lorsque vous entrez dans le café, vous pouvez sentir l'atmosphère à l'ancienne.


#######

Recently, Inju City made a new park around the unused train tracks. People take pictures as they stroll through the park or along the railroad tracks. Next to the railroad tracks, there is a cafe built from an old train. There are many old stuffs in that cafe. So when you enter the cafe, you can feel the old-fashioned atmosphere.
g_text_translate.es:
Recientemente, la ciudad de Inju construyó un nuevo parque alrededor de las vías del tren en desuso. La gente toma fotografías mientras pasean por el parque oa lo largo de las vías del tren. Junto a las vías del tren, hay una cafetería construida a partir de un antiguo tren. Hay muchas cosas viejas en ese café. Entonces, cuando ingresas al café, puedes sentir el ambiente antiguo.


#######

Recently, Inju City made a new park around the unused train tracks. People take pictures as they stroll through the park or along the railroad tracks. Next to the railroad tracks, there is a cafe built from an old train. There are many old stuffs in that cafe. So when you enter the cafe, you can feel the old-fashioned atmosphere.
g_text_translate.id:
Baru-baru ini, Kota Inju membuat taman baru di sekitar rel kereta yang tidak terpakai. Orang-orang mengambil gambar saat mereka berjalan-jalan di taman atau di sepanjang rel kereta api. Di sebelah rel kereta api, ada sebuah kafe yang dibangun dari kereta tua. Ada banyak barang-barang tua di kafe itu. Jadi saat masuk ke dalam kafe, suasana jadul bisa langsung terasa.


#######

Recently, Inju City made a new park around the unused train tracks. People take pictures as they stroll through the park or along the railroad tracks. Next to the railroad tracks, there is a cafe built from an old train. There are many old stuffs in that cafe. So when you enter the cafe, you can feel the old-fashioned atmosphere.
g_text_translate.ja:

Neben den Bahngleisen gibt es ein Café, das aus einem alten Zug gebaut wurde. In diesem Café gibt es viele alte Sachen. Wenn Sie also das Café betreten, können Sie die altmodische Atmosphäre spüren.

हाल ही में, इंजू सिटी ने अप्रयुक्त रेल पटरियों के आसपास एक नया पार्क बनाया। लोग पार्क में या रेल की पटरियों पर टहलते समय तस्वीरें लेते हैं। रेल की पटरियों के बगल में एक पुरानी ट्रेन से बना एक कैफे है। उस कैफ़े में बहुत सारी पुरानी चीज़ें हैं. इसलिए जब आप कैफे में प्रवेश करते हैं, तो आप पुराने जमाने के माहौल को महसूस कर सकते हैं।

Demiryolu raylarının yanında eski bir trenden yapılmış bir kafe var. O kafede bir sürü eski eşya var. Yani kafeye girdiğinizde eski moda atmosferi hissedebiliyorsunuz.

general.g_text: 다음 달에 친한 친구가 결혼을 합니다. 외국에서 결혼식을 하는데 저는 회사 일 때문에 못 갑니다. 그래서 휴대 전화로 영상을 찍어서 친구에게 ( ㉠ ). 저는 친구와 어릴 때 함께 다닌 학교와 우리의 추억이 있는 여러 장소를 찍을 겁니다. 그리고 고향 친구들이 축하 인사를 하는 것도 찍을 겁니다. 친구가 그것을 보고 기뻐하면 좋겠습니다.

g_text_translate.vi:
Tháng sau bạn thân tôi sẽ kết hôn. Đám cưới được tổ chức ở nước ngoài nhưng vì công việc ở công ty nên tôi không đi được. Vì vậy, tôi đã quay video bằng điện thoại  và (㉠) cho bạn. Tôi sẽ chụp ảnh trường học nơi mà tôi đã đi cùng bạn tôi khi còn nhỏ và những địa điểm có kỷ niệm của chúng tôi. Và tôi cũng sẽ quay cảnh các bạn ở quê nhà gửi lời chúc mừng. Tôi hy vọng bạn tôi sẽ vui mừng khi nhìn thấy điều đó. 
--------------------
A/V/Mệnh đề + 는 + N: Hình thức danh từ hóa; động từ, tính từ, mệnh đề trước 는 bổ nghĩa cho danh từ đứng sau. 
V + (으)면 좋겠다: Cấu trúc thể hiện mong ước, mong muốn. Nếu (như thế này) thì tốt.
g_text_translate.en: My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.fr:
Mon ami proche se marie le mois prochain. Le mariage va avoir lieu à l'étranger, mais je ne peux pas y aller à cause du travail. Alors je prends une vidéo avec mon téléphone et j'essaie de l'envoyer à mon ami. Je vais prendre des photos de l'école où mon ami et moi sommes allés quand nous étions jeunes et des endroits où nous avons des souvenirs. Et je filmerai les félicitations de nos amis locaux. J'espère que mon ami sera content de le voir.


#######

My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.es:
Mi amigo cercano se casa el próximo mes. La boda se va a celebrar en el extranjero, pero no puedo ir por motivos de trabajo. Así que tomo un video con mi teléfono y trato de enviárselo a mi amigo. Voy a tomar fotos de la escuela a la que fuimos mi amigo y yo cuando éramos jóvenes y los lugares donde tenemos recuerdos. Y filmaré las felicitaciones de nuestros amigos locales. Espero que mi amigo esté feliz de verlo.


#######

My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.id:
Teman dekat saya akan menikah bulan depan. Pernikahannya akan diadakan di luar negeri, tapi aku tidak bisa pergi karena pekerjaan. Jadi saya mengambil video dengan ponsel saya dan mencoba mengirimkannya ke teman saya. Saya akan memotret sekolah yang saya dan teman saya kunjungi ketika kami masih muda dan tempat-tempat di mana kami memiliki kenangan. Dan saya akan merekam ucapan selamat dari teman-teman kampung halaman kami. Semoga teman saya senang melihatnya.


#######

My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.ja:
私の親友が来月結婚します。結婚式は海外で行うのですが、仕事で行けません。だから私は自分の携帯電話でビデオを撮り、それを友達に送ろうとします.友達と一緒に子供の頃に通った学校や、思い出のある場所を写真に撮ります。そして、地元の友達からのお祝いを撮影します。私の友人がそれを見て喜んでくれることを願っています。


#######

My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.de:
Mein enger Freund heiratet nächsten Monat. Die Hochzeit wird im Ausland stattfinden, aber ich kann wegen der Arbeit nicht gehen. Also mache ich ein Video mit meinem Handy und versuche es meinem Freund zu schicken. Ich werde Fotos von der Schule machen, die mein Freund und ich besucht haben, als wir jung waren, und von den Orten, an denen wir Erinnerungen haben. Und ich werde Glückwünsche von unseren Freunden aus der Heimatstadt filmen. Ich hoffe, mein Freund wird sich darüber freuen.

我的好朋友下个月要结婚了。婚礼要在海外举行，但我因为工作不能去。所以我用手机拍了一段视频，然后尝试发送给我的朋友。我要拍我和朋友小时候去过的学校和我们有回忆的地方。我会拍下我们家乡朋友的祝贺。我希望我的朋友看到​​它会很高兴。


#######

My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.

g_text_translate.pt:
Meu amigo próximo vai se casar no mês que vem. O casamento será realizado no exterior, mas não posso ir por causa do trabalho. Então faço um vídeo com meu celular e tento enviar para meu amigo. Vou tirar fotos da escola que meu amigo e eu frequentamos quando éramos jovens e dos lugares onde temos lembranças. E vou filmar os parabéns dos nossos amigos da cidade natal. Espero que meu amigo fique feliz em ver isso.

I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.hi:
मेरे करीबी दोस्त की अगले महीने शादी है। शादी विदेश में होने वाली है, लेकिन मैं काम के कारण नहीं जा सकता। इसलिए मैं अपने फोन से एक वीडियो लेता हूं और इसे अपने दोस्त को भेजने की कोशिश करता हूं। मैं उस स्कूल की तस्वीरें लेने जा रहा हूं जहां मैं और मेरा दोस्त बचपन में गए थे और उन जगहों की भी जहां से हमारी यादें जुड़ी हुई हैं। और मैं अपने गृहनगर मित्रों की ओर से बधाइयां फिल्माऊंगा। मुझे उम्मीद है कि मेरा दोस्त इसे देखकर खुश होगा.


#######

My close friend is getting married next month. The wedding is going to be held overseas, but I can't go because of work. So I take a video with my phone and try to send it to my friend. I'm going to take pictures of the school my friend and I went to when we were young and the places where we have memories. And I'll film congratulations from our hometown friends. I hope my friend will be happy to see it.
g_text_translate.tr:
Yakın arkadaşım önümüzdeki ay evleniyor. Düğün yurt dışında yapılacak ama iş nedeniyle gidemiyorum. Bu yüzden telefonumla bir video çekip arkadaşıma göndermeye çalışıyorum. Arkadaşımla küçükken gittiğimiz okulun ve anılarımızın olduğu yerlerin fotoğraflarını çekeceğim. Ve memleketteki dostlarımızın tebriklerini filme çekeceğim. Umarım arkadaşım bunu görünce mutlu olur.


#######

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠: 
1. Đi để gửi
2. Định gửi
3. Không thể gửi được
4. Chưa từng gửi
--------------------
V + (으)러 가다: Đi để làm gì. 
V + (으)려고 하다: Định, sẽ làm gì đó. 
V + (ㅇ)ㄹ 수 없다: Không thể. 
V + (으)ㄴ 적이 있다/없다: Diễn tả kinh nghiệm đã từng hoặc chưa từng làm gì trong quá khứ. 

Trong đoạn văn sử dụng chủ yếu đuôi (으)ㄹ 겁니다 - tương lai, ý định. Vậy ta chọn đáp án 2 là hợp lý.
explain.en:
Fill the suitable phrase in <g>㉠</g>: 
1. Go to send
2. Try to send
3. Cannot send
4. Never send
--------------------
<g>V + (으)러 가다</g>: To go for what.
<g>V + (으)려고 하다</g>: To intend to, will do something.
<g>V + (ㅇ)ㄹ 수 없다</g>: Can't do something.
<g>V + (으)ㄴ 적이 있다/없다</g>: Expresses the experience of having done or never done anything in the past.

In the passage, it uses mainly the ending <g>(으)ㄹ 겁니다</g> - future, intention. So we choose answer 2 is reasonable.

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 적이 있다/없다</g>: Exprime l'expérience d'avoir fait ou de ne jamais rien faire dans le passé.

Dans le passage, il utilise principalement la terminaison<g>(으)ㄹ 겁니다</g>- avenir, intention. Nous choisissons donc la réponse 2 est raisonnable.

<g>V + (으)ㄴ 적이 있다/없다</g>: Expresses the experience of having done or never done anything in the past.

In the passage, it uses mainly the ending <g>(으)ㄹ 겁니다</g> - future, intention. So we choose answer 2 is reasonable.

q_answer: 저는 친구의 결혼을 축하해 주고 싶습니다.
저는 고향 친구들과 결혼식에 가려고 합니다.
친구는 고향에 와서 결혼식을 하려고 합니다.
친구는 제가 찍은 영상을 보고 좋아했습니다.

explain.vi:
Từ nội dung của đoạn trên chúng ta có thể biết được điều gì? 
1. Tôi muốn chúc mừng đám cưới của bạn tôi. 
2. Tôi định đi dự đám cưới với những người bạn ở quê. 
3. Bạn tôi định về quê tổ chức đám cưới. 
4. Bạn tôi đã xem video tôi quay và rất thích nó. 
--------------------
축하하다: Chúc mừng
결혼식: Lễ kết hôn

Người bạn của "nhân vật tôi" tổ chức đám cưới ở nước ngoài nên "nhân vật tôi" không đi được. Để chúc mừng đám cưới bạn, "nhân vật tôi" định làm một video.

4. My friend watched the video I filmed and liked it very much.

<g>결혼식</g>: Marriage ceremony

general.g_text: 요즘 공항에서 여러 가지 서비스를 즐길 수 있습니다. 공항 안에 여행으로 피곤한 사람들이 잘 수 있는 방과 샤워할 수 있는 곳이 있습니다. 그리고 여행 가방이 고장 났을 때 가방을 ( ㉠ ) 빌려주는 서비스도 있습니다. 겨울에 따뜻한 나라로 가는 사람들을 위해 겨울옷을 맡아 주는 곳도 있습니다. 여권을 안 가져온 사람들에게 여권을 만들어 주기도 합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Dạo gần đây có nhiều dịch vụ có thể sử dụng ngay tại sân bay. Có phòng ngủ và nơi mà những người mệt mỏi vì đi du lịch có thể ngủ và tắm trong đó. Và cũng có dịch vụ ( ㉠ ) cho mượn vali khi vali của du khách bị hỏng. Cũng có nơi nhận giữ quần áo mùa đông cho du khách đến những nước có thời tiết ấm áp vào mùa đông. Thậm chí sân bay còn giúp làm hộ chiếu cho những ai không mang hộ chiếu theo.
g_text_translate.en: There are several services available at the airport these days. Inside the airport, there are rooms for those who are tired from travel and places for them to take a shower. And there is also a service that fixes or lends a suitcase in case the suitcase is broken. There are also places that keep winter clothes for people traveling to warm countries in winter. They even make passports for those who didn't bring them.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il existe plusieurs services disponibles à l'aéroport ces jours-ci. À l'intérieur de l'aéroport, il y a des chambres pour ceux qui sont fatigués du voyage et des endroits où ils peuvent prendre une douche. Et il y a aussi un service qui répare ou prête une valise en cas de casse. Il existe également des endroits qui gardent les vêtements d'hiver pour les personnes voyageant dans les pays chauds en hiver. Ils fabriquent même des passeports pour ceux qui ne les ont pas apportés.

#######

There are several services available at the airport these days. Inside the airport, there are rooms for those who are tired from travel and places for them to take a shower. And there is also a service that fixes or lends a suitcase in case the suitcase is broken. There are also places that keep winter clothes for people traveling to warm countries in winter. They even make passports for those who didn't bring them.
g_text_translate.es:
Hay varios servicios disponibles en el aeropuerto en estos días. Dentro del aeropuerto, hay habitaciones para aquellos que están cansados ​​del viaje y lugares para que se duchen. Y también hay un servicio que arregla o presta una maleta en caso de que se rompa la maleta. También hay lugares que guardan ropa de invierno para personas que viajan a países cálidos en invierno. Incluso hacen pasaportes para los que no los trajeron.

#######

There are several services available at the airport these days. Inside the airport, there are rooms for those who are tired from travel and places for them to take a shower. And there is also a service that fixes or lends a suitcase in case the suitcase is broken. There are also places that keep winter clothes for people traveling to warm countries in winter. They even make passports for those who didn't bring them.
g_text_translate.id:
Ada beberapa layanan yang tersedia di bandara hari ini. Di dalam bandara terdapat kamar untuk mereka yang lelah karena perjalanan dan tempat untuk mandi. Dan ada juga layanan yang memperbaiki atau meminjamkan koper jika koper rusak. Ada juga tempat yang menyimpan pakaian musim dingin untuk orang-orang yang bepergian ke negara-negara hangat di musim dingin. Mereka bahkan membuat paspor bagi mereka yang tidak membawanya.

#######

There are several services available at the airport these days. Inside the airport, there are rooms for those who are tired from travel and places for them to take a shower. And there is also a service that fixes or lends a suitcase in case the suitcase is broken. There are also places that keep winter clothes for people traveling to warm countries in winter. They even make passports for those who didn't bring them.
g_text_translate.ja:
最近では、空港で利用できるサービスがいくつかあります。空港内には、旅に疲れた人のための部屋やシャワーを浴びる場所があります。また、スーツケースが壊れた場合に備えて、スーツケースを修理または貸与するサービスもあります。冬に暖かい国に旅行する人のために防寒着を置いているところもあります。持ってこなかった人のパスポートも作ってくれます。

#######

They even make passports for those who didn't bring them.
g_text_translate.de:
Heutzutage stehen am Flughafen mehrere Dienstleistungen zur Verfügung. Im Flughafen gibt es Zimmer für Reisemüde und Duschen. Und es gibt auch einen Service, der einen Koffer repariert oder verleiht, falls der Koffer kaputt ist. Es gibt auch Orte, an denen Winterkleidung für Menschen aufbewahrt wird, die im Winter in warme Länder reisen. Sie machen sogar Pässe für diejenigen, die sie nicht mitgebracht haben.

#######

E c'è anche un servizio che aggiusta o presta una valigia nel caso la valigia si rompa. Ci sono anche posti che tengono vestiti invernali per chi viaggia in paesi caldi in inverno. Fanno anche passaporti per chi non li ha portati.

g_text_translate.ru:
В эти дни в аэропорту доступно несколько услуг. Внутри аэропорта есть комнаты для уставших от путешествия и места, где можно принять душ. А еще есть служба, которая чинит или одалживает чемодан, если чемодан сломается. Есть также места, где хранится зимняя одежда для людей, отправляющихся зимой в теплые страны. Они даже делают паспорта тем, кто их не принес.

ปัจจุบันมีบริการหลายอย่างที่สนามบิน ภายในสนามบินมีห้องสำหรับผู้ที่เหนื่อยล้าจากการเดินทางและมีที่ให้อาบน้ำ และยังมีบริการซ่อมหรือให้ยืมกระเป๋าเดินทางในกรณีที่กระเป๋าเดินทางชำรุด นอกจากนี้ยังมีสถานที่เก็บเสื้อผ้ากันหนาวสำหรับผู้ที่เดินทางไปยังประเทศที่อบอุ่นในฤดูหนาวอีกด้วย พวกเขายังทำหนังสือเดินทางให้กับผู้ที่ไม่ได้นำมาด้วย

इन दिनों हवाई अड्डे पर कई सेवाएँ उपलब्ध हैं। हवाई अड्डे के अंदर, यात्रा से थके हुए लोगों के लिए कमरे और स्नान करने के लिए स्थान हैं। और एक ऐसी सेवा भी है जो सूटकेस टूट जाने पर उसे ठीक कराती है या उधार देती है। ऐसे स्थान भी हैं जो सर्दियों में गर्म देशों की यात्रा करने वाले लोगों के लिए सर्दियों के कपड़े रखते हैं। वे उन लोगों के भी पासपोर्ट बनाते हैं जो उन्हें नहीं लाते।

Ayrıca valizin kırılması durumunda valizi tamir eden veya ödünç veren bir hizmet de bulunmaktadır. Kışın sıcak ülkelere seyahat eden insanlar için kışlık kıyafet bulunduran yerler de var. Getirmeyenlere pasaport bile yaptırıyorlar.

general.g_text: 몇 달 전 우리 동네에 피아노 학원이 생겼습니다. 어머니는 그 학원 앞을 지날 때마다 한참 동안 서서 피아노 소리를 들으셨습니다. 어머니가 피아노를 배우고 싶어 하시는 것 같아서 저는  ( ㉠ ). 처음에 어머니는 나이가 많아서 학원에 다니는 것을 부끄러워하셨습니다. 하지만 요즘은 즐겁게 학원에 다니시고 가끔 가족 모임에서 손녀와 함께 연주도 하십니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Một trung tâm dạy đàn piano được mở trong khu phố nhà tôi cách đây vài tháng. Mỗi khi đi ngang qua đó, mẹ tôi đều đứng lại một lúc lâu và lắng nghe tiếng đàn piano. Có lẽ mẹ tôi muốn học piano nên tôi ( ㉠ ). Ban đầu mẹ tôi rất xấu hổ khi đến trung tâm vì bà cảm thấy mình đã lớn tuổi. Nhưng dạo gần đây mẹ tôi rất vui vẻ đi học đàn tại trung tâm và thỉnh thoảng, bà còn biểu diễn cùng cháu gái trong các cuộc họp gia đình.
g_text_translate.en: A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il y a quelques mois, une académie de piano a ouvert dans mon quartier. Chaque fois que ma mère passait devant l'académie, elle restait longtemps debout et écoutait du piano. J'ai inscrit ma mère à l'académie parce qu'elle semblait vouloir apprendre le piano. Au début, ma mère était gênée d'aller à l'académie parce qu'elle était vieille. Mais ces jours-ci, elle va joyeusement à l'académie et joue parfois avec sa petite-fille lors de réunions de famille.

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.es:
Hace unos meses abrió una academia de piano en mi barrio. Cada vez que mi madre pasaba por la academia, se paraba por mucho tiempo y escuchaba el piano. Inscribí a mi madre en la academia porque parecía querer aprender piano. Al principio, a mi madre le daba vergüenza asistir a la academia porque era mayor. Pero en estos días va feliz a la academia y, a veces, juega con su nieta en las reuniones familiares.

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.id:
Beberapa bulan yang lalu, sebuah akademi piano dibuka di lingkungan saya. Setiap kali ibuku melewati akademi, dia berdiri lama dan mendengarkan piano. Saya mendaftarkan ibu saya di akademi karena dia sepertinya ingin belajar piano. Pada awalnya, ibu saya malu untuk menghadiri akademi karena dia sudah tua. Tapi akhir-akhir ini, dia pergi ke akademi dengan gembira dan terkadang bermain dengan cucunya di pertemuan keluarga.

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.ja:
数ヶ月前、私の近所にピアノアカデミーがオープンしました。母は学院の前を通るたびに、長い間立ちっぱなしでピアノに耳を傾けていました。母がピアノを習いたいらしいので、母をアカデミーに入学させました。最初、母は年をとっていたのでアカデミーに通うことを恥ずかしく思っていました。でも最近は楽しく学園に通い、家族の集まりで孫娘と遊ぶこともある。

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.de:
Vor ein paar Monaten hat in meiner Nachbarschaft eine Klavierakademie eröffnet. Wenn meine Mutter an der Akademie vorbeikam, stand sie lange da und hörte Klavier. Ich schrieb meine Mutter an der Akademie ein, weil sie offenbar Klavier lernen wollte. Anfangs war es meiner Mutter peinlich, die Akademie zu besuchen, weil sie alt war. Aber heutzutage geht sie gerne zur Akademie und spielt manchmal mit ihrer Enkelin bei Familientreffen.

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
几个月前，我家附近开了一家钢琴学院。每当妈妈路过学院时，她都会站很久，听着钢琴曲。我给我妈妈报了名，因为她似乎想学钢琴。起初，我妈妈因为年纪大了，很不好意思上学院。但这些天，她开心地去学院，有时在家庭聚会上和孙女一起玩。

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
幾個月前，我家附近開了一家鋼琴學院。每當媽媽路過學院時，她都會站很久，聽著鋼琴曲。我給我媽媽報了名，因為她似乎想學鋼琴。起初，我媽媽因為年紀大了，很不好意思上學院。但這些天，她開心地去學院，有時在家庭聚會上和孫女一起玩。

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.it:
Qualche mese fa, nel mio quartiere, è stata aperta un'accademia di pianoforte. Ogni volta che mia madre passava per l'accademia, rimaneva a lungo ad ascoltare il pianoforte. Ho iscritto mia madre all'accademia perché sembrava voler imparare a suonare il pianoforte. All'inizio mia madre era imbarazzata a frequentare l'accademia perché era vecchia. Ma in questi giorni va felicemente all'accademia e talvolta gioca con sua nipote alle riunioni di famiglia.

#######

A few months ago, a piano academy opened in my neighborhood. Whenever my mother passed by the academy, she stood for a long time and listened to the piano. I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.ru:
Несколько месяцев назад в моем районе открылась фортепианная академия. Всякий раз, когда моя мама проходила мимо академии, она подолгу стояла и слушала фортепиано. Я записал маму в академию, потому что она, похоже, хотела научиться играть на фортепиано. Поначалу моя мама стеснялась посещать академию, потому что была старой. Но сейчас она с радостью ходит в академию и иногда играет с внучкой на семейных посиделках.

#######

I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. g_text_translate.th:
ไม่กี่เดือนที่ผ่านมา สถาบันสอนเปียโนเปิดขึ้นในละแวกบ้านของฉัน เมื่อใดก็ตามที่แม่ของฉันเดินผ่านโรงเรียน เธอก็ยืนฟังเปียโนเป็นเวลานาน ฉันสมัครให้แม่เข้าเรียนในโรงเรียนเพราะดูเหมือนเธออยากเรียนเปียโน ตอนแรกแม่อายที่จะเข้าเรียนเพราะอายุมากแล้ว แต่ทุกวันนี้ เธอไปโรงเรียนอย่างมีความสุข และบางครั้งก็เล่นกับหลานสาวในงานรวมตัวของครอบครัว

#######

I enrolled my mother in the academy because she seemed to want to learn piano. At first, my mother was embarrassed to attend the academy because she was old. But these days, she goes to the academy happily and sometimes plays with her granddaughter at family gatherings.
g_text_translate.pt:
Há alguns meses, abriu uma academia de piano no meu bairro. Sempre que minha mãe passava pela academia, ela ficava muito tempo parada ouvindo piano. Matriculei minha mãe na academia porque ela parecia querer aprender piano. No início, minha mãe ficou com vergonha de frequentar a academia porque era idosa. Mas hoje em dia ela vai feliz para a academia e às vezes brinca com a neta nas reuniões de família.

g_text_translate.hi:
कुछ महीने पहले, मेरे पड़ोस में एक पियानो अकादमी खुली। मेरी मां जब भी अकादमी के पास से गुजरतीं तो काफी देर तक खड़ी होकर पियानो सुनती रहतीं। मैंने अपनी माँ को अकादमी में नामांकित किया क्योंकि वह पियानो सीखना चाहती थी। सबसे पहले, मेरी माँ को अकादमी में जाने में शर्मिंदगी होती थी क्योंकि वह बूढ़ी थीं। लेकिन इन दिनों, वह खुशी-खुशी अकादमी जाती है और कभी-कभी पारिवारिक समारोहों में अपनी पोती के साथ खेलती है।

g_text_translate.tr:
Birkaç ay önce mahallemde bir piyano akademisi açıldı. Annem ne zaman akademinin önünden geçse uzun süre ayakta durur ve piyano dinlerdi. Annemi akademiye kaydettirdim çünkü piyano öğrenmek istiyormuş gibi görünüyordu. Annem yaşlı olduğu için ilk başta akademiye gitmekten utanıyordu. Ancak bu günlerde akademiye mutlu bir şekilde gidiyor ve bazen torunuyla aile toplantılarında oynuyor.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 어머니는 가족들 앞에서 피아노를 안 치십니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn. 
1. Mẹ tôi học piano một cách vui vẻ. 
2. Khu phố tôi ở không có trung tâm dạy đàn piano. 
3. Tôi dạy mẹ chơi piano. 
4. Mẹ tôi không chơi piano trước mặt gia đình. 
--------------------
피아노 학원: Trung tâm dạy piano
나이가 많다: Có tuổi, lớn tuổi
부끄럽다: Xấu hổ
즐겁다: Vui vẻ

A + 게: Một cách (Biến đổi từ tính từ thành trạng từ)
V/A + (으)시다: Kính ngữ của động từ/tính từ

Ban đầu người mẹ xấu hổ vì tuổi mình đã cao nhưng sau một thời gian bà đã đi học đàn một cách vui vẻ. Vì vậy đáp án 1 là đáp án chính xác.
explain.en:
Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. My mother learns piano happily. 
2. There is no piano academy in my neighborhood. 
3. I teach my mother to play the piano. 
4. My mother doesn't play the piano in front of my family.
--------------------
<g>피아노 학원:</g> Piano academy
<g>나이가 많다:</g> Be elderly
<g>부끄럽다:</g> Be embarrassed
<g>즐겁다:</g> Be enjoyable, joyful, cheerful, happy

<g>A + 게:</g> Changing adjectives into adverbs
<g>V/A + (으)시다:</g> Honorific verb/adjective

At first the mother was embarrassed because of her advanced age, but after a while she happily went to the piano academy. So 1 is the correct answer.
explain.fr:
Choisissez l'option qui correspond au paragraphe.
1. Ma mère apprend le piano avec bonheur.
2. Il n'y a pas d'académie de piano dans mon quartier.
3. J'apprends à ma mère à jouer du piano.
4. Ma mère ne joue pas du piano devant ma famille.
--------------------
<g>피아노 학원:</g>Académie de piano
<g>나이가 많다:</g>Être âgé
<g>부끄럽다:</g>Être embarassé
<g>즐겁다:</g>Soyez agréable, joyeux, joyeux, heureux

<g>A + 게:</g>Changer les adjectifs en adverbes
<g>V/A + (으)시다:</g>Verbe/adjectif honorifique

Au début, la mère était gênée à cause de son âge avancé, mais après un certain temps, elle est allée joyeusement à l'académie de piano. Donc 1 est la bonne réponse.

Elija la opción que corresponda al párrafo.

4. Mi madre no toca el piano delante de mi familia.
--------------------

<g>나이가 많다:</g>ser anciano
<g>부끄럽다:</g>Estar embarazado
<g>즐겁다:</g>Ser agradable, alegre, alegre, feliz

<g>A + 게:</g>Cambio de adjetivos en adverbios
<g>V/A + (으)시다:</g>verbo/adjetivo honorífico

general.g_text: 인주시장은 오래된 시장입니다. 그런데 요즘 사람들은 오래된 시장을 별로 좋아하지 않아서 찾는 사람이 적어졌습니다. 시장을 새롭게 바꾸기 위해서 가게 주인들은 시장에 재미있는 그림을 전시하고 가게의 이름도 예쁘게 써서 걸었습니다. 또 이 시장에서만 볼 수 있는 다양한 물건들도 팔기 시작했습니다. 시장이 바뀐 후부터 사람들이 다시 ( ㉠ ).

g_text_translate.vi: Chợ Inju là một khu chợ lâu đời. Nhưng bây giờ người ta không thích những khu chợ cũ lắm nên người lui tới ngày càng ít đi. Để làm mới khu chợ, các chủ cửa hàng đã trưng bày những bức tranh hài hước trong chợ và tên của cửa hàng cũng được viết một cách hoa mỹ. Họ cũng bắt đầu bán nhiều mặt hàng chỉ có thể tìm thấy ở nơi này. Sau khi khu chợ thay đổi, mọi người bắt đầu lại (㉠).
g_text_translate.en: Inju Market is an old market. But people don't really like old markets these days, so fewer people visit it. In order to renew the market, shop owners displayed interesting paintings in the market and wrote the name of the store in a flowery way and then hung it up. They also started selling a variety of items that you can only see in this market. People are coming here again since the market renewed.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le marché d'Inju est un ancien marché. Mais les gens n'aiment pas vraiment les vieux marchés de nos jours, donc moins de gens le visitent. Afin de renouveler le marché, les commerçants ont exposé des peintures intéressantes sur le marché et ont écrit le nom du magasin de manière fleurie, puis l'ont accroché. Ils ont également commencé à vendre une variété d'articles que vous ne pouvez voir que sur ce marché. Les gens reviennent ici depuis que le marché s'est renouvelé.

#######

Inju Market is an old market. But people don't really like old markets these days, so fewer people visit it. In order to renew the market, shop owners displayed interesting paintings in the market and wrote the name of the store in a flowery way and then hung it up. They also started selling a variety of items that you can only see in this market. People are coming here again since the market renewed.
g_text_translate.es:
Inju Market es un mercado antiguo. Pero a la gente realmente no le gustan los mercados antiguos en estos días, por lo que menos personas lo visitan. Para renovar el mercado, los dueños de las tiendas exhibieron pinturas interesantes en el mercado y escribieron el nombre de la tienda con flores y luego la colgaron. También comenzaron a vender una variedad de artículos que solo puedes ver en este mercado. La gente viene aquí de nuevo desde que se renovó el mercado.

#######

Inju Market is an old market. But people don't really like old markets these days, so fewer people visit it. g_text_translate.de:

Sie begannen auch mit dem Verkauf einer Vielzahl von Artikeln, die Sie nur auf diesem Markt sehen können. Die Leute kommen wieder hierher, seit sich der Markt erneuert hat.

इंजु मार्केट एक पुराना बाजार है। लेकिन आजकल लोगों को पुराने बाज़ार पसंद नहीं आते, इसलिए वहां कम ही लोग आते हैं। बाज़ार को नवीनीकृत करने के लिए, दुकान मालिकों ने बाज़ार में दिलचस्प पेंटिंग प्रदर्शित कीं और दुकान का नाम फूलों से लिखा और फिर उसे लटका दिया। उन्होंने विभिन्न प्रकार की वस्तुएं भी बेचना शुरू कर दिया जिन्हें आप केवल इसी बाजार में देख सकते हैं। बाजार के नवीनीकरण के बाद से लोग दोबारा यहां आ रहे हैं।

Ayrıca sadece bu pazarda görebileceğiniz çeşitli eşyaları da satmaya başladılar. Pazar yenilendiğinden beri insanlar buraya tekrar geliyor.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn. 
1. Chợ Inju mới xuất hiện gần đây.

general.g_text: 예전에 제 꿈은 유명한 영화배우였습니다. 하지만 배우가 되는 것은 생각보다 어려웠습니다. 그래서 저는 ( ㉠ ). 아이들에게 동화책을 읽어 주는 일입니다. 배우는 아니지만 저는 책을 읽으면서 배우처럼 연기를 합니다. 아이들은 제 연기를 보고 크게 웃거나 박수를 치면서 좋아합니다. 배우가 되지는 못했지만 저는 지금 제가 하는 일이 아주 마음에 듭니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ngày trước, ước mơ của tôi là trở thành một diễn viên điện ảnh nổi tiếng. Nhưng trở thành diễn viên khó hơn tôi nghĩ rất nhiều. Vì vậy tôi ( ㉠ ). Đó là đọc truyện cổ tích cho trẻ em. Tuy không phải là diễn viên nhưng tôi vừa đọc sách vừa diễn xuất như một diễn viên. Bọn trẻ rất thích xem tôi diễn, chúng cười giòn tan hoặc vỗ tay thật giòn giã. Tôi không thể trở thành diễn viên nhưng tôi hài lòng với công việc hiện tại của mình.
g_text_translate.en: Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.fr:
À l'époque, mon rêve était de devenir un acteur de cinéma célèbre. Mais être acteur était plus difficile que je ne le pensais. J'ai donc trouvé un autre travail. C'est lire des contes de fées pour les enfants. Bien que je ne sois pas acteur, j'agis comme un acteur en lisant des livres. Les enfants adorent voir mes performances et éclater de rire ou applaudir. Je ne suis pas devenu acteur mais je suis satisfait de mon travail actuel.

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.es:
Antes, mi sueño era convertirme en un famoso actor de cine. Pero ser actor fue más difícil de lo que pensaba. Así que encontré otro trabajo. Es leer cuentos de hadas para niños. Aunque no soy actor, actúo como un actor mientras leo libros. A los niños les encanta ver mis actuaciones y se ríen a carcajadas o aplauden. No me convertí en actor, pero estoy satisfecho con mi trabajo actual.

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.id:
Dulu, impian saya adalah menjadi aktor film terkenal. Tapi menjadi seorang aktor lebih sulit dari yang saya kira. Jadi saya menemukan pekerjaan lain. Ini adalah membaca dongeng untuk anak-anak. Meskipun saya bukan seorang aktor, saya bertindak seperti seorang aktor saat membaca buku. Anak-anak senang melihat penampilan saya dan tertawa terbahak-bahak atau bertepuk tangan. Saya tidak menjadi aktor tapi saya puas dengan pekerjaan saya saat ini.

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.ja:
昔の私の夢は、有名な映画俳優になることでした。でも役者は思ったより大変でした。それで、別の仕事を見つけました。子供向けのおとぎ話を読んでいます。私は俳優ではありませんが、本を読みながら俳優のふりをしています。子供たちは私のパフォーマンスを見て、大声で笑ったり拍手したりするのが大好きです。俳優にはなりませんでしたが、今の仕事に満足しています。

#######

Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.de:
Früher war es mein Traum, ein berühmter Filmschauspieler zu werden. Aber Schauspieler zu sein war schwieriger als ich dachte. Also fand ich einen anderen Job. Es liest Märchen für Kinder. Obwohl ich kein Schauspieler bin, benehme ich mich wie ein Schauspieler, wenn ich Bücher lese. Die Kinder lieben es, meine Aufführungen zu sehen und laut zu lachen oder zu applaudieren. Ich bin kein Schauspieler geworden, aber mit meinem jetzigen Job bin ich zufrieden.

g_text_translate.ru:
Когда-то моей мечтой было стать известным киноактером. Но быть актером оказалось труднее, чем я думал. Поэтому я нашел другую работу. Это чтение сказок для детей. Хоть я и не актер, но, читая книги, веду себя как актер. Дети любят смотреть мои выступления, громко смеяться или аплодировать. Я не стал актером, но своей нынешней работой доволен.

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.th:
ย้อนกลับไปในสมัยก่อน ความฝันของฉันคือการเป็นนักแสดงภาพยนตร์ที่มีชื่อเสียง แต่การเป็นนักแสดงมันยากกว่าที่ฉันคิด ฉันก็เลยหางานใหม่ เป็นการอ่านนิทานสำหรับเด็ก แม้ว่าฉันจะไม่ใช่นักแสดง แต่ฉันก็ทำตัวเหมือนนักแสดงในขณะที่อ่านหนังสือ เด็กๆ ชอบดูการแสดงของฉันและหัวเราะออกมาดังๆ หรือปรบมือ ฉันไม่ได้เป็นนักแสดงแต่ฉันพอใจกับงานปัจจุบันของฉัน

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.pt:
Antigamente, meu sonho era me tornar um ator de cinema famoso. Mas ser ator foi mais difícil do que eu pensava. Então encontrei outro emprego. É ler contos de fadas para crianças. Embora eu não seja ator, ajo como ator enquanto leio livros. As crianças adoram ver minhas apresentações e rir alto ou aplaudir. Não me tornei ator, mas estou satisfeito com meu trabalho atual.

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.hi:
पुराने दिनों में, मेरा सपना एक प्रसिद्ध फिल्म अभिनेता बनना था। लेकिन एक अभिनेता बनना जितना मैंने सोचा था उससे कहीं अधिक कठिन था। इसलिए मुझे दूसरी नौकरी मिल गई. यह बच्चों के लिए परियों की कहानियां पढ़ना है। हालाँकि मैं एक अभिनेता नहीं हूँ, लेकिन किताबें पढ़ते समय मैं एक अभिनेता की तरह व्यवहार करता हूँ। बच्चों को मेरा प्रदर्शन देखना और जोर-जोर से हंसना या तालियां बजाना पसंद है। मैं अभिनेता तो नहीं बना लेकिन मैं अपनी वर्तमान नौकरी से संतुष्ट हूं।

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.
g_text_translate.tr:
O zamanlar hayalim ünlü bir sinema oyuncusu olmaktı. Ama oyuncu olmak düşündüğümden daha zordu. Bu yüzden başka bir iş buldum. Çocuklara masal okumaktır. Oyuncu olmasam da kitap okurken oyuncu gibi davranıyorum. Çocuklar performanslarımı görmeyi, yüksek sesle gülmeyi veya alkışlamayı seviyorlar. Oyuncu olmadım ama şu anki işimden memnunum.

#######

Back in the day, my dream was to become a famous movie actor. But being an actor was harder than I thought. So I found another job. It is reading fairy tales for children. Although I'm not an actor, I act like an actor while reading books. The children love to see my performances and laugh out loud or applaud. I didn't become an actor but I am satisfied with my current job.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠
1. Đã gặp diễn viên
2. Vừa mới trở lên nổi tiếng
3. Tìm một công việc khác
4. Nỗ lực nhiều hơn
--------------------
영화배우: Diễn viên điện ảnh
연기하다: Diễn xuất

N1보다 N2: So với N1 thì N2

Nhân vật không thể làm diễn viên nên đã chọn một công việc khác đơn giản hơn, nhưng vẫn có thể diễn xuất.
explain.en:

1. Met an actor
2. Just became famous
3. Found another job
4. Tried harder
--------------------
<g>영화배우:</g> Movie actor
<g>연기하다:</g> To act

<g>N1보다 N2:</g> Compared to N1, N2 is...

The character could not be an actor, so he chose another job, but he could still act.

explain.vi:
Nội dung có thể biết được từ đoạn văn là gì? 
1. Tôi là diễn viên điện ảnh. 
2. Tôi muốn chuyển việc. 
3. Bọn trẻ vừa xem phim vừa cười giòn giã. 
4. Những đứa trẻ thích thú khi tôi đọc sách cho chúng nghe. 
--------------------
박수를 치다: Vỗ tay

V + (으)면: Khi, nếu.
explain.en:
According to the article, what can you know?
1. I am a movie actor.
2. I want to change my job.
3. Children laugh out loud while watching the movie.
4. Children enjoy it when I read to them.
--------------------
<g>박수를 치다:</g> To applaud

<g>V + (으)면:</g> When, if.

4. Les enfants aiment quand je leur lis.
--------------------

<g>V + (으)면:</g>Quand si.

general.g_text: 저는 발표를 잘합니다. 하지만 전에는 발표를 잘하지 못했습니다. 여러 사람들이 저를 보고 있어서 너무 긴장했기 때문입니다. 저는 발표를 잘하고 싶어서 ( ㉠ ) 연습을 많이 했습니다. 혼자서 연습하는 것을 휴대전화로 찍고 잘 못한 부분을 다시 연습했습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi rất giỏi phát biểu. Nhưng trước đây, tôi lại không giỏi phát biểu lắm. Tôi cảm thấy căng thẳng vì lúc đó có rất nhiều người đang nhìn mình. Tôi rất muốn phát biểu thật tốt nên (  ) tôi thường luyện tập rất nhiều. Tôi quay lại phần mình tự luyện tập bằng điện thoại và luyện lại những phần mình chưa làm tốt.
g_text_translate.en: I am good at presenting. But in the past, I wasn't good at presenting. It's because I used to get nervous when a lot of people looked at me. I wanted to be a good presenter, so I practiced a lot before giving a presentation. I recorded the parts I practiced on my own with my phone and rehearsed the parts I didn't do well.
g_text_translate.fr:
Je suis doué pour présenter. Mais dans le passé, je n'étais pas doué pour la présentation. C'est parce que j'avais l'habitude d'être nerveux quand beaucoup de gens me regardaient. Je voulais être un bon présentateur, alors je me suis beaucoup entraîné avant de faire une présentation. J'ai enregistré les parties que je pratiquais seul avec mon téléphone et j'ai répété les parties que je n'avais pas bien faites.

#######

I am good at presenting. But in the past, I wasn't good at presenting. It's because I used to get nervous when a lot of people looked at me. I wanted to be a good presenter, so I practiced a lot before giving a presentation. I recorded the parts I practiced on my own with my phone and rehearsed the parts I didn't do well.
g_text_translate.es:
Soy bueno para presentar. Pero en el pasado, no era bueno presentando. Es porque solía ponerme nervioso cuando mucha gente me miraba. Quería ser un buen presentador, así que practiqué mucho antes de dar una presentación. Grabé las partes que practiqué por mi cuenta con mi teléfono y ensayé las partes que no hice bien.

#######

I am good at presenting. But in the past, I wasn't good at presenting. It's because I used to get nervous when a lot of people looked at me. I wanted to be a good presenter, so I practiced a lot before giving a presentation. I recorded the parts I practiced on my own with my phone and rehearsed the parts I didn't do well.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya pandai presentasi. Tapi di masa lalu, saya tidak pandai presentasi. Itu karena aku dulu gugup ketika banyak orang melihatku. Saya ingin menjadi presenter yang baik, jadi saya banyak berlatih sebelum memberikan presentasi. Saya merekam bagian-bagian yang saya latih sendiri dengan telepon saya dan melatih bagian-bagian yang tidak saya lakukan dengan baik.

#######

I am good at presenting. But in the past, I wasn't good at presenting. It's because I used to get nervous when a lot of people looked at me. I wanted to be a good presenter, so I practiced a lot before giving a presentation. I recorded the parts I practiced on my own with my phone and rehearsed the parts I didn't do well.
g_text_translate.ja:
私はプレゼンテーションが得意です。でも、昔はプレゼンが苦手でした。たくさんの人に見られると緊張してしまうからです。私は良いプレゼンターになりたかったので、プレゼンテーションをする前にたくさん練習しました。自力で練習した部分をスマホで録音し、苦手な部分をリハーサルしました。

#######

I am good at presenting. But in the past, I wasn't good at presenting. It's because I used to get nervous when a lot of people looked at me. I wanted to be a good presenter, so I practiced a lot before giving a presentation. I recorded the parts I practiced on my own with my phone and rehearsed the parts I didn't do well.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich kann gut präsentieren. Aber in der Vergangenheit war ich nicht gut im Präsentieren. Das liegt daran, dass ich früher nervös wurde, wenn viele Leute mich ansahen. Ich wollte ein guter Moderator sein, also habe ich viel geübt, bevor ich eine Präsentation hielt. Ich habe die Teile, die ich alleine geübt habe, mit meinem Handy aufgenommen und die Teile geprobt, die ich nicht gut gemacht habe.

#######

I am good at presenting. But in the past, I wasn't good at presenting. It's because I used to get nervous when a lot of people looked at me. #######

Ho registrato le parti su cui mi sono esercitato da solo con il mio telefono e ho provato le parti che non ho eseguito bene.

मैं प्रस्तुतीकरण में अच्छा हूँ. लेकिन अतीत में, मैं प्रस्तुतीकरण में अच्छा नहीं था। ऐसा इसलिए क्योंकि जब बहुत से लोग मेरी तरफ देखते थे तो मैं घबरा जाती थी। मैं एक अच्छा प्रस्तुतकर्ता बनना चाहता था, इसलिए प्रस्तुति देने से पहले मैंने बहुत अभ्यास किया। जिन भागों का मैंने स्वयं अभ्यास किया था, उन्हें मैंने अपने फ़ोन से रिकॉर्ड किया और जिन भागों का अभ्यास मैंने अच्छा नहीं किया था, उनका अभ्यास किया।

--------------------

V + 기 전에: Trước khi làm gì.
