1. I practice in front of everyone.
2. I was so nervous when practicing.
3. I recorded myself practicing with my phone.
4. When I gave a presentation, people told me where I didn't do well.
--------------------
<g>찍다:</g> To record (videos), to take (photos)
<g>잘 못하다:</g> To do something wrong, to make a mistake, to do something not well

<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, certain way)
<g>V + 는 것:</g> Changing verbs into nouns.
explain.hi:
वह विकल्प चुनें जो पैराग्राफ से मेल खाता हो।
1. मैं सबके सामने अभ्यास करता हूं.
2. अभ्यास करते समय मैं बहुत घबराया हुआ था।
3. मैंने अपने फोन से अभ्यास करते हुए खुद को रिकॉर्ड किया।
4. जब मैंने प्रेजेंटेशन दिया तो लोगों ने मुझसे कहा कि मैंने कहां अच्छा प्रदर्शन नहीं किया.
------------------------
<g>찍다:</g>(वीडियो) रिकॉर्ड करना, (फोटो) लेना
<g>잘 못하다:</g>कुछ गलत करना, गलती करना, कुछ अच्छा नहीं करना

<g>N + (으)로:</g>द्वारा (मतलब, निश्चित तरीके से)
<g>V + 는 것:</g>क्रिया को संज्ञा में बदलना.

#######

Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. I practice in front of everyone.
2. I was so nervous when practicing.
3. I recorded myself practicing with my phone.
4. When I gave a presentation, people told me where I didn't do well.
--------------------
<g>찍다:</g> To record (videos), to take (photos)
<g>잘 못하다:</g> To do something wrong, to make a mistake, to do something not well

<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, certain way)
<g>V + 는 것:</g> Changing verbs into nouns.
explain.tr:
Paragrafa karşılık gelen seçeneği seçin.
1. Herkesin önünde pratik yapıyorum.
2. Pratik yaparken çok gergindim.
3. Telefonumla pratik yaparken kendimi kaydettim.
4. Bir sunum yaptığımda insanlar bana hangi konularda iyi olmadığımı söylediler.
--------------------
<g>찍다:</g>Kaydetmek (videolar), çekmek (fotoğraflar)
<g>잘 못하다:</g>Yanlış bir şey yapmak, hata yapmak, iyi olmayan bir şey yapmak

<g>N + (으)로:</g>Tarafından (belirli bir şekilde)
<g>V + 는 것:</g>Fiillerin isme dönüştürülmesi.

#######

Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. I practice in front of everyone.
2. I was so nervous when practicing.
3. I recorded myself practicing with my phone.
4. When I gave a presentation, people told me where I didn't do well.
--------------------
<g>찍다:</g> To record (videos), to take (photos)
<g>잘 못하다:</g> To do something wrong, to make a mistake, to do something not well

<g>N + (으)로:</g> By (means, certain way)
<g>V + 는 것:</g> Changing verbs into nouns.

general.g_text: 설탕은 단맛을 낼 때 사용합니다. 음식을 오래 먹고 싶을 때 사용하기도 합니다. 그런데 설탕은 음식을 할 때만 쓰는 것은 아닙니다. 꽃병에 물과 함께 설탕을 넣으면 꽃을 오래 볼 수 있습니다. 옷을 빨 때 설탕을 넣으면 하얀색 옷이 더 깨끗해지고 설탕과 레몬을 같이 넣으면 옷이 부드러워집니다. 요리한 후에 손을 ( ㉠ ) 컵을 닦을 때 사용할 수도 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Đường được sử dụng để tạo ra vị ngọt. Nó cũng được sử dụng khi bạn muốn thức ăn có thể ăn được lâu. Tuy nhiên đường không chỉ được sử dụng khi nấu ăn. Cho đường vào bình hoa cùng với nước sẽ giúp hoa tươi lâu hơn. Khi giặt quần áo, thêm đường vào cũng sẽ giúp quần áo trắng sạch hơn, đồng thời nếu thêm cả đường và chanh vào sẽ giúp quần áo mềm mại hơn. Cũng có thể dùng đường để (  ) tay khi sau nấu ăn hoặc để làm sạch cốc.
g_text_translate.en: Sugar is used to sweeten. It is also used when you want food to last for a long time. However, sugar is not only used in cooking. Putting sugar along with water in the vase will make the flowers last longer.  When washing clothes, adding sugar makes white clothes cleaner, and adding sugar and lemon together makes clothes softer. You can also use sugar to wash your hands after cooking or to clean your cup.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le sucre est utilisé pour sucrer. Il est également utilisé lorsque vous voulez que les aliments durent longtemps. Cependant, le sucre n'est pas seulement utilisé en cuisine. Mettre du sucre avec de l'eau dans le vase fera durer les fleurs plus longtemps. Lorsque vous lavez des vêtements, l'ajout de sucre rend les vêtements blancs plus propres, et l'ajout de sucre et de citron rend les vêtements plus doux. Vous pouvez également utiliser du sucre pour vous laver les mains après la cuisson ou pour nettoyer votre tasse.

#######

Sugar is used to sweeten. It is also used when you want food to last for a long time. However, sugar is not only used in cooking. Putting sugar along with water in the vase will make the flowers last longer.  When washing clothes, adding sugar makes white clothes cleaner, and adding sugar and lemon together makes clothes softer. You can also use sugar to wash your hands after cooking or to clean your cup.
g_text_translate.es:
El azúcar se usa para endulzar. También se utiliza cuando se quiere que la comida dure mucho tiempo. Sin embargo, el azúcar no solo se usa para cocinar. Poner azúcar junto con agua en el florero hará que las flores duren más. Al lavar la ropa, agregar azúcar hace que la ropa blanca quede más limpia, y agregar azúcar y limón juntos hace que la ropa sea más suave. También puedes usar azúcar para lavarte las manos después de cocinar o para limpiar tu taza.

#######

Putting sugar along with water in the vase will make the flowers last longer.  When washing clothes, adding sugar makes white clothes cleaner, and adding sugar and lemon together makes clothes softer. You can also use sugar to wash your hands after cooking or to clean your cup.
g_text_translate.id:
Gula digunakan untuk mempermanis. Ini juga digunakan ketika Anda ingin makanan bertahan lama. Namun, gula tidak hanya digunakan dalam masakan. Menempatkan gula bersama dengan air di dalam vas akan membuat bunga bertahan lebih lama. Saat mencuci pakaian, menambahkan gula membuat pakaian putih lebih bersih, dan menambahkan gula dan lemon bersama-sama membuat pakaian lebih lembut. Anda juga dapat menggunakan gula untuk mencuci tangan setelah memasak atau untuk membersihkan cangkir Anda.

#######

g_text_translate.de:

Wenn Sie Zucker zusammen mit Wasser in die Vase geben, halten die Blumen länger. Beim Waschen von Kleidung macht die Zugabe von Zucker weiße Kleidung sauberer, und die gemeinsame Zugabe von Zucker und Zitrone macht die Kleidung weicher. Sie können Zucker auch verwenden, um sich nach dem Kochen die Hände zu waschen oder Ihre Tasse zu reinigen.

g_text_translate.hi:
चीनी का उपयोग मीठा करने के लिए किया जाता है। इसका उपयोग तब भी किया जाता है जब आप चाहते हैं कि भोजन लंबे समय तक चले। हालाँकि, चीनी का उपयोग केवल खाना पकाने में ही नहीं किया जाता है। फूलदान में पानी के साथ चीनी डालने से फूल लंबे समय तक टिके रहेंगे। कपड़े धोते समय चीनी मिलाने से सफेद कपड़े साफ हो जाते हैं और चीनी और नींबू मिलाने से कपड़े मुलायम हो जाते हैं। आप खाना पकाने के बाद हाथ धोने या अपना कप साफ करने के लिए भी चीनी का उपयोग कर सकते हैं।

Tatlandırmak için şeker kullanılır. Ayrıca yiyeceklerin uzun süre dayanmasını istediğinizde de kullanılır. Ancak şeker sadece yemek pişirmede kullanılmaz. Vazoya su ile birlikte şeker de koymak çiçeklerin daha uzun süre dayanmasını sağlayacaktır. Çamaşır yıkarken şeker eklemek beyaz kıyafetleri daha temiz hale getirir, şeker ve limonun birlikte eklenmesi ise çamaşırların daha yumuşak olmasını sağlar. Şekeri yemek pişirdikten sonra ellerinizi yıkamak veya bardağınızı temizlemek için de kullanabilirsiniz.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 설탕을 넣은 음식은 빨리 먹어야 합니다.
꽃병에 설탕을 넣으면 꽃이 오래 삽니다.
하얀 옷을 빨 때 설탕을 넣으면 좋지 않습니다.
빨래할 때 레몬과 설탕을 함께 쓰면 안 됩니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn.
1. Phải nhanh chóng ăn thức ăn có chứa đường.
2. Nếu bỏ đường vào bình hoa thì hoa có thể sống lâu.
3. Không nên cho đường vào khi giặt quần áo màu trắng.
4. Không được dùng chanh và đường khi giặt đồ.
--------------------
넣다: Cho, bỏ, đặt vào

V + (으)면: Nếu/khi làm gì
V + (으)면 안 되다: Không được làm gì

Bỏ đường vào bình hoa sẽ giúp hoa tươi lâu hơn, nên đáp án đúng là 2.
explain.en:
Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. Food with sugar should be eaten quickly. 
2. Putting sugar in the vase will make the flowers live longer.
3. It is not good to add sugar when washing white clothes.
4. Do not use lemon and sugar together when doing laundry.
--------------------
<g>넣다:</g> To put in

<g>V + (으)면:</g> If/when
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g> Should not/must not

Putting sugar in the vase will help the flowers stay fresh longer, so the correct answer is 2.

<g>넣다:</g>Para colocar

<g>V + (으)면:</g>Se quando
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g>Não deveria/não deveria

Colocar açúcar no vaso ajudará as flores a permanecerem frescas por mais tempo, então a resposta correta é 2.

#######

Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. Food with sugar should be eaten quickly. 
2. Putting sugar in the vase will make the flowers live longer.
3. It is not good to add sugar when washing white clothes.
4. Do not use lemon and sugar together when doing laundry.
--------------------
<g>넣다:</g> To put in

<g>V + (으)면:</g> If/when
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g> Should not/must not

Putting sugar in the vase will help the flowers stay fresh longer, so the correct answer is 2.
explain.hi:
वह विकल्प चुनें जो पैराग्राफ से मेल खाता हो।

3. सफेद कपड़े धोते समय चीनी मिलाना अच्छा नहीं होता है।
4. कपड़े धोते समय नींबू और चीनी का एक साथ प्रयोग न करें।
------------------------
<g>넣다:</g>इसमें रखने क लिए

<g>V + (으)면:</g>अगर जब
<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g>नहीं करना चाहिए/नहीं करना चाहिए

फूलदान में चीनी डालने से फूल लंबे समय तक ताजे बने रहेंगे, इसलिए सही उत्तर 2 है।

explain.tr:

4. Çamaşır yıkarken limon ve şekeri bir arada kullanmayın.

<g>V + (으)면 안 되다:</g>Yapmamalı / yapmamalı

general.g_text: 한국에서는 아이의 첫 번째 생일을 ‘돌’이라고 말합니다. 돌에는 아이가 물건을 잡는 특별한 행사를 합니다. 아이가 공을 잡으면 운동선수, 마이크를 잡으면 연예인이 될 것이라고 생각합니다. 연필은 선생님, 돈은 부자를 의미합니다. 아이 앞에 놓는 물건들의 ( ㉠ ) 모두 아이의 건강과 행복을 생각하는 마음이 들어 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ở Hàn Quốc, sinh nhật đầu tiên của một đứa trẻ được gọi là 'Dol - Tiệc thôi nôi'. Tại tiệc thôi nôi, một hoạt động được tổ chức để đứa trẻ chọn đồ. Nếu đứa trẻ chọn bóng, nó được cho là sẽ trở thành một vận động viên, nếu chọn micro thì sẽ làm nghệ sĩ. Nếu chọn bút chì thì là thầy giáo, còn nếu chọn tiền thì có nghĩa, sau này nó sẽ trở thành người giàu có. Đồ vật đặt trước mặt ( ㉠ ) đều có tâm niệm hướng đến sức khỏe và hạnh phúc của trẻ.
g_text_translate.en: In Korea, a child's first birthday is called 'Dol'. At 'Dol', there is a special activity for the child to choose objects. If the child catches the ball, he will become an athlete, and if he holds the microphone, he will become a celebrity. Pencil means teacher, money means rich person. The objects placed in front of the child have different meanings, but all of them contain the wish that the child is always healthy and happy.
g_text_translate.fr:
En Corée, le premier anniversaire d'un enfant s'appelle « Dol ». Chez 'Dol', il y a une activité spéciale pour que l'enfant choisisse des objets. Si l'enfant attrape le ballon, il deviendra un athlète, et s'il tient le micro, il deviendra une célébrité. Crayon signifie enseignant, argent signifie personne riche. Les objets placés devant l'enfant ont des significations différentes, mais tous contiennent le souhait que l'enfant soit toujours en bonne santé et heureux.

#######

In Korea, a child's first birthday is called 'Dol'. At 'Dol', there is a special activity for the child to choose objects. If the child catches the ball, he will become an athlete, and if he holds the microphone, he will become a celebrity. Pencil means teacher, money means rich person. The objects placed in front of the child have different meanings, but all of them contain the wish that the child is always healthy and happy.
g_text_translate.es:
En Corea, el primer cumpleaños de un niño se llama 'Dol'. En 'Dol', hay una actividad especial para que el niño elija objetos. Si el niño atrapa la pelota, se convertirá en un atleta, y si sostiene el micrófono, se convertirá en una celebridad. Lápiz significa maestro, dinero significa persona rica. Los objetos colocados frente al niño tienen diferentes significados, pero todos contienen el deseo de que el niño esté siempre sano y feliz.

#######

Jika anak menangkap bola, dia akan menjadi atlet, dan jika dia memegang mikrofon, dia akan menjadi selebriti. Pensil artinya guru, uang artinya orang kaya. Benda-benda yang diletakkan di depan anak memiliki arti yang berbeda-beda, namun semuanya mengandung harapan agar anak selalu sehat dan bahagia.

explain.zh-CN:
填空<g>㉠</g>用适当的短语。
1.有不同的含义，但
2.有不同的颜色，但
3.有特殊形状但
4.有相同的气氛，但
--------------------
<g>의미:</g>意义
<g>다르다:</g>与众不同
<g>물건을 잡다:</g>持有，选择，拿走某物

<g>V/A + 지만:</g>但是（表示对比）。

#######

Fill in the blank <g>㉠</g> with the appropriate phrase.
1. Have different meanings but
2. Have different colors but
3. Have the special shape but
4. Have the same atmosphere but
--------------------
<g>의미:</g> Meaning
<g>다르다:</g> Be different
<g>물건을 잡다:</g> To hold, to choose, to take something

<g>V/A + 지만:</g> But (indicating the contrast).

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 아이가 물건을 많이 잡으면 더 좋습니다.
물건을 잡는 행사는 첫 번째 생일에 합니다.
마이크를 잡으면 선생님이 될 것이라고 생각합니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn.
1. Quả bóng mang ý nghĩa là trở thành người giàu.
2. Đứa trẻ chọn nhiều đồ vật là tốt.
3. Hoạt động chọn đồ vật này được tổ chức vào sinh nhật đầu tiên.
4. Nếu chọn micro được cho là sẽ trở thành giáo viên.
--------------------
N + 을/를 의미하다: Có ý nghĩa, mang ý nghĩa là
N + (이)라고 말하다: Được gọi là.
explain.en:
Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. Ball means to be rich.
2. It's better if the child catches a lot of things. 
3. The activity of choosing objects is held on the first birthday.
4. People think that if the child chooses a microphone, he will become a teacher.
--------------------
<g>N + 을/를 의미하다:</g> To mean, have a meaning
<g>N + (이)라고 말하다:</g> To be called.

4. Les gens pensent que si l'enfant choisit un microphone, il deviendra enseignant.

<g>N + (이)라고 말하다:</g>Être appelé.

general.g_text: 저는 일 때문에 외국에서 삽니다. 여기는 언제나 여름입니다. 저와 아이들은 한국의 ( ㉠ ). 특히 예쁜 꽃이 피는 봄과 단풍을 볼 수 있는 가을이 그립습니다. 그런데 오늘 한국에 계시는 아버지에게서 소포가 왔습니다.  아버지가 그리신 고향의 사계절 그림이었습니다. 저는 고향의 사계절을 선물해 주신 아버지가 고마웠습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Vì công việc mà tôi phải sống ở nước ngoài. Ở đây lúc nào cũng là mùa hè. Tôi và con tôi ( ㉠ ) của Hàn Quốc. Đặc biệt tôi nhớ mùa xuân hoa nở rực rỡ và mùa thu có thể ngắm lá phong đỏ. Hôm nay tôi nhận được một bưu phẩm từ người bố đang sống ở Hàn Quốc gửi đến. Đó chính là bức tranh quê hương bốn mùa do chính bố tôi vẽ. Tôi rất biết ơn ông vì ông đã tặng tôi bốn mùa của quê hương.
g_text_translate.en: I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.fr:
Je vis à l'étranger pour le travail. C'est toujours l'été ici. Mes enfants et moi pensons beaucoup aux quatre saisons en Corée. Surtout, le printemps me manque quand de belles fleurs fleurissent et l'automne quand je peux voir des feuilles d'automne. Mais aujourd'hui, un colis est arrivé de mon père en Corée. C'était un tableau des quatre saisons de ma ville natale que mon père a dessiné. J'étais reconnaissant à mon père de m'avoir donné les quatre saisons de ma ville natale.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.es:
Vivo en el extranjero por trabajo. Aquí siempre es verano. Mis hijos y yo pensamos mucho sobre las cuatro estaciones en Corea. Especialmente, extraño la primavera cuando florecen hermosas flores y el otoño cuando puedo ver las hojas de otoño. Pero hoy, llegó un paquete de mi padre en Corea. Era un cuadro de las cuatro estaciones de mi ciudad natal que dibujó mi padre. Estaba agradecido con mi padre por darme las cuatro estaciones de mi ciudad natal.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya tinggal di luar negeri untuk bekerja. Di sini selalu musim panas. Saya dan anak-anak saya banyak berpikir tentang empat musim di Korea. Terutama, saya merindukan musim semi ketika bunga-bunga indah bermekaran dan musim gugur ketika saya bisa melihat dedaunan musim gugur. Tapi hari ini, sebuah parsel datang dari ayahku di Korea. Itu adalah lukisan empat musim di kampung halaman saya yang digambar ayah saya. Saya berterima kasih kepada ayah saya karena memberi saya empat musim di kampung halaman saya.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.ja:
仕事で海外に住んでいます。ここはいつも夏です。私と私の子供たちは、韓国の四季についてよく考えます。特に、美しい花が咲く春と、紅葉が見られる秋が恋しいです。でも今日、韓国の父から小包が届きました。父が描いた故郷の四季の絵でした。故郷の四季を与えてくれた父に感謝した。

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich lebe beruflich im Ausland. Hier ist immer Sommer. Ich und meine Kinder denken viel über die vier Jahreszeiten in Korea nach. Besonders vermisse ich den Frühling, wenn schöne Blumen blühen, und den Herbst, wenn ich Herbstblätter sehen kann. Aber heute ist ein Paket von meinem Vater aus Korea angekommen. Es war ein Gemälde der vier Jahreszeiten meiner Heimatstadt, das mein Vater gemalt hat. Ich war meinem Vater dankbar, dass er mir die vier Jahreszeiten meiner Heimatstadt geschenkt hat.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我住在国外工作。这里总是夏天。我和我的孩子们对韩国的四个季节想了很多。尤其怀念鲜花盛开的春天和看到秋叶的秋天。但是今天，我父亲在韩国寄来了一个包裹。那是我父亲画的家乡四个季节的画。感谢父亲给了我家乡的四个季节。

#######

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我住在國外工作。這裡總是夏天。我和我的孩子們對韓國的四個季節想了很多。尤其懷念鮮花盛開的春天和看到秋葉的秋天。但是今天，我父親在韓國寄來了一個包裹。那是我父親畫的家鄉四個季節的畫。感謝父親給了我家鄉的四個季節。

#######

g_text_translate.it:
Vivo all'estero per lavoro. Qui è sempre estate. Io ei miei figli pensiamo molto alle quattro stagioni in Corea. Soprattutto, mi manca la primavera quando sbocciano bellissimi fiori e l'autunno quando posso vedere le foglie autunnali. Ma oggi è arrivato un pacco da mio padre in Corea. Era un dipinto delle quattro stagioni della mia città natale disegnato da mio padre. Ero grato a mio padre per avermi dato le quattro stagioni della mia città natale.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. g_text_translate.ru:
Я живу за границей по работе. Здесь всегда лето. Я и мои дети много думаем о четырех временах года в Корее. Особенно я скучаю по весне, когда распускаются красивые цветы, и по осени, когда я вижу осенние листья. Но сегодня пришла посылка от моего отца из Кореи. Это была картина с изображением четырех времен года моего родного города, которую нарисовал мой отец. Я был благодарен отцу за то, что он подарил мне четыре времени года моего родного города.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. g_text_translate.th:
ฉันอาศัยอยู่ต่างประเทศเพื่อทำงาน ที่นี่เป็นฤดูร้อนเสมอ ฉันและลูกๆ คิดมากเกี่ยวกับสี่ฤดูกาลในเกาหลี โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่ง ฉันคิดถึงฤดูใบไม้ผลิที่ดอกไม้สวยงามบานสะพรั่ง และฤดูใบไม้ร่วงที่ฉันเห็นใบไม้ในฤดูใบไม้ร่วง แต่วันนี้มีพัสดุมาจากพ่อของฉันที่เกาหลี เป็นภาพวาดสี่ฤดูกาลในบ้านเกิดของฉันที่พ่อของฉันวาด ฉันรู้สึกขอบคุณพ่อที่ให้ฤดูกาลทั้งสี่ของบ้านเกิดแก่ฉัน

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.
g_text_translate.pt:
Moro no exterior a trabalho. É sempre verão aqui. Eu e meus filhos pensamos muito sobre as quatro estações na Coreia. Principalmente, sinto falta da primavera, quando lindas flores desabrocham, e do outono, quando posso ver as folhas de outono. Mas hoje chegou um pacote do meu pai na Coréia. Foi uma pintura das quatro estações da minha cidade natal que meu pai desenhou. Fiquei grato ao meu pai por me dar as quatro estações da minha cidade natal.

#######

g_text_translate.hi:
मैं काम के सिलसिले में विदेश में रहता हूं। यहाँ हमेशा गर्मी रहती है। मैं और मेरे बच्चे कोरिया में चार सीज़न के बारे में बहुत सोचते हैं। विशेष रूप से, मुझे वसंत की याद आती है जब सुंदर फूल खिलते हैं और पतझड़ की याद आती है जब मैं पतझड़ के पत्ते देख पाता हूँ। लेकिन आज, कोरिया में मेरे पिता के पास से एक पार्सल आया। यह मेरे गृहनगर की चार ऋतुओं की एक पेंटिंग थी जिसे मेरे पिता ने बनाया था। मुझे अपने गृहनगर के चार सीज़न देने के लिए मैं अपने पिता का आभारी था।

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. g_text_translate.tr:
İş nedeniyle yurt dışında yaşıyorum. Burada her zaman yaz vardır. Ben ve çocuklarım Kore'deki dört mevsim hakkında çok düşünüyoruz. Özellikle güzel çiçeklerin açtığı baharı, sonbahar yapraklarını gördüğüm sonbaharı özlüyorum. Ama bugün Kore'deki babamdan bir paket geldi. Babamın çizdiği memleketimin dört mevsimini anlatan bir tabloydu. Memleketimin dört mevsimini bana yaşattığı için babama minnettardım.

#######

I live abroad for work. It's always summer here. Me and my kids think a lot about the four seasons in Korea. Especially, I miss spring when beautiful flowers bloom and autumn when I can see autumn leaves. But today, a parcel arrived from my father in Korea. It was a painting of the four seasons of my hometown that my father drew. I was grateful to my father for giving me the four seasons of my hometown.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠.
1. Lo lắng về công việc
2. Quên cuộc sống
3. Thường liên lạc
4. Rất nhớ bốn mùa
--------------------
많이 생각하다: Nghĩ nhiều, nhớ
언제나: Luôn luôn, lúc nào cũng

N + 에게서 : Từ ai đó.
explain.en:

3. Keep in touch with my friend often
4. Think a lot about the four seasons

<g>N + 에게서:</g> From somebody.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용으로 알 수 있는 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 아버지는 자주 계절 그림을 보내 줍니다.
제가 사는 곳의 꽃과 단풍이 아름답습니다.
저는 아버지와 이곳에서 함께 살고 싶습니다.
저는 소포를 받고 아버지의 사랑을 느꼈습니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung của đoạn văn.
1. Bố thường gửi tranh về các mùa cho tôi. 
2. Hoa và lá phong ở nơi tôi sống rất đẹp.
3. Tôi muốn cùng bố sống ở nơi này.
4. Tôi nhận được bưu phẩm và cảm nhận được tình yêu thương của bố tôi.
--------------------
단풍: Thu vàng, cây phong, cây lá đỏ
소포를 받다: Nhận bưu phẩm, bưu kiện

Vì phải sống ở nước ngoài chỉ có mùa hè nên nhân nhân vật rất nhớ bốn mùa của Hàn Quốc. Và khi nhận được tranh tự tay bố vẽ và gửi, cô đã rất biết ơn và cảm nhận được tình yêu thương bố dành cho mình.
explain.en:
Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. My father often sends me seasonal paintings.
2. The flowers and maple leaves where I live are beautiful.
3. I want to live here with my father.
4. When I received the parcel, I felt my father's love.
--------------------
<g>단풍:</g> Maple leaves, autumn foliage
<g>소포를 받다:</g> To receive a parcel

Because the character has to live abroad, where it's summer all the time, the character misses the four seasons of Korea. And when the character received his/her father's painting, he/she was very grateful and felt his/her father's love.

3. Je veux vivre ici avec mon père.
4. Lorsque j'ai reçu le colis, j'ai ressenti l'amour de mon père.
--------------------
<g>단풍:</g>Feuilles d'érable, feuillage d'automne
<g>소포를 받다:</g>Pour recevoir un colis

Parce que le personnage doit vivre à l'étranger, où c'est l'été tout le temps, le personnage rate les quatre saisons de la Corée. Et quand le personnage a reçu la peinture de son père, il a été très reconnaissant et a ressenti l'amour de son père.

3. मैं यहां अपने पिता के साथ रहना चाहता हूं.

general.g_text: 저는 조금 전에 텔레비전을 보고 깜짝 놀랐습니다. 텔레비전에 제 동생이 크게 나왔기 때문입니다. 동생은 테니스 경기장에서 경기를 보고 있었는데 박수를 치면서 웃고 있었습니다. 동생의 모습을 텔레비전에서 본 것은 처음이었습니다. 매일 보는 동생이지만 동생의 얼굴을 텔레비전에서 보니까 ( ㉠ ) 새로운 기분이 들었습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Lúc nãy xem tivi tôi rất bất ngờ. Bởi vì em trai tôi đã xuất hiện trên tivi. Em trai tôi đang xem trận đấu ở sân tennis và vừa vỗ tay vừa cười. Đó là lần đầu tiên tôi nhìn thấy hình ảnh của em trai mình trên tivi. Tuy ngày nào cũng gặp nhưng khi nhìn thấy khuôn mặt của em tôi trên tivi, tôi cảm thấy rất ( ㉠ ) và mới lạ.
g_text_translate.en: I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.fr:
J'ai regardé la télévision il y a quelque temps et j'ai été étonné. C'est parce que mon petit frère est passé à la télé. Mon jeune frère regardait un match sur le court de tennis, applaudissait et riait. C'était la première fois que je voyais mon jeune frère à la télévision. Même si je le vois tous les jours, je me sens toujours heureux et nouveau en voyant son visage à la télévision.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.es:
Vi la televisión hace un tiempo y me quedé asombrado. Es porque mi hermano menor apareció en la televisión. Mi hermano menor estaba viendo un partido en la cancha de tenis, aplaudiendo y riendo. Era la primera vez que veía a mi hermano menor en la televisión. Aunque lo veo todos los días, todavía me siento feliz y nuevo cuando veo su rostro en la televisión.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya menonton TV beberapa waktu yang lalu dan tercengang. Itu karena adik laki-laki saya muncul di TV. Adik laki-laki saya sedang menonton pertandingan di lapangan tenis, bertepuk tangan dan tertawa. Ini adalah pertama kalinya saya melihat adik laki-laki saya di TV. Meskipun saya melihatnya setiap hari, saya masih merasa senang dan baru ketika melihat wajahnya di TV.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.ja:
少し前にテレビを見てビックリしました。弟がテレビに出たからです。弟はテニスコートで試合を観戦し、拍手と笑いを浮かべていました。弟をテレビで初めて見た。毎日会っていますが、テレビで彼の顔を見ると、今でも嬉しくて新鮮です。

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich habe vor einiger Zeit ferngesehen und war erstaunt. Weil mein jüngerer Bruder im Fernsehen aufgetreten ist. Mein jüngerer Bruder sah sich ein Spiel auf dem Tennisplatz an, applaudierte und lachte. Es war das erste Mal, dass ich meinen jüngeren Bruder im Fernsehen sah. Obwohl ich ihn jeden Tag sehe, fühle ich mich immer noch glücklich und neu, wenn ich sein Gesicht im Fernsehen sehe.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
前段时间看了电视，惊呆了。这是因为我弟弟出现在电视上。弟弟在网球场上看球，掌声大笑。这是我第一次在电视上看到我弟弟。虽然我每天都能见到他，但在电视上看到他的脸时，我仍然感到高兴和新鲜。

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
前段時間看了電視，驚呆了。這是因為我弟弟出現在電視上。弟弟在網球場上看球，掌聲大笑。這是我第一次在電視上看到我弟弟。雖然我每天都能見到他，但在電視上看到他的臉時，我仍然感到高興和新鮮。

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.it:
Tempo fa ho guardato la TV e sono rimasto sbalordito. È perché mio fratello minore è apparso in TV. Mio fratello minore stava guardando una partita al campo da tennis, applaudendo e ridendo. Era la prima volta che vedevo mio fratello minore in TV. Anche se lo vedo tutti i giorni, mi sento ancora felice e nuovo quando vedo la sua faccia in TV.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.ru:
Недавно я смотрел телевизор и был удивлён. Это потому, что мой младший брат появился на телевидении. Мой младший брат смотрел игру на теннисном корте, аплодировал и смеялся. Это был первый раз, когда я увидел своего младшего брата по телевизору. Хотя я вижу его каждый день, я все равно чувствую себя счастливым и обновленным, когда вижу его лицо по телевизору.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.th:
ฉันดูทีวีได้สักพักแล้วก็ต้องประหลาดใจ เป็นเพราะน้องชายของฉันปรากฏตัวในทีวี น้องชายของฉันกำลังดูการแข่งขันที่สนามเทนนิส ปรบมือและหัวเราะ นี่เป็นครั้งแรกที่ฉันเห็นน้องชายในทีวี แม้ว่าฉันจะเจอเขาทุกวัน แต่ฉันก็ยังรู้สึกมีความสุขและแปลกใหม่เมื่อได้เห็นหน้าเขาในทีวี

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.pt:
Assisti TV há um tempo e fiquei surpreso. É porque meu irmão mais novo apareceu na TV. Meu irmão mais novo estava assistindo a um jogo na quadra de tênis, aplaudindo e rindo. Foi a primeira vez que vi meu irmão mais novo na TV. Embora eu o veja todos os dias, ainda me sinto feliz e renovado ao ver seu rosto na TV.

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.hi:
मैंने कुछ देर पहले टीवी देखा और आश्चर्यचकित रह गया। ऐसा इसलिए है क्योंकि मेरा छोटा भाई टीवी पर आया था। मेरा छोटा भाई टेनिस कोर्ट पर खेल देख रहा था, तालियाँ बजा रहा था और हँस रहा था। यह पहली बार था जब मैंने अपने छोटे भाई को टीवी पर देखा। हालाँकि मैं उसे रोज़ देखता हूँ, फिर भी टीवी पर उसका चेहरा देखकर मुझे ख़ुशी और नयापन महसूस होता है।

#######

I watched TV a while ago and was astonished. It's because my younger brother appeared on TV. My younger brother was watching a game at the tennis court, applausing and laughing. It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.
g_text_translate.tr:
Biraz önce televizyon izledim ve hayrete düştüm. Çünkü küçük kardeşim televizyona çıktı. Küçük erkek kardeşim tenis kortunda bir maç izliyor, alkışlıyor ve gülüyordu. Kardeşimi ilk kez televizyonda görüyordum. Onu her gün görmeme rağmen televizyonda yüzünü görünce kendimi hala mutlu ve yeni hissediyorum.

#######

It was the first time I saw my younger brother on TV. Although I see him everyday, I still feel happy and new when seeing his face on TV.

<g>V/A + (으)ㄴ/는데:</g> Connects two clauses.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄴ/는/(으)ㄹ + N:</g> Noun modifier.

The sentence describes the feeling of the character when seeing his/her younger brother on TV -> 2 is correct.

The sentence describes the feeling of the character when seeing his/her younger brother on TV -> 2 is correct.

general.g_text: 얼음 음료는 여름철 인기 메뉴입니다. 그런데 얼음이 녹아서 물이 되면 음료의 맛이 없어집니다. 그래서 얼음 음료를 만들 때는 천천히 녹는 얼음을 넣으면 좋습니다. 큰 얼음은 작은 얼음보다 천천히 녹고, 오래 얼린 얼음도 잠깐 얼린 얼음보다 천천히 녹습니다. 이런 얼음을 넣으면 ( ㉠ ) 처음 음료의 맛을 오래 즐길 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Thức uống đá là món phổ biến vào mùa hè. Nhưng khi đá tan ra và trở thành nước thì thức uống sẽ không còn ngon nữa. Vì vậy, khi làm thức uống đá, bạn nên cho đá tan từ từ vào. Viên đá lớn sẽ tan chậm hơn viên đá nhỏ và những viên đá đông trong thời gian dài cũng tan chậm hơn những viên đông trong thời gian ngắn. Nếu cho đá như vậy ( ㉠ ) lần đầu tiên bạn có thể thưởng thức hương vị của đồ uống trong một thời gian dài.
g_text_translate.en: Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les boissons glacées sont populaires en été. Mais lorsque la glace fond et devient de l'eau, la boisson n'aura plus bon goût. Par conséquent, lors de la préparation de boissons glacées, il est préférable d'ajouter de la glace fondant lentement. Les gros glaçons fondent plus lentement que les petits, et les longs glaçons congelés fondent plus lentement que les petits glaçons congelés. Si vous ajoutez de la glace comme celle-ci, vous pourrez profiter longtemps du premier goût de la boisson tout en buvant.


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.es:
Las bebidas heladas son populares en el verano. Pero cuando el hielo se derrita y se convierta en agua, la bebida ya no sabrá bien. Por lo tanto, cuando prepare bebidas heladas, es mejor agregar hielo que se derrita lentamente. Los cubitos de hielo grandes se derretirán más lentamente que los pequeños, y los cubitos de hielo congelados largos se derriten más lentamente que los cubitos de hielo congelados pequeños. Si agrega hielo como este, puede disfrutar del primer sabor de la bebida durante mucho tiempo mientras bebe.


#######

Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.id:
Minuman es sangat populer di musim panas. Namun ketika es tersebut mencair dan menjadi air, maka minuman tersebut tidak lagi terasa enak. Oleh karena itu, saat membuat minuman es, sebaiknya tambahkan es yang mencair perlahan. Es batu besar akan mencair lebih lambat daripada yang kecil, dan es batu beku panjang mencair lebih lambat daripada es batu beku pendek. Jika Anda menambahkan es seperti ini, Anda dapat menikmati rasa pertama minuman untuk waktu yang lama sambil minum.


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.ja:
夏はアイスドリンクが人気です。しかし、氷が溶けて水になると、飲み物は美味しくなくなります。そのため、アイスドリンクを作るときは、ゆっくりと溶ける氷を入れるとよいでしょう。大きな氷​​は小さな氷よりもゆっくりと溶け、長く凍った氷は短い氷よりもゆっくりと溶けます。このように氷を入れれば、飲み始めの味を長く楽しめます。


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.de:
Eisgetränke sind im Sommer beliebt. Aber wenn das Eis schmilzt und zu Wasser wird, schmeckt das Getränk nicht mehr. Daher ist es bei der Zubereitung von Eisgetränken besser, langsam schmelzendes Eis hinzuzufügen. Große Eiswürfel schmelzen langsamer als kleine und lange gefrorene Eiswürfel schmelzen langsamer als kurze gefrorene Eiswürfel. Wenn Sie auf diese Weise Eis hinzufügen, können Sie den ersten Geschmack des Getränks während des Trinkens lange genießen.


#######

Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
冰饮在夏天很受欢迎。但是当冰融化变成水时，饮料就不再好吃了。因此，在制作冰镇饮料时，最好加入缓慢融化的冰块。大冰块比小冰块融化得更慢，长冰块比短冰块融化得慢。像这样加冰的话，可以一边喝，一边长时间享受饮料的初味。

If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.

g_text_translate.it:
Le bevande ghiacciate sono popolari in estate. Ma quando il ghiaccio si scioglie e diventa acqua, la bevanda non avrà più un buon sapore. Pertanto, quando si preparano bevande ghiacciate, è meglio aggiungere ghiaccio che si scioglie lentamente. I cubetti di ghiaccio grandi si sciolgono più lentamente di quelli piccoli e i cubetti di ghiaccio lunghi e congelati si sciolgono più lentamente dei cubetti di ghiaccio corti e congelati. Se aggiungi del ghiaccio in questo modo, puoi goderti a lungo il primo assaggio della bevanda mentre bevi.

g_text_translate.ru:
Летом популярны холодные напитки. Но когда лед растает и станет водой, напиток уже не будет вкусным. Поэтому при приготовлении холодных напитков лучше добавлять медленно тающий лед. Большие кубики льда тают медленнее, чем маленькие, а давно замороженные кубики льда тают медленнее, чем короткозамороженные. Если добавить лед вот так, то можно долго наслаждаться первым вкусом напитка во время питья.


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.th:
เครื่องดื่มเย็นเป็นที่นิยมในฤดูร้อน แต่เมื่อน้ำแข็งละลายกลายเป็นน้ำ เครื่องดื่มก็จะไม่มีรสชาติอีกต่อไป ดังนั้นเวลาทำเครื่องดื่มเย็นๆ ควรเติมน้ำแข็งที่ละลายช้าๆ จะดีกว่า น้ำแข็งก้อนใหญ่จะละลายช้ากว่าก้อนเล็ก และน้ำแข็งก้อนยาวแช่แข็งจะละลายช้ากว่าน้ำแข็งก้อนสั้น หากคุณเติมน้ำแข็งแบบนี้ คุณจะสามารถเพลิดเพลินกับรสชาติแรกของเครื่องดื่มได้เป็นเวลานานในขณะที่ดื่ม


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.pt:
As bebidas geladas são populares no verão. Mas quando o gelo derreter e virar água, a bebida não terá mais gosto. Portanto, ao preparar bebidas geladas, é melhor adicionar gelo que derrete lentamente. Os cubos de gelo grandes derretem mais lentamente do que os pequenos, e os cubos de gelo congelados longos derretem mais lentamente do que os cubos de gelo congelados curtos. Se você adicionar gelo assim, poderá saborear por muito tempo o primeiro gole da bebida enquanto bebe.


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.
g_text_translate.hi:
गर्मियों में आइस्ड पेय लोकप्रिय हैं। लेकिन जब बर्फ पिघलकर पानी बन जाए तो पेय का स्वाद अच्छा नहीं रहेगा। इसलिए, आइस्ड ड्रिंक बनाते समय धीरे-धीरे पिघलने वाली बर्फ मिलाना बेहतर होता है। बड़े बर्फ के टुकड़े छोटे बर्फ के टुकड़ों की तुलना में अधिक धीरे-धीरे पिघलेंगे, और लंबे समय तक जमे हुए बर्फ के टुकड़े छोटे जमे हुए बर्फ के टुकड़ों की तुलना में अधिक धीरे-धीरे पिघलेंगे। यदि आप इस तरह से बर्फ डालते हैं, तो आप पीते समय पेय के पहले स्वाद का लंबे समय तक आनंद ले सकते हैं।


#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Yaz aylarında buzlu içecekler popülerdir. Ancak buz eriyip suya dönüştüğünde içeceğin tadı artık güzel olmayacaktır. Bu nedenle buzlu içecek hazırlarken yavaş yavaş eriyen buz eklemek daha iyidir. Büyük buz küpleri küçüklere göre daha yavaş erir ve uzun süre donmuş buz küpleri kısa donmuş buz küplerine göre daha yavaş erir. Bu şekilde buz eklerseniz, içerken uzun süre içeceğin ilk tadının tadını çıkarabilirsiniz.


#######

Iced drinks are popular in the summer. But when the ice melts and becomes water, the drink will no longer taste good. Therefore, when making iced drinks, it is better to add slowly melting ice. Large ice cubes will melt more slowly than small ones, and long frozen ice cubes melts more slowly than short frozen ice cubes. If you add ice like this, you can enjoy the first taste of the drink for a long time while drinking.

Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠.
1. Uống nhưng
2. Định uống
3. Vì uống
4. Khi uống
--------------------
V/A + 아/어/여지다: Trở nên, trở thành.
V + (ㅇ)ㄹ 수 있다: Có thể.
N + 보다: Cấu trúc so sánh.
N + 이/가 되다: Trở thành N.
A/V + 지만: Tuy nhiên.
V + (으)려고: Định làm gì đó.
V + 기 때문에: Cấu trúc vì - nên.
V + 는 동안에: Trong lúc, trong khi.

q_answer: 오래 얼린 얼음이 더 빨리 녹습니다.
작은 얼음은 큰 얼음보다 빨리 녹습니다.
큰 얼음을 음료에 넣으면 맛이 금방 달라집니다.
음료 맛은 작은 얼음을 넣을 때 천천히 변합니다.

general.g_text: 태풍은 보통 7월부터 9월까지 많이 생깁니다. 이런 태풍들도 이름이 있는데 그 중에는 한국어로 된 이름도 있습니다. 태풍의 이름은 태풍이 지나가는 곳에 있는 열네 개 나라에서 만들고 있습니다. 한국도 2000년부터 태풍의 이름을 ( ㉠ ). 한국어로 이름을 만들 때는 다른 나라 사람들도 발음하기 쉬운 단어를 고릅니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Bão thường xảy ra nhiều từ tháng 7 đến tháng 9. Những cơn bão này cũng có tên, trong đó có cả tên bằng tiếng Hàn. Tên của cơn bão được đặt bởi 14 quốc gia nơi các cơn bão đi qua. Hàn Quốc cũng ( ㉠ ) tên cho các cơn bão từ những năm 2000. Khi tên được đặt bằng tiếng Hàn, người ta chọn những từ dễ phát âm ngay cả đối với những người đến từ các quốc gia khác.
g_text_translate.en: Storms often occur from July to September. These storms also have names, some of which are in Korean. The names of the storms are given by the 14 countries they pass through. Korea also started naming storms in 2000. When creating a name in Korean, they choose a word that is easy to pronounce even for people from other countries.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les orages se produisent souvent de juillet à septembre. Ces tempêtes ont aussi des noms, dont certains sont en coréen. Les noms des tempêtes sont donnés par les 14 pays traversés. La Corée a également commencé à nommer les tempêtes en 2000. Lors de la création d'un nom en coréen, ils choisissent un mot facile à prononcer, même pour les personnes d'autres pays.


#######

Storms often occur from July to September. These storms also have names, some of which are in Korean. The names of the storms are given by the 14 countries they pass through. Korea also started naming storms in 2000. When creating a name in Korean, they choose a word that is easy to pronounce even for people from other countries.
g_text_translate.es:
Las tormentas a menudo ocurren de julio a septiembre. Estas tormentas también tienen nombres, algunos de los cuales están en coreano. Los nombres de las tormentas vienen dados por los 14 países por los que pasan. Corea también comenzó a nombrar tormentas en 2000. Al crear un nombre en coreano, eligen una palabra que sea fácil de pronunciar incluso para personas de otros países.


#######

Storms often occur from July to September. These storms also have names, some of which are in Korean. The names of the storms are given by the 14 countries they pass through. Korea also started naming storms in 2000. When creating a name in Korean, they choose a word that is easy to pronounce even for people from other countries.

Korea juga mulai menamai badai pada tahun 2000. Saat membuat nama dalam bahasa Korea, mereka memilih kata yang mudah diucapkan bahkan untuk orang dari negara lain.

พายุมักเกิดขึ้นตั้งแต่เดือนกรกฎาคมถึงกันยายน พายุเหล่านี้ก็มีชื่อด้วย ซึ่งบางลูกเป็นภาษาเกาหลี ชื่อของพายุนั้นมาจาก 14 ประเทศที่พายุเคลื่อนผ่าน เกาหลีเริ่มตั้งชื่อพายุในปี 2000 เช่นกัน เมื่อตั้งชื่อในภาษาเกาหลี พวกเขาเลือกคำที่ออกเสียงง่ายแม้กระทั่งกับคนจากประเทศอื่น ๆ


#######

Storms often occur from July to September. These storms also have names, some of which are in Korean. The names of the storms are given by the 14 countries they pass through. Korea also started naming storms in 2000. When creating a name in Korean, they choose a word that is easy to pronounce even for people from other countries.
g_text_translate.pt:
As tempestades ocorrem frequentemente de julho a setembro. Essas tempestades também têm nomes, alguns dos quais em coreano. Os nomes das tempestades são dados pelos 14 países por onde passam. A Coreia também começou a nomear tempestades em 2000. Ao criar um nome em coreano, eles escolhem uma palavra que seja fácil de pronunciar mesmo para pessoas de outros países.


#######

g_text_translate.hi:
तूफ़ान अक्सर जुलाई से सितम्बर तक आते हैं। इन तूफ़ानों के नाम भी हैं, जिनमें से कुछ कोरियाई भाषा में हैं। तूफानों के नाम उन 14 देशों के आधार पर दिए जाते हैं जहां से वे गुजरते हैं। कोरिया ने भी 2000 में तूफानों का नामकरण करना शुरू किया। कोरियाई में नाम बनाते समय, वे ऐसा शब्द चुनते हैं जिसका उच्चारण अन्य देशों के लोगों के लिए भी आसान हो।


#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Fırtınalar genellikle Temmuz'dan Eylül'e kadar meydana gelir. Bu fırtınaların bazılarının Korece olan isimleri de var. Fırtınalara isimlerini geçtikleri 14 ülke veriyor. Kore de 2000 yılında fırtınalara isim vermeye başladı. Korece isim oluştururken diğer ülkelerden insanların bile telaffuz etmesi kolay bir kelime seçiyorlar.

explain.en:
Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. Storms usually occur in winter and spring.
2. There are almost no storms in Korea.
3. The names of the storms are given by 14 countries.

--------------------
The names of the storms are given by the 14 countries they pass through. 4 is a confounding answer. Korea choses easy-to-pronounce names for storms.

Die Namen der Stürme werden von den 14 Ländern vergeben, die sie durchqueren. 4 ist eine verwirrende Antwort. Korea wählt leicht auszusprechende Namen für Stürme.

--------------------

general.g_text: 몇 달 전, 우리 집 앞에서 떨고 있는 작고 마른 강아지를 보았습니다. 저는 그 강아지가 너무 불쌍해 보였습니다. 저는 강아지를 집으로 데려와 먹을 것을 주고 잠도 재워 주었습니다. 그때부터 주인을 찾고 있는데 아직도 주인이 나타나지 않습니다. 그 강아지는 이제 ( ㉠ ) 저의 좋은 친구가 되었습니다. 강아지와 헤어지기 싫습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Vài tháng trước, tôi đã nhìn thấy một chú chó nhỏ gầy đang run rẩy trước nhà tôi. Tôi thấy con chó đó rất đáng thương. Tôi đưa con chó về nhà cho nó ăn và ru nó ngủ. Từ lúc đó tôi tìm chủ nhân (của chú chó) nhưng họ vẫn chưa xuất hiện. Chú chó đó bây giờ ( ㉠ ) đã trở thành bạn tốt của tôi. Tôi không muốn rời xa nó.
g_text_translate.en: A few months ago, I saw a small skinny puppy shivering in front of my house. I found the puppy so pitiful. I brought the puppy home, fed it and put it to sleep. I've been looking for the owner since then, but the owner still hasn't appeared. The puppy is now big and healthy, and it became a good friend of mine. I don't want to break up with the puppy.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il y a quelques mois, j'ai vu un petit chiot maigre frissonner devant ma maison. J'ai trouvé le chiot si pitoyable. J'ai ramené le chiot à la maison, je l'ai nourri et je l'ai endormi. Je cherche le propriétaire depuis lors, mais le propriétaire n'est toujours pas apparu. Le chiot est maintenant grand et en bonne santé, et il est devenu un bon ami à moi. Je ne veux pas rompre avec le chiot.


#######

I've been looking for the owner since then, but the owner still hasn't appeared. The puppy is now big and healthy, and it became a good friend of mine. I don't want to break up with the puppy.
g_text_translate.es:
Hace unos meses, vi a un pequeño cachorro flaco tiritando frente a mi casa. Encontré al cachorro tan lamentable. Llevé al cachorro a casa, lo alimenté y lo puse a dormir. He estado buscando al dueño desde entonces, pero el dueño todavía no ha aparecido. El cachorro ahora es grande y saludable, y se convirtió en un buen amigo mío. No quiero romper con el cachorro.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠.
1. Vì ngủ nhiều quá
2. Vì tìm chủ nhân của nó
3. Lớn lên và khỏe mạnh hơn và
4. Vì nó cứ run liên tục
--------------------
V/A + (으)ㄴ/는/(으)ㄹ + N: Định ngữ.
V + 아/어/여 보이다: Trông (như thế nào đó).
V/A + (으)ㄴ/는데: Kết nối hai mệnh đề.
V/A 아/어서: Vừa mang nghĩa chỉ nguyên nhân, vừa có thể dùng làm cấu trúc thể hiện sự tiếp diễn của hành động.
explain.en:
Fill in the blank <g>㉠</g> with the appropriate phrase.
1. Sleeps too much and
2. Finds its owner and
3. Big and healthy and
4. Keeps shaking and
--------------------
<g>A/V + (으)ㄴ/는/(으)ㄹ + N:</g> Noun modifier.
<g>V + 아/어/여 보이다:</g> To look like, to seem like
<g><V/A + (으)ㄴ/는데/g>: Connects two clauses.
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g> And/in order to, because of/so that…
explain.fr:
Remplir les trous<g>㉠</g>avec la phrase appropriée.
1. Dort trop et
2. Trouve son propriétaire et
3. Grand et sain et
4. Continue à trembler et
--------------------
<g>A/V + (으)ㄴ/는/(으)ㄹ + N:</g>Modificateur de nom.
<g>V + 아/어/여 보이다:</g>Ressembler, avoir l'air
<g><V/A + (으)ㄴ/는데/g> : relie deux clauses.
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g>Et/pour, à cause de/pour que…


#######

<g><V/A + (으)ㄴ/는데/g>: Connects two clauses.
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g> And/in order to, because of/so that…

2. Bu yavru köpeği kaybettim.
3. Bu yavru köpeği büyütmeyi sevmiyorum
4. Sokaktan eve getirdiğim bir köpek yavrusunu yetiştiriyorum.
--------------------
Karakter köpeği evin önünde aldı.

#######

Choose the option that corresponds to the paragraph.
1. I met the puppy's owner.
2. I lost this puppy.
3. I don't like to raise this puppy
4. I am raising a puppy I brought home from the street.
--------------------
The character picked up the dog in front of the house.

general.g_text: 저는 작년에 베트남에서 왔습니다. 지금은 한국에서 살고 있습니다. 베트남과 한국은 식사 예절이 조금 다릅니다. 한국에서는 밥 그릇을 들고 먹지 않습니다. 반면에 베트남에서는 밥 그릇을 들고 먹습니다. 그렇지만 ( ㉠ ) 것도 있습니다. 한국과 베트남에서 모두 어른이 먼저 밥을 먹고 그 다음에 아이가 먹습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi đến từ Việt Nam từ năm ngoái. Hiện tại tôi đang sống ở Hàn Quốc. Tôi thấy rằng phép tắc dùng bữa ở Việt Nam và Hàn Quốc hơi khác nhau một chút. Ở Hàn Quốc người ta không cầm bát lên rồi ăn cơm. Ngược lại người Việt Nam lại cầm bát cơm lên và ăn. Nhưng cũng có những phép tắc ( ㉠ ). Ở cả Hàn Quốc và Việt Nam, người lớn ăn cơm trước rồi sau đó trẻ con mới được ăn.
g_text_translate.en: I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.it:
Sono venuto dal Vietnam l'anno scorso. Vivo in Corea adesso. Vietnam e Corea hanno maniere a tavola leggermente diverse. In Corea non tengono la ciotola del riso quando mangiano. In Vietnam, invece, le persone tengono in mano la ciotola del riso e mangiano. Ma c'è la stessa cosa. Sia in Corea che in Vietnam, prima mangiano gli adulti e poi i bambini.

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.fr:
Je suis venu du Vietnam l'année dernière. Je vis en Corée maintenant. Le Vietnam et la Corée ont des manières de table légèrement différentes. En Corée, on ne tient pas le bol de riz en mangeant. Au Vietnam, en revanche, les gens tiennent le bol de riz et mangent. Mais c'est la même chose. En Corée et au Vietnam, les adultes mangent en premier, puis les enfants.

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.es:
Vine de Vietnam el año pasado. Estoy viviendo en Corea ahora. Vietnam y Corea tienen modales en la mesa ligeramente diferentes. En Corea, no sostienen el plato de arroz cuando comen. En Vietnam, por el contrario, la gente sostiene el cuenco de arroz y come. Pero ocurre lo mismo. Tanto en Corea como en Vietnam, los adultos comen primero y luego los niños.

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya datang dari Vietnam tahun lalu. Saya tinggal di Korea sekarang. Vietnam dan Korea memiliki tata krama makan yang sedikit berbeda. Di Korea, mereka tidak memegang mangkuk nasi saat makan. Di Vietnam, sebaliknya, orang-orang memegang mangkuk nasi dan memakannya. Tapi ada hal yang sama. Baik di Korea maupun Vietnam, orang dewasa makan terlebih dahulu, baru kemudian anak-anak makan.

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.ja:
私は昨年ベトナムから来ました。私は今韓国に住んでいます。ベトナムと韓国ではテーブルマナーが少し異なります。韓国ではご飯茶わんを持たずに食事をします。一方、ベトナムでは丼を持って食べます。しかし、同じこともあります。韓国でもベトナムでも、大人が先に食べて、その後に子供が食べます。

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich bin letztes Jahr aus Vietnam gekommen. Ich lebe jetzt in Korea. Vietnam und Korea haben leicht unterschiedliche Tischmanieren. In Korea hält man die Reisschale beim Essen nicht in der Hand. In Vietnam hingegen hält man die Reisschale in der Hand und isst. Aber da ist das Gleiche. Sowohl in Korea als auch in Vietnam essen zuerst die Erwachsenen und dann die Kinder.

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我去年从越南来。我现在住在韩国。越南和韩国的餐桌礼仪略有不同。在韩国，吃饭时不端着饭碗。另一方面，在越南，人们端着饭碗吃饭。但有同样的事情。在韩国和越南，都是先大人吃饭，然后才是小孩吃饭。

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. In Vietnam, on the other hand, people hold the rice bowl and eat. But there's the same thing. In both Korea and Vietnam, adults eat first, and then children eat.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我去年從越南來。我現在住在韓國。越南和韓國的餐桌禮儀略有不同。在韓國，吃飯時不端著飯碗。另一方面，在越南，人們端著飯碗吃飯。但有同樣的事情。在韓國和越南，都是先大人吃飯，然後才是小孩吃飯。

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. g_text_translate.ru:
Я приехал из Вьетнама в прошлом году. Я сейчас живу в Корее. Во Вьетнаме и Корее немного разные манеры за столом. В Корее не берут в руки миску с рисом во время еды. Во Вьетнаме, напротив, люди держат миску с рисом и едят. Но есть то же самое. И в Корее, и во Вьетнаме сначала едят взрослые, а потом дети.

#######

I came from Vietnam last year. I am living in Korea now. Vietnam and Korea have slightly different table manners. In Korea, they don't hold the rice bowl when eating. ฉันมาจากเวียดนามเมื่อปีที่แล้ว ตอนนี้ฉันอาศัยอยู่ที่เกาหลี เวียดนามและเกาหลีมีมารยาทบนโต๊ะอาหารที่แตกต่างกันเล็กน้อย ที่เกาหลีพวกเขาไม่ถือชามข้าวเวลาทานอาหาร ในทางกลับกัน ในเวียดนาม ผู้คนจะถือชามข้าวและรับประทาน แต่มีสิ่งเดียวกัน ทั้งในเกาหลีและเวียดนาม ผู้ใหญ่กินก่อน จากนั้นเด็กก็กิน

Eu vim do Vietnã no ano passado. Estou morando na Coréia agora. O Vietnã e a Coreia têm modos à mesa ligeiramente diferentes. Na Coreia, eles não seguram a tigela de arroz quando comem. No Vietnã, por outro lado, as pessoas seguram a tigela de arroz e comem. Mas é a mesma coisa. Tanto na Coreia como no Vietname, os adultos comem primeiro e depois as crianças comem.

g_text_translate.hi:
मैं पिछले साल वियतनाम से आया था। मैं अभी कोरिया में रह रहा हूं. वियतनाम और कोरिया में टेबल मैनर्स थोड़े अलग हैं। कोरिया में, वे भोजन करते समय चावल का कटोरा नहीं पकड़ते हैं। दूसरी ओर, वियतनाम में लोग चावल का कटोरा पकड़कर खाते हैं। लेकिन वहां भी वही बात है. कोरिया और वियतनाम दोनों में, वयस्क पहले खाते हैं, और फिर बच्चे खाते हैं।

#######

Geçen yıl Vietnam'dan geldim. Şu anda Kore'de yaşıyorum. Vietnam ve Kore'nin sofra adabı biraz farklıdır. Kore'de yemek yerken pirinç kasesini tutmazlar. Vietnam'da ise insanlar pirinç kasesini tutup yemek yiyorlar. Ama aynı şey var. Hem Kore'de hem de Vietnam'da önce yetişkinler yemek yer, sonra çocuklar yemek yer.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 베트남과 한국은 식사 예절이 다 같습니다.
한국에서 어른이 아이보다 먼저 밥을 먹습니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Bây giờ tôi đang sống ở Việt Nam.
2. Phép tắc ăn uống cả Việt Nam và Hàn Quốc tất cả đều giống nhau.
3. Ở Hàn Quốc mọi người cầm bát lên rồi ăn cơm.
4. Ở Hàn Quốc người lớn ăn cơm trước trẻ em. 
--------------------
그릇: Bát
들다: Cầm

N1 + 보다 + N2: So với N1 thì N2.

Không chỉ ở Hàn Quốc mà ở Việt Nam người lớn cũng ăn cơm trước trẻ em.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. Now I live in Vietnam.
2. Vietnam and Korea have the same table manners.
3. In Korea, people hold the rice bowl and eat.
4. In Korea, adults eat before children.
--------------------
<g>그릇:</g> Bowl
<g>들다:</g> To hold

<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> Compared to N1, N2 is.

Not only in Korea but also in Vietnam, adults will eat first and then children eat.
explain.it:
Scegli quello che corrisponde al contenuto di questo testo.

1. Ora vivo in Vietnam.
2. Vietnam e Corea hanno le stesse buone maniere a tavola.
3. In Corea, le persone tengono la ciotola di riso e mangiano.
4. In Corea gli adulti mangiano prima dei bambini.
--------------------
<g>그릇:</g>Ciotola
<g>들다:</g>Tenere

<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g>Rispetto a N1, N2 lo è.

Non solo in Corea ma anche in Vietnam, prima mangiano gli adulti e poi mangiano i bambini.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. Now I live in Vietnam.
2. Vietnam and Korea have the same table manners.
3. In Korea, people hold the rice bowl and eat.
4. In Korea, adults eat before children.
--------------------
<g>그릇:</g> Bowl
<g>들다:</g> To hold

<g>N1 + 보다 + N2:</g> Compared to N1, N2 is.

Not only in Korea but also in Vietnam, adults will eat first and then children eat.
explain.fr:
Choisissez celui qui correspond au contenu de ce texte.

1. Maintenant, je vis au Vietnam.
2. Le Vietnam et la Corée ont les mêmes manières à table.
3. En Corée, les gens tiennent le bol de riz et mangent.
4. En Corée, les adultes mangent avant les enfants.
--------------------

general.g_text: 요즘 물가가 많이 올라서인지 사람들이 중고 용품을 이용하는 사람이 많습니다. 재활용센터에 가 보면 깨끗하고 좋은 물건들을 찾을 수 있습니다. 중고 물건이지만 짧은 기간 동안 사용한 제품이나 최신형 제품도 많습니다. 옷부터 가구까지 모든 물건은 수리되어 품질을 ( ㉠ ) 사용이 가능합니다. 안 쓰는 물건을 가지고 와서 팔 수도 있고 또 필요한 물건을 싼 가격으로 살 수도 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Dạo gần đây không biết có phải do vật giá tăng hay không mà số người sử dụng các vật đồ dùng cũ đang tăng lên. Nếu đi đến trung tâm tái chế, bạn có thể tìm những đồ vật còn mới và tốt. Chúng là đồ cũ nhưng có những đồ vật được dùng trong thời gian ngắn hoặc cũng có nhiều đồ dùng đời mới nhất. Từ quần áo đến đồ nội thất tất cả đều được sửa và ( ㉠ ) đều có thể sử dụng được. Nếu mang những đồ vật không dùng nữa đến, bạn có thể bán chúng hoặc mua những đồ dùng cần thiết với giá thấp hơn.
g_text_translate.en: There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.it:
Ci sono molte persone che usano beni di seconda mano perché i prezzi sono aumentati molto in questi giorni. Se vai in un centro di riciclaggio, puoi trovare cose pulite e buone. Anche se si tratta di articoli usati, molti prodotti sono stati utilizzati per un breve periodo di tempo o sono i prodotti più nuovi. Tutto, dai vestiti ai mobili, viene riparato e testato per la qualità prima dell'uso. Puoi portare qualcosa che non usi e venderlo, oppure puoi comprare qualcosa che ti serve a un prezzo inferiore.

#######

There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.fr:
De nombreuses personnes utilisent des biens d’occasion car les prix ont beaucoup augmenté ces jours-ci. Si vous allez dans une déchetterie, vous pouvez trouver des choses propres et bonnes. Même s’il s’agit d’articles usagés, de nombreux produits ont été utilisés pendant une courte période ou sont les produits les plus récents. Tout, des vêtements aux meubles, est réparé et testé pour sa qualité avant utilisation. Vous pouvez apporter quelque chose que vous n'utilisez pas et le vendre, ou vous pouvez acheter quelque chose dont vous avez besoin à un prix inférieur.

#######

There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.es:
Hay mucha gente que utiliza artículos de segunda mano porque los precios han subido mucho estos días. Si vas a un centro de reciclaje, puedes encontrar cosas limpias y buenas. Aunque son artículos usados, hay muchos productos que llevan poco tiempo usados ​​o son productos de última generación. Todo, desde ropa hasta muebles, se repara y se prueba su calidad antes de su uso. Puedes traer algo que no uses y venderlo, o puedes comprar algo que necesites a un precio más bajo.

#######

Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.id:
Banyak orang yang menggunakan barang bekas karena harganya yang naik pesat akhir-akhir ini. Jika Anda pergi ke pusat daur ulang, Anda dapat menemukan barang-barang yang bersih dan bagus. Meski merupakan barang bekas, namun banyak juga produk yang baru dipakai dalam jangka waktu singkat atau merupakan produk terbaru. Segala sesuatu mulai dari pakaian hingga furnitur diperbaiki dan diuji kualitasnya sebelum digunakan. Anda bisa membawa sesuatu yang sudah tidak terpakai dan menjualnya, atau Anda bisa membeli sesuatu yang Anda butuhkan dengan harga lebih murah.

#######

There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.ja:
最近は価格も高騰しているので中古品を利用する人も多いです。リサイクルセンターに行けば、きれいで良いものを見つけることができます。中古品といっても使用期間の短い商品や新しい商品も多数ございます。衣服から家具に至るまで、あらゆるものは使用前に修理され、品質がテストされます。使わないものを持ち込んで売ったり、必要なものを安く買うこともできます。

#######

g_text_translate.de:
Es gibt viele Menschen, die gebrauchte Waren verwenden, weil die Preise heutzutage stark gestiegen sind. Wenn Sie zu einem Recyclingzentrum gehen, finden Sie saubere, gute Sachen. Obwohl es sich um gebrauchte Artikel handelt, gibt es viele Produkte, die nur kurze Zeit verwendet wurden oder die neuesten Produkte sind. Von Kleidung bis hin zu Möbeln wird alles vor dem Gebrauch repariert und auf Qualität geprüft. Sie können etwas mitbringen, das Sie nicht verwenden, und es verkaufen, oder Sie können etwas, das Sie benötigen, zu einem günstigeren Preis kaufen.

#######

g_text_translate.th:
มีคนหันมาใช้สินค้ามือสองกันเป็นจำนวนมากเพราะช่วงนี้ราคาขึ้นมาก หากคุณไปที่ศูนย์รีไซเคิลคุณจะพบสิ่งที่สะอาดและดี แม้ว่าจะเป็นสินค้ามือสอง แต่ก็มีสินค้ามากมายที่ใช้ในช่วงเวลาสั้นๆ หรือเป็นสินค้าใหม่ล่าสุด ทุกอย่างตั้งแต่เสื้อผ้าไปจนถึงเฟอร์นิเจอร์ได้รับการซ่อมแซมและทดสอบคุณภาพก่อนใช้งาน คุณสามารถนำสิ่งที่คุณไม่ได้ใช้มาขายหรือซื้อสิ่งที่คุณต้องการในราคาที่ต่ำกว่าก็ได้

#######

There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.pt:
Tem muita gente que usa bens de segunda mão porque os preços subiram muito hoje em dia. Se você for a um centro de reciclagem, poderá encontrar coisas boas e limpas. Mesmo sendo itens usados, há muitos produtos que foram usados ​​por um curto período de tempo ou são produtos mais novos. Tudo, desde roupas até móveis, é reparado e testado quanto à qualidade antes do uso. Você pode trazer algo que não usa e vender, ou pode comprar algo que precisa por um preço mais baixo.

#######

There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.hi:
ऐसे बहुत से लोग हैं जो सेकेंड-हैंड सामान का इस्तेमाल करते हैं क्योंकि आजकल कीमतें बहुत बढ़ गई हैं। यदि आप किसी पुनर्चक्रण केंद्र में जाते हैं, तो आपको साफ़, अच्छी चीज़ें मिल सकती हैं। भले ही वे उपयोग की गई वस्तुएं हैं, ऐसे कई उत्पाद हैं जिनका उपयोग थोड़े समय के लिए किया गया है या नवीनतम उत्पाद हैं। कपड़ों से लेकर फ़र्निचर तक हर चीज़ की मरम्मत की जाती है और उपयोग से पहले उसकी गुणवत्ता का परीक्षण किया जाता है। आप कोई ऐसी चीज़ ला सकते हैं जिसका आप उपयोग नहीं करते हैं और उसे बेच सकते हैं, या आप कम कीमत पर अपनी ज़रूरत की कोई चीज़ खरीद सकते हैं।

#######

There are many people who use second-hand goods because prices have risen a lot these days. If you go to a recycling center, you can find clean, good stuff. Even though they are used items, there are many products that have been used for a short period of time or are the newest products. Everything from clothes to furniture is repaired and tested for quality before use. You can bring something you don't use and sell it, or you can buy something you need at a lower price.
g_text_translate.tr:
Günümüzde fiyatların çok artması nedeniyle ikinci el eşya kullanan pek çok kişi bulunmaktadır. Bir geri dönüşüm merkezine giderseniz temiz, güzel şeyler bulabilirsiniz. Kullanılmış ürün olmasına rağmen kısa süre kullanılmış veya en yeni ürünler olan birçok ürün bulunmaktadır. Giysilerden mobilyalara kadar her şey kullanımdan önce onarılıyor ve kalite açısından test ediliyor. Kullanmadığınız bir şeyi getirip satabilirsiniz ya da ihtiyacınız olan bir şeyi daha düşük fiyata satın alabilirsiniz.

#######

general.g_text: 매달 마지막 주 수요일은 문화가 있는 날입니다. 이 날에는 영화관, 박물관 등 전국에 있는 문화 시설을 할인된 가격이나 무료로 ( ㉠ ). 그리고 지역마다 특색 있는 프로그램, 행사가 있어서 한국의 다양한 문화를 경험할 수 있습니다. 또 이 날에는 밤에 문을 여는 문화 시설도 있어서 평소에 일 때문에 문화를 즐기지 못한 사람들은 이날에 문화 시설에 가서 체험할 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Mỗi tháng đều có ngày văn hóa vào thứ tư của tuần cuối cùng trong tháng. Vào ngày này bạn có thể được giảm giá hoặc ( ㉠ ) miễn phí các công trình văn hóa trên khắp Hàn Quốc như rạp chiếu phim, bảo tàng. Và mỗi khu vực đều có những chương trình, sự kiện độc đáo nên bạn có thể có được rất nhiều trải nghiệm về văn hóa Hàn Quốc. Bên cạnh đó, vào ngày này cũng có những công trình văn hóa mở cửa vào buổi đêm nên những người bình thường không thể thường thức văn hóa vào ngày thường có thể đến và trải nghiệm những công trình văn hóa này.
g_text_translate.en: The last Wednesday of every month is Culture Day. On this day, you can enjoy cultural facilities across the country, such as movie theaters and museums, at a discounted price or free of charge. And there are unique programs and events in each region, so you can experience various cultures of Korea. There are also cultural facilities that open at night on this day, so people who have not enjoyed culture due to work can go to these cultural facilities and experience on this day.
g_text_translate.it:
L'ultimo mercoledì di ogni mese è la Giornata della Cultura. In questo giorno potrai usufruire di strutture culturali in tutto il Paese, come cinema e musei, a un prezzo scontato o gratuitamente. E ci sono programmi ed eventi unici in ogni regione, così puoi sperimentare le diverse culture della Corea. Ci sono anche strutture culturali che aprono di notte in questo giorno, quindi le persone che non hanno apprezzato la cultura a causa del lavoro possono recarsi in queste strutture culturali e sperimentare in questo giorno.

#######

The last Wednesday of every month is Culture Day. On this day, you can enjoy cultural facilities across the country, such as movie theaters and museums, at a discounted price or free of charge. And there are unique programs and events in each region, so you can experience various cultures of Korea. There are also cultural facilities that open at night on this day, so people who have not enjoyed culture due to work can go to these cultural facilities and experience on this day.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le dernier mercredi de chaque mois est la Fête de la Culture. Ce jour-là, vous pourrez profiter des installations culturelles dans tout le pays, comme les cinémas et les musées, à prix réduit ou gratuitement. Et il existe des programmes et des événements uniques dans chaque région, afin que vous puissiez découvrir différentes cultures coréennes. Il existe également des installations culturelles qui ouvrent la nuit ce jour-là, afin que les personnes qui n'ont pas profité de la culture à cause de leur travail puissent se rendre dans ces installations culturelles et vivre cette journée.

#######

g_text_translate.es:

Y hay programas y eventos únicos en cada región, para que puedas experimentar las diversas culturas de Corea. También hay instalaciones culturales que abren por la noche en este día, por lo que las personas que no han disfrutado de la cultura debido al trabajo pueden ir a estas instalaciones culturales y experimentar ese día.

Dan terdapat program dan acara unik di setiap daerah, sehingga Anda bisa merasakan berbagai budaya Korea. content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 매주 수요일에 문화가 있는 날이 있습니다.
문화가 있는 날에는 문화 시설에 가면 덜 돈을 냅다.
문화가 있는 날에는 특색 있는 프로그램이 없습니다.
이 날에는 한국의 다양한 문화를 경험할 수 없습니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Thứ tư hàng tuần là ngày văn hóa.
2. Nếu đi tới các cơ sở công trình văn hóa vào ngày văn hóa thì có thể trả ít tiền hơn.
3. Vào ngày văn hóa không có các chương trình độc đáo.
4. Vào ngày này không thể trải nghiệm nhiều về văn hóa Hàn Quốc.
--------------------
문화 시설: Cơ sở, công trình văn hóa
돈을 내다: Trả tiền
체험하다 = 경험하다: Trải nghiệm

V/A + (으)면: Nếu, khi.

general.g_text: 한국에서는 새집으로 이사하면 가족이나 친구, 친척들을 집으로 초대합니다. 이 것은 ‘집들이’라고 합니다. ( ㉠ ) 사람들은 휴지, 세제 같은 생활용품을 선물합니다. 세제는 ‘세제의 거품처럼 돈을 많이 벌어서 부자가 되세요.’라는 뜻이 있습니다. 휴지는 잘 풀리기 때문에 모든 일이 잘 풀리기를 바라는 마음으로 휴지를 선물합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ở Hàn Quốc, khi chuyển sang nhà mới người ta sẽ mời gia đình, bạn bè và họ hàng đến nhà. Điều này được gọi là 'Tiệc tân gia'. ( ㉠ ) mọi người thường tặng những vật dụng cần trong sinh hoạt như giấy vệ sinh, nước tẩy rửa. Nước tẩy rửa mang ý nghĩa 'Mong chủ nhà kiếm được nhiều tiền như bong bóng của chất tẩy rửa và trở thành người giàu'. Giấy vệ sinh thì rất dễ tháo ra nên họ tặng giấy vệ sinh với tấm lòng mong mọi chuyện sẽ được thuận lợi suôn sẻ.
g_text_translate.en: In Korea, when you move into a new house, you invite family, friends, and relatives to your home. This is called ‘housewarming’. When going to a housewarming, people present household items such as toilet paper and detergent. Detergent means ‘Make a lot of money and become rich like bubbles in detergent.’ Because the paper unravels from the roll easily, people present toilet paper with the hope that everything will work out well.
g_text_translate.it:
In Corea, quando ti trasferisci in una nuova casa, inviti familiari, amici e parenti a casa tua. Questo si chiama “inaugurazione della casa”. Quando si va all'inaugurazione di una casa, le persone presentano articoli per la casa come carta igienica e detersivi. Detersivo significa "Guadagna un sacco di soldi e diventa ricco come le bolle di un detersivo". Poiché la carta si disfa facilmente dal rotolo, le persone regalano la carta igienica con la speranza che tutto vada bene.

#######

In Korea, when you move into a new house, you invite family, friends, and relatives to your home. This is called ‘housewarming’. When going to a housewarming, people present household items such as toilet paper and detergent. Detergent means ‘Make a lot of money and become rich like bubbles in detergent.’ Because the paper unravels from the roll easily, people present toilet paper with the hope that everything will work out well.
g_text_translate.fr:
En Corée, lorsque vous emménagez dans une nouvelle maison, vous invitez votre famille, vos amis et vos proches chez vous. C’est ce qu’on appelle une « pendaison de crémaillère ». Lorsqu'ils se rendent à une pendaison de crémaillère, les gens présentent des articles ménagers tels que du papier toilette et du détergent. Détergent signifie « Gagnez beaucoup d’argent et devenez riche comme des bulles de détergent ». Comme le papier se détache facilement du rouleau, les gens présentent le papier toilette avec l’espoir que tout se passera bien.

#######

When going to a housewarming, people present household items such as toilet paper and detergent. Detergent means ‘Make a lot of money and become rich like bubbles in detergent.’ Because the paper unravels from the roll easily, people present toilet paper with the hope that everything will work out well.
g_text_translate.es:
En Corea, cuando te mudas a una nueva casa, invitas a familiares, amigos y parientes a tu casa. Esto se llama "inauguración de la casa". Al asistir a una inauguración de una casa, la gente presenta artículos del hogar como papel higiénico y detergente. Detergente significa “Gana mucho dinero y hazte rico como burbujas de detergente”. Como el papel se deshace fácilmente del rollo, la gente presenta el papel higiénico con la esperanza de que todo salga bien.

#######
