g_text_translate.id:
Di Korea, ketika Anda pindah ke rumah baru, Anda mengundang keluarga, teman, dan kerabat ke rumah Anda. Ini disebut 'pindah rumah'. Saat pergi ke pesta pindahan rumah, orang-orang mempersembahkan barang-barang rumah tangga seperti tisu toilet dan deterjen. Deterjen berarti 'Dapatkan banyak uang dan menjadi kaya seperti gelembung dalam deterjen.' Karena kertas mudah terurai dari gulungannya, orang-orang memberikan tisu toilet dengan harapan semuanya akan berjalan dengan baik.

#######

Detergent means ‘Make a lot of money and become rich like bubbles in detergent.’ Because the paper unravels from the roll easily, people present toilet paper with the hope that everything will work out well.
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国では、新しい家に引っ越したら、家族、友人、親戚を家に招きます。これを「新築祝い」といいます。新築祝いに行くと、トイレットペーパーや洗剤などの日用品をプレゼントします。洗剤には「洗剤の泡のようにたくさんお金を稼いで金持ちになれ」という意味があり、紙がすぐに解けてしまうことから、万事うまくいくようにという願いを込めてトイレットペーパーをプレゼントします。

g_text_translate.de:
Wenn Sie in Korea in ein neues Haus einziehen, laden Sie Familie, Freunde und Verwandte zu sich nach Hause ein. Dies nennt man „Einweihungsfeier“. Bei einer Einweihungsfeier präsentieren Menschen Haushaltsgegenstände wie Toilettenpapier und Waschmittel. Waschmittel bedeutet „Viel Geld verdienen und reich werden wie Blasen im Waschmittel.“ Da sich das Papier leicht von der Rolle lösen lässt, schenken die Leute Toilettenpapier in der Hoffnung, dass alles gut klappt.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在韩国，当你搬进新家时，你会邀请家人、朋友和亲戚来你家。这称为“乔迁之喜”。参加乔迁典礼时，人们会赠送卫生纸和清洁剂等家居用品。洗涤剂的意思是“像洗涤剂中的泡沫一样赚很多钱并变得富有”。由于卫生纸很容易从卷筒上散开，因此人们赠送卫生纸时希望一切顺利。

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
在韓國，當你搬進新家時，你會邀請家人、朋友和親戚來你家。這稱為“喬遷之喜”。參加喬遷典禮時，人們會贈送衛生紙和清潔劑等家居用品。洗滌劑的意思是“像洗滌劑中的泡沫一樣賺很多錢並變得富有”。由於衛生紙很容易從捲筒上散開，因此人們贈送衛生紙時希望一切順利。

g_text_translate.ru:
В Корее, когда вы переезжаете в новый дом, вы приглашаете к себе домой семью, друзей и родственников. Это называется «новоселье». Собираясь на новоселье, люди дарят предметы домашнего обихода, такие как туалетная бумага и моющее средство. «Моющее средство» означает «Заработайте много денег и станьте богатыми, как пузыри в моющем средстве». Поскольку бумага легко распутывается из рулона, люди дарят туалетную бумагу в надежде, что все пройдет хорошо.

g_text_translate.th:
ในเกาหลี เมื่อคุณย้ายเข้าบ้านใหม่ คุณจะเชิญครอบครัว เพื่อน และญาติมาที่บ้านของคุณ สิ่งนี้เรียกว่า 'พิธีขึ้นบ้านใหม่' เมื่อไปงานขึ้นบ้านใหม่ ผู้คนจะนำเสนอสิ่งของในครัวเรือน เช่น กระดาษชำระและผงซักฟอก ผงซักฟอกหมายถึง 'ทำเงินได้มากมายและรวยเหมือนฟองสบู่ในผงซักฟอก' เนื่องจากกระดาษหลุดออกจากม้วนได้ง่าย ผู้คนจึงนำเสนอกระดาษชำระด้วยความหวังว่าทุกอย่างจะออกมาดี

g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया में, जब आप एक नए घर में जाते हैं, तो आप परिवार, दोस्तों और रिश्तेदारों को अपने घर पर आमंत्रित करते हैं। इसे 'गृहप्रवेश' कहा जाता है। गृहप्रवेश के लिए जाते समय, लोग टॉयलेट पेपर और डिटर्जेंट जैसी घरेलू वस्तुएं भेंट करते हैं। डिटर्जेंट का अर्थ है 'बहुत सारा पैसा कमाओ और डिटर्जेंट में बुलबुले की तरह अमीर बनो।' क्योंकि कागज रोल से आसानी से खुल जाता है, लोग इस उम्मीद के साथ टॉयलेट पेपर पेश करते हैं कि सब कुछ ठीक हो जाएगा।

Kore'de yeni bir eve taşındığınızda ailenizi, arkadaşlarınızı ve akrabalarınızı evinize davet edersiniz. Buna 'eve taşınma' denir. İnsanlar yeni eve taşınma partisine giderken tuvalet kağıdı, deterjan gibi ev eşyalarını sunarlar. Deterjan, 'Deterjan baloncukları gibi çok para kazan ve zengin ol' anlamına gelir. Kağıt rulodan kolayca çözüldüğü için insanlar her şeyin yolunda gideceği umuduyla tuvalet kağıdı sunarlar.

q_answer: 휴지를 주면 '일이 잘 풀리기를 바랍니다'라는 의미합니다.
한국 사람은 휴지와 세제를 선물하지 않습니다.
휴지와 세제의 가격이 올라서 다른 물건을 선물합니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Mọi người không thích tiệc tân gia.
2. Nếu tặng giấy vệ sinh thì có ý nghĩa là ' Mong mọi chuyện được suôn sẻ'.
3. Người Hàn Quốc không tặng giấy vệ sinh và chất tẩy rửa.
4. Giá của giấy vệ sinh và chất tẩy rửa tăng nên người ta tặng đồ khác.
--------------------
의미하다: Có nghĩa là
일이 잘 풀리다: Chuyện suôn sẻ, thuận lợi
바라다: Mong đợi, mong muốn

V/A + 기 때문에: Vì ... nên.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. People don't like the housewarming.
2. Giving toilet paper means 'I hope things work out'.
3. Koreans do not gift toilet paper and detergent.
4. The price of toilet paper and detergent goes up, so people present other items.
 --------------------
<g>의미하다:</g> To mean
<g>일이 잘 풀리다:</g> Things work out
<g>바라다:</g> To hope, to wish

<g>V/A + 기 때문에:</g> Because.

2. Dare la carta igienica significa "spero che le cose funzionino".
3. I coreani non regalano carta igienica e detersivi.
4. Il prezzo della carta igienica e dei detersivi aumenta, quindi le persone presentano altri articoli.

<g>일이 잘 풀리다:</g>Le cose funzionano
<g>바라다:</g>Sperare, desiderare

<g>V/A + 기 때문에:</g>Perché.

3. कोरियाई लोग टॉयलेट पेपर और डिटर्जेंट उपहार में नहीं देते हैं।
4. टॉयलेट पेपर और डिटर्जेंट की कीमत बढ़ जाती है, इसलिए लोग अन्य वस्तुएं पेश करते हैं।
------------------------

<g>바라다:</g>आशा करना, कामना करना

general.g_text: 우리 가족은 여름휴가 때마다 바다에 갑니다. 작년에는 동해 바다에 다녀왔습니다. 2박 3일 일정이었는데 다행히 비도 오지 않고 날씨도 맑았습니다. 바닷물이 깊지 않아서 아이들이 놀기에도 안전해서 마음이 ( ㉠ ) 즐거웠습니다. 점심에는 맛있는 라면을 끓여 먹고 오후에는 배를 타서 돌아갔습니다. 무더운 여름에는 역시 시원한 바다가 최고입니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Gia đình tôi đi du lịch biển vào mỗi kỳ nghỉ hè. Năm ngoái gia đình tôi đã đi biển Donghae. Chúng tôi đi ba ngày hai đêm, may mắn là trời không mưa và rất trong xanh. Nước biển không sâu nên bọn trẻ có thể an toàn chơi các trò dưới nước nên lòng tôi rất ( ㉠ ) và vui vẻ. Chúng tôi nấu món mì thật ngon rồi ăn và đi tàu trở về. Vào mùa hè nóng nực thì bãi biển mát quả là điều tuyệt vời nhất.
g_text_translate.en: My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.it:
La mia famiglia va al mare ogni vacanza estiva. L'anno scorso siamo stati nel Mare dell'Est. È stato un viaggio di 2 notti e 3 giorni, fortunatamente non ha piovuto e il tempo era sereno. L'acqua del mare non era profonda, quindi era sicuro far giocare i bambini, quindi mi sono sentito a mio agio e mi sono divertito. Abbiamo cucinato dei deliziosi ramen per pranzo e siamo tornati in barca nel pomeriggio. Nella calda estate, il mare fresco è il migliore.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.fr:
Ma famille va à la mer chaque vacances d'été. L'année dernière, nous sommes allés en mer de l'Est. C'était un voyage de 2 nuits et 3 jours, heureusement il n'a pas plu et le temps était clair. L'eau de mer n'était pas profonde, donc les enfants pouvaient jouer en toute sécurité, donc je me sentais à l'aise et j'appréciais ça. Nous avons cuisiné de délicieux ramen pour le déjeuner et sommes repartis en bateau dans l'après-midi. En été chaud, la mer fraîche est la meilleure.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.es:
Mi familia va al mar todas las vacaciones de verano. El año pasado fuimos al Mar del Este. Fue un viaje de 2 noches y 3 días, afortunadamente no llovió y el clima estuvo despejado. El agua del mar no era profunda, por lo que era seguro que los niños jugaran, así que me sentí cómodo y lo disfruté. Cocinamos un delicioso ramen para el almuerzo y regresamos en barco por la tarde. En verano caluroso, el mar fresco es lo mejor.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.id:
Keluarga saya pergi ke laut setiap liburan musim panas. Tahun lalu, kami pergi ke Laut Timur. Perjalanan 2 malam 3 hari, untung tidak hujan dan cuaca cerah. Air lautnya tidak dalam sehingga aman untuk dimainkan anak-anak, sehingga saya merasa nyaman dan menikmatinya. Kami memasak ramen lezat untuk makan siang dan kembali dengan perahu di sore hari. Di musim panas, laut yang sejuk adalah yang terbaik.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.ja:
私の家族は毎年夏休みに海に行きます。去年、私たちは東海に行きました。 2泊3日の旅でしたが、幸いにも雨は降らず、天気も良くなりました。海水は深くなく、子供でも安心して遊べるので、安心して楽しめました。昼食においしいラーメンを作り、午後にはボートで戻りました。暑い夏には涼しい海が最高です。

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.de:
Meine Familie fährt jeden Sommerurlaub ans Meer. Letztes Jahr waren wir an der Ostsee. Die Reise dauerte zwei Nächte und drei Tage, glücklicherweise regnete es nicht und das Wetter war klar. Das Meerwasser war nicht tief, so dass Kinder sicher spielen konnten, ich fühlte mich also wohl und genoss es. Zum Mittagessen kochten wir köstliche Ramen und fuhren am Nachmittag mit dem Boot zurück. Im heißen Sommer ist das kühle Meer das Beste.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我的家人每年暑假都会去海边。去年，我们去了东海。这是三天两夜的旅行，幸运的是没有下雨，天气晴朗。海水不深，孩子们玩起来很安全，感觉很舒服，玩得很开心。我们做了美味的拉面当午餐，下午乘船返回。炎热的夏天，清凉的海水是最好的。

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我的家人每年暑假都會去海邊。去年，我們去了東海。這是三天兩夜的旅行，幸運的是沒有下雨，天氣晴朗。海水不深，孩子們玩起來很安全，感覺很舒服，玩得很開心。我們做了美味的拉麵當午餐，下午乘船返回。炎熱的夏天，清涼的海水是最好的。

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.ru:
Моя семья ездит на море каждые летние каникулы. В прошлом году мы побывали в Восточном море. Поездка длилась 2 ночи и 3 дня, к счастью, дождя не было и погода была ясная. Морская вода была небольшой, поэтому детям было безопасно играть, поэтому я чувствовал себя комфортно и получал от этого удовольствие. На обед мы приготовили вкусный рамен, а днем ​​отправились обратно на лодке. Жарким летом лучше всего прохладное море.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.th:
ครอบครัวของฉันไปทะเลทุกวันหยุดฤดูร้อน ปีที่แล้วเราไปทะเลตะวันออก เป็นทริป 2 คืน 3 วัน โชคดีฝนไม่ตกและอากาศแจ่มใส น้ำทะเลไม่ลึกจึงทำให้เด็กๆ เล่นได้อย่างปลอดภัย ฉันรู้สึกสบายใจและสนุกสนาน เราปรุงราเมนแสนอร่อยเป็นอาหารกลางวันและเดินทางกลับโดยเรือในช่วงบ่าย หน้าร้อน ทะเลเย็นคือที่สุด

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.pt:
Minha família vai para o mar todas as férias de verão. No ano passado, fomos ao Mar do Leste. Foi uma viagem de 2 noites e 3 dias, felizmente não choveu e o tempo estava bom. A água do mar não era profunda, então era seguro para as crianças brincarem, então me senti confortável e gostei. Preparamos um delicioso ramen para o almoço e voltamos de barco à tarde. No verão quente, o mar fresco é o melhor.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.hi:
मेरा परिवार हर गर्मी की छुट्टियों में समुद्र में जाता है। पिछले साल, हम पूर्वी सागर गए थे। यह 2 रात और 3 दिन की यात्रा थी, सौभाग्य से बारिश नहीं हुई और मौसम साफ था। समुद्र का पानी गहरा नहीं था, इसलिए बच्चों के खेलने के लिए यह सुरक्षित था, इसलिए मुझे सहज महसूस हुआ और मैंने इसका आनंद लिया। हमने दोपहर के भोजन के लिए स्वादिष्ट रेमन पकाया और दोपहर में नाव से वापस चले गए। गर्मी के मौसम में ठंडा समुद्र सबसे अच्छा होता है।

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.
g_text_translate.tr:
Ailem her yaz tatilinde denize gider. Geçen yıl Doğu Denizi'ne gittik. 2 gece 3 günlük bir yolculuktu, çok şükür yağmur yağmadı ve hava açıktı. Deniz suyu derin olmadığından çocukların oynaması güvenliydi, bu yüzden kendimi rahat hissettim ve keyif aldım. Öğle yemeği için lezzetli ramen pişirdik ve öğleden sonra tekneyle geri döndük. Sıcak yaz aylarında serin deniz en iyisidir.

#######

My family goes to the sea every summer vacation. Last year, we went to the East Sea. It was a 2 nights and 3 days trip, fortunately it didn't rain and the weather was clear. The sea water was not deep, so it was safe for children to play, so I felt comfortable and enjoyed it. We cooked delicious ramen for lunch and went back by boat in the afternoon. In hot summer, the cool sea is the best.

general.g_text: 사람마다 좋아하는 것이 ( ㉠ ) 즐기는 취미활동도 다릅니다. 하지만 가끔 가족들이 함께 즐겁게 보내는 시간도 필요합니다. 캠핑은 가족들이 함께 즐길 수 있는 활동입니다. 너무 좋은 곳이 아니더라도 가족과 함께 이야기하고 맛있는 음식을 먹으면서 행복한 추억을 만들 수 있습니다. 부모와 아이가 같이 계획하고 준비하면 생각을 나누고 가족 간의 사랑을 키울 수도 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Điều mọi người yêu thích ( ㉠ ) các hoạt động sở thích cũng khác nhau. Nhưng đôi khi các thành viên trong gia đình cũng cần có những khoảng thời gian vui vẻ cùng nhau. Cắm trại là hoạt động mà gia đình có thể tận hưởng cùng nhau. Dù không phải nơi quá đẹp nhưng vẫn có thể tạo ra những kỷ niệm vui vẻ khi vừa trò chuyện cùng với gia đình vừa ăn những món ăn ngon. Khi bố mẹ và con cái cùng nhau lên kế hoạch và chuẩn bị, họ chia sẻ suy nghĩ của mình và có thể nuôi dưỡng tình yêu gia đình.
g_text_translate.en: Everyone has different hobbies, so the hobbies they enjoy are also different. But sometimes families need time to have fun together. Camping is an activity that families can enjoy together. Even if it's not a great place, you can make happy memories while talking with your family and eating delicious food. When parents and children plan and prepare together, they can share ideas and foster family love.
g_text_translate.it:
Ognuno ha hobby diversi, quindi anche gli hobby che apprezzano sono diversi. Ma a volte le famiglie hanno bisogno di tempo per divertirsi insieme. Il campeggio è un'attività che le famiglie possono godersi insieme. Anche se non è un bel posto, puoi creare ricordi felici mentre parli con la tua famiglia e mangi cibo delizioso. Quando genitori e figli pianificano e si preparano insieme, possono condividere idee e favorire l’amore familiare.

#######

Everyone has different hobbies, so the hobbies they enjoy are also different. But sometimes families need time to have fun together. Camping is an activity that families can enjoy together. Even if it's not a great place, you can make happy memories while talking with your family and eating delicious food. When parents and children plan and prepare together, they can share ideas and foster family love.
g_text_translate.fr:
Tout le monde a des passe-temps différents, donc les passe-temps qu’ils apprécient sont également différents. Mais parfois, les familles ont besoin de temps pour s’amuser ensemble. Le camping est une activité que les familles peuvent pratiquer ensemble. Même si ce n'est pas un endroit génial, vous pouvez créer des souvenirs heureux tout en discutant avec votre famille et en mangeant de délicieux plats. Lorsque les parents et les enfants planifient et se préparent ensemble, ils peuvent partager des idées et favoriser l'amour familial.

#######

Everyone has different hobbies, so the hobbies they enjoy are also different. But sometimes families need time to have fun together. Camping is an activity that families can enjoy together. Even if it's not a great place, you can make happy memories while talking with your family and eating delicious food. When parents and children plan and prepare together, they can share ideas and foster family love.
g_text_translate.es:
Cada uno tiene aficiones diferentes, por lo que las aficiones que disfrutan también son diferentes. Pero a veces las familias necesitan tiempo para divertirse juntas. Acampar es una actividad que las familias pueden disfrutar juntas. Incluso si no es un gran lugar, puedes crear recuerdos felices mientras hablas con tu familia y comes comida deliciosa. Cuando padres e hijos planifican y se preparan juntos, pueden compartir ideas y fomentar el amor familiar.

#######

Everyone has different hobbies, so the hobbies they enjoy are also different. But sometimes families need time to have fun together. Camping is an activity that families can enjoy together. Even if it's not a great place, you can make happy memories while talking with your family and eating delicious food. When parents and children plan and prepare together, they can share ideas and foster family love.
g_text_translate.id:
Setiap orang mempunyai hobi yang berbeda-beda, sehingga hobi yang digemari juga berbeda-beda. Namun terkadang keluarga membutuhkan waktu untuk bersenang-senang bersama. Berkemah merupakan salah satu kegiatan yang bisa dinikmati bersama oleh keluarga. Meski bukan tempatnya yang bagus, Anda bisa menciptakan kenangan indah sambil berbincang dengan keluarga dan menyantap makanan lezat. Ketika orang tua dan anak-anak merencanakan dan mempersiapkan diri bersama, mereka dapat berbagi gagasan dan memupuk kasih sayang keluarga.

#######

Everyone has different hobbies, so the hobbies they enjoy are also different. But sometimes families need time to have fun together. Camping is an activity that families can enjoy together. Even if it's not a great place, you can make happy memories while talking with your family and eating delicious food. When parents and children plan and prepare together, they can share ideas and foster family love.
g_text_translate.ja:
人それぞれ趣味が違うので、楽しめる趣味も異なります。しかし、時には家族が一緒に楽しむ時間が必要な場合もあります。キャンプは家族で楽しめるアクティビティです。たとえ良い場所でなくても、家族と話しながら美味しいものを食べれば楽しい思い出が作れます。親子で一緒に計画を立てて準備すると、アイデアを共有し、家族愛を育むことができます。

हर किसी के शौक अलग-अलग होते हैं, इसलिए उनके शौक भी अलग-अलग होते हैं। लेकिन कभी-कभी परिवारों को एक साथ मौज-मस्ती करने के लिए समय की आवश्यकता होती है। कैम्पिंग एक ऐसी गतिविधि है जिसका आनंद परिवार एक साथ ले सकते हैं। भले ही यह कोई अच्छी जगह न हो, आप अपने परिवार के साथ बात करते हुए और स्वादिष्ट खाना खाते हुए सुखद यादें बना सकते हैं। जब माता-पिता और बच्चे एक साथ योजना बनाते हैं और तैयारी करते हैं, तो वे विचार साझा कर सकते हैं और पारिवारिक प्रेम को बढ़ावा दे सकते हैं।

Kamp yapmak ailelerin birlikte keyifle yapabileceği bir aktivitedir. Harika bir yer olmasa bile ailenizle sohbet ederken, lezzetli yemekler yerken mutlu anılar yaratabilirsiniz. Ebeveynler ve çocuklar birlikte plan yapıp hazırlandıklarında fikirlerini paylaşabilirler ve aile sevgisini geliştirebilirler.

general.g_text: 한국에서 시민들은 쓰레기를 분리수거합니다. 일반 쓰레기는 봉투에 ( ㉠ ). 다시 쓸 수 있는 깡통, 병, 플라스틱, 종이 등을 분리수거통에 버립니다. 그 후에  재활용 센터에 운반할 겁니다. 음식물 쓰레기는 음식물 봉투에 버립니다. 그리고 지역마다 쓰레기를 버리는 시간, 날짜나 장소, 쓰레기봉투 등이 많이 다릅니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ở Hàn Quốc, người dân phân loại và thu gom rác thải. Rác thông thường ( ㉠ ) vào túi. Các thùng cát tông, chai lọ, nhựa, giấy,... có thể được tái sử dụng được bỏ vào thùng rác tái chế. Sau đó chúng sẽ được gửi tới trung tâm tái chế. Rác thực phẩm được bỏ vào túi đựng rác thực phẩm. Và tùy thuộc vào từng khu vực mà thời gian, ngày tháng hay địa điểm, thùng vứt rác cũng rất khác nhau.
g_text_translate.en: In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.it:
In Corea i cittadini differenziano i rifiuti. La gente mette la spazzatura in un sacchetto e la butta via. Mettono lattine, bottiglie, plastica, carta, ecc. riutilizzabili nel contenitore per il riciclaggio. Successivamente verrà trasportato al centro di riciclaggio. Gettano i rifiuti alimentari nei sacchetti del cibo. Inoltre, l'ora, la data, il luogo e i sacchi della spazzatura per smaltire la spazzatura variano notevolmente da regione a regione.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.fr:
En Corée, les citoyens trient les déchets. Les gens mettent leurs déchets dans un sac et les jettent. Ils mettent les canettes, bouteilles, plastiques, papiers, etc. réutilisables dans le bac de recyclage. Après cela, il sera transporté vers la déchetterie. Ils jettent les déchets alimentaires dans des sacs de nourriture. De plus, l'heure, la date, le lieu et les sacs poubelles pour déposer les déchets varient considérablement d'une région à l'autre.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.es:
En Corea, los ciudadanos separan la basura. La gente pone la basura general en una bolsa y la tira. Ponen latas, botellas, plástico, papel, etc. reutilizables en el contenedor de reciclaje. Posteriormente será transportado al centro de reciclaje. Tiran los desperdicios de comida en bolsas de comida. Además, la hora, la fecha, el lugar y las bolsas de basura para sacar la basura varían mucho de una región a otra.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.id:
Di Korea, warga memilah sampah. Orang-orang memasukkan sampah umum ke dalam tas dan membuangnya. Mereka membuang kaleng, botol, plastik, kertas, dll yang dapat digunakan kembali ke tempat sampah daur ulang. Setelah itu akan diangkut ke pusat daur ulang. Mereka membuang sisa makanan ke dalam kantong makanan. Selain itu, waktu, tanggal, lokasi, dan kantong sampah untuk membuang sampah sangat bervariasi dari satu daerah ke daerah lain.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国では国民がゴミを分別します。一般ゴミは袋に入れて捨てます。再利用可能な缶、ボトル、プラスチック、紙などをリサイクル箱に入れます。その後、リサイクルセンターへ運ばれます。彼らは食品廃棄物を食品袋に入れて捨てます。また、ゴミを出す時間や日時、場所、ゴミ袋は地域によって大きく異なります。

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.de:
In Korea trennen die Bürger den Müll. Die Leute packen den allgemeinen Müll in eine Tüte und werfen ihn weg. Sie werfen wiederverwendbare Dosen, Flaschen, Plastik, Papier usw. in die Recyclingtonne. Anschließend wird es zum Recyclingzentrum transportiert. Sie werfen Lebensmittelabfälle in Lebensmitteltüten weg. Auch die Zeit, das Datum, der Ort und die Müllsäcke für die Müllentsorgung variieren stark von Region zu Region.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在韩国，公民进行垃圾分类。人们把一般垃圾装进袋子里然后扔掉。他们将可重复使用的罐头、瓶子、塑料、纸张等放入回收箱。之后，它将被运送到回收中心。他们将食物垃圾扔进食品袋中。此外，不同地区投放垃圾的时间、日期、地点和垃圾袋也有很大差异。

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
在韓國，公民進行垃圾分類。人們把一般垃圾裝進袋子裡然後扔掉。他們將可重複使用的罐頭、瓶子、塑料、紙張等放入回收箱。之後，它將被運送到回收中心。他們將食物垃圾扔進食品袋中。此外，不同地區投放垃圾的時間、日期、地點和垃圾袋也有很大差異。

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.ru:
В Корее граждане разделяют мусор. Люди складывают обычный мусор в мешок и выбрасывают. Они выбрасывают многоразовые банки, бутылки, пластик, бумагу и т. д. в мусорную корзину. После этого его отправят в центр переработки. Пищевые отходы выбрасывают в пакеты для еды. Кроме того, время, дата, место и мешки для вывоза мусора сильно различаются от региона к региону.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.th:
ในเกาหลี ประชาชนแยกขยะ ประชาชนนำขยะทั่วไปใส่ถุงแล้วทิ้ง พวกเขาใส่กระป๋อง ขวดพลาสติก กระดาษ ฯลฯ ที่นำมาใช้ซ้ำได้ลงในถังขยะรีไซเคิล หลังจากนั้นจะขนส่งไปยังศูนย์รีไซเคิล พวกเขาทิ้งเศษอาหารในถุงอาหาร นอกจากนี้ เวลา วันที่ สถานที่ และถุงขยะในการทิ้งขยะยังแตกต่างกันอย่างมากในแต่ละภูมิภาค

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.pt:
Na Coreia, os cidadãos separam o lixo. As pessoas colocam o lixo geral em um saco e jogam fora. Eles colocam latas, garrafas, plástico, papel, etc. reutilizáveis ​​na lixeira. Depois disso, será transportado para o centro de reciclagem. Eles jogam fora os restos de comida em sacos de comida. Além disso, a hora, a data, o local e os sacos de lixo para descartar o lixo variam muito de região para região.

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया में नागरिक कूड़ा अलग करते हैं। लोग सामान्य कूड़ा-कचरा थैले में डालकर फेंक देते हैं। वे पुन: प्रयोज्य डिब्बे, बोतलें, प्लास्टिक, कागज आदि को रीसाइक्लिंग बिन में डालते हैं। इसके बाद इसे रीसाइक्लिंग सेंटर तक पहुंचाया जाएगा. वे खाने के कचरे को खाने की थैलियों में फेंक देते हैं। साथ ही, कूड़ा-कचरा डालने का समय, तारीख, स्थान और कूड़े की थैलियां एक क्षेत्र से दूसरे क्षेत्र में बहुत भिन्न होती हैं।

#######

In Korea, citizens separate garbage. People put general garbage in a bag and throw it away. They put reusable cans, bottles, plastic, paper, etc. into the recycling bin. After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.
g_text_translate.tr:
Kore'de vatandaşlar çöpleri ayırıyor. İnsanlar genel çöpleri bir torbaya koyup çöpe atıyorlar. Yeniden kullanılabilen kutuları, şişeleri, plastikleri, kağıtları vb. geri dönüşüm kutusuna atıyorlar. Daha sonra geri dönüşüm merkezine nakledilecektir. Yemek atıklarını yemek poşetlerine atıyorlar. Ayrıca çöplerin atılacağı saat, tarih, yer ve çöp torbaları bölgeden bölgeye büyük farklılıklar gösteriyor.

#######

After that, it will be transported to the recycling center. They throw away food waste in food bags. Also, the time, date, location, and garbage bags for putting out garbage vary greatly from region to region.

1. They throw general garbage into the recycling bin.
2. Although the area is different, the date and place of throwing out the garbage are the same.
3. Koreans separate garbage and throw it away.
4. You cannot throw away bottles, plastic, or paper that you can use.
--------------------
<g>분리수거하다:</g> To separate garbage

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다/없다:</g> Can/can't.
<g>V + 는 + N:</g> Noun modifiers for verbs of present tenses.
explain.zh-TW:

1. 他們將一般垃圾扔進回收箱。

3.韓國人將垃圾分類並扔掉。
4. 不能扔掉可以使用的瓶子、塑料或紙張。
--------------------
<g>분리수거하다:</g>垃圾分類

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다/없다:</g>可以/不可以。
<g>V + 는 + N:</g>現在時動詞的名詞修飾語。

explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो इस पाठ की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।

1. वे सामान्य कचरा रीसाइक्लिंग बिन में फेंक देते हैं।
2. इलाका भले ही अलग-अलग हो, लेकिन कूड़ा फेंकने की तारीख और जगह एक ही है।
3. कोरियाई लोग कूड़ा-कचरा अलग करके फेंक देते हैं।
4. आप उन बोतलों, प्लास्टिक या कागज को फेंक नहीं सकते जिनका आप उपयोग कर सकते हैं।
------------------------

general.g_text: 오늘 고향 친구가 우리 집에 놀러 와서 외식을 하기로 했습니다. 우리는 먼저 스마트폰으로 검색해 보고 유명한 집 근처 식당에 찾아갔습니다. 식당은 손님이 많아서 자리가 없었습니다. 우리는 30분 정도 ( ㉠ ) 들어갈 수 있었습니다. 음식이 다 맛있을 것 같아서 메뉴 다섯 개를 시켰습니다. 처음에 많을 것 같지만 우리는 다 주문한 음식을 맛있게 먹었습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm nay một người bạn cùng quê tới nhà tôi chơi nên tôi quyết định đi ăn ngoài. Đầu tiên chúng tôi thử tìm kiếm bằng điện thoại thông minh rồi đi đến một nhà hàng nổi tiếng gần nhà. Nhà hàng rất đông khách nên không còn chỗ nữa. Chúng tôi ( ㉠ ) khoảng 30 phút rồi mới vào trong. Đồ ăn có vẻ rất ngon nên chúng tôi đã gọi năm món trên thực đơn. Ban đầu chúng tôi thấy nhiều nhưng chúng tôi vẫn ăn hết số thức ăn mình đã gọi một cách ngon lành.
g_text_translate.en: Today, a friend from hometown came over to my house and we decided to eat out. We first searched on our smartphones and went to a famous restaurant near my house. The restaurant was full of customers and there were no seats. We waited about 30 minutes before we were able to get in. We thought all the food would be delicious, so we ordered five menus. It seems like there are a lot at first, but we all enjoyed the food we ordered.
g_text_translate.it:
Oggi un amico della mia città è venuto a casa mia e abbiamo deciso di mangiare fuori. Abbiamo prima cercato sui nostri smartphone e siamo andati in un famoso ristorante vicino a casa mia. Il ristorante era pieno di clienti e non c'erano posti a sedere. Abbiamo aspettato circa 30 minuti prima di poter entrare. Pensavamo che tutto il cibo sarebbe stato delizioso, quindi abbiamo ordinato cinque menu. All'inizio sembra che ce ne siano molti, ma abbiamo apprezzato tutti il ​​cibo che abbiamo ordinato.

#######

Today, a friend from hometown came over to my house and we decided to eat out. We first searched on our smartphones and went to a famous restaurant near my house. The restaurant was full of customers and there were no seats. We waited about 30 minutes before we were able to get in. We thought all the food would be delicious, so we ordered five menus. It seems like there are a lot at first, but we all enjoyed the food we ordered.
g_text_translate.fr:
Aujourd'hui, un ami de ma ville natale est venu chez moi et nous avons décidé d'aller manger au restaurant. Nous avons d’abord cherché sur nos smartphones et sommes allés dans un restaurant célèbre près de chez moi. Le restaurant était plein de clients et il n'y avait pas de places assises. Nous avons attendu environ 30 minutes avant de pouvoir entrer. Nous pensions que toute la nourriture serait délicieuse, alors nous avons commandé cinq menus. Au début, il semble qu'il y en ait beaucoup, mais nous avons tous apprécié la nourriture que nous avons commandée.

#######

It seems like there are a lot at first, but we all enjoyed the food we ordered.
g_text_translate.es:
Hoy vino a mi casa un amigo de mi ciudad natal y decidimos salir a comer. Primero buscamos en nuestros teléfonos inteligentes y fuimos a un restaurante famoso cerca de mi casa. El restaurante estaba lleno de clientes y no había asientos. Esperamos unos 30 minutos antes de poder entrar. Pensamos que toda la comida estaría deliciosa, así que pedimos cinco menús. Al principio parece que hay muchos, pero todos disfrutamos de la comida que pedimos.

g_text_translate.id:
Hari ini, seorang teman dari kampung halaman datang ke rumah saya dan kami memutuskan untuk makan di luar. Kami pertama kali mencari di ponsel cerdas kami dan pergi ke restoran terkenal di dekat rumah saya. Restoran itu penuh dengan pelanggan dan tidak ada kursi. Kami menunggu sekitar 30 menit sebelum bisa masuk. Kami pikir semua makanannya enak, jadi kami memesan lima menu. Sepertinya awalnya banyak, tapi kami semua menikmati makanan yang kami pesan.

g_text_translate.de:
Heute kam ein Freund aus meiner Heimatstadt zu mir nach Hause und wir beschlossen, auswärts zu essen. Wir suchten zuerst auf unseren Smartphones und gingen in ein berühmtes Restaurant in der Nähe meines Hauses. Das Restaurant war voller Gäste und es gab keine Sitzplätze. Wir warteten etwa 30 Minuten, bevor wir eintreten konnten. Wir dachten, das Essen würde köstlich sein, also bestellten wir fünf Menüs. Auf den ersten Blick sieht es so aus, als gäbe es viele davon, aber das bestellte Essen hat uns allen sehr gut geschmeckt.

g_text_translate.hi:
आज, गृहनगर से एक दोस्त मेरे घर आया और हमने बाहर खाना खाने का फैसला किया। हमने सबसे पहले अपने स्मार्टफ़ोन पर खोज की और मेरे घर के पास एक प्रसिद्ध रेस्तरां में गए। रेस्तरां ग्राहकों से भरा हुआ था और सीटें नहीं थीं। अंदर जाने से पहले हमने करीब 30 मिनट तक इंतजार किया। हमने सोचा कि सारा खाना स्वादिष्ट होगा, इसलिए हमने पांच मेनू का ऑर्डर दिया। ऐसा लगता है कि पहले तो बहुत कुछ है, लेकिन हम सभी ने ऑर्डर किए गए भोजन का आनंद लिया।

Bugün memleketten bir arkadaşım evime geldi ve dışarıda yemek yemeye karar verdik. Önce akıllı telefonlarımızdan araştırdık ve evimin yakınındaki ünlü bir restorana gittik. Restoran müşteri doluydu ve yer yoktu. İçeri girebilmek için yaklaşık 30 dakika bekledik. Tüm yemeklerin lezzetli olacağını düşündük ve beş menü sipariş ettik. İlk başta çok şey var gibi görünüyor, ama hepimiz sipariş ettiğimiz yemeklerden keyif aldık.

वह चुनें जो इस पाठ की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।

1. रेस्तरां में जाने से पहले उन्होंने अपने स्मार्टफोन पर सर्च किया.
2. रेस्तरां में खाना अच्छा नहीं था.
3. दोस्त को बाहर खाना खाना था, इसलिए वे एक रेस्तरां में गए।
4. इस रेस्टोरेंट में ज्यादा ग्राहक नहीं थे.
------------------------
<g>검색하다:</g>खोजना

<g>V + 기로 하다:</g>निर्णय लेना, वादा करना।
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 것 같다:</g>जैसा दिखता है, वैसा लगता है, मुझे लगता है।
<g>V + 기 전에:</g>पहले।

#######

Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. They searched on their smartphones before going to the restaurant.
2. The food at the restaurant was not good.
3. The friend wanted to eat out, so they went to a restaurant.
4. This restaurant didn't have many customers.
--------------------
<g>검색하다:</g> To search

<g>V + 기로 하다:</g> To decide to, to promise to.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 것 같다:</g> Look like, seem, I think.
<g>V + 기 전에:</g> Before.
explain.tr:
Bu metindeki içeriğe uygun olanı seçin.

1. Restorana gitmeden önce akıllı telefonlarından arama yaptılar.
2. Restorandaki yemekler iyi değildi.
3. Arkadaşı dışarıda yemek yemek istedi ve bir restorana gittiler.
4. Bu restoranın çok fazla müşterisi yoktu.
--------------------
<g>검색하다:</g>Aramak

<g>V + 기로 하다:</g>Karar vermek, söz vermek.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 것 같다:</g>Görünüşe göre, sanırım.
<g>V + 기 전에:</g>Önce.

general.g_text: 현대 사회에서 서로가 ( ㉠ ) 잘 살아가기 위해 공공예절을 지켜야 합니다. 첫째, 지하철역, 병원 등 공공장소에서 담배를 피우지 않도록 합니다. 둘째, 공공장소에서 휴대폰을 사용할 경우에는 작은 소리로 해야 합니다. 셋째, 공공장소에 아이들을 데리고 가면 뛰어다니지 않도록 주의해야 합니다. 그리고 공공장소에 애완견을 데리고 나갈 때에는 반드시 목줄을 매야 합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trong xã hội hiện đại, để sống tốt ( ㉠ ) với nhau thì phải tuân thủ các phép tắc công cộng. Đầu tiên, không được hút thuốc ở những nơi công cộng như ga tàu điện ngầm, bệnh viện,... Thứ hai, khi sử dụng điện thoại di động ở những nơi công cộng thì phải bật nhỏ tiếng. Thứ ba, nếu đưa trẻ em đến những nơi công cộng, phải chú ý không được để chúng chạy lung tung. Và khi dắt thú cưng đến nơi công cộng thì phải đeo xích cho chúng.
g_text_translate.en: In order to live well without being uncomfortable with each other in modern society, public etiquette must be observed. First, avoid smoking in public places such as subway stations and hospitals. Second, if you use your cell phone in a public place, you should do it in a low volume. Third, if you take your children to public places, you should be careful not to let them run around. And when you take your dog out in public, it must be on a leash.
g_text_translate.it:
Per vivere bene senza sentirsi a disagio gli uni con gli altri nella società moderna, è necessario osservare l'etichetta pubblica. Innanzitutto, evitare di fumare nei luoghi pubblici come le stazioni della metropolitana e gli ospedali. In secondo luogo, se usi il cellulare in un luogo pubblico, dovresti farlo a volume basso. Terzo, se porti i tuoi figli in luoghi pubblici, dovresti stare attento a non lasciarli correre in giro. E quando porti il ​​tuo cane in pubblico, deve essere al guinzaglio.

#######

In order to live well without being uncomfortable with each other in modern society, public etiquette must be observed. First, avoid smoking in public places such as subway stations and hospitals. Second, if you use your cell phone in a public place, you should do it in a low volume. Third, if you take your children to public places, you should be careful not to let them run around. And when you take your dog out in public, it must be on a leash.
g_text_translate.fr:
Afin de bien vivre sans être mal à l'aise les uns avec les autres dans la société moderne, l'étiquette publique doit être respectée. Premièrement, évitez de fumer dans les lieux publics tels que les stations de métro et les hôpitaux. Deuxièmement, si vous utilisez votre téléphone portable dans un lieu public, vous devez le faire à faible volume. Troisièmement, si vous emmenez vos enfants dans des lieux publics, vous devez faire attention à ne pas les laisser courir. Et lorsque vous sortez votre chien en public, il doit être tenu en laisse.

#######

In order to live well without being uncomfortable with each other in modern society, public etiquette must be observed. First, avoid smoking in public places such as subway stations and hospitals. Second, if you use your cell phone in a public place, you should do it in a low volume. Third, if you take your children to public places, you should be careful not to let them run around. And when you take your dog out in public, it must be on a leash.
g_text_translate.es:
Para vivir bien sin sentirse incómodos unos con otros en la sociedad moderna, se debe observar la etiqueta pública. En primer lugar, evite fumar en lugares públicos como estaciones de metro y hospitales. En segundo lugar, si utilizas tu celular en un lugar público, debes hacerlo en un volumen bajo. En tercer lugar, si lleva a sus hijos a lugares públicos, debe tener cuidado de no dejarlos correr. Y cuando saques a tu perro en público, debe estar atado.

#######

And when you take your dog out in public, it must be on a leash.
g_text_translate.id:
Untuk hidup dengan baik tanpa merasa tidak nyaman satu sama lain dalam masyarakat modern, etika publik harus dipatuhi. Pertama, hindari merokok di tempat umum seperti stasiun kereta bawah tanah dan rumah sakit. Kedua, jika Anda menggunakan ponsel di tempat umum, sebaiknya lakukan dengan volume suara yang pelan. Ketiga, jika Anda membawa anak Anda ke tempat umum, berhati-hatilah untuk tidak membiarkan mereka berlarian. Dan saat Anda membawa anjing Anda ke tempat umum, ia harus diikat.

#######

g_text_translate.ja:
現代社会でお互いに不快感を持たずにうまく生きていくためには、公共のマナーを守らなければなりません。まず、地下鉄の駅や病院などの公共の場所での喫煙は避けてください。次に、公共の場所で携帯電話を使用する場合は、小さな音量で使用する必要があります。第三に、子供を公共の場所に連れて行く場合は、子供を走り回らせないように注意する必要があります。また、犬を公共の場に連れ出すときは、必ずリードを付けてください。

#######

And when you take your dog out in public, it must be on a leash.
g_text_translate.de:
Um in der modernen Gesellschaft gut zu leben, ohne sich unwohl zu fühlen, muss die öffentliche Etikette eingehalten werden. Vermeiden Sie zunächst das Rauchen an öffentlichen Orten wie U-Bahn-Stationen und Krankenhäusern. Zweitens: Wenn Sie Ihr Mobiltelefon an einem öffentlichen Ort verwenden, sollten Sie dies mit geringer Lautstärke tun. Drittens: Wenn Sie Ihre Kinder an öffentliche Orte mitnehmen, sollten Sie darauf achten, dass sie nicht herumlaufen. Und wenn Sie Ihren Hund in die Öffentlichkeit mitnehmen, muss er an der Leine sein.

#######

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
在现代社会，要想生活得好，又不至于彼此不舒服，就必须遵守公共礼仪。首先，避免在地铁站、医院等公共场所吸烟。其次，在公共场所使用手机时，应调低音量。第三，如果带孩子去公共场所，要注意不要让孩子乱跑。当你带你的狗去公共场合时，必须用皮带拴住它。

g_text_translate.ru:
Чтобы жить хорошо, не испытывая дискомфорта друг с другом в современном обществе, необходимо соблюдать общественный этикет. Во-первых, избегайте курения в общественных местах, таких как станции метро и больницы. Во-вторых, если вы пользуетесь мобильным телефоном в общественном месте, вам следует делать это на низкой громкости. В-третьих, если вы водите детей в общественные места, будьте осторожны и не позволяйте им бегать. А когда вы выводите собаку на улицу, она должна быть на поводке.

g_text_translate.th:
การจะใช้ชีวิตได้ดีไม่อึดอัดกันในสังคมยุคใหม่ต้องคำนึงถึงมารยาทในที่สาธารณะ ประการแรก หลีกเลี่ยงการสูบบุหรี่ในที่สาธารณะ เช่น สถานีรถไฟใต้ดินและโรงพยาบาล ประการที่สอง หากคุณใช้โทรศัพท์มือถือในที่สาธารณะ คุณควรทำในระดับเสียงที่เบา ประการที่สาม หากคุณพาลูกไปในสถานที่สาธารณะ คุณควรระวังอย่าปล่อยให้พวกเขาวิ่งเล่น และเมื่อคุณพาสุนัขของคุณออกไปในที่สาธารณะ สุนัขจะต้องมีสายจูง

g_text_translate.pt:
Para viver bem sem se sentirem desconfortáveis ​​uns com os outros na sociedade moderna, a etiqueta pública deve ser observada. Primeiro, evite fumar em locais públicos, como estações de metrô e hospitais. Em segundo lugar, se você usa seu celular em um local público, deve fazê-lo em volume baixo. Terceiro, se você levar seus filhos a locais públicos, tome cuidado para não deixá-los correr por aí. E quando você leva seu cachorro para passear em público, ele deve estar na coleira.

g_text_translate.hi:
आधुनिक समाज में एक-दूसरे के साथ असहज हुए बिना अच्छी तरह से रहने के लिए सार्वजनिक शिष्टाचार का पालन करना चाहिए। सबसे पहले, मेट्रो स्टेशनों और अस्पतालों जैसे सार्वजनिक स्थानों पर धूम्रपान करने से बचें। दूसरा, यदि आप सार्वजनिक स्थान पर अपने सेल फोन का उपयोग करते हैं, तो आपको इसे कम आवाज़ में करना चाहिए। तीसरा, यदि आप अपने बच्चों को सार्वजनिक स्थानों पर ले जाते हैं, तो आपको सावधान रहना चाहिए कि उन्हें इधर-उधर भागने न दें। और जब आप अपने कुत्ते को सार्वजनिक स्थान पर ले जाते हैं, तो उसे पट्टे पर होना चाहिए।

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Modern toplumda birbirinden rahatsız olmadan iyi yaşamak için toplumsal görgü kurallarına uyulması gerekir. Öncelikle metro istasyonları ve hastaneler gibi halka açık yerlerde sigara içmekten kaçının. İkincisi, eğer cep telefonunuzu halka açık bir yerde kullanıyorsanız, bunu düşük ses seviyesinde yapmalısınız. Üçüncüsü, eğer çocuklarınızı halka açık yerlere götürüyorsanız onların ortalıkta dolaşmasına izin vermemeye dikkat etmelisiniz. Ve köpeğinizi halka açık bir yere çıkardığınızda tasmalı olması gerekir.

general.g_text: 한국에서 다양한 교통수단이 발달해 있습니다. 큰 도시 내에서 이동할 때는 시내버스, 지하철이나 택시를 주로 이용합니다. 사람들은 버스 정류장에서 시내버스를 타고 ( ㉠ ) 곳으로 이동할 수 있습니다. 게다가 최근에 휴대전화나 버스 정류장의 전광판을 통해서 시내버스의 도착 시간을  쉽게 알 수 있어서 아주 편리합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Các loại hình phương tiện giao thông khác nhau rất phát triển ở Hàn Quốc. Khi di chuyển trong nội thành những đô thị lớn mọi người chủ yếu sử dụng xe bus nội thành, tàu điện ngầm hay taxi. Mọi người có thể bắt xe bus ở các bến xe bus rồi di chuyển tới nơi ( ㉠ ). Bên cạnh đó, gần đây có thể dễ dàng biết được thời gian đến của xe bus nội thành thông qua điện thoại di động hoặc các biển báo đèn led ở bến xe bus nên rất tiện.
g_text_translate.en: Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.it:
In Corea vengono sviluppati vari mezzi di trasporto. Quando ci si sposta nelle grandi città, le persone di solito usano gli autobus urbani, la metropolitana o i taxi. Le persone possono prendere un autobus urbano dalla fermata dell'autobus fino al luogo in cui vogliono andare. Inoltre, recentemente, è molto comodo poter conoscere facilmente l'orario di arrivo dell'autobus urbano tramite il proprio cellulare o il tabellone elettronico alla fermata dell'autobus.

#######

Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.fr:
Divers moyens de transport sont développés en Corée. Lorsqu'ils se déplacent dans les grandes villes, les gens utilisent généralement les bus urbains, le métro ou les taxis. Les gens peuvent prendre un bus urbain depuis l’arrêt de bus jusqu’à l’endroit où ils souhaitent se rendre. De plus, depuis peu, il est très pratique de pouvoir facilement connaître l'heure d'arrivée du bus de la ville via votre téléphone portable ou le panneau d'affichage électronique à l'arrêt de bus.

#######

Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.es:
En Corea se desarrollan varios medios de transporte. Para moverse dentro de las grandes ciudades, la gente suele utilizar autobuses urbanos, metro o taxis. Las personas pueden tomar un autobús urbano desde la parada hasta donde quieran ir. Además, últimamente resulta muy cómodo poder conocer fácilmente la hora de llegada del autobús urbano a través de su teléfono móvil o del panel electrónico de la parada.

#######

Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.id:
Berbagai alat transportasi dikembangkan di Korea. Saat beraktivitas di kota besar, masyarakat biasanya menggunakan bus kota, kereta bawah tanah, atau taksi. Masyarakat bisa naik bus kota dari halte menuju tempat yang ingin dituju. Selain itu, akhir-akhir ini sangat mudah bagi Anda untuk mengetahui waktu kedatangan bus kota dengan mudah melalui ponsel Anda atau papan informasi elektronik di halte bus.

#######

Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国ではさまざまな交通手段が発達しています。大都市内を移動する場合、人々は通常、市バス、地下鉄、またはタクシーを利用します。人々はバス停から市バスに乗って目的地まで行くことができます。また、最近では市バスの到着時間が携帯電話やバス停の電光掲示板で簡単にわかるようになって大変便利です。

#######

Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.de:
In Korea werden verschiedene Transportmittel entwickelt. Bei Umzügen innerhalb von Großstädten nutzt man meist Stadtbusse, U-Bahnen oder Taxis. Die Leute können von der Bushaltestelle aus mit dem Stadtbus dorthin fahren, wo sie hin wollen. Darüber hinaus ist es seit kurzem sehr praktisch, dass Sie die Ankunftszeit des Stadtbusses ganz einfach über Ihr Mobiltelefon oder die elektronische Anzeigetafel an der Bushaltestelle herausfinden können.

#######

Various means of transportation are developed in Korea. When moving within big cities, people usually use city buses, subways, or taxis. People can take a city bus from the bus stop to where they want to go. In addition, recently, it is very convenient that you can easily find out the arrival time of the city bus through your mobile phone or the electronic display board at the bus stop.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
韩国发展了多种交通方式。在大城市内移动时，人们通常使用城市公交车、地铁或出租车。人们可以从公交车站乘坐城市公交车到达他们想去的地方。另外，最近，您可以通过手机或公交车站的电子显示屏轻松了解城市公交车的到达时间，非常方便。

g_text_translate.zh-TW:
韓國發展了多種交通方式。在大城市內移動時，人們通常使用城市公交車、地鐵或出租車。人們可以從公交車站乘坐城市公交車到達他們想去的地方。另外，最近，您可以通過手機或公交車站的電子顯示屏輕鬆了解城市公交車的到達時間，非常方便。

g_text_translate.ru:
В Корее развиты различные виды транспорта. Передвигаясь по большим городам, люди обычно пользуются городскими автобусами, метро или такси. Люди могут сесть на городской автобус от автобусной остановки до места, куда они хотят. Кроме того, в последнее время очень удобно, что время прибытия городского автобуса можно легко узнать через мобильный телефон или электронное табло на остановке.

g_text_translate.th:
วิธีการเดินทางที่หลากหลายได้รับการพัฒนาในเกาหลี เมื่อเดินทางภายในเมืองใหญ่ ผู้คนมักจะใช้บริการรถประจำทางประจำเมือง รถไฟใต้ดิน หรือแท็กซี่ ผู้คนสามารถนั่งรถบัสประจำเมืองจากป้ายรถเมล์ไปยังที่ที่ต้องการไป นอกจากนี้เมื่อเร็ว ๆ นี้สะดวกมากที่คุณสามารถค้นหาเวลามาถึงของรถบัสเข้าเมืองผ่านโทรศัพท์มือถือหรือบอร์ดแสดงผลอิเล็กทรอนิกส์ที่ป้ายรถเมล์ได้อย่างง่ายดาย

g_text_translate.pt:
Vários meios de transporte são desenvolvidos na Coreia. Ao se deslocar nas grandes cidades, as pessoas geralmente usam ônibus urbanos, metrôs ou táxis. As pessoas podem pegar um ônibus urbano no ponto de ônibus até onde desejam ir. Além disso, recentemente, é muito conveniente que você possa saber facilmente o horário de chegada do ônibus urbano através do seu celular ou do display eletrônico do ponto de ônibus.

g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया में परिवहन के विभिन्न साधन विकसित किये गये हैं। बड़े शहरों में यात्रा करते समय, लोग आमतौर पर सिटी बसों, सबवे या टैक्सियों का उपयोग करते हैं। लोग जहां जाना चाहते हैं वहां तक ​​बस स्टॉप से ​​​​सिटी बस ले सकते हैं। इसके अलावा, हाल ही में यह बहुत सुविधाजनक हो गया है कि आप अपने मोबाइल फोन या बस स्टॉप पर इलेक्ट्रॉनिक डिस्प्ले बोर्ड के माध्यम से सिटी बस के आगमन का समय आसानी से पता कर सकते हैं।

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Kore'de çeşitli ulaşım araçları geliştirildi. İnsanlar büyük şehirlerde hareket ederken genellikle şehir içi otobüsleri, metroları veya taksileri kullanırlar. İnsanlar otobüs duraklarından belediye otobüsüne binerek gitmek istedikleri yere gidebiliyorlar. Ayrıca son zamanlarda şehir içi otobüsün varış saatini cep telefonunuzdan ya da duraktaki elektronik gösterge panosundan kolayca öğrenebilmeniz de oldukça kullanışlı.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Phương tiện giao thông ở Hàn Quốc rất bất tiện.
2. Có thể biết thời gian đến của xe bus nội thành thông qua điện thoại di động 
3. Khi di chuyển trong nội thành mọi người chủ yếu sử dụng xe đạp.
4. Ở Hàn Quốc không có xe bus hoặc tàu điện ngầm.
--------------------
도착 시간: Thời gian đến nơi
전광판: Bảng quảng cáo điện tử

general.g_text: 스마트폰 앱(App)에는 유용한 것들이 많습니다. 휴대전화 카메라로 명함을 찍으면 명함의 이름, 주소, 전화번호가 자동으로 입력됩니다. 게다가 ‘구해줘’ 앱이 있습니다. 어두운 밤길, 등산 등의 야외 활동 중 위험한 상황에서 112나 119로 전화하지 ( ㉠ ). 위험할 때 이 앱으로 자신의 위치로 문자나 채팅으로 알릴 겁니다. 그러면 빨리 도움을 받을 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Có rất nhiều điều hữu ích trong các ứng dụng của điện thoại thông minh. Khi bạn chụp ảnh danh thiếp bằng camera của điện thoại, tên, địa chỉ và số điện thoại của danh thiếp sẽ tự động được nhập vào. Bên cạnh đó còn có ứng dụng 'Save me'. Bạn ( ㉠ ) 112 hoặc 119 trong các tình huống nguy hiểm trong các hoạt động ngoài trời như đi bộ ở cung đường tối hoặc đi bộ đường dài. Khi nguy hiểm, ứng dụng này sẽ thông báo vị trí của bạn bằng tin nhắn hoặc trò chuyện chatting. Như vậy thì bạn sẽ nhanh chóng nhận được trợ giúp.
g_text_translate.en: There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.it:
Ci sono molte cose utili nelle app per smartphone. Se scatti una foto di un biglietto da visita con la fotocamera del tuo telefono, il nome, l'indirizzo e il numero di telefono del biglietto da visita vengono inseriti automaticamente. Inoltre, c'è l'app "Salvami". Non è necessario chiamare il 112 o il 119 in situazioni pericolose durante attività all'aperto come camminare su una strada buia o fare escursioni. Quando sei in pericolo, questa app annuncerà la tua posizione tramite SMS o chat. Quindi puoi ottenere aiuto rapidamente.

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il existe de nombreuses choses utiles dans les applications pour smartphone. Si vous prenez une photo d'une carte de visite avec l'appareil photo de votre téléphone, le nom, l'adresse et le numéro de téléphone de la carte de visite sont automatiquement saisis. En outre, il existe l'application « Sauvez-moi ». Vous n’avez pas besoin d’appeler le 112 ou le 119 dans des situations dangereuses lors d’activités de plein air comme marcher sur une route sombre ou faire de la randonnée. Lorsque vous êtes en danger, cette application annoncera votre position par SMS ou par chat. Vous pourrez alors obtenir de l’aide rapidement.

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.es:
Hay muchas cosas útiles en las aplicaciones para teléfonos inteligentes. Si toma una fotografía de una tarjeta de presentación con la cámara de su teléfono, el nombre, la dirección y el número de teléfono de la tarjeta de presentación se ingresan automáticamente. Además, existe la aplicación 'Sálvame'. No es necesario llamar al 112 o al 119 en situaciones peligrosas durante actividades al aire libre como caminar por una carretera oscura o hacer senderismo. Cuando esté en peligro, esta aplicación anunciará su ubicación mediante mensaje de texto o chat. Entonces podrá obtener ayuda rápidamente.

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.id:
Ada banyak hal berguna dalam aplikasi ponsel pintar. Jika Anda mengambil gambar kartu nama dengan kamera ponsel Anda, nama, alamat, dan nomor telepon kartu nama tersebut akan dimasukkan secara otomatis. Selain itu, ada aplikasi 'Selamatkan saya'. Anda tidak perlu menelepon 112 atau 119 dalam situasi berbahaya selama aktivitas luar ruangan seperti berjalan di jalan yang gelap atau hiking. Saat Anda dalam bahaya, aplikasi ini akan mengumumkan lokasi Anda melalui teks atau chat. Maka Anda bisa mendapatkan bantuan dengan cepat.

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.ja:
スマホアプリには便利なものがたくさんあります。携帯電話のカメラで名刺を撮影すると、名刺の名前、住所、電話番号が自動的に入力されます。さらに、「Save me」アプリもあります。暗い道を歩いたり、ハイキングをしたりするアウトドア活動中に危険な状況になったときに、112番や119番に通報する必要はありません。危険にさらされた場合、このアプリはテキストまたはチャットを通じてあなたの位置を通知します。そうすればすぐに助けを得ることができます。

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.de:
Es gibt viele nützliche Dinge in Smartphone-Apps. Wenn Sie mit der Kamera Ihres Telefons ein Foto einer Visitenkarte aufnehmen, werden Name, Adresse und Telefonnummer der Visitenkarte automatisch eingegeben. Außerdem gibt es die App „Save me“. In gefährlichen Situationen bei Outdoor-Aktivitäten wie dem Gehen auf einer dunklen Straße oder beim Wandern müssen Sie nicht die 112 oder 119 anrufen. Wenn Sie in Gefahr sind, gibt diese App Ihren Standort per SMS oder Chat bekannt. Dann können Sie schnell Hilfe bekommen.

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
智能手机应用程序中有很多有用的东西。如果您使用手机的相机拍摄名片，则会自动输入名片的姓名、地址和电话号码。此外，还有“救救我”应用程序。在户外活动（如走黑路或徒步旅行）时，遇到危险情况无需拨打112或119。当您遇到危险时，该应用程序将通过短信或聊天宣布您的位置。然后您就可以快速获得帮助。

#######

There are many useful things in smartphone apps. If you take a picture of a business card with your phone's camera, the business card's name, address, and phone number are automatically entered. Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
智能手機應用程序中有很多有用的東西。如果您使用手機的相機拍攝名片，則會自動輸入名片的姓名、地址和電話號碼。此外，還有“救救我”應用程序。在戶外活動（如走黑路或徒步旅行）時，遇到危險情況無需撥打112或119。當您遇到危險時，該應用程序將通過短信或聊天宣布您的位置。然後您就可以快速獲得幫助。

#######

When you are in danger, this app will announce your location via text or chat. Then you can get help quickly.
g_text_translate.ru:
В приложениях для смартфонов есть много полезных вещей. Если вы сфотографируете визитную карточку камерой телефона, имя визитной карточки, адрес и номер телефона будут введены автоматически. Кроме того, есть приложение «Спаси меня». Вам не нужно звонить по номеру 112 или 119 в опасных ситуациях во время активного отдыха, например, при прогулке по темной дороге или в походе. Когда вы находитесь в опасности, это приложение сообщит о вашем местоположении с помощью текстового сообщения или чата. Тогда вы сможете быстро получить помощь.

g_text_translate.th:
มีประโยชน์มากมายในแอพสมาร์ทโฟน หากคุณถ่ายภาพนามบัตรด้วยกล้องในโทรศัพท์ของคุณ ชื่อ ที่อยู่ และหมายเลขโทรศัพท์ของนามบัตรจะถูกป้อนโดยอัตโนมัติ นอกจากนี้ยังมีแอป 'บันทึกฉัน' คุณไม่จำเป็นต้องโทรหมายเลข 112 หรือ 119 ในสถานการณ์ที่เป็นอันตรายระหว่างกิจกรรมกลางแจ้ง เช่น การเดินบนถนนที่มืดมิดหรือการเดินป่า เมื่อคุณตกอยู่ในอันตราย แอปนี้จะประกาศตำแหน่งของคุณผ่านข้อความหรือแชท จากนั้นคุณสามารถขอความช่วยเหลือได้อย่างรวดเร็ว

#######

Besides, there is 'Save me' app. You do not need to call 112 or 119 in dangerous situations during outdoor activities such as walking on a dark road or hiking. g_text_translate.pt:
Existem muitas coisas úteis em aplicativos para smartphones. Se você tirar uma foto de um cartão de visita com a câmera do seu telefone, o nome, endereço e número de telefone do cartão de visita serão inseridos automaticamente. Além disso, existe o aplicativo 'Salve-me'. Não é necessário ligar para o 112 ou 119 em situações perigosas durante atividades ao ar livre, como caminhar numa estrada escura ou fazer caminhadas. Quando você estiver em perigo, este aplicativo anunciará sua localização por mensagem de texto ou chat. Então você pode obter ajuda rapidamente.

g_text_translate.hi:
स्मार्टफोन ऐप्स में कई काम की चीजें होती हैं। यदि आप अपने फ़ोन के कैमरे से किसी व्यवसाय कार्ड की तस्वीर लेते हैं, तो व्यवसाय कार्ड का नाम, पता और फ़ोन नंबर स्वचालित रूप से दर्ज हो जाता है। इसके अलावा 'सेव मी' ऐप भी है. आपको बाहरी गतिविधियों जैसे अंधेरी सड़क पर चलना या लंबी पैदल यात्रा के दौरान खतरनाक स्थितियों में 112 या 119 पर कॉल करने की आवश्यकता नहीं है। जब आप खतरे में होंगे तो यह ऐप टेक्स्ट या चैट के जरिए आपकी लोकेशन की घोषणा कर देगा। तब आपको शीघ्र सहायता मिल सकेगी.

Akıllı telefon uygulamalarında birçok yararlı şey vardır. Telefonunuzun kamerasıyla bir kartvizitin fotoğrafını çekerseniz, kartvizitin adı, adresi ve telefon numarası otomatik olarak girilir. Ayrıca 'Kurtar beni' uygulaması da var. Karanlık bir yolda yürümek, doğa yürüyüşü gibi açık hava etkinlikleri sırasında tehlikeli durumlarda 112 veya 119'u aramanıza gerek yok. Tehlikede olduğunuzda, bu uygulama konumunuzu metin veya sohbet yoluyla duyuracaktır. O zaman hızlı bir şekilde yardım alabilirsiniz.

explain.vi:
Điền cụm từ thích hợp vào ㉠.

1. Sẽ không gọi điện thoại
2. Không gọi cũng được
3. Định không gọi điện
4. Quyết định không gọi điện
--------------------
위험하다: Nguy hiểm

V/A + (으)ㄹ 때: Khi, lúc.
V + 지 않아도 되다: Không cần làm gì (cũng được).

Dựa vào nghĩa => Chọn đáp án 3 vì ứng dụng 'Save me' sẽ tự thông báo mà người dùng không cần gọi điện.

2. Don't need to call
3. Intend not to call
4. Decided not to call

<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g> When.
<g>V + 지 않아도 되다:</g> Don’t have to.

Based on the meaning => Choose 3 because the 'Save me' app will announce your location, you don't have to call.
