general.g_text: 한국의 대표적인 명절은 설날과 추석입니다. 설날에는 보통 가족, 친척들이 모여서 차례를 지내고 윗사람에게 세배를 합니다. 그러면 윗사람은 아랫사람에게 덕담을 하면서 세뱃돈을 줍니다. 설날에는 보통 떡국을 먹습니다. 추석에는 성묘를 가거나 집에서 차례를 지냅니다. 이 날에는 한국인들은 송편을 먹고 ( ㉠ ) 소원을 빕니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ngày lễ tết tiêu biểu của Hàn Quốc là Tết Nguyên Đán và Tết trung thu. Vào Tết Nguyên Đán gia đình, người thân thường tụ tập quây quần rồi cúng bái tổ tiên và lạy chào những người bề trên. Sau đó người bề trên sẽ chúc phúc và lì xì cho những người bề dưới. Thông thường mọi người ăn canh bánh Tteok vào Tết Nguyên Đán. Vào Tết Trung thu thì mọi người đi tảo mộ hoặc cúng bái tổ tiên tại nhà. Vào ngày này, người Hàn Quốc ăn bánh Songpyeon và ( ㉠ ) cầu nguyện.
g_text_translate.en: The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.it:
Le festività rappresentative in Corea sono Capodanno e Chuseok. Il giorno di Capodanno, i membri della famiglia e i parenti di solito si riuniscono per celebrare riti ancestrali e inchinarsi davanti ai loro anziani. Quindi, gli anziani danno soldi ai loro più giovani dicendo cose buone. A Capodanno la gente solitamente mangia il tteokguk. A Chuseok, le persone vanno alle tombe o celebrano riti ancestrali a casa. In questo giorno, i coreani mangiano songpyeon ed esprimono desideri mentre guardano la luna piena.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.fr:
Les jours fériés représentatifs en Corée sont le Nouvel An et Chuseok. Le jour du Nouvel An, les membres de la famille et les proches se réunissent généralement pour célébrer des rites ancestraux et s'incliner devant leurs aînés. Ensuite, les aînés donnent de l’argent à leurs plus jeunes tout en disant de bonnes choses. Le jour du Nouvel An, les gens mangent généralement du tteokguk. À Chuseok, les gens se rendent sur les tombes ou célèbrent des rites ancestraux chez eux. Ce jour-là, les Coréens mangent du songpyeon et font des vœux tout en regardant la pleine lune.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.es:
Los días festivos representativos en Corea son el día de Año Nuevo y Chuseok. El día de Año Nuevo, los familiares y parientes suelen reunirse para celebrar ritos ancestrales e inclinarse ante sus mayores. Luego, los mayores dan dinero a los más jóvenes mientras dicen cosas buenas. El día de Año Nuevo, la gente suele comer tteokguk. En Chuseok, la gente va a las tumbas o celebra ritos ancestrales en casa. En este día, los coreanos comen songpyeon y piden deseos mientras contemplan la luna llena.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.id:
Hari libur representatif di Korea adalah Hari Tahun Baru dan Chuseok. Pada Hari Tahun Baru, anggota keluarga dan kerabat biasanya berkumpul untuk mengadakan upacara leluhur dan membungkuk kepada orang yang lebih tua. Kemudian, orang yang lebih tua memberikan uang kepada yang lebih muda sambil mengucapkan hal-hal yang baik. Pada Hari Tahun Baru, orang biasanya makan tteokguk. Pada hari Chuseok, orang-orang pergi ke kuburan atau mengadakan upacara leluhur di rumah. Pada hari ini, orang Korea makan songpyeon dan mengucapkan permohonan sambil menyaksikan bulan purnama.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国の代表的な祝日は元旦と秋夕（チュソク）です。元旦には通常、家族や親戚が集まり、祖先の儀式を行い、年長者に頭を下げます。そして、先輩は良いことを言いながら後輩にお金を渡します。元旦にはトッククを食べるのが一般的です。秋夕には、人々はお墓に行ったり、家で先祖の儀式を行ったりします。この日、韓国人はソンピョンを食べ、満月を眺めながら願い事をします。

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.de:
Die repräsentativen Feiertage in Korea sind Neujahr und Chuseok. Am Neujahrstag versammeln sich normalerweise Familienmitglieder und Verwandte, um Ahnenriten abzuhalten und sich vor den Älteren zu verneigen. Dann geben die Älteren ihren Jüngeren Geld und sagen dabei Gutes. Am Neujahrstag isst man normalerweise Tteokguk. Auf Chuseok gehen die Menschen zu Gräbern oder halten zu Hause Ahnenriten ab. An diesem Tag essen Koreaner Songpyeon und äußern Wünsche, während sie den Vollmond beobachten.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
韩国的代表性节日是元旦和中秋节。元旦这一天，家人和亲戚通常都会聚集在一起，举行祭祖仪式，向长辈鞠躬。然后，长辈一边说好话，一边给晚辈钱。在元旦，人们通常会吃年糕汤。中秋节，人们会去坟墓或在家举行祭祀活动。在这一天，韩国人一边吃松饼，一边赏月许愿。

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
韓國的代表性節日是元旦和中秋節。元旦這一天，家人和親戚通常都會聚集在一起，舉行祭祖儀式，向長輩鞠躬。然後，長輩一邊說好話，一邊給晚輩錢。在元旦，人們通常會吃年糕湯。中秋節，人們會去墳墓或在家舉行祭祀活動。在這一天，韓國人一邊吃鬆餅，一邊賞月許願。

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.ru:
Типичными праздниками в Корее являются Новый год и Чусок. В Новый год члены семьи и родственники обычно собираются, чтобы провести родовые обряды и поклониться старшим. Затем старшие дают деньги младшим, говоря при этом хорошие слова. В Новый год люди обычно едят ттоккук. В Чусок люди ходят на могилы или проводят дома родовые обряды. В этот день корейцы едят сонпён и загадывают желания, наблюдая за полнолунием.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.th:
วันหยุดตัวแทนในเกาหลีคือวันปีใหม่และวันชูซอก ในวันปีใหม่ สมาชิกในครอบครัวและญาติพี่น้องมักจะรวมตัวกันเพื่อประกอบพิธีไหว้บรรพบุรุษและคำนับผู้อาวุโส จากนั้นผู้เฒ่าก็ให้เงินกับน้องพร้อมกับพูดสิ่งดีๆ ในวันปีใหม่ ผู้คนมักจะกินต็อกกุก ในเทศกาลชูซ็อก ผู้คนจะไปที่หลุมศพหรือประกอบพิธีกรรมบรรพบุรุษที่บ้าน ในวันนี้ คนเกาหลีจะกินซองพยอนและขอพรขณะชมพระจันทร์เต็มดวง

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.pt:
Os feriados representativos na Coreia são o Dia de Ano Novo e o Chuseok. No dia de Ano Novo, os familiares e parentes costumam se reunir para realizar ritos ancestrais e fazer reverências aos mais velhos. Então, os mais velhos dão dinheiro aos mais jovens enquanto dizem coisas boas. No dia de Ano Novo, as pessoas costumam comer tteokguk. Em Chuseok, as pessoas vão aos túmulos ou realizam ritos ancestrais em casa. Neste dia, os coreanos comem songpyeon e fazem desejos enquanto observam a lua cheia.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया में प्रतिनिधि छुट्टियाँ नए साल का दिन और चुसेओक हैं। नए साल के दिन, परिवार के सदस्य और रिश्तेदार आमतौर पर पैतृक संस्कार करने और अपने बुजुर्गों को प्रणाम करने के लिए इकट्ठा होते हैं। फिर बड़े अपने छोटों को अच्छी-अच्छी बातें कहते हुए पैसे देते हैं। नए साल के दिन, लोग आमतौर पर टेटोकगुक खाते हैं। चुसेओक पर, लोग कब्रों पर जाते हैं या घर पर पैतृक संस्कार करते हैं। इस दिन, कोरियाई लोग सोंगपियोन खाते हैं और पूर्णिमा को देखते हुए मनोकामनाएं मांगते हैं।

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. Then, elders give money to their youngers while saying good things. On New Year's Day, people usually eat tteokguk. On Chuseok, people go to graves or hold ancestral rites at home. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.
g_text_translate.tr:
Kore'deki temsili tatiller Yeni Yıl Günü ve Chuseok'tur. Yılbaşı gününde aile üyeleri ve akrabalar genellikle atalardan kalma ayinler düzenlemek ve büyüklerinin önünde eğilmek için bir araya gelirler. Sonra büyükler küçüklerine güzel sözler söyleyerek para verirler. Yılbaşı gününde insanlar genellikle tteokguk yerler. Chuseok'ta insanlar mezarlara gider veya evlerinde atalara ait ayinler düzenlerler. Bu günde Koreliler dolunayı izlerken şarkı söyler ve dilek tutarlar.

#######

The representative holidays in Korea are New Year's Day and Chuseok. On New Year's Day, family members and relatives usually gather to hold ancestral rites and bow to their elders. On this day, Koreans eat songpyeon and make wishes while watching the full moon.

3. Tết Nguyên Đán và Tết Trung thu không phải là ngày lễ tết tiêu biểu của Hàn Quốc.

general.g_text: 한국에서는 드라마를 ( ㉠ ) 사람도 많고 드라마의 종류도 많습니다. 매일 방영하는 일일 연속극, 주말에만 방영하는 주말 드라마 등이 있습니다. 공중파 방송뿐만 아니라 케이블 방송에서도 드라마를 방영하고 있습니다. 드라마의 내용은 주로 사랑과 가족 소재로 합니다. 한국의 드라마 중 일부는 일본, 중국, 동남아시아 등에서 인기를 끌고 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Ở Hàn Quốc có nhiều người ( ㉠ ) phim truyền hình và cũng có nhiều thể loại phim truyền hình. Có phim truyền hình nhiều tập phát sóng mỗi ngày, cũng có những bộ phim chỉ phát sóng vào cuối tuần,... Phim truyền hình không chỉ được phát sóng trên truyền hình công cộng mà còn được phát sóng trên truyền hình cáp. Nội dung của phim truyền hình chủ yếu là về tình yêu và gia đình. Một số bộ phim truyền hình của Hàn Quốc đang nhận được sự yêu thích ở Nhật Bản, Trung Quốc, Đông Nam Á.
g_text_translate.en: In Korea, there are many people who like dramas and there are many types of dramas. There are daily soap operas that air every day, and weekend dramas that air only on weekends. Dramas are aired not only on public television but also on cable television. The contents of the dramas are mainly about love and family. Some of the Korean dramas are popular in Japan, China, Southeast Asia, etc.
g_text_translate.it:
In Corea ci sono molte persone a cui piacciono i drammi e ci sono molti tipi di drammi. Ci sono soap opera quotidiane che vanno in onda tutti i giorni e drammi del fine settimana che vanno in onda solo nei fine settimana. I drammi vengono trasmessi non solo dalla televisione pubblica ma anche dalla televisione via cavo. I contenuti dei drammi riguardano principalmente l'amore e la famiglia. Alcuni dei drammi coreani sono popolari in Giappone, Cina, Sud-Est asiatico, ecc.

#######

In Korea, there are many people who like dramas and there are many types of dramas. There are daily soap operas that air every day, and weekend dramas that air only on weekends. Dramas are aired not only on public television but also on cable television. The contents of the dramas are mainly about love and family. Some of the Korean dramas are popular in Japan, China, Southeast Asia, etc.
g_text_translate.fr:
En Corée, beaucoup de gens aiment les drames et il existe de nombreux types de drames. Il existe des feuilletons quotidiens diffusés tous les jours et des drames du week-end diffusés uniquement le week-end. Les dramatiques sont diffusées non seulement à la télévision publique mais également à la télévision par câble. Le contenu des drames porte principalement sur l'amour et la famille. Certains drames coréens sont populaires au Japon, en Chine, en Asie du Sud-Est, etc.

#######

In Korea, there are many people who like dramas and there are many types of dramas. There are daily soap operas that air every day, and weekend dramas that air only on weekends. Dramas are aired not only on public television but also on cable television. The contents of the dramas are mainly about love and family. Some of the Korean dramas are popular in Japan, China, Southeast Asia, etc.
g_text_translate.es:
En Corea hay mucha gente a la que le gustan los dramas y hay muchos tipos de dramas. Hay telenovelas diarias que se transmiten todos los días y dramas de fin de semana que se transmiten solo los fines de semana. Los dramas se transmiten no sólo en la televisión pública sino también en la televisión por cable. Los contenidos de los dramas tratan principalmente sobre el amor y la familia. Algunos de los dramas coreanos son populares en Japón, China, el sudeste asiático, etc.

#######

Dramas are aired not only on public television but also on cable television. The contents of the dramas are mainly about love and family. Some of the Korean dramas are popular in Japan, China, Southeast Asia, etc.

Drama tidak hanya ditayangkan di televisi publik, tetapi juga di televisi kabel. Isi dramanya terutama tentang cinta dan keluarga. Beberapa drama Korea populer di Jepang, China, Asia Tenggara, dll.

g_text_translate.tr:
Kore'de dizilerden hoşlanan birçok insan var ve birçok dizi türü var. Her gün yayınlanan günlük pembe diziler ve yalnızca hafta sonları yayınlanan hafta sonu dramaları var. Dramalar sadece kamu televizyonlarında değil, kablolu televizyonda da yayınlanıyor. Dizilerin içeriği ağırlıklı olarak aşk ve aile üzerinedir. Bazı Kore dizileri Japonya, Çin, Güneydoğu Asya vb. ülkelerde popülerdir.

#######

In Korea, there are many people who like dramas and there are many types of dramas. There are daily soap operas that air every day, and weekend dramas that air only on weekends. Dramas are aired not only on public television but also on cable television. The contents of the dramas are mainly about love and family. Some of the Korean dramas are popular in Japan, China, Southeast Asia, etc.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 드라마는 공중파 방송과 케이블 방송에서 방영합니다.
내용은 주로 친구와 가족 소재로 하고 있습니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Không có nhiều thể loại phim truyền hình.
2. Phim truyền hình được phát sóng trên truyền hình công cộng và truyền hình cáp.
3. Nội dung chủ yếu là về bạn bè và gia đình.
4. Phim truyền hình Hàn Quốc không được yêu thích ở Đông Nam Á.
--------------------
인기를 끌다: Được ưa chuộng, được yêu thích
공중파 방송: Truyền hình công cộng
케이블 방송: Truyền hình cáp
explain.en:

2. Dramas are aired on public television and cable television.
3. The contents are mainly about friends and family.
4. Korean dramas are not popular in Southeast Asia.

<g>인기를 끌다:</g> To gain popularity
<g>공중파 방송:</g> Public television
<g>케이블 방송:</g> Cable television
explain.it:
Scegli quello che corrisponde al contenuto di questo testo.

1. Non esistono molti tipi di drammi.
2. Le fiction vengono trasmesse dalla televisione pubblica e dalla televisione via cavo.
3. I contenuti riguardano principalmente amici e familiari.
4. I drammi coreani non sono popolari nel sud-est asiatico.
--------------------
<g>인기를 끌다:</g>Per guadagnare popolarità
<g>공중파 방송:</g>Televisione pubblica
<g>케이블 방송:</g>Tv via cavo

वह चुनें जो इस पाठ की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।

1. नाटक कई प्रकार के नहीं होते.
2. नाटक सार्वजनिक टेलीविजन और केबल टेलीविजन पर प्रसारित किये जाते हैं।
3. सामग्री मुख्य रूप से मित्रों और परिवार के बारे में है।
4. कोरियाई नाटक दक्षिण पूर्व एशिया में लोकप्रिय नहीं हैं।
------------------------
<g>인기를 끌다:</g>लोकप्रियता हासिल करने के लिए

3. The contents are mainly about friends and family.
4. Korean dramas are not popular in Southeast Asia.
--------------------
<g>인기를 끌다:</g> To gain popularity
<g>공중파 방송:</g> Public television
<g>케이블 방송:</g> Cable television

general.g_text: 한국 사회에서 인기가 높은 직업은 ‘공무원’입니다. 다른 직업에 비해서 안정적이지만 경쟁률이 매우 높습니다. 또한, 대기업에서 일하기를 원하는 사람도 많습니다. 대기업은 대체로 봉급이 높고 직원에 대한 혜택이 ( ㉠ ) 사람들이 좋아합니다. 그 외에 개인적으로 회사나 가게를 만들어 사업을 하는 사람들도 적지 않습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Một nghề nghiệp được yêu thích trong xã hội Hàn Quốc là 'công chức'. So với những nghề nghiệp khác thì ổn định hơn nhưng tỉ lệ cạnh tranh lại rất cao. Ngoài ra cũng có nhiều người muốn làm việc ở những doanh nghiệp lớn. Nhìn chung các doanh nghiệp lớn thường có mức lương cao và có ( ㉠ ) chế độ dành cho nhân viên (nên) mọi người cũng rất thích. Ngoài ra cũng có nhiều người tự thành lập công ty hay cửa hàng riêng và kinh doanh.
g_text_translate.en: A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. Large corporations are generally liked by people because of their high salaries and many benefits for their employees. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.it:
Un lavoro popolare nella società coreana è quello di "funzionario pubblico". È stabile rispetto ad altri lavori, ma il tasso di concorrenza è molto alto. Inoltre, molte persone vogliono lavorare per grandi aziende. Le grandi aziende sono generalmente apprezzate dalle persone per i loro stipendi elevati e i numerosi vantaggi per i loro dipendenti. Inoltre non sono poche le persone che fanno affari creando aziende o negozi in proprio.

#######

A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. Large corporations are generally liked by people because of their high salaries and many benefits for their employees. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.fr:
Un métier populaire dans la société coréenne est celui de « fonctionnaire ». C'est stable par rapport aux autres métiers, mais le taux de concurrence est très élevé. De plus, de nombreuses personnes souhaitent travailler pour de grandes entreprises. Les grandes entreprises sont généralement appréciées des gens en raison de leurs salaires élevés et des nombreux avantages offerts à leurs employés. De plus, rares sont ceux qui font des affaires en créant eux-mêmes des entreprises ou des magasins.

#######

A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. Large corporations are generally liked by people because of their high salaries and many benefits for their employees. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.es:
Un trabajo popular en la sociedad coreana es el de "servidor público". Es estable en comparación con otros trabajos, pero la tasa de competencia es muy alta. Además, mucha gente quiere trabajar para grandes corporaciones. Las grandes corporaciones generalmente gustan a la gente debido a sus altos salarios y muchos beneficios para sus empleados. Además, no son pocas las personas que hacen negocio creando empresas o comercios por su cuenta.

#######

A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. Large corporations are generally liked by people because of their high salaries and many benefits for their employees. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.id:
Pekerjaan yang populer di masyarakat Korea adalah 'pegawai negeri'. Ini stabil dibandingkan pekerjaan lain, tetapi tingkat persaingannya sangat tinggi. Selain itu, banyak orang ingin bekerja di perusahaan besar. Perusahaan besar umumnya disukai masyarakat karena gajinya yang tinggi dan banyak tunjangan bagi karyawannya. Selain itu, tidak sedikit pula orang yang berbisnis dengan mendirikan perusahaan atau toko sendiri.

#######

A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. Large corporations are generally liked by people because of their high salaries and many benefits for their employees. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国社会で人気の職業は「公務員」だ。他の仕事に比べれば安定していますが、競争率は非常に高いです。また、大企業への就職を希望する人も多いです。大企業は、従業員の給与が高く、福利厚生が充実しているため、一般的に人々に好かれています。また、自分で会社やお店を作ってビジネスを行う人も少なくありません。

#######

A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. Large corporations are generally liked by people because of their high salaries and many benefits for their employees. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.de:
Ein beliebter Beruf in der koreanischen Gesellschaft ist „Beamter“. Im Vergleich zu anderen Jobs ist es stabil, aber die Konkurrenzquote ist sehr hoch. Außerdem möchten viele Menschen für große Unternehmen arbeiten. Große Unternehmen sind im Allgemeinen wegen ihrer hohen Gehälter und vielen Zusatzleistungen für ihre Mitarbeiter bei den Menschen beliebt. Darüber hinaus gibt es nicht wenige Menschen, die Geschäfte machen, indem sie selbst Unternehmen oder Geschäfte gründen.

#######

A popular job in Korean society is 'public servant'. It's stable compared to other jobs, but the competition rate is very high. Also, many people want to work for large corporations. In addition, there are not a few people who do business by creating companies or shops on their own.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
韩国社会流行的职业是“公务员”。与其他工作相比，它比较稳定，但竞争率非常高。此外，许多人想为大公司工作。大公司普遍受到人们的喜欢，因为他们的工资高，员工福利多。此外，自行创办公司或店铺经商的也不在少数。

g_text_translate.ru:
Популярная профессия в корейском обществе — «государственный служащий». Она стабильна по сравнению с другими вакансиями, но уровень конкуренции очень высок. Кроме того, многие люди хотят работать в крупных корпорациях. Крупные корпорации обычно нравятся людям из-за их высоких зарплат и множества льгот для своих сотрудников. Кроме того, немало людей занимаются бизнесом, создавая компании или магазины самостоятельно.

อาชีพยอดนิยมในสังคมเกาหลีคือ 'ข้าราชการ' มีความมั่นคงเมื่อเทียบกับงานอื่นๆ แต่มีอัตราการแข่งขันที่สูงมาก นอกจากนี้ หลายๆ คนยังอยากทำงานให้กับบริษัทขนาดใหญ่อีกด้วย โดยทั่วไปแล้วบริษัทขนาดใหญ่มักเป็นที่ชื่นชอบของผู้คนเนื่องจากมีเงินเดือนสูงและสวัสดิการมากมายสำหรับพนักงาน อีกทั้งมีไม่กี่คนที่ทำธุรกิจด้วยการสร้างบริษัทหรือร้านค้าด้วยตัวเอง

g_text_translate.hi:
कोरियाई समाज में एक लोकप्रिय नौकरी 'लोक सेवक' है। यह अन्य नौकरियों की तुलना में स्थिर है, लेकिन प्रतिस्पर्धा दर बहुत अधिक है। साथ ही, बहुत से लोग बड़े निगमों के लिए काम करना चाहते हैं। बड़े निगम आमतौर पर अपने उच्च वेतन और अपने कर्मचारियों के लिए कई लाभों के कारण लोगों द्वारा पसंद किए जाते हैं। इसके अलावा ऐसे लोग भी कम नहीं हैं जो अपने दम पर कंपनियां या दुकानें बनाकर बिजनेस करते हैं।

Kore toplumunda popüler bir iş 'kamu görevlisi'dir. Diğer işlere göre istikrarlıdır ancak rekabet oranı çok yüksektir. Ayrıca birçok kişi büyük şirketlerde çalışmak istiyor. Büyük şirketler genellikle yüksek maaşları ve çalışanlarına sağladığı birçok fayda nedeniyle insanlar tarafından beğenilmektedir. Ayrıca kendi başına şirket veya mağaza kurarak iş yapanların sayısı da az değildir.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Nghề công chức không được yêu thích ở xã hội Hàn Quốc.
2. Tiền lương ở các doanh nghiệp lớn cao nhưng không có đãi ngộ cho nhân viên.
3. Có nhiều người mở công ty và kinh doanh cá nhân.
4. Có ít người mong muốn làm việc ở các doanh nghiệp lớn.
--------------------
개인적으로: Theo cách riêng, cá nhân
대기업: Công ty, doanh nghiệp lớn

explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. Civil servants are not popular in Korean society.
2. Salaries are high in large corporations, but there are no benefits for employees.
3. There are many people who personally make a company and do business.

general.g_text: 한국에서는 편의점에서도 해열제, 소화제, 감기약을 살 수 있습니다. 하지만 대부분의 약은 약국에서 삽니다. 특히, 휴일에 약이 필요하면 휴일지킴이 약국을 ( ㉠ ). 휴일지킴이 약국은 휴일에도 문을 엽니다. 그리고 휴일지킴이 약국 홈페이지에서 필요한 약의 정보를 확인할 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Bạn có thể mua thuốc hạ sốt, thuốc tiêu hóa, thuốc cảm ở cửa hàng tiện lợi. Nhưng hầu hết các loại thuốc được mua ở hiệu thuốc. Đặc biệt nếu cần mua thuốc trong những ngày nghỉ lễ ( ㉠ ) Holiday Keeper Pharmacy. Holiday Keeper Pharmacy mở cửa cả trong những ngày nghỉ lễ. Và bạn có thể tìm kiếm thông tin về các loại thuốc ở trên fanpage của những hiệu thuốc này.
g_text_translate.en: In Korea, you can buy fever reducer, digestive medicine, and cold medicine at convenience stores. But most medicines are bought at pharmacies. In particular, if you need medicine on a holiday, you can find Holiday Keeper Pharmacies. Holiday Keeper Pharmacies are open even on holidays. And you can also check the information on the medications you need on Holiday Keeper Pharmacies' websites.
g_text_translate.it:
In Corea, puoi acquistare antipiretici, medicinali per la digestione e medicinali per il raffreddore nei minimarket. Ma la maggior parte dei medicinali viene acquistata in farmacia. In particolare, se hai bisogno di medicine in vacanza, puoi trovare le Farmacie Holiday Keeper. Le Farmacie Holiday Keeper sono aperte anche nei giorni festivi. E puoi anche controllare le informazioni sui farmaci di cui hai bisogno sui siti web delle farmacie Holiday Keeper.

#######

In Korea, you can buy fever reducer, digestive medicine, and cold medicine at convenience stores. But most medicines are bought at pharmacies. In particular, if you need medicine on a holiday, you can find Holiday Keeper Pharmacies. Holiday Keeper Pharmacies are open even on holidays. And you can also check the information on the medications you need on Holiday Keeper Pharmacies' websites.
g_text_translate.fr:
En Corée, vous pouvez acheter des analgésiques, des médicaments digestifs et des médicaments contre le rhume dans les supérettes. Mais la plupart des médicaments sont achetés en pharmacie. En particulier, si vous avez besoin de médicaments pendant un jour férié, vous pouvez trouver des pharmacies Holiday Keeper. Les pharmacies Holiday Keeper sont ouvertes même les jours fériés. Et vous pouvez également consulter les informations sur les médicaments dont vous avez besoin sur les sites Web des pharmacies Holiday Keeper.

#######

ในเกาหลีคุณสามารถซื้อยาลดไข้ ยาย่อยอาหาร และยาแก้หวัดได้ที่ร้านสะดวกซื้อ แต่ยาส่วนใหญ่จะซื้อที่ร้านขายยา โดยเฉพาะอย่างยิ่ง หากคุณต้องการยาในช่วงวันหยุด คุณสามารถค้นหาร้านขายยา Holiday Keeper ได้ ร้านขายยา Holiday Keeper เปิดให้บริการแม้ในวันหยุด และคุณยังสามารถตรวจสอบข้อมูลเกี่ยวกับยาที่คุณต้องการได้จากเว็บไซต์ของ Holiday Keeper Pharmacies

#######

In Korea, you can buy fever reducer, digestive medicine, and cold medicine at convenience stores. But most medicines are bought at pharmacies. In particular, if you need medicine on a holiday, you can find Holiday Keeper Pharmacies. Holiday Keeper Pharmacies are open even on holidays. And you can also check the information on the medications you need on Holiday Keeper Pharmacies' websites.
g_text_translate.pt:
Na Coreia, você pode comprar redutores de febre, remédios digestivos e remédios para resfriado em lojas de conveniência. Mas a maioria dos medicamentos é comprada em farmácias. Em particular, se precisar de medicamentos nas férias, pode encontrar as Farmácias Holiday Keeper. As Farmácias Holiday Keeper estão abertas mesmo nos feriados. E você também pode verificar as informações sobre os medicamentos de que precisa nos sites das Farmácias Holiday Keeper.

#######

In Korea, you can buy fever reducer, digestive medicine, and cold medicine at convenience stores. But most medicines are bought at pharmacies. In particular, if you need medicine on a holiday, you can find Holiday Keeper Pharmacies. Holiday Keeper Pharmacies are open even on holidays. And you can also check the information on the medications you need on Holiday Keeper Pharmacies' websites.
g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया में, आप सुविधा स्टोर पर बुखार कम करने वाली दवा, पाचन दवा और सर्दी की दवा खरीद सकते हैं। लेकिन अधिकांश दवाएँ फार्मेसियों में खरीदी जाती हैं। विशेष रूप से, यदि आपको छुट्टी के दिन दवा की आवश्यकता है, तो आप हॉलिडे कीपर फ़ार्मेसियाँ पा सकते हैं। हॉलिडे कीपर फ़ार्मेसी छुट्टियों के दिन भी खुली रहती हैं। और आप हॉलिडे कीपर फार्मेसियों की वेबसाइटों पर अपनी आवश्यक दवाओं की जानकारी भी देख सकते हैं।

#######

In Korea, you can buy fever reducer, digestive medicine, and cold medicine at convenience stores. But most medicines are bought at pharmacies. In particular, if you need medicine on a holiday, you can find Holiday Keeper Pharmacies. Holiday Keeper Pharmacies are open even on holidays. And you can also check the information on the medications you need on Holiday Keeper Pharmacies' websites.
g_text_translate.tr:
Kore'de ateş düşürücü, sindirim ilacı ve soğuk algınlığı ilaçlarını marketlerden satın alabilirsiniz. Ancak çoğu ilaç eczanelerden satın alınır. Özellikle tatilde ilaca ihtiyacınız varsa Holiday Keeper Eczanelerini bulabilirsiniz. Bayram Bekçisi Eczaneleri tatil günlerinde dahi açıktır. Ayrıca ihtiyacınız olan ilaçlarla ilgili bilgileri Holiday Keeper Eczaneleri'nin web sitelerinden de kontrol edebilirsiniz.

#######

And you can also check the information on the medications you need on Holiday Keeper Pharmacies' websites.

3. Redutores de febre, remédios digestivos e remédios para resfriado são caros.
4. Você pode ver as informações sobre medicamentos nos sites das Farmácias Holiday Keeper.
--------------------
<g>확인하다:</g>Para confirmar, para verificar

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다/없다:</g>Pode/não pode.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. In Korea, you cannot usually buy medicine at convenience stores.
2. Holiday Keeper Pharmacies are closed on holidays.
3. Fever reducer, digestive medicine, and cold medicine are expensive.
4. You can see the medicine information on websites of Holiday Keeper Pharmacies.
--------------------
<g>확인하다:</g> To confirm, to verify

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다/없다:</g> Can/can't.
explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो इस पाठ की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।

1. कोरिया में, आप आमतौर पर सुविधा स्टोर से दवा नहीं खरीद सकते।
2. हॉलिडे कीपर फ़ार्मेसियाँ छुट्टियों के दिन बंद रहती हैं।
3. बुखार कम करने की दवा, पाचन की दवा और सर्दी की दवा महंगी हैं।
4. आप हॉलिडे कीपर फार्मेसियों की वेबसाइटों पर दवा की जानकारी देख सकते हैं।
------------------------
<g>확인하다:</g>पुष्टि करना, पुष्टि करना

<g>V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다/없다:</g>कर सकते हैं/नहीं कर सकते.

--------------------

1. Kore'de genellikle marketlerden ilaç satın alamazsınız.
2. Bayram Bekçisi Eczaneler tatil günlerinde kapalıdır.
3. Ateş düşürücü, sindirim ilacı ve soğuk algınlığı ilacı pahalıdır.
4. Holiday Keeper Eczanelerinin web sitelerinde ilaç bilgilerini görebilirsiniz.

general.g_text: 한국은 도로명 주소를 사용합니다. 도로명 주소는 도로 이름과 건물 번호를 표기합니다. 한국의 ( ㉠ ) ‘도시 이름, 도로명과 건물 번호’처럼 큰 장소에서 작은 장소의 순서로 씁니다. 예를 들어 서울출입국 - 외국인청의 주소는 ‘서울특별시 양천구 목동동로 151 서울 출입국 외국인청’입니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hàn Quốc sử dụng địa chỉ tên đường. Địa chỉ tên đường được biểu thị bằng tên đường và số tòa nhà. ( ㉠ ) của Hàn Quốc sẽ viết theo thứ tự từ địa chỉ lớn đến địa chỉ nhỏ như 'Tên thành phố, tên đường, số tòa nhà'. Ví dụ như địa chỉ của Văn phòng xuất nhập cảnh Seoul - Ủy ban người nước ngoài là 'Thành phố Seoul, quận Yangcheon, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Văn phòng xuất nhập cảnh Seoul - Ủy ban người nước ngoài'.
g_text_translate.en: Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.it:
La Corea utilizza gli indirizzi dei nomi delle strade. L'indirizzo del nome della strada indica il nome della strada e il numero dell'edificio. Quando si scrive l'indirizzo in Corea, le persone scrivono in ordine dal grande al piccolo, ad esempio "nome della città, nome della strada e numero dell'edificio". Ad esempio, l'indirizzo del Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office è "Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office".

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.fr:
La Corée utilise des adresses postales. L'adresse du nom de la rue indique le nom de la rue et le numéro du bâtiment. Lorsqu’ils écrivent l’adresse en Corée, les gens écrivent dans l’ordre du plus grand au plus petit, par exemple « nom de la ville, nom de la rue et numéro du bâtiment ». Par exemple, l'adresse du ministère de l'Immigration et des Affaires étrangères de Séoul est « Séoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151, ministère de l'Immigration de Séoul ».

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.es:
Corea utiliza direcciones con nombres de calles. La dirección del nombre de la calle indica el nombre de la calle y el número del edificio. Al escribir la dirección en Corea, la gente escribe en orden de mayor a menor, como "nombre de la ciudad, nombre de la calle y número de edificio". Por ejemplo, la dirección del Ministerio de Inmigración y Relaciones Exteriores de Seúl es 'Seúl, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Oficina de Inmigración y Relaciones Exteriores de Seúl'.

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.id:
Korea menggunakan alamat nama jalan. Alamat nama jalan menunjukkan nama jalan dan nomor bangunan. Saat menulis alamat di Korea, orang menulis secara berurutan dari besar ke kecil, seperti ‘nama kota, nama jalan, dan nomor bangunan’. Misalnya, alamat Kantor Imigrasi - Luar Negeri Seoul adalah 'Kantor Luar Negeri Imigrasi Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul'.

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.ja:
韓国では通り名住所を使用します。街路名アドレスは、街路名と建物番号を示します。韓国で住所を書くとき、「都市名、通り名、建物番号」など、大きいものから小さいものへ順番に書きます。例えば、ソウル出入国在留管理局の住所は「ソウル市陽川区木洞洞路151 ソウル出入国在留管理局」です。

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.de:
In Korea werden Straßenadressen verwendet. Die Straßennamenadresse gibt den Straßennamen und die Gebäudenummer an. Beim Schreiben der Adresse wird in Korea in der Reihenfolge von groß nach klein geschrieben, beispielsweise „Stadtname, Straßenname und Gebäudenummer“. Die Adresse des Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office lautet beispielsweise „Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office“.

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
韩国使用街道名称地址。街道名称地址表示街道名称和建筑物编号。在韩国写地址时，人们按照从大到小的顺序书写，例如“城市名、街道名、门牌号”。例如，首尔出入境管理局的地址是“首尔，阳川区，木洞洞路 151 首尔出入境管理局”。

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
韓國使用街道名稱地址。街道名稱地址表示街道名稱和建築物編號。在韓國寫地址時，人們按照從大到小的順序書寫，例如“城市名、街道名、門牌號”。例如，首爾出入境管理局的地址是“首爾，陽川區，木洞洞路 151 首爾出入境管理局”。

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.ru:
Корея использует адреса с названиями улиц. В адресе названия улицы указывается название улицы и номер дома. При написании адреса в Корее люди пишут в порядке от большего к меньшему, например, «название города, название улицы и номер дома». Например, адрес Сеульского иммиграционного офиса иностранных дел: «Сеул, Янчхонгу, Мокдондонг-ро, 151 Сеульский иммиграционный офис иностранных дел».

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.th:
เกาหลีใช้ที่อยู่ชื่อถนน ที่อยู่ชื่อถนนระบุชื่อถนนและหมายเลขอาคาร เมื่อเขียนที่อยู่ในเกาหลี ผู้คนจะเขียนเรียงจากใหญ่ไปเล็ก เช่น "ชื่อเมือง ชื่อถนน และเลขที่อาคาร" ตัวอย่างเช่น ที่อยู่ของสำนักงานตรวจคนเข้าเมืองโซล - สำนักงานต่างประเทศคือ 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'

#######

When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.pt:
A Coreia usa endereços com nomes de ruas. O endereço do nome da rua indica o nome da rua e o número do edifício. Ao escrever o endereço na Coreia, as pessoas escrevem em ordem de grande para pequeno, como “nome da cidade, nome da rua e número do prédio”. Por exemplo, o endereço do Ministério das Relações Exteriores da Imigração de Seul é 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Ministério das Relações Exteriores da Imigração de Seul'.

#######

Korea uses street name addresses. The street name address indicates the street name and building number. When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.hi:
कोरिया सड़क नाम पते का उपयोग करता है। सड़क का नाम पता सड़क का नाम और भवन संख्या दर्शाता है। कोरिया में पता लिखते समय लोग बड़े से छोटे क्रम में लिखते हैं, जैसे 'शहर का नाम, सड़क का नाम और भवन संख्या'। उदाहरण के लिए, सियोल आप्रवासन-विदेश कार्यालय का पता 'सियोल, यांगचेओन-गु, मोकडोंगडोंग-आरओ 151 सियोल आप्रवासन विदेश कार्यालय' है।

#######

When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. For example, the address of the Seoul Immigration - Foreign Office is 'Seoul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seoul Immigration Foreign Office'.
g_text_translate.tr:
Kore sokak adı adreslerini kullanıyor. Sokak adı adresi, sokak adını ve bina numarasını gösterir. Kore’de adres yazarken insanlar ‘şehir adı, sokak adı ve bina numarası’ gibi büyükten küçüğe doğru sırayla yazıyorlar. Örneğin, Seul Göçmenlik - Dışişleri Ofisinin adresi 'Seul, Yangcheon-gu, Mokdongdong-ro 151 Seul Göçmenlik Dışişleri Ofisi'dir.

When writing the address in Korea, people write in order from large to small, such as ‘city name, street name and building number’. content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 한국에서 작은 장소에서 큰 장소의 순서로 씁니다.
한국에 주소 순서는 '도시 이름, 도로명, 건물 번호'입니다.
한국에서 주소를 쓸 때 사람들은 도시 이름을 안 씁니다.

2. Địa chỉ tên đường chỉ được biểu thị bằng tên.
3. Thứ tự địa chỉ của Hàn Quốc là 'Tên thành phố, tên đường, số tòa nhà'.
4. Khi viết địa chỉ ở Hàn Quốc mọi người không viết tên thành phố.
--------------------
표기하다: Ghi, viết, biểu thị

general.g_text: 저는 대학에서 한국어를 더 배우기 위해서 작년에 한국에 다녀왔습니다. 유학 가기 전에 아무리 노력해도 늘지 않은 한국어가 ( ㉠ ) 느는 것을 느낄 수 있었습니다. 한국에서의 유학을 통해서 저는 쉽게 한국어를 배우고 가르치는 방법에 대해서 큰 관심을 가지게 되었습니다. 그래서 대학을 졸업한 후에 저는 집 근처에 있는 학원에서 한국어를 가르치기 시작하기로 했습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Năm ngoái tôi đã tới Hàn Quốc để học thêm tiếng Hàn ở trường đại học. Tôi có thể cảm nhận được sự cải thiện ( ㉠ ) vốn tiếng Hàn dù tôi có cố gắng thế nào cũng không cải thiện được trước khi đi du học. Du học Hàn Quốc đã làm tôi dành sự quan tâm lớn về phương pháp học và dạy tiếng Hàn một cách dễ dàng. Vì vậy sau khi tốt nghiệp tôi đã quyết định bắt đầu dạy tiếng Hàn ở một trung tâm gần nhà.
g_text_translate.en: I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.it:
Sono andato in Corea l'anno scorso per imparare di più il coreano al college. Potevo sentire che il mio coreano, che non era migliorato nonostante tutti i miei sforzi prima di andare a studiare all'estero, era migliorato rapidamente. Studiando all'estero in Corea, mi sono interessato molto a come imparare e insegnare facilmente il coreano. Quindi, dopo essermi laureato, ho deciso di iniziare a insegnare coreano in un'accademia vicino a casa mia.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.fr:
Je suis allé en Corée l'année dernière pour apprendre davantage le coréen à l'université. Je pouvais sentir que mon coréen, qui ne s'était pas amélioré malgré tous mes efforts avant de partir étudier à l'étranger, s'est amélioré rapidement. En étudiant à l'étranger en Corée, je me suis beaucoup intéressé à la manière d'apprendre et d'enseigner facilement le coréen. Ainsi, après avoir obtenu mon diplôme universitaire, j’ai décidé de commencer à enseigner le coréen dans une académie près de chez moi.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.es:
Fui a Corea el año pasado para aprender más coreano en la universidad. Podía sentir que mi coreano, que no había mejorado por mucho que lo intentara antes de ir a estudiar al extranjero, mejoró rápidamente. Al estudiar en Corea, me interesé mucho en cómo aprender y enseñar coreano fácilmente. Entonces, después de graduarme de la universidad, decidí empezar a enseñar coreano en una academia cerca de mi casa.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya pergi ke Korea tahun lalu untuk belajar lebih banyak bahasa Korea di perguruan tinggi. Saya dapat merasakan bahwa bahasa Korea saya, yang belum membaik tidak peduli seberapa keras saya berusaha sebelum saya pergi belajar ke luar negeri, meningkat dengan cepat. Melalui belajar di luar negeri di Korea, saya menjadi sangat tertarik dengan cara belajar dan mengajar bahasa Korea dengan mudah. Jadi, setelah lulus kuliah, saya memutuskan untuk mulai mengajar bahasa Korea di akademi dekat rumah saya.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.ja:
私は大学で韓国語をもっと学ぶために昨年韓国に行きました。留学前はいくら頑張っても上達しなかった韓国語がみるみる上達したのを感じました。韓国への留学を通じて、私は韓国語を簡単に学び、教える方法に非常に興味を持ちました。そこで、大学卒業後、家の近くのアカデミーで韓国語を教え始めることにしました。

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich bin letztes Jahr nach Korea gegangen, um im College mehr Koreanisch zu lernen. Ich spürte, dass sich mein Koreanisch, das sich vor meinem Studium im Ausland trotz aller Bemühungen nicht verbessert hatte, schnell verbesserte. Durch mein Auslandsstudium in Korea interessierte ich mich sehr dafür, wie man einfach Koreanisch lernen und lehren kann. Nach meinem College-Abschluss beschloss ich, an einer Akademie in der Nähe meines Hauses Koreanisch zu unterrichten.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我去年去了韩国，在大学学习更多韩语。我能感觉到，出国前无论怎么努力都没有进步的韩语，进步得很快。通过在韩国留学，我对如何轻松学习和教授韩语非常感兴趣。因此，大学毕业后，我决定开始在我家附近的一所学院教韩语。

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
我去年去了韓國，在大學學習更多韓語。我能感覺到，出國前無論怎麼努力都沒有進步的韓語，進步得很快。通過在韓國留學，我對如何輕鬆學習和教授韓語非常感興趣。因此，大學畢業後，我決定開始在我家附近的一所學院教韓語。

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.ru:
В прошлом году я поехал в Корею, чтобы больше изучать корейский в колледже. Я чувствовал, что мой корейский, который не улучшился, как бы я ни старался до того, как поехал учиться за границу, быстро улучшился. Обучаясь за границей в Корее, я очень заинтересовался тем, как легко изучать и преподавать корейский язык. Итак, после окончания колледжа я решил начать преподавать корейский язык в академии рядом с моим домом.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.th:
ฉันไปเกาหลีเมื่อปีที่แล้วเพื่อเรียนภาษาเกาหลีมากขึ้นในวิทยาลัย ฉันรู้สึกได้ว่าภาษาเกาหลีของฉันซึ่งไม่ดีขึ้นไม่ว่าจะพยายามแค่ไหนก่อนที่จะไปเรียนต่อต่างประเทศก็พัฒนาขึ้นอย่างรวดเร็ว จากการไปศึกษาต่อที่ประเทศเกาหลีทำให้ฉันสนใจอย่างมากในการเรียนรู้และสอนภาษาเกาหลีอย่างง่ายดาย หลังจากเรียนจบวิทยาลัย ฉันจึงตัดสินใจเริ่มสอนภาษาเกาหลีที่สถาบันใกล้บ้าน

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.pt:
Fui para a Coreia no ano passado para aprender mais coreano na faculdade. Pude sentir que meu coreano, que não havia melhorado por mais que eu tentasse antes de ir estudar no exterior, melhorou rapidamente. Ao estudar no exterior, na Coreia, fiquei muito interessado em como aprender e ensinar coreano facilmente. Então, depois de me formar na faculdade, decidi começar a ensinar coreano em uma academia perto da minha casa.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.hi:
मैं कॉलेज में और अधिक कोरियाई भाषा सीखने के लिए पिछले साल कोरिया गया था। मैं महसूस कर सकता था कि विदेश में पढ़ाई के लिए जाने से पहले मेरी कोरियाई भाषा में, चाहे मैंने कितनी भी कोशिश की हो, सुधार नहीं हुआ था, तेजी से सुधार हुआ। विदेश में कोरिया में पढ़ाई के दौरान मेरी इस बात में बहुत दिलचस्पी हो गई कि कैसे आसानी से कोरियाई भाषा सीखी और सिखाई जाए। इसलिए, कॉलेज से स्नातक होने के बाद, मैंने अपने घर के पास एक अकादमी में कोरियाई पढ़ाना शुरू करने का फैसला किया।

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.
g_text_translate.tr:
Üniversitede daha fazla Korece öğrenmek için geçen yıl Kore'ye gittim. Yurtdışına okumaya gitmeden önce ne kadar çabalasam da gelişmeyen Korecemin hızla geliştiğini hissedebiliyordum. Kore'de yurt dışında eğitim gördüğümde Korece'nin nasıl kolayca öğrenilip öğretilebileceği konusuyla çok ilgilenmeye başladım. Üniversiteden mezun olduktan sonra evimin yakınındaki bir akademide Korece öğretmeye başlamaya karar verdim.

#######

I went to Korea last year to learn more Korean in college. I could feel that my Korean, which hadn't improved no matter how hard I tried before I went to study abroad, improved quickly. Through studying abroad in Korea, I became very interested in how to easily learn and teach Korean. So, after graduating from college, I decided to start teaching Korean at an academy near my house.

4. Nhanh 
--------------------

V + (으)ㄹ 수 있다/없다: Có thể/không thể.
V + 아/어도: Dù, cho dù.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

2. Năm sau tôi sẽ tốt nghiệp đại học.

4. Trước khi đi du học tôi ghét tiếng Hàn.

general.g_text: 저는 우표 모으는 것을 좋아해서 중학교 때부터 여러 나라의 우표를 모으고 있습니다. 지금까지 이백 개 정도의 우표를 모았습니다. 제가 가장 좋아하는 우표는 한국에서 온 우표입니다. 저는 보통 일주일에 한 번 취미가 같은 친구들과 만나고 한국어로 이야기합니다. 그렇게 하면 한국어 능력을 향상시킬 수 있습니다. 우표를 통해 친구들과 그 나라의 문화를 ( ㉠ ) 정말 즐겁습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Tôi thích sưu tập tem nên đã sưu tập nhiều loại tem của các quốc gia từ hồi trung học. Bây giờ tôi đã sưu tập được khoảng hai trăm chiếc tem. Chiếc tem mà tôi thích nhất là chiếc tem đến từ Hàn Quốc. Mỗi tuần một lần tôi thường gặp những người bạn có cùng sở thích và trò chuyện bằng tiếng Hàn với họ. Nếu làm vậy thì năng lực tiếng Hàn của tôi có thể được cải thiện. Và thông qua những chiếc tem, tôi ( ㉠ ) các bạn và văn hóa của đất nước đó nên tôi cảm thấy rất vui.
g_text_translate.en: I like collecting stamps, so I've been collecting stamps from various countries since middle school. I've collected about two hundred stamps so far. My favorite stamps are from Korea. I usually meet up with friends with the same hobby once a week and talk in Korean. That way I can improve my Korean language skills. I really enjoy getting to know my friends and the culture of the country through stamps.
g_text_translate.it:
Mi piace collezionare francobolli, quindi colleziono francobolli di vari paesi fin dai tempi delle scuole medie. Finora ho raccolto circa duecento francobolli. I miei francobolli preferiti provengono dalla Corea. Di solito mi incontro con gli amici con lo stesso hobby una volta alla settimana e parlo in coreano. In questo modo posso migliorare le mie competenze nella lingua coreana. Mi piace molto conoscere i miei amici e la cultura del paese attraverso i francobolli.

#######

I like collecting stamps, so I've been collecting stamps from various countries since middle school. I've collected about two hundred stamps so far. My favorite stamps are from Korea. I usually meet up with friends with the same hobby once a week and talk in Korean. That way I can improve my Korean language skills. I really enjoy getting to know my friends and the culture of the country through stamps.
g_text_translate.fr:
J'aime collectionner les timbres, c'est pourquoi je collectionne les timbres de différents pays depuis le collège. J'ai collectionné environ deux cents timbres jusqu'à présent. Mes timbres préférés viennent de Corée. Je retrouve généralement des amis partageant le même passe-temps une fois par semaine et je parle en coréen. De cette façon, je peux améliorer mes compétences en coréen. J'aime vraiment connaître mes amis et la culture du pays à travers les timbres.

#######

I like collecting stamps, so I've been collecting stamps from various countries since middle school. I've collected about two hundred stamps so far. My favorite stamps are from Korea. I usually meet up with friends with the same hobby once a week and talk in Korean. That way I can improve my Korean language skills. I really enjoy getting to know my friends and the culture of the country through stamps.
g_text_translate.es:

De esa manera puedo mejorar mis habilidades en el idioma coreano. Disfruto mucho conocer a mis amigos y la cultura del país a través de sellos.

g_text_translate.th:
ฉันชอบสะสมแสตมป์ ดังนั้นฉันจึงสะสมแสตมป์จากประเทศต่างๆ ตั้งแต่สมัยมัธยมต้น จนถึงตอนนี้ฉันสะสมแสตมป์ได้ประมาณสองร้อยดวง แสตมป์ที่ฉันชอบคือจากเกาหลี ฉันมักจะพบปะกับเพื่อนที่มีงานอดิเรกเดียวกันสัปดาห์ละครั้งและพูดคุยเป็นภาษาเกาหลี ด้วยวิธีนี้ฉันสามารถพัฒนาทักษะภาษาเกาหลีของฉันได้ ฉันสนุกกับการทำความรู้จักกับเพื่อนฝูงและวัฒนธรรมของประเทศผ่านการประทับตรา

g_text_translate.hi:
मुझे टिकट संग्रह करना पसंद है, इसलिए मैं मिडिल स्कूल से ही विभिन्न देशों से टिकट संग्रह कर रहा हूं। मैंने अब तक लगभग दो सौ टिकटें एकत्र कर ली हैं। मेरे पसंदीदा टिकट कोरिया से हैं। मैं आमतौर पर सप्ताह में एक बार इसी शौक वाले दोस्तों से मिलता हूं और कोरियाई भाषा में बात करता हूं। इस तरह मैं अपने कोरियाई भाषा कौशल में सुधार कर सकता हूं। मुझे टिकटों के माध्यम से अपने दोस्तों और देश की संस्कृति को जानने में बहुत मजा आता है।

#######

I like collecting stamps, so I've been collecting stamps from various countries since middle school. I've collected about two hundred stamps so far. My favorite stamps are from Korea. I usually meet up with friends with the same hobby once a week and talk in Korean. That way I can improve my Korean language skills. I really enjoy getting to know my friends and the culture of the country through stamps.
g_text_translate.tr:
Pul biriktirmeyi seviyorum, bu yüzden ortaokuldan beri çeşitli ülkelerden pul topluyorum. Şu ana kadar iki yüze yakın pul topladım. En sevdiğim pullar Kore'den. Genellikle haftada bir kez aynı hobiye sahip arkadaşlarımla buluşup Korece konuşuyorum. Bu şekilde Korece dil becerilerimi geliştirebilirim. Pullar aracılığıyla arkadaşlarımı ve ülke kültürünü tanımaktan büyük keyif alıyorum.

#######

I like collecting stamps, so I've been collecting stamps from various countries since middle school. I've collected about two hundred stamps so far. My favorite stamps are from Korea. I usually meet up with friends with the same hobby once a week and talk in Korean. That way I can improve my Korean language skills. I really enjoy getting to know my friends and the culture of the country through stamps.

3. Costumo jogar fora os selos depois de ler a carta.
4. Não encontro amigos que tenham o mesmo hobby.
--------------------
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g>Porque.
<g>V + 는 것/게:</g>Descrevendo substantivos com verbos.

#######

Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. I sold about two hundred stamps.
2. My hobby is collecting stamps.
3. I usually throw away the stamps after reading the letter.
4. I don't meet friends who have the same hobby.
--------------------
<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g> Because.
<g>V + 는 것/게:</g> Describing nouns with verbs.

general.g_text: 저는 지난 방학에 친구들과 같이 전주 여행을 다녀왔습니다. 우리는 전주에 고속버스를 타고 갔습니다. 그리고 1박 2일 동안 여행했습니다. 저는 전주에 여행가 본 적이 없어서 정말 즐거웠습니다. 전주에 한국의 전통 문화를 배울 수 있는 곳이 많았습니다. 그리고 전주 비빔밥이 아주 유명합니다. 전주 비빔밥은 서울에서 먹은 것과 다르게 맛있었습니다. 이번 여행은 정말 ( ㉠ ).

g_text_translate.vi: Vào kỳ nghỉ trước tôi đã cùng các bạn của mình đi du lịch Jeonju. Chúng tôi đã đi xe bus cao tốc tới Jeonju. Và chúng tôi đã có chuyến du lịch 2 ngày 1 đêm. Tôi chưa từng đi tới Jeonju trước đây nên cảm thấy rất vui. Ở Jeonju có nhiều nơi bạn có thể học, tìm hiểu về nền văn hóa truyền thống Hàn Quốc. Và cơm trộn ở Jeonju cũng rất nổi tiếng. Tôi cảm thấy cơm trộn ở Jeonju ngon một cách khác biệt so với cơm trộn tôi ăn ở Seoul. Thực sự đây sẽ là một chuyến du lịch ( ㉠ ).
g_text_translate.en: I went on a trip to Jeonju with my friends last vacation. We went to Jeonju by express bus. And we traveled for 2 days and 1 night. I've never been to Jeonju before, so I really enjoyed it. There are many places where you can learn Korean traditional culture in Jeonju. And Jeonju Bibimbap is very famous. Jeonju Bibimbap was different from what I had in Seoul and it was delicious. This trip is truly unforgettable.
g_text_translate.it:
Ho fatto un viaggio a Jeonju con i miei amici la scorsa vacanza. Siamo andati a Jeonju con l'autobus espresso. E abbiamo viaggiato per 2 giorni e 1 notte. Non sono mai stato a Jeonju prima, quindi mi è davvero piaciuto. Ci sono molti posti dove puoi imparare la cultura tradizionale coreana a Jeonju. E Jeonju Bibimbap è molto famoso. Jeonju Bibimbap era diverso da quello che avevo a Seoul ed era delizioso. Questo viaggio è davvero indimenticabile.

#######

I went on a trip to Jeonju with my friends last vacation. We went to Jeonju by express bus. And we traveled for 2 days and 1 night. I've never been to Jeonju before, so I really enjoyed it. There are many places where you can learn Korean traditional culture in Jeonju. And Jeonju Bibimbap is very famous. Jeonju Bibimbap was different from what I had in Seoul and it was delicious. This trip is truly unforgettable.

Je ne suis jamais allé à Jeonju auparavant, donc j'ai vraiment apprécié. Il existe de nombreux endroits où vous pouvez apprendre la culture traditionnelle coréenne à Jeonju. Et Jeonju Bibimbap est très célèbre. Jeonju Bibimbap était différent de ce que j'avais à Séoul et c'était délicieux. Ce voyage est vraiment inoubliable.

g_text_translate.hi:
मैं पिछली छुट्टियों में अपने दोस्तों के साथ जोंजू की यात्रा पर गया था। हम एक्सप्रेस बस से जोंजू गए। और हमने 2 दिन और 1 रात की यात्रा की। मैं पहले कभी जोंजू नहीं गया था, इसलिए मैंने वास्तव में इसका आनंद लिया। जोंजू में ऐसे कई स्थान हैं जहां आप कोरियाई पारंपरिक संस्कृति सीख सकते हैं। और जोंजू बिबिंबैप बहुत प्रसिद्ध है। जोंजू बिबिंबैप मैंने सियोल में जो खाया उससे अलग था और यह स्वादिष्ट था। यह यात्रा सचमुच अविस्मरणीय है।

Jeonju'da Kore geleneksel kültürünü öğrenebileceğiniz birçok yer var. Jeonju Bibimbap da çok ünlü. Jeonju Bibimbap Seul'de yediğimden farklıydı ve çok lezzetliydi. Bu gezi gerçekten unutulmaz.

general.g_text: 어제 저녁에 민수 씨 생일 파티가 있었습니다. 민수 씨가 우리 반 친구들을 ( ㉠ ) 우리는 파티에 갔습니다. 민수 씨가 맛있는 음식과 음료수를 많이 준비하고 우리는 회비를 모아서 케이크와 선물을 샀습니다. 우리는 맛있는 음식도 먹고 음악도 듣고 이야기도 많이 했습니다. 아주 재미있었습니다. 오랜만에 우리는 이렇게 즐거운 시간을 보낼 수 있었습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Tiệc sinh nhật của Minsoo diễn ra vào tối hôm qua. Minsoo ( ㉠ ) các bạn lớp tôi (nên) chúng tôi đã đi tới bữa tiệc. Minsoo đã chuẩn bị nhiều đồ uống và đồ ăn ngon còn chúng tôi thì cùng góp tiền mua bánh sinh nhật và quà. Chúng tôi ăn những món ăn ngon và nghe nhạc và cùng nhau nói rất nhiều chuyện. Thực sự rất thú vị. Lâu rồi chúng tôi mới có thể có một khoảng thời gian vui vẻ như thế này.
g_text_translate.en: There was Minsoo's birthday party last night. Minsoo invited our classmates so we went to the party. Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.it:
Ieri sera c'è stata la festa di compleanno di Minsoo. Minsoo ha invitato i nostri compagni di classe così siamo andati alla festa. Minsoo ha preparato un sacco di cibi e bevande deliziosi e abbiamo risparmiato sulla quota associativa per acquistare torte e regali. Abbiamo mangiato cibo delizioso, ascoltato musica e parlato molto. E 'stato molto divertente. Era da un po' che non riuscivamo a divertirci così tanto.

#######

There was Minsoo's birthday party last night. Minsoo invited our classmates so we went to the party. Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.fr:
Il y avait la fête d'anniversaire de Minsoo hier soir. Minsoo a invité nos camarades de classe alors nous sommes allés à la fête. Minsoo a préparé de nombreux plats et boissons délicieux et nous avons économisé nos cotisations pour acheter des gâteaux et des cadeaux. Nous avons mangé de la nourriture délicieuse, écouté de la musique et beaucoup parlé. C'était super bien. Cela faisait longtemps que nous n'avions pas pu passer un aussi bon moment.

#######

There was Minsoo's birthday party last night. Minsoo invited our classmates so we went to the party. Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.es:
Anoche hubo una fiesta de cumpleaños de Minsoo. Minsoo invitó a nuestros compañeros de clase así que fuimos a la fiesta. Minsoo preparó muchas comidas y bebidas deliciosas y ahorramos nuestras cuotas de membresía para comprar pasteles y regalos. Comimos comida deliciosa, escuchamos música y hablamos mucho. Fue muy divertido. Hacía tiempo que no podíamos pasarlo tan bien.

#######

There was Minsoo's birthday party last night. Minsoo invited our classmates so we went to the party. Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.id:
Ada pesta ulang tahun Minsoo tadi malam. Minsoo mengundang teman sekelas kami jadi kami pergi ke pesta. Minsoo menyiapkan banyak makanan dan minuman lezat, dan kami menghemat biaya keanggotaan untuk membeli kue dan hadiah. Kami makan makanan lezat, mendengarkan musik, dan banyak mengobrol. Itu sangat menyenangkan. Sudah lama sejak kami bisa bersenang-senang.

#######

There was Minsoo's birthday party last night. Minsoo invited our classmates so we went to the party. Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.ja:
昨夜はミンスの誕生日パーティーがありました。ミンスがクラスメイトを誘ってくれたので、私たちはパーティーに行きました。ミンスは美味しい食べ物や飲み物をたくさん用意してくれて、私たちは会費を貯めてケーキやプレゼントを買いました。美味しいものを食べて、音楽を聴いて、たくさん話しました。とても楽しかった。こんなに楽しい時間を過ごすことができたのは久しぶりでした。

#######

There was Minsoo's birthday party last night. Minsoo invited our classmates so we went to the party. Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.de:
Gestern Abend fand Minsoos Geburtstagsfeier statt. Minsoo lud unsere Klassenkameraden ein, also gingen wir zur Party. Minsoo bereitete viele köstliche Speisen und Getränke zu und wir sparten unsere Mitgliedsbeiträge, um Kuchen und Geschenke zu kaufen. Wir haben lecker gegessen, Musik gehört und viel geredet. Es war viel Spaß. Es ist schon eine Weile her, seit wir eine so schöne Zeit haben konnten.

#######

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
昨晚有珉秀的生日聚会。民秀邀请了我们的同学，所以我们去参加聚会。民秀准备了很多美味的食物和饮料，我们还攒了会员费买了蛋糕和礼物。我们吃着美味的食物，听着音乐，聊了很多。这很有趣。我们已经有一段时间没有能够享受如此美好的时光了。

g_text_translate.ru:

Минсу приготовил много вкусной еды и напитков, а мы накопили членские взносы на покупку тортов и подарков. Мы ели вкусную еду, слушали музыку и много разговаривали. Это было очень весело. Давненько мы не могли так хорошо провести время.

g_text_translate.th:
เมื่อคืนมีงานวันเกิดมินซู มินซูเชิญเพื่อนร่วมชั้นของเราดังนั้นเราจึงไปงานปาร์ตี้ มินซูเตรียมอาหารและเครื่องดื่มแสนอร่อยมากมาย และเราเก็บเงินค่าสมาชิกไว้เพื่อซื้อเค้กและของขวัญ เรากินอาหารอร่อย ฟังเพลง และพูดคุยกันมากมาย มันเป็นจำนวนมากของความสนุก. เป็นเวลานานแล้วที่เราจะมีช่วงเวลาที่ดีเช่นนี้

g_text_translate.pt:
Houve a festa de aniversário de Minsoo ontem à noite. Minsoo convidou nossos colegas e fomos para a festa. Minsoo preparou muitas comidas e bebidas deliciosas e economizamos nossas taxas de adesão para comprar bolos e presentes. Comemos comida deliciosa, ouvimos música e conversamos muito. Foi muito divertido. Já faz um tempo que não conseguimos nos divertir tanto.

#######

g_text_translate.hi:
कल रात मिन्सू की जन्मदिन की पार्टी थी। मिन्सू ने हमारे सहपाठियों को आमंत्रित किया इसलिए हम पार्टी में गए। मिन्सू ने बहुत सारे स्वादिष्ट भोजन और पेय तैयार किए, और हमने केक और उपहार खरीदने के लिए अपनी सदस्यता शुल्क बचा लिया। हमने स्वादिष्ट खाना खाया, संगीत सुना और खूब बातें कीं। यह बहुत ही मज़ेदार था। काफी समय हो गया है जब से हम इतना अच्छा समय बिता पाए हैं।

#######

Minsoo prepared lots of delicious food and drinks, and we saved up our membership fees to buy cakes and gifts. We ate delicious food, listened to music, and talked a lot. It was a lot of fun. It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.
g_text_translate.tr:
Dün gece Minsoo'nun doğum günü partisi vardı. Minsoo sınıf arkadaşlarımızı davet etti ve biz de partiye gittik. Minsoo bir sürü lezzetli yiyecek ve içecek hazırladı ve biz de kek ve hediyeler almak için üyelik ücretlerimizi biriktirdik. Lezzetli yemekler yedik, müzik dinledik ve çok konuştuk. Çok eğlenceliydi. Böyle güzel vakit geçirmeyeli uzun zaman olmuştu.

#######

It's been a while since we were able to have such a good time.

4. The friends collected the money and gave it to Minsoo.
