general.g_text: 저는 어제 7시 약속이 있었는데 택시를 타지 않고 버스로 약속 장소까지 갔습니다. 그때 퇴근시간이어서 길이 너무 막혔습니다. 그런데 버스 다니는 길은 막히지 않았습니다. 한국에는 버스 전용 도로가 ( ㉠ ) 차가 많은 막히는 시간에도 버스가 택시보다 빠릅니다. 그래서 저는 출-퇴근 시간에는 버스나 지하철을 이용하려고 합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm qua tôi có một cuộc hẹn lúc 7 giờ, tôi không đi taxi mà bắt xe bus để đi tới điểm hẹn. Lúc đó là giờ tan tầm nên đường rất tắc. Nhưng làn đường xe bus đi lại không tắc. Hàn Quốc ( ㉠ ) làn đường chuyên dụng dành riêng cho xe bus (nên) dù vào thời điểm có nhiều xe ô tô gây tắc đường, xe bus vẫn đi nhanh hơn taxi. Vì vậy mà vào giờ đi làm hay tan tầm tôi định sẽ sử dụng xe bus hoặc tàu điện ngầm.
g_text_translate.en: I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.it:
Ieri avevo appuntamento alle 7, invece di prendere un taxi sono andato al luogo dell'incontro in autobus. Era l'ora di punta, quindi il traffico era pessimo. Ma la strada riservata agli autobus non è stata bloccata. Dato che in Corea le strade sono riservate solo agli autobus, gli autobus sono più veloci dei taxi anche nelle ore di punta. Quindi userò l'autobus o la metropolitana nelle ore di punta.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.fr:
J'avais rendez-vous hier à 7 heures, au lieu de prendre un taxi, je me suis rendu au lieu de rendez-vous en bus. C'était l'heure de pointe, donc la circulation était très mauvaise. Mais la route réservée aux bus n’a pas été bloquée. Comme la Corée dispose de routes réservées aux bus, les bus sont plus rapides que les taxis, même aux heures de pointe. Je vais donc utiliser le bus ou le métro aux heures de pointe.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.es:
Tenía una cita ayer a las 7 en punto, en lugar de tomar un taxi, fui al lugar de reunión en autobús. Era hora punta y el tráfico era muy malo. Pero la carretera exclusiva para autobuses no fue bloqueada. Dado que Corea tiene carreteras exclusivas para autobuses, los autobuses son más rápidos que los taxis incluso durante las horas pico. Entonces voy a usar el autobús o el metro durante las horas pico.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.id:
Saya ada janji jam 7 kemarin, daripada naik taksi, saya pergi ke tempat pertemuan dengan bus. Saat itu jam sibuk, jadi lalu lintas sangat buruk. Namun jalan khusus bus tidak diblokir. Karena Korea hanya mempunyai jalan raya yang hanya dilengkapi bus, bus lebih cepat dibandingkan taksi bahkan pada jam-jam sibuk. Jadi saya akan menggunakan bus atau kereta bawah tanah pada jam sibuk.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.ja:
昨日は7時に約束があったので、タクシーに乗らずにバスで集合場所に行きました。ラッシュアワーだったので、交通量はとても悪かったです。しかし、バス専用道路は封鎖されなかった。韓国はバス専用道路なので、ラッシュアワーでもバスの方がタクシーより早いです。なので、ラッシュアワーにはバスか地下鉄を使うことになります。

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.de:
Ich hatte gestern um 7 Uhr einen Termin, statt ein Taxi zu nehmen, bin ich mit dem Bus zum Treffpunkt gefahren. Es war Hauptverkehrszeit, daher war der Verkehr sehr schlecht. Aber die reine Busstraße war nicht gesperrt. Da es in Korea nur Busstraßen gibt, sind Busse auch während der Hauptverkehrszeiten schneller als Taxis. Deshalb werde ich während der Hauptverkehrszeit den Bus oder die U-Bahn nutzen.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
昨天7点我约好了，没有打车，而是坐公交车去了集合地点。由于正值上下班高峰期，所以交通状况非常糟糕。但公交车专用路并没有被封锁。由于韩国有公交车专用道路，因此即使在高峰时段，公交车也比出租车更快。所以我会在高峰时段乘坐公共汽车或地铁。

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
昨天7點我約好了，沒有打車，而是坐公交車去了集合地點。當時正值上下班高峰期，所以交通非常糟糕。但公交車專用路並沒有被封鎖。由於韓國有公交車專用道路，因此即使在高峰時段，公交車也比出租車更快。所以我會在高峰時段乘坐公共汽車或地鐵。

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.ru:
Вчера у меня была назначена встреча на 7 часов, вместо того, чтобы взять такси, я поехал к месту встречи на автобусе. Это был час пик, поэтому движение было очень плохим. Но дорога, по которой ходят только автобусы, не была перекрыта. Поскольку в Корее дороги только для автобусов, автобусы ездят быстрее, чем такси, даже в часы пик. Поэтому я собираюсь воспользоваться автобусом или метро в час пик.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.th:
เมื่อวานฉันมีนัดตอน 7 โมง แทนที่จะนั่งแท็กซี่กลับไปสถานที่นัดพบโดยรถบัส มันเป็นชั่วโมงเร่งด่วน รถจึงติดขัดมาก แต่ไม่ได้ปิดถนนเฉพาะรถประจำทาง เนื่องจากเกาหลีมีถนนสำหรับรถประจำทางเท่านั้น รถบัสจึงเร็วกว่าแท็กซี่แม้ในช่วงเวลาเร่งด่วน ดังนั้นฉันจะใช้รถประจำทางหรือรถไฟใต้ดินในช่วงเวลาเร่งด่วน

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.pt:
Ontem tinha um encontro marcado às 7 horas, em vez de pegar um táxi, fui de ônibus ao local do encontro. Era hora do rush, então o trânsito estava muito ruim. Mas a estrada exclusiva para ônibus não foi bloqueada. Como a Coreia tem estradas exclusivas para ônibus, os ônibus são mais rápidos que os táxis, mesmo nos horários de pico. Então vou usar o ônibus ou o metrô na hora do rush.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.hi:
कल मेरा 7 बजे का अपॉइंटमेंट था, मैं टैक्सी लेने के बजाय बस से बैठक स्थल पर गया। यह व्यस्त समय था, इसलिए यातायात बहुत खराब था। लेकिन केवल बस मार्ग अवरुद्ध नहीं हुआ। चूंकि कोरिया में केवल बसों के लिए सड़कें हैं, इसलिए व्यस्त समय के दौरान भी बसें टैक्सियों से तेज़ चलती हैं। इसलिए मैं व्यस्त समय के दौरान बस या सबवे का उपयोग करने जा रहा हूँ।

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.
g_text_translate.tr:
Dün saat 7'de randevum vardı, taksiye binmek yerine otobüsle buluşma yerine gittim. Yoğun saat olduğundan trafik çok kötüydü. Ancak sadece otobüsün geçtiği yol kapatılmadı. Kore'de yalnızca otobüslerin geçtiği yollar olduğundan, yoğun saatlerde bile otobüsler taksilerden daha hızlıdır. Bu yüzden trafiğin yoğun olduğu saatlerde otobüsü veya metroyu kullanacağım.

#######

I had an appointment at 7 o'clock yesterday, instead of taking a taxi, I went to the meeting place by bus. It was rush hour, so the traffic was so bad. But the bus-only road was not blocked. Since Korea has bus-only roads, buses are faster than taxis even during rush hours. So I'm going to use the bus or subway during rush hour.

general.g_text: 저는 어제 친구와 함께 명동에 쇼핑하러 갔습니다. 토요일이어서 사람이 많고 아주 복잡했습니다. 명동에서 옷과 신발은 아주 많고 예쁩니다. 가격도 싸고 품질도 ( ㉠ ) 치마 하나와 구두 하나 샀습니다. 구두는 잘 입고 어울립니다. 그런데 집에 와서 치마를 입어 보니까 좀 작았습니다. 그래서 좀 큰 걸로 바꾸고 싶습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Hôm qua tôi đã cùng bạn đi mua sắm ở Myeongdong. Vì là thứ bảy nên có rất nhiều người và rất đông đúc. Quần áo và giày dép ở Myeongdong rất đẹp. Giá rẻ và chất lượng cũng ( ㉠ ) tôi đã mua một chiếc chân váy và một đôi giày. Tôi đeo đôi giày rất vừa và hợp. Nhưng khi về đến nhà và mặc thử chân váy thì thấy hơi chật. Vì vậy tôi muốn đổi sang một chiếc khác rộng hơn một chút.
g_text_translate.en: Yesterday I went shopping in Myeong-dong with a friend. It was Saturday, so it was crowded. Myeong-dong has a lot of clothes and shoes and they are pretty. The price was cheap and the quality was good, so I bought a skirt and a pair of shoes. The shoes look good on me. But when I got home and tried on the skirt, it was a bit small. So I want to change it to something bigger.
g_text_translate.it:
Ieri sono andato a fare shopping a Myeong-dong con un amico. Era sabato, quindi era affollato. Myeong-dong ha molti vestiti e scarpe e sono carini. Il prezzo era economico e la qualità era buona, quindi ho comprato una gonna e un paio di scarpe. Le scarpe mi stanno bene. Ma quando sono tornata a casa e ho provato la gonna, era un po' piccola. Quindi voglio cambiarlo in qualcosa di più grande.

#######

Yesterday I went shopping in Myeong-dong with a friend. It was Saturday, so it was crowded. Myeong-dong has a lot of clothes and shoes and they are pretty. The price was cheap and the quality was good, so I bought a skirt and a pair of shoes. The shoes look good on me. But when I got home and tried on the skirt, it was a bit small. So I want to change it to something bigger.
g_text_translate.fr:
Hier, je suis allé faire du shopping à Myeong-dong avec un ami. C'était samedi, donc il y avait du monde. Myeong-dong a beaucoup de vêtements et de chaussures et ils sont jolis. Le prix était bon marché et la qualité était bonne, alors j'ai acheté une jupe et une paire de chaussures. Les chaussures me vont bien. Mais quand je suis rentré à la maison et que j’ai essayé la jupe, elle était un peu petite. Je veux donc le changer pour quelque chose de plus grand.

#######

Yesterday I went shopping in Myeong-dong with a friend. It was Saturday, so it was crowded. Myeong-dong has a lot of clothes and shoes and they are pretty. The price was cheap and the quality was good, so I bought a skirt and a pair of shoes. The shoes look good on me. But when I got home and tried on the skirt, it was a bit small. So I want to change it to something bigger.
g_text_translate.es:
Ayer fui de compras a Myeong-dong con un amigo. Era sábado, así que estaba lleno. Myeong-dong tiene mucha ropa y zapatos y son bonitos. El precio era barato y la calidad buena, así que compré una falda y un par de zapatos. Los zapatos me quedan bien. Pero cuando llegué a casa y me probé la falda, me quedó un poco pequeña. Entonces quiero cambiarlo por algo más grande.

#######

Yesterday I went shopping in Myeong-dong with a friend. It was Saturday, so it was crowded. Myeong-dong has a lot of clothes and shoes and they are pretty. g_text_translate.id:
Kemarin saya pergi berbelanja di Myeong-dong dengan seorang teman. Saat itu hari Sabtu, jadi ramai. Myeong-dong memiliki banyak pakaian dan sepatu dan semuanya cantik. Harganya murah dan kualitasnya bagus, jadi saya beli rok dan sepatu. Sepatu itu terlihat bagus untukku. Tapi ketika saya sampai di rumah dan mencoba roknya, ternyata agak kecil. Jadi saya ingin mengubahnya menjadi sesuatu yang lebih besar.

g_text_translate.hi:
कल मैं एक दोस्त के साथ माययोंग-डोंग में खरीदारी करने गया था। शनिवार का दिन था इसलिए भीड़ बहुत थी. माययोंग-डोंग के पास बहुत सारे कपड़े और जूते हैं और वे सुंदर हैं। कीमत सस्ती थी और गुणवत्ता अच्छी थी, इसलिए मैंने एक स्कर्ट और एक जोड़ी जूते खरीदे। जूते मुझ पर अच्छे लगते हैं. लेकिन जब मैं घर पहुंची और स्कर्ट ट्राई की तो वह थोड़ी छोटी थी। इसलिए मैं इसे किसी बड़ी चीज़ में बदलना चाहता हूं।

Dün bir arkadaşımla Myeong-dong'a alışverişe gittim. Cumartesi günü olduğundan kalabalıktı. Myeong-dong'un bir sürü kıyafeti ve ayakkabısı var ve bunlar çok güzel. Fiyatı ucuzdu ve kalitesi iyiydi, bu yüzden bir etek ve bir çift ayakkabı aldım. Ayakkabılar bana çok yakışıyor. Ama eve gelip eteği denediğimde biraz küçük geldi. Bu yüzden onu daha büyük bir şeyle değiştirmek istiyorum.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Cả chân váy và giày đều tốt nhưng đắt.
2. Tôi muốn đổi sang chiếc chân váy size lớn hơn.
3. Giày đẹp nhưng hơi rộng.
4. Cuối tuần ở Myeongdong có ít người.
--------------------
사이즈: Size, kích cỡ
바꾸다: Đổi

V + 아/어 보니까: Thấy là, thấy rằng (Làm gì rồi phát hiện ra sự thật nào đó).
V + 아/어서: Làm việc này rồi sau đó làm việc kia.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. Skirts and shoes are both good, but expensive.
2. I want to change to a larger size skirt.
3. The shoes are nice but a bit big.
4. There are few people in Myeong-dong on weekends.
--------------------
<g>사이즈:</g> Size
<g>바꾸다:</g> To change

<g>V + 아/어 보니까:</g>Now that I have done… I know that...
<g>V + 아/어서:</g> Used to express doing one action then a second action.
explain.it:
Scegli quello che corrisponde al contenuto di questo testo.

1. Gonne e scarpe sono entrambe buone, ma costose.
2. Voglio passare ad una gonna di taglia più grande.
3. Le scarpe sono belle ma un po' grandi.
4. Ci sono poche persone a Myeong-dong nei fine settimana.
--------------------
<g>사이즈:</g>Misurare
<g>바꾸다:</g>Cambiare

<g>V + 아/어 보니까:</g>Ora che ho fatto... so che...
<g>V + 아/어서:</g>Utilizzato per esprimere il fare un'azione e poi una seconda azione.

#######

general.g_text: 예전 한국인들은 휴가에 국내 여행을 갔습니다. 여름 휴가철에 시원한 바다에 많이 갔고 겨울에는 ( ㉠ ). 그렇지만 요즘은 휴가 시기가 다양해지면서 휴가 관광지도 다양해졌습니다. 해외로 여행을 떠나는 사람도 많아졌습니다. 그런데 국내 여행 좋아하는 사람은 한국관광공사에서 제공하는 누리집 https://www.visitkorea.of.kr 방문하면 한국에서 가 볼 만한 여행지에 대한 정보를 얻을 수 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trước đây người Hàn Quốc đi du lịch trong nước vào các kỳ nghỉ. Vào kỳ nghỉ mùa hè họ thường đi tới những bãi biển mát mẻ còn vào mùa đông họ ( ㉠ ). Nhưng gần đây, thời gian nghỉ lễ khác nhau nên các điểm đến trong các kỳ nghỉ cũng đa dạng hơn. Số người đi du lịch nước ngoài đang tăng lên. Nhưng nếu những người yêu thích du lịch trong nước ghé thăm trang web https://www.visitkorea.of.kr của Tổng cục du lịch Hàn Quốc thì cũng có thể biết được thông tin về những địa điểm du lịch đáng đi ở Hàn Quốc.
g_text_translate.en: In the past, Koreans went on a domestic trip on vacation. They went to the cool sea a lot during the summer vacation season and went skiing in the winter. But these days, as vacation times have diversified, vacation destinations have also diversified. More and more people are traveling abroad. However, those who like domestic travel can get information on travel destinations worth visiting in Korea by visiting the website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr provided by the Korea Tourism Organization.
g_text_translate.it:
In passato, i coreani andavano in vacanza in viaggio d'affari. Andavano spesso al mare fresco durante le vacanze estive e sciavano in inverno. Ma oggigiorno, poiché i tempi delle vacanze si sono diversificati, anche le destinazioni delle vacanze si sono diversificate. Sempre più persone viaggiano all'estero. Tuttavia, coloro che amano i viaggi nazionali possono ottenere informazioni sulle destinazioni di viaggio che vale la pena visitare in Corea visitando il sito web https://www.visitkorea.of.kr fornito dalla Korea Tourism Organization.

#######

In the past, Koreans went on a domestic trip on vacation. They went to the cool sea a lot during the summer vacation season and went skiing in the winter. But these days, as vacation times have diversified, vacation destinations have also diversified. More and more people are traveling abroad. However, those who like domestic travel can get information on travel destinations worth visiting in Korea by visiting the website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr provided by the Korea Tourism Organization.
g_text_translate.fr:
Dans le passé, les Coréens partaient en vacances à l'intérieur du pays. Ils allaient beaucoup à la mer fraîche pendant les vacances d'été et faisaient du ski en hiver. Mais de nos jours, à mesure que les périodes de vacances se sont diversifiées, les destinations de vacances se sont également diversifiées. De plus en plus de personnes voyagent à l'étranger. Cependant, ceux qui aiment les voyages intérieurs peuvent obtenir des informations sur les destinations à visiter en Corée en visitant le site Web https://www.visitkorea.of.kr fourni par l'Office coréen du tourisme.

#######

But these days, as vacation times have diversified, vacation destinations have also diversified. More and more people are traveling abroad. However, those who like domestic travel can get information on travel destinations worth visiting in Korea by visiting the website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr provided by the Korea Tourism Organization.
g_text_translate.es:
En el pasado, los coreanos realizaban viajes nacionales de vacaciones. Iban mucho al fresco mar durante las vacaciones de verano y a esquiar en invierno. Pero hoy en día, a medida que los tiempos de vacaciones se han diversificado, los destinos vacacionales también se han diversificado. Cada vez más personas viajan al extranjero. Sin embargo, aquellos a quienes les gustan los viajes nacionales pueden obtener información sobre destinos de viaje que vale la pena visitar en Corea visitando el sitio web https://www.visitkorea.of.kr proporcionado por la Organización de Turismo de Corea.

g_text_translate.id:
Di masa lalu, orang Korea melakukan perjalanan domestik untuk berlibur. Mereka sering pergi ke laut yang sejuk selama liburan musim panas dan bermain ski di musim dingin. Namun belakangan ini, seiring dengan semakin beragamnya waktu liburan, destinasi liburan pun semakin beragam. Semakin banyak orang yang bepergian ke luar negeri. Namun bagi yang menyukai wisata domestik bisa mendapatkan informasi destinasi wisata yang layak dikunjungi di Korea dengan mengunjungi website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr yang disediakan oleh Korea Tourism Organization.

かつて、韓国人は休暇を利用して国内旅行に出かけました。夏休みには涼しい海によく行き、冬にはスキーに行きました。しかし最近では、休暇の時間の多様化に伴い、休暇の目的地も多様化しています。海外旅行に行く人が増えています。ただし、国内旅行が好きな人は、韓国観光公社が提供するウェブサイト https://www.visitkorea.of.kr を参照して、韓国で訪れる価値のある旅行先の情報を入手できます。

Wer jedoch Inlandsreisen mag, kann sich auf der Website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr der Korea Tourism Organization über lohnenswerte Reiseziele in Korea informieren.

g_text_translate.ru:
Раньше корейцы отправлялись в отпуск внутри страны. В сезон летних каникул они много ездили на прохладное море, а зимой катались на лыжах. Но в наши дни, когда время отпусков изменилось, изменились и места отдыха. Все больше людей выезжают за границу. Однако те, кто любит путешествовать внутри страны, могут получить информацию о туристических направлениях, которые стоит посетить в Корее, посетив веб-сайт https://www.visitkorea.of.kr, предоставленный Корейской туристической организацией.

g_text_translate.th:
ในอดีตคนเกาหลีไปเที่ยวพักผ่อนในประเทศ พวกเขาไปทะเลเย็นบ่อยมากในช่วงวันหยุดฤดูร้อนและเล่นสกีในฤดูหนาว แต่ทุกวันนี้ เนื่องจากเวลาวันหยุดมีความหลากหลาย สถานที่พักผ่อนก็มีความหลากหลายเช่นกัน ผู้คนเดินทางไปต่างประเทศมากขึ้นเรื่อยๆ อย่างไรก็ตาม ผู้ที่ชื่นชอบการเดินทางภายในประเทศสามารถรับข้อมูลเกี่ยวกับสถานที่ท่องเที่ยวที่ควรค่าแก่การเยี่ยมชมในเกาหลีได้โดยเข้าไปที่เว็บไซต์ https://www.visitkorea.of.kr จัดทำโดยองค์การการท่องเที่ยวเกาหลี

#######

In the past, Koreans went on a domestic trip on vacation. They went to the cool sea a lot during the summer vacation season and went skiing in the winter. But these days, as vacation times have diversified, vacation destinations have also diversified. More and more people are traveling abroad. However, those who like domestic travel can get information on travel destinations worth visiting in Korea by visiting the website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr provided by the Korea Tourism Organization.
g_text_translate.pt:
No passado, os coreanos faziam viagens domésticas de férias. Eles iam muito ao mar fresco durante as férias de verão e esquiavam no inverno. Mas hoje em dia, à medida que os tempos de férias se diversificaram, os destinos de férias também se diversificaram. Cada vez mais pessoas viajam para o exterior. No entanto, aqueles que gostam de viagens domésticas podem obter informações sobre destinos turísticos que valem a pena visitar na Coreia, visitando o site https://www.visitkorea.of.kr fornecido pela Organização de Turismo da Coreia.

#######

However, those who like domestic travel can get information on travel destinations worth visiting in Korea by visiting the website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr provided by the Korea Tourism Organization.
g_text_translate.hi:
अतीत में, कोरियाई लोग छुट्टियों पर घरेलू यात्रा पर जाते थे। गर्मी की छुट्टियों के मौसम में वे ठंडे समुद्र में खूब जाते थे और सर्दियों में स्कीइंग करते थे। लेकिन इन दिनों, जैसे-जैसे छुट्टियों के समय में विविधता आई है, छुट्टियों के गंतव्य भी विविध हो गए हैं। अधिक से अधिक लोग विदेश यात्रा कर रहे हैं। हालाँकि, जो लोग घरेलू यात्रा पसंद करते हैं वे कोरिया पर्यटन संगठन द्वारा प्रदान की गई वेबसाइट https://www.visitkorea.of.kr पर जाकर कोरिया में घूमने लायक यात्रा स्थलों के बारे में जानकारी प्राप्त कर सकते हैं।

#######

In the past, Koreans went on a domestic trip on vacation. They went to the cool sea a lot during the summer vacation season and went skiing in the winter. But these days, as vacation times have diversified, vacation destinations have also diversified. More and more people are traveling abroad. However, those who like domestic travel can get information on travel destinations worth visiting in Korea by visiting the website https://www.visitkorea.of.kr provided by the Korea Tourism Organization.
g_text_translate.tr:
Geçmişte Koreliler tatil için yurt içi geziye giderlerdi. Yaz tatilinde bol bol serin denize, kışın ise kayak yapmaya gittiler. Ancak günümüzde tatil süreleri çeşitlendikçe tatil yerleri de çeşitlendi. Giderek daha fazla insan yurtdışına seyahat ediyor. Ancak yurt içi seyahati sevenler Kore Turizm Örgütü'nün https://www.visitkorea.of.kr adresini ziyaret ederek Kore'de görülmeye değer gezi destinasyonları hakkında bilgi alabilirler.

content.q_text: 이 글의 내용과 같은 것을 고르십시오.
q_answer: 한국 사람은 해외 여행을 좋아하지 않습니다.
한국에서 가 여행할 만한 곳이 거의 없습니다.
겨울에 한국 사람은 스키를 안 타고 산에 갑니다.

1. Người Hàn Quốc không thích đi du lịch nước ngoài.
2. Hầu như không có nơi nào đáng đi ở Hàn Quốc.
3. Mùa đông người Hàn không đi trượt tuyết mà đi leo núi.
4. Thời gian đi du lịch và các điểm du lịch ở Hàn Quốc đã đa dạng hơn.
--------------------
여행을 떠나다: Đi du lịch
얻다: Nhận được, thu được

<g>N + 에 대한:</g>Über etwas.

general.g_text: 지금까지 저는 운동하는 것을 싫어하고 술도 자주 마셨습니다. 매일 밤 늦게까지 텔레비전을 봐서 아침에 일어나는 것이 많이 힘들었습니다. 그래서 항상 피곤하고 자주 감기도 걸렸습니다. 이제부터 저는 건강을 위해서 이런 나쁜 습관을 ( ㉠ ). 먼저 일찍 자고 일찍 일어날 겁니다. 가까운 곳은 걸어서 다니고 일주일에 두 번 이상 운동을 할 겁니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Tới tận bây giờ tôi vẫn ghét tập thể dục và uống nhiều rượu. Mỗi ngày tôi đều xem TV tới tận đêm khuya nên việc dậy sớm vào buổi sáng với tôi rất khó khăn. Vì vậy mà tôi luôn cảm thấy mệt mỏi và thường xuyên bị cảm. Từ bây giờ tôi ( ㉠ ) những thói quen xấu này vì sức khỏe của mình. Trước tiên tôi sẽ đi ngủ sớm và dậy sớm. Tôi sẽ đi bộ tới những nơi gần và tập thể dục trên hai lần một tuần.
g_text_translate.en: Until now, I hate exercising and I often drink alcohol. I watched TV until late every night, so it was very hard to get up in the morning. So I was always tired and caught a cold often. From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.it:
Fino ad ora odio fare attività fisica e bevo spesso alcolici. Guardavo la TV fino a tardi ogni sera, quindi era molto difficile alzarmi la mattina. Quindi ero sempre stanco e prendevo spesso il raffreddore. Da ora in poi, ho deciso di abbandonare queste cattive abitudini per il bene della mia salute. Per prima cosa andrò a letto presto e mi alzerò presto. Camminerò nelle vicinanze e mi allenerò più di due volte a settimana.

#######

Until now, I hate exercising and I often drink alcohol. I watched TV until late every night, so it was very hard to get up in the morning. So I was always tired and caught a cold often. From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.fr:
Jusqu'à présent, je déteste faire de l'exercice et je bois souvent de l'alcool. Je regardais la télévision jusque tard tous les soirs, donc c'était très difficile de me lever le matin. J’étais donc toujours fatigué et j’attrapais souvent un rhume. Désormais, j’ai décidé de rompre avec ces mauvaises habitudes pour le bien de ma santé. Premièrement, je vais me coucher tôt et me lever tôt. Je me promènerai à proximité et ferai de l'exercice plus de deux fois par semaine.

#######

Until now, I hate exercising and I often drink alcohol. I watched TV until late every night, so it was very hard to get up in the morning. So I was always tired and caught a cold often. From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.es:
Hasta ahora, odio hacer ejercicio y bebo alcohol a menudo. Todas las noches veía la televisión hasta tarde, por lo que era muy difícil levantarme por la mañana. Así que siempre estaba cansado y me resfriaba a menudo. A partir de ahora decidí romper con estos malos hábitos por el bien de mi salud. Primero, me acostaré temprano y me levantaré temprano. Caminaré cerca y haré ejercicio más de dos veces por semana.

#######

Until now, I hate exercising and I often drink alcohol. I watched TV until late every night, so it was very hard to get up in the morning. So I was always tired and caught a cold often. From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.id:
Sampai saat ini saya benci berolahraga dan sering minum minuman beralkohol. Saya menonton TV sampai larut malam, jadi sangat sulit untuk bangun di pagi hari. Jadi saya selalu lelah dan sering masuk angin. Mulai sekarang, saya memutuskan untuk menghentikan kebiasaan buruk tersebut demi kesehatan saya. Pertama, saya akan tidur lebih awal dan bangun lebih awal. Saya akan berjalan-jalan di sekitar dan berolahraga lebih dari dua kali seminggu.

#######

Until now, I hate exercising and I often drink alcohol. I watched TV until late every night, so it was very hard to get up in the morning. So I was always tired and caught a cold often. From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.ja:
今まで運動が嫌いで、お酒もよく飲んでいました。毎晩遅くまでテレビを見ていたので、朝起きるのがとても大変でした。そのため、いつも疲れていてよく風邪を引いていました。これからは、健康のためにこれらの悪い習慣をやめることにしました。まず、早く寝て早く起きます。週に2回以上は近くを散歩したり、運動したりするつもりです。

#######

Until now, I hate exercising and I often drink alcohol. I watched TV until late every night, so it was very hard to get up in the morning. So I was always tired and caught a cold often. From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.de:
Bisher hasse ich Sport und trinke oft Alkohol. Da ich jeden Abend bis spät in die Nacht fernsah, fiel es mir sehr schwer, morgens aufzustehen. Deshalb war ich immer müde und bekam oft eine Erkältung. Von nun an habe ich beschlossen, diese schlechten Gewohnheiten im Interesse meiner Gesundheit aufzugeben. Zuerst gehe ich früh zu Bett und stehe früh auf. Ich werde mehr als zweimal pro Woche in der Nähe herumlaufen und Sport treiben.

#######

From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
到现在为止，我讨厌运动，而且经常喝酒。我每天晚上都看电视到很晚，所以早上很难起床。所以我总是很累，经常感冒。从现在开始，为了我的健康，我决定改掉这些坏习惯。首先，我会早睡早起。我会在附近散步，每周锻炼两次以上。

#######

From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.

#######

From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.
g_text_translate.ru:
До сих пор я ненавижу заниматься спортом и часто употребляю алкоголь. Каждый вечер я смотрел телевизор до позднего вечера, поэтому мне было очень трудно вставать утром. Поэтому я всегда был уставшим и часто простужался. С этого момента я решил отказаться от этих вредных привычек ради своего здоровья. Во-первых, я рано ложусь спать и рано встаю. Я буду гулять поблизости и заниматься спортом чаще двух раз в неделю.

#######

g_text_translate.th:
จนถึงตอนนี้ฉันเกลียดการออกกำลังกายและมักจะดื่มแอลกอฮอล์ ฉันดูทีวีจนดึกทุกคืน จึงเป็นเรื่องยากมากที่จะตื่นนอนตอนเช้า ฉันก็เลยเหนื่อยและเป็นหวัดบ่อยๆ จากนี้ไป ฉันตัดสินใจที่จะเลิกนิสัยที่ไม่ดีเหล่านี้เพื่อสุขภาพของฉัน ก่อนอื่นฉันจะเข้านอนเร็วและตื่นแต่เช้า ฉันจะเดินไปรอบๆ และออกกำลังกายมากกว่าสองครั้งต่อสัปดาห์

#######

From now on, I decided to break these bad habits for the sake of my health. First, I will go to bed early and get up early. I will walk around nearby and exercise more than twice a week.

Então eu estava sempre cansado e pegava resfriado com frequência. A partir de agora, decidi abandonar esses maus hábitos pelo bem da minha saúde. Primeiro, vou dormir cedo e acordar cedo. Vou passear nas proximidades e fazer exercícios mais de duas vezes por semana.

Bu yüzden her zaman yorgundum ve sık sık üşütüyordum. Artık sağlığım adına bu kötü alışkanlıklarımdan vazgeçmeye karar verdim. Öncelikle erken yatıp erken kalkacağım. Yakınlarda dolaşacağım ve haftada iki defadan fazla egzersiz yapacağım.

<g>걸어서 다니다:</g>Andar

<g>V/A + 아/어서:</g>Porque.

general.g_text: 몸이 아프면 병원에 가야 하지만 조금 아플 때는 혼자서 치료해 보는 것도 좋습니다. 먼저 ( ㉠ ) 밀가루 음식이나 차가운 음식을 먹으면 안 됩니다. 그 대신에 하루 세 번 조금씩 먹는 것이 좋습니다. 또 목이 아플 때는 많이 말하지 않고 따뜻한 물을 마시는 것도 좋습니다. 감기에 걸렸을 때는 푹 자고 비타민 C가 많은 오렌지 주스를 마시는 것도 좋습니다. 하지만 낫지 않으면 의사의 도움을 받는 것이 중요합니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Nếu cơ thể mệt mỏi bạn phải đi tới bệnh viện nhưng nếu chỉ hơi mệt thôi thì bạn nên thử tự mình điều trị. Trước tiên, bạn không nên ăn đồ ăn làm từ bột mì hay đồ ăn lạnh ( ㉠ ). Thay vào đó bạn nên ăn từng chút một, một ngày ăn ba lần. Bên cạnh đó nếu bị đau họng bạn nên tránh nói nhiều và uống nước ấm. Khi bị cảm bạn nên ngủ đủ giấc và uống nước ép cam có nhiều vitamin C. Nhưng nếu vẫn không đỡ hơn thì điều quan trọng là bạn nên nhận sự trợ giúp từ bác sĩ.
g_text_translate.en: If you are sick, you should go to the hospital, but if you are slightly ill, it is good to treat yourself. First of all, you should not eat flour-based food or cold food when having indigestion. Instead, it is recommended to eat small amounts three times a day. Also, when you have a sore throat, it is good to drink warm water without talking much. When you have a cold, get a good night's sleep and drink orange juice, which is high in vitamin C. But if you don't get better, it's important to get help from a doctor.
g_text_translate.it:
Se sei malato dovresti andare in ospedale, ma se sei leggermente malato è bene curarti. Prima di tutto, non dovresti mangiare cibi a base di farina o cibi freddi quando soffri di indigestione. Si consiglia invece di mangiarne piccole quantità tre volte al giorno. Inoltre, quando si ha mal di gola, è bene bere acqua tiepida senza parlare molto. Quando hai il raffreddore, dormi bene la notte e bevi succo d'arancia, che è ricco di vitamina C. Ma se non guarisci, è importante chiedere aiuto a un medico.

#######

If you are sick, you should go to the hospital, but if you are slightly ill, it is good to treat yourself. First of all, you should not eat flour-based food or cold food when having indigestion. Instead, it is recommended to eat small amounts three times a day. Also, when you have a sore throat, it is good to drink warm water without talking much. When you have a cold, get a good night's sleep and drink orange juice, which is high in vitamin C. But if you don't get better, it's important to get help from a doctor.
g_text_translate.fr:
Si vous êtes malade, vous devriez aller à l'hôpital, mais si vous êtes légèrement malade, il est bon de vous soigner. Tout d’abord, vous ne devez pas manger d’aliments à base de farine ou d’aliments froids en cas d’indigestion. Il est plutôt recommandé d’en manger de petites quantités trois fois par jour. Aussi, quand on a mal à la gorge, il est bon de boire de l’eau tiède sans trop parler. Lorsque vous avez un rhume, dormez bien et buvez du jus d'orange, riche en vitamine C. Mais si votre état ne s'améliore pas, il est important de demander l'aide d'un médecin.

#######

If you are sick, you should go to the hospital, but if you are slightly ill, it is good to treat yourself. First of all, you should not eat flour-based food or cold food when having indigestion. Instead, it is recommended to eat small amounts three times a day. Also, when you have a sore throat, it is good to drink warm water without talking much. When you have a cold, get a good night's sleep and drink orange juice, which is high in vitamin C. But if you don't get better, it's important to get help from a doctor.
g_text_translate.es:
Si está enfermo, debe ir al hospital, pero si está levemente enfermo, es bueno que se trate usted mismo. En primer lugar, no se deben consumir alimentos a base de harina ni alimentos fríos cuando se tiene indigestión. En cambio, se recomienda comer pequeñas cantidades tres veces al día. Además, cuando se tiene dolor de garganta, es bueno beber agua tibia sin hablar mucho. Cuando esté resfriado, duerma bien por la noche y beba jugo de naranja, que tiene un alto contenido de vitamina C. Pero si no mejora, es importante buscar ayuda de un médico.

#######

If you are sick, you should go to the hospital, but if you are slightly ill, it is good to treat yourself. First of all, you should not eat flour-based food or cold food when having indigestion. Instead, it is recommended to eat small amounts three times a day. Also, when you have a sore throat, it is good to drink warm water without talking much. When you have a cold, get a good night's sleep and drink orange juice, which is high in vitamin C. But if you don't get better, it's important to get help from a doctor.
g_text_translate.id:
Kalau sakit sebaiknya ke rumah sakit, tapi kalau sakit ringan ada baiknya diobati sendiri. Pertama-tama, Anda sebaiknya tidak mengonsumsi makanan berbahan dasar tepung atau makanan dingin saat mengalami gangguan pencernaan. Sebaliknya, dianjurkan makan dalam jumlah kecil tiga kali sehari. Selain itu, ketika sedang sakit tenggorokan, ada baiknya minum air hangat tanpa banyak bicara. Saat Anda sedang pilek, tidurlah yang nyenyak dan minumlah jus jeruk yang kaya akan vitamin C. Namun jika Anda tidak kunjung membaik, penting untuk mendapatkan pertolongan dari dokter.

#######

If you are sick, you should go to the hospital, but if you are slightly ill, it is good to treat yourself. First of all, you should not eat flour-based food or cold food when having indigestion. When you have a cold, get a good night's sleep and drink orange juice, which is high in vitamin C. But if you don't get better, it's important to get help from a doctor.
g_text_translate.ja:
病気なら病院に行くべきですが、ちょっとした病気なら自分で治療するのが良いでしょう。まず、消化不良のときは小麦粉ベースの食べ物や冷たい食べ物を食べてはいけません。代わりに、少量を1日3回食べることをお勧めします。また、喉が痛いときはあまり話さずに白湯を飲むと良いでしょう。風邪をひいているときは、十分な睡眠をとり、ビタミン C が豊富なオレンジ ジュースを飲みましょう。ただし、症状が改善しない場合は、医師の助けを得ることが重要です。

#######

When you have a cold, get a good night's sleep and drink orange juice, which is high in vitamin C. But if you don't get better, it's important to get help from a doctor.
g_text_translate.de:
Wenn Sie krank sind, sollten Sie ins Krankenhaus gehen, aber wenn Sie leicht krank sind, ist es gut, sich selbst zu behandeln. Erstens sollten Sie bei Verdauungsbeschwerden keine mehlhaltigen oder kalten Speisen zu sich nehmen. Stattdessen wird empfohlen, dreimal täglich kleine Mengen zu sich zu nehmen. Auch bei Halsschmerzen ist es gut, warmes Wasser zu trinken, ohne viel zu reden. Wenn Sie eine Erkältung haben, schlafen Sie gut und trinken Sie Orangensaft, der reich an Vitamin C ist. Wenn es jedoch nicht besser wird, ist es wichtig, einen Arzt aufzusuchen.

#######

如果你生病了，你应该去医院，但如果你病得很轻，最好自己治疗一下。首先，消化不良时不宜吃面类食物或生冷食物。相反，建议一日三餐少量食用。另外，喉咙痛时，最好不要多说话，喝点温水。感冒时，睡个好觉并喝富含维生素 C 的橙汁。但如果没有好转，寻求医生的帮助很重要。

g_text_translate.ru:

Вместо этого рекомендуется есть небольшими порциями три раза в день. Также, когда у вас болит горло, полезно пить теплую воду, не разговаривая много. Bunun yerine günde üç defa küçük miktarlarda yemek tavsiye edilir. Ayrıca boğaz ağrınız olduğunda fazla konuşmadan ılık su içmek iyi gelir. q_answer: 조금 아프면 혼자서 바로 입원해야 합니다.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Nếu đau một chút thôi thì cũng phải tự mình nhập viện ngay.
2. Nếu ốm nặng thì nên điều trị ở nhà.
3. Khi tiêu hóa không tốt thì không nên ăn bánh mì.
4. Khi bị cảm nên ăn đồ ăn lạnh.
--------------------
밀가루 음식: Thực phẩm có bột mì
입원하다: Nhập viện

V + 는 것이/게 좋다: Làm gì thì tốt, nên làm gì.
V/A + (으)ㄹ 때: Khi, lúc.

Khi tiêu hóa không tốt không nên ăn thực phẩm có chứa bột mì nên đáp án đúng là 3.
explain.en:
Choose the one that matches the content in this text.

1. If you are slightly ill, you should be hospitalized right away by yourself.
2. If you are very ill, it is better to treat yourself at home.
3. It is better not to eat bread when digestion is not working well.
4. When you have a cold, it is better to eat cold food.
--------------------
<g>밀가루 음식:</g> Flour-based food
<g>입원하다:</g> To be hospitalized

<g>V + 는 것이/게 좋다:</g> It would be better to <g>V</g>.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g> When.

When having indigestion, you should not eat flour-based food, so the correct answer is 3.

3. È meglio non mangiare il pane quando la digestione non funziona bene.
4. Quando hai il raffreddore, è meglio mangiare cibi freddi.
--------------------
<g>밀가루 음식:</g>Alimenti a base di farina
<g>입원하다:</g>Essere ricoverato in ospedale

<g>V + 는 것이/게 좋다:</g>Sarebbe meglio farlo<g>V</g>.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g>Quando.

In caso di indigestione non dovresti mangiare cibi a base di farina, quindi la risposta corretta è 3.

3. Хлеб лучше не есть, когда пищеварение плохо работает.
4. При простуде лучше есть холодную пищу.
--------------------
<g>밀가루 음식:</g>Еда на основе муки
<g>입원하다:</g>Быть госпитализированным

<g>V + 는 것이/게 좋다:</g>Было бы лучше<g>V</g>.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g>Когда.

При несварении желудка нельзя употреблять мучную пищу, поэтому правильный ответ – 3.

4. When you have a cold, it is better to eat cold food.

<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g> When.

explain.hi:
वह चुनें जो इस पाठ की सामग्री से मेल खाता हो।

1. अगर आप थोड़े भी बीमार हैं तो आपको तुरंत अस्पताल में भर्ती होना चाहिए।

Bu metindeki içeriğe uygun olanı seçin.

1. Eğer hafif hastaysanız hemen kendi başınıza hastaneye kaldırılmalısınız.
2. Eğer çok hastaysanız, kendinizi evde tedavi etmeniz daha iyidir.
3. Sindirim iyi çalışmadığında ekmek yememek daha iyidir.
4. Soğuk algınlığınız olduğunda soğuk yemek yemek daha iyidir.
--------------------

<g>입원하다:</g>Hastaneye kaldırılmak

<g>V + 는 것이/게 좋다:</g>Daha iyi olurdu<g>V</g>.
<g>V/A + (으)ㄹ 때:</g>Ne zaman.

general.g_text: 지난주 토요일에 회사 동료의 결혼식에 갔다 왔습니다. 결혼식이 끝나고 친구와 약속이 있어서 명동에 갔습니다. 길이 많이 막혀서 택시를 타고 가장 가까운 지하철역으로 갔습니다. 지하철을 탄 후에 노선도를 봤는데 두 번이나 갈아타야 합니다. 지하철을 타기 전에는 미리 노선도를 ( ㉠ ) 한 번에 가는 지하철을 탈 수 있었습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Thứ bảy tuần trước tôi đã đi đám cưới của đồng nghiệp cùng công ty. Sau khi đám cưới kết thúc tôi có hẹn với bạn nên đã đi đến Myeongdong. Vì tắc đường nên tôi đã bắt taxi và đi đến ga tàu điện ngầm gần nhất. Sau khi lên tàu điện ngầm rồi tôi mới xem bản đồ và thấy mình phải đổi tàu hai lần. Trước khi lên tàu điện ngầm ( ㉠ ) bản đồ tàu điện ngầm trước thì tôi đã có thể đi tuyến tàu đi thẳng một lần.
g_text_translate.en: Last Saturday, I went to a colleague's wedding. After the wedding, I went to Myeong-dong because I had an appointment with a friend. There was a lot of traffic jam, so I took a taxi to the nearest subway station. I looked at the route map after taking the subway, and I have to transfer twice. Before taking the subway, if I checked the route map in advance, I could get on the train that go straight to where I need to go.
g_text_translate.it:
Sabato scorso sono stata al matrimonio di un collega. Dopo il matrimonio sono andato a Myeong-dong perché avevo un appuntamento con un amico. C'era molto traffico, quindi ho preso un taxi fino alla stazione della metropolitana più vicina. Ho guardato la mappa del percorso dopo aver preso la metropolitana e devo cambiare due volte. Prima di prendere la metropolitana, se controllassi in anticipo la mappa del percorso, potrei salire sul treno che va direttamente dove devo andare.

#######

Last Saturday, I went to a colleague's wedding. After the wedding, I went to Myeong-dong because I had an appointment with a friend. There was a lot of traffic jam, so I took a taxi to the nearest subway station. I looked at the route map after taking the subway, and I have to transfer twice. Before taking the subway, if I checked the route map in advance, I could get on the train that go straight to where I need to go.
g_text_translate.fr:
Samedi dernier, je suis allé au mariage d'un collègue. Après le mariage, je suis allé à Myeong-dong car j'avais rendez-vous avec un ami. Il y avait beaucoup d'embouteillages, alors j'ai pris un taxi jusqu'à la station de métro la plus proche. J'ai regardé le plan d'itinéraire après avoir pris le métro et je dois changer deux fois. Avant de prendre le métro, si je vérifiais le plan du trajet à l'avance, je pourrais monter dans le train qui me mènerait directement là où je dois aller.

Miré el mapa de ruta después de tomar el metro y tengo que hacer transbordo dos veces. Antes de tomar el metro, si consultara el mapa de ruta con anticipación, podría tomar el tren que me llevaría directamente a donde necesito ir.

explain.vi:
Chọn đáp án phù hợp với nội dung đoạn văn.

1. Vì muốn mua quần áo nên đã đến Myeongdong.
2. Đã phải đổi tàu điện ngầm hai lần.
3. Đã đi xe bus tới lễ kết hôn.
4. Đi bộ tới ga tàu điện ngầm.
--------------------
갈아타다: Chuyển tàu, chuyển tuyến, chuyển xe

V + 아/어야 하다: Phải, nên làm gì.
N + (이)나: Những, tận (Thể hiện sự thật nhiều hơn so với suy nghĩ của người nói).

2. I had to change the subway twice.
3. I went to the wedding by bus.
4. I walked to the subway station.
--------------------
<g>갈아타다:</g> To transfer, to change

<g>V + 아/어야 하다:</g> Must, have to.

general.g_text: 옛날에는 한국과 베트남이 중국 문화의 영향을 ( ㉠ ). 그래서 두 나라의 언어는 약 60% 정도가 한자어입니다. 한국에서 학생들은 한자를 초, 중, 고등학교에서 배웁니다. 그러나 베트남에서 한자가 널리 사용되지 않았지만 베트남어 발음이 한자의 영향도 받았습니다. 따라서 한국어와 베트남어 발음이 유사한 단어가 많습니다. 예를 들어 발음이 비슷한 단어는 '통계, 주의, 행복' 같은 것이 있습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Trước đây Hàn Quốc và Việt Nam đều ( ㉠ ) của văn hóa Trung Quốc. Vì vậy khoảng 60% ngôn ngữ của hai nước là chữ Hán. Ở Hàn Quốc học sinh vẫn học chữ Hán ở trường tiểu học, trung học cơ sở và trung học phổ thông. Nhưng ở Việt Nam chữ Hán không còn được sử dụng rộng rãi nhưng phát âm tiếng Việt cũng bị ảnh hưởng bởi chữ Hán. Vì vậy có nhiều từ tiếng Hàn và tiếng Việt có phát âm giống nhau. Ví dụ có những từ phát âm giống nhau như 'Thống kê, chú ý, hạnh phúc'.
g_text_translate.en: In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.it:
In passato, la Corea e il Vietnam furono influenzati dalla cultura cinese. Quindi, circa il 60% delle lingue in entrambi i paesi sono caratteri cinesi. In Corea, gli studenti imparano i caratteri cinesi alle scuole elementari, medie e superiori. Tuttavia, sebbene i caratteri cinesi non fossero ampiamente utilizzati in Vietnam, anche la pronuncia vietnamita fu influenzata dai caratteri cinesi. Pertanto, ci sono molte parole con pronuncia simile in coreano e vietnamita. Ad esempio, le parole che suonano simili includono "statistiche, attenzione, felicità".

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.fr:
Dans le passé, la Corée et le Vietnam ont été influencés par la culture chinoise. Ainsi, environ 60 % des langues des deux pays sont des caractères chinois. En Corée, les élèves apprennent les caractères chinois à l'école primaire, intermédiaire et secondaire. Cependant, même si les caractères chinois n’étaient pas largement utilisés au Vietnam, la prononciation vietnamienne était également influencée par les caractères chinois. Par conséquent, il existe de nombreux mots avec une prononciation similaire en coréen et en vietnamien. Par exemple, les mots qui se ressemblent incluent « statistiques, attention, bonheur ».

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.es:
En el pasado, Corea y Vietnam se vieron afectados por la cultura china. Así, alrededor del 60% de los idiomas de ambos países son caracteres chinos. En Corea, los estudiantes aprenden caracteres chinos en la escuela primaria, secundaria y preparatoria. Sin embargo, aunque los caracteres chinos no se utilizaron mucho en Vietnam, la pronunciación vietnamita también estuvo influenciada por los caracteres chinos. Por lo tanto, hay muchas palabras con pronunciación similar en coreano y vietnamita. Por ejemplo, palabras que suenan similares incluyen "estadísticas, atención, felicidad".

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.id:
Dulu, Korea dan Vietnam terpengaruh oleh budaya Tiongkok. Jadi, sekitar 60% bahasa di kedua negara adalah karakter Cina. Di Korea, siswa mempelajari karakter Cina di sekolah dasar, menengah, dan menengah atas. Namun, meskipun aksara Tionghoa tidak banyak digunakan di Vietnam, pengucapan bahasa Vietnam juga dipengaruhi oleh aksara Tionghoa. Oleh karena itu, ada banyak kata dengan pengucapan serupa dalam bahasa Korea dan Vietnam. Misalnya, kata-kata yang terdengar mirip antara lain 'statistik, perhatian, kebahagiaan'.

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.ja:
かつて韓国やベトナムは中国文化の影響を受けていました。つまり、両国の言語の約 60% は漢字です。韓国では小学校、中学校、高校で漢字を学びます。ただし、ベトナムでは漢字は広く使用されていませんでしたが、ベトナム語の発音も漢字の影響を受けました。そのため、韓国語とベトナム語には発音が似ている単語がたくさんあります。たとえば、似た響きの単語には、「統計、注目、幸福」などがあります。

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.de:
In der Vergangenheit waren Korea und Vietnam von der chinesischen Kultur geprägt. So sind etwa 60 % der Sprachen in beiden Ländern chinesische Schriftzeichen. In Korea lernen Schüler in der Grund-, Mittel- und Oberstufe chinesische Schriftzeichen. Obwohl chinesische Schriftzeichen in Vietnam nicht weit verbreitet waren, wurde die vietnamesische Aussprache jedoch auch von chinesischen Schriftzeichen beeinflusst. Daher gibt es auf Koreanisch und Vietnamesisch viele Wörter mit ähnlicher Aussprache. Zu den ähnlich klingenden Wörtern gehören beispielsweise „Statistik, Aufmerksamkeit, Glück“.

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.zh-CN:
过去，韩国和越南都受到中国文化的影响。因此，两国大约60%的语言都是汉字。在韩国，学生在小学、初中和高中学习汉字。不过，虽然汉字在越南没有广泛使用，但越南语的发音也受到了汉字的影响。因此，韩语和越南语中有很多发音相似的单词。例如，听起来相似的词包括“统计、注意力、幸福”。

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. However, although Chinese characters were not widely used in Vietnam, Vietnamese pronunciation was also influenced by Chinese characters. Therefore, there are many words with similar pronunciation in Korean and Vietnamese. For example, words that sound similar include 'statistics, attention, happiness'.
g_text_translate.zh-TW:
過去，韓國和越南都受到中國文化的影響。因此，兩國大約60%的語言都是漢字。在韓國，學生在小學、初中和高中學習漢字。不過，雖然漢字在越南沒有廣泛使用，但越南語的發音也受到了漢字的影響。因此，韓語和越南語中有很多發音相似的單詞。例如，聽起來相似的詞包括“統計、注意力、幸福”。

#######

In the past, Korea and Vietnam were affected by Chinese culture. So, about 60% of the languages in both countries are Chinese characters. In Korea, students learn Chinese characters in elementary, middle, and high school. g_text_translate.ru:
В прошлом Корея и Вьетнам находились под влиянием китайской культуры. Так, около 60% языков в обеих странах — китайские иероглифы. В Корее учащиеся изучают китайские иероглифы в начальной, средней и старшей школе. Однако, хотя китайские иероглифы не получили широкого распространения во Вьетнаме, на вьетнамское произношение также повлияли китайские иероглифы. Поэтому в корейском и вьетнамском языках много слов со схожим произношением. Например, слова, которые звучат одинаково, включают «статистика, внимание, счастье».

g_text_translate.th:
ในอดีตเกาหลีและเวียดนามได้รับผลกระทบจากวัฒนธรรมจีน ดังนั้นประมาณ 60% ของภาษาในทั้งสองประเทศจึงเป็นตัวอักษรจีน ในประเทศเกาหลี นักเรียนจะเรียนอักษรจีนตั้งแต่ระดับประถมศึกษา มัธยมต้น และมัธยมปลาย อย่างไรก็ตาม แม้ว่าตัวอักษรจีนจะไม่ได้ใช้กันอย่างแพร่หลายในเวียดนาม แต่การออกเสียงภาษาเวียดนามก็ได้รับอิทธิพลจากตัวอักษรจีนเช่นกัน ดังนั้นจึงมีคำหลายคำที่มีการออกเสียงคล้ายกันในภาษาเกาหลีและเวียดนาม ตัวอย่างเช่น คำที่ฟังดูคล้ายกัน ได้แก่ 'สถิติ ความสนใจ ความสุข'

#######

No passado, a Coreia e o Vietname foram afectados pela cultura chinesa. Assim, cerca de 60% dos idiomas em ambos os países são caracteres chineses. Na Coreia, os alunos aprendem caracteres chineses no ensino fundamental, médio e médio. No entanto, embora os caracteres chineses não fossem amplamente utilizados no Vietname, a pronúncia vietnamita também foi influenciada pelos caracteres chineses. Portanto, existem muitas palavras com pronúncia semelhante em coreano e vietnamita. Por exemplo, palavras que soam semelhantes incluem “estatísticas, atenção, felicidade”.

g_text_translate.hi:
अतीत में, कोरिया और वियतनाम चीनी संस्कृति से प्रभावित थे। तो, दोनों देशों में लगभग 60% भाषाएँ चीनी अक्षर हैं। कोरिया में, छात्र प्राथमिक, मध्य और उच्च विद्यालय में चीनी अक्षर सीखते हैं। हालाँकि, हालाँकि वियतनाम में चीनी अक्षरों का व्यापक रूप से उपयोग नहीं किया गया था, वियतनामी उच्चारण भी चीनी अक्षरों से प्रभावित था। इसलिए, कोरियाई और वियतनामी में समान उच्चारण वाले कई शब्द हैं। उदाहरण के लिए, जो शब्द समान लगते हैं उनमें 'सांख्यिकी, ध्यान, खुशी' शामिल हैं।

#######

g_text_translate.tr:
Geçmişte Kore ve Vietnam Çin kültüründen etkilenmişti. Yani her iki ülkedeki dillerin yaklaşık %60'ı Çince karakterlerdir. Kore'de öğrenciler ilkokul, ortaokul ve lisede Çince karakterleri öğreniyorlar. Ancak Vietnam'da Çince karakterler yaygın olarak kullanılmasa da Vietnamca telaffuz da Çince karakterlerden etkilenmiştir. Bu nedenle Korece ve Vietnamca'da benzer telaffuza sahip birçok kelime var. Örneğin kulağa benzer gelen kelimeler arasında 'istatistik, dikkat, mutluluk' yer alıyor.

general.g_text: 베트남의 교육과정은 초등 5년, 중등 4년, 고등 3년입니다. 교육과정에 따라 교복이 다릅니다. 베트남에서 초, 중, 고등학생은 반드시 교복을 ( ㉠ ). 초등학생은 바지에 흰 와이셔츠, 빨간 머플러를 두릅니다. 중고등 학생은 바지와 흰 셔츠 차림으로 머플러는 하지 않습니다. 여자 고등학생은 흰색 아오자이를 교복으로 입습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Chương trình học ở Việt Nam gồm 5 năm tiểu học, 4 năm trung học cơ sở và 3 năm trung học phổ thông. Theo mỗi cấp học mà đồng phục cũng khác nhau. Ở Việt Nam học sinh tiểu học, trung học cơ sở và trung học phổ thông nhất định ( ㉠ ) đồng phục. Học sinh tiểu học mặc quần tây và áo sơ mi trắng, đeo khăn quàng đỏ. Học sinh trung học cơ sở và trung học phổ thông mặc quần tây và áo sơ mi trắng, không đeo khăn quàng. Nữ sinh cấp ba mặc đồng phục là áo dài trắng.
g_text_translate.en: The Vietnamese curriculum consists of 5 years of elementary school, 4 years of middle school, and 3 years of high school. School uniforms vary depending on the curriculum. In Vietnam, elementary, middle and high school students must wear school uniforms. Elementary school students wear white shirts and red scarves on their pants. Middle and high school students wear pants and white shirts, no scarves. Female high school students wear white Ao Dai as their school uniforms.
g_text_translate.it:
Il curriculum vietnamita è composto da 5 anni di scuola elementare, 4 anni di scuola media e 3 anni di scuola superiore. Le uniformi scolastiche variano a seconda del curriculum. In Vietnam, gli studenti delle scuole elementari, medie e superiori devono indossare le uniformi scolastiche. Gli studenti delle scuole elementari indossano camicie bianche e sciarpe rosse sui pantaloni. Gli studenti delle scuole medie e superiori indossano pantaloni e camicie bianche, senza sciarpe. Le studentesse delle scuole superiori indossano Ao Dai bianche come uniformi scolastiche.

#######

The Vietnamese curriculum consists of 5 years of elementary school, 4 years of middle school, and 3 years of high school. School uniforms vary depending on the curriculum. In Vietnam, elementary, middle and high school students must wear school uniforms. Elementary school students wear white shirts and red scarves on their pants. Middle and high school students wear pants and white shirts, no scarves. Female high school students wear white Ao Dai as their school uniforms.
g_text_translate.fr:
Le programme vietnamien comprend 5 années d'école primaire, 4 années de collège et 3 années de lycée. Les uniformes scolaires varient en fonction du programme. Au Vietnam, les élèves des écoles primaires, collégiennes et lycéennes doivent porter des uniformes scolaires. Les élèves du primaire portent des chemises blanches et des foulards rouges sur leurs pantalons. Les collégiens et lycéens portent des pantalons et des chemises blanches, pas de foulard. Les lycéennes portent du Ao Dai blanc comme uniforme scolaire.

#######

The Vietnamese curriculum consists of 5 years of elementary school, 4 years of middle school, and 3 years of high school. School uniforms vary depending on the curriculum. In Vietnam, elementary, middle and high school students must wear school uniforms. Elementary school students wear white shirts and red scarves on their pants. Middle and high school students wear pants and white shirts, no scarves. Female high school students wear white Ao Dai as their school uniforms.
g_text_translate.es:
El plan de estudios vietnamita consta de 5 años de escuela primaria, 4 años de escuela media y 3 años de escuela secundaria. Los uniformes escolares varían según el plan de estudios. En Vietnam, los estudiantes de primaria, secundaria y preparatoria deben usar uniformes escolares. Los estudiantes de primaria visten camisas blancas y pañuelos rojos en los pantalones. Los estudiantes de secundaria y preparatoria visten pantalones y camisas blancas, sin bufandas. Las estudiantes de secundaria visten Ao Dai blanco como uniforme escolar.

#######

The Vietnamese curriculum consists of 5 years of elementary school, 4 years of middle school, and 3 years of high school. School uniforms vary depending on the curriculum. In Vietnam, elementary, middle and high school students must wear school uniforms. Elementary school students wear white shirts and red scarves on their pants. Middle and high school students wear pants and white shirts, no scarves. Female high school students wear white Ao Dai as their school uniforms.
g_text_translate.id:
Kurikulum Vietnam terdiri dari 5 tahun sekolah dasar, 4 tahun sekolah menengah pertama, dan 3 tahun sekolah menengah atas. Seragam sekolah bervariasi tergantung pada kurikulum. Di Vietnam, siswa SD, SMP, dan SMA wajib mengenakan seragam sekolah. Siswa sekolah dasar mengenakan kemeja putih dan selendang merah di celananya. Siswa SMP dan SMA memakai celana dan kemeja putih, tidak ada selendang. Siswa sekolah menengah perempuan mengenakan Ao Dai putih sebagai seragam sekolah mereka.

#######

The Vietnamese curriculum consists of 5 years of elementary school, 4 years of middle school, and 3 years of high school. School uniforms vary depending on the curriculum. In Vietnam, elementary, middle and high school students must wear school uniforms. Elementary school students wear white shirts and red scarves on their pants. Middle and high school students wear pants and white shirts, no scarves. Female high school students wear white Ao Dai as their school uniforms.
g_text_translate.ja:
ベトナムのカリキュラムは小学校5年間、中学校4年間、高校3年間で構成されています。学校の制服はカリキュラムによって異なります。ベトナムでは小・中・高校生は制服を着用しなければなりません。小学生は白いシャツに赤いスカーフをズボンに巻きます。中高生はズボンと白シャツを着用し、スカーフは着用しません。女子高生は白いアオザイを制服として着ます。

#######

Middle and high school students wear pants and white shirts, no scarves. Female high school students wear white Ao Dai as their school uniforms.
g_text_translate.de:
Der vietnamesische Lehrplan besteht aus 5 Jahren Grundschule, 4 Jahren Mittelschule und 3 Jahren Oberschule. Schuluniformen variieren je nach Lehrplan. In Vietnam müssen Grund-, Mittel- und Oberstufenschüler Schuluniformen tragen. Grundschüler tragen weiße Hemden und rote Schals an den Hosen. Schüler der Mittel- und Oberstufe tragen Hosen und weiße Hemden, keine Schals. Weibliche Oberstufenschülerinnen tragen weiße Ao Dai als Schuluniformen.

g_text_translate.ru:
Вьетнамская учебная программа состоит из 5 лет начальной школы, 4 лет средней школы и 3 лет старшей школы. Школьная форма варьируется в зависимости от учебной программы. Во Вьетнаме учащиеся начальной, средней и старшей школы должны носить школьную форму. Учащиеся начальной школы носят белые рубашки и красные шарфы на штанах. Учащиеся средних и старших классов носят брюки и белые рубашки, без шарфов. Учащиеся старших классов носят белую школьную форму Аодай.

หลักสูตรภาษาเวียดนามประกอบด้วยโรงเรียนประถมศึกษา 5 ปี มัธยมศึกษาตอนต้น 4 ปี และมัธยมศึกษาตอนปลาย 3 ปี ชุดนักเรียนจะแตกต่างกันไปขึ้นอยู่กับหลักสูตร ในเวียดนาม นักเรียนประถม มัธยมต้น และมัธยมปลายต้องสวมชุดนักเรียน นักเรียนชั้นประถมศึกษาสวมเสื้อเชิ้ตสีขาวและผ้าพันคอสีแดงบนกางเกง นักเรียนมัธยมต้นและมัธยมปลายสวมกางเกงขายาวและเสื้อเชิ้ตสีขาว ไม่สวมผ้าพันคอ นักเรียนมัธยมปลายหญิงจะสวมชุดอ่าวได๋สีขาวเป็นชุดนักเรียน

No Vietnã, os alunos do ensino fundamental, médio e médio devem usar uniforme escolar. Os alunos do ensino fundamental usam camisas brancas e lenços vermelhos nas calças. g_text_translate.hi:
वियतनामी पाठ्यक्रम में 5 साल का प्राथमिक विद्यालय, 4 साल का मिडिल स्कूल और 3 साल का हाई स्कूल शामिल है। पाठ्यक्रम के आधार पर स्कूल की वर्दी अलग-अलग होती है। वियतनाम में, प्राथमिक, मध्य और उच्च विद्यालय के छात्रों को स्कूल की वर्दी पहननी चाहिए। प्राथमिक विद्यालय के छात्र अपनी पैंट पर सफेद शर्ट और लाल स्कार्फ पहनते हैं। मिडिल और हाई स्कूल के छात्र पैंट और सफेद शर्ट पहनते हैं, स्कार्फ नहीं। हाई स्कूल की महिला छात्राएं अपनी स्कूल वर्दी के रूप में सफेद एओ दाई पहनती हैं।

g_text_translate.tr:
Vietnam müfredatı 5 yıllık ilkokul, 4 yıllık ortaokul ve 3 yıllık liseden oluşmaktadır. Okul kıyafetleri müfredata göre değişmektedir. Vietnam'da ilkokul, ortaokul ve lise öğrencilerinin okul üniforması giymesi zorunludur. İlkokul öğrencileri beyaz gömlek ve pantolonlarına kırmızı eşarp giyiyor. Ortaokul ve lise öğrencileri pantolon ve beyaz gömlek giyiyor, eşarp kullanmıyor. Kız lise öğrencileri okul üniforması olarak beyaz Ao Dai giyerler.

general.g_text: 제 취미는 사진을 찍는 것입니다. 요즘은 부모님과 친구들에게 보내고 싶기 때문에 고향에 있을 때보다 더 많이 사진을 찍습니다. 사진은 제가 말로 이야기할 수 없는 것도 잘 이야기해 줍니다. 요즘은 바쁠 때도 매일 두세 장의 사진을 찍습니다. 그리고 가족이나 친구들에게 보냅니다. 사진을 보내고 사진에 대해서 이야기하는 것은 정말 즐겁습니다. 한국에 있는 동안 ( ㉠ ) 사진을 많이 찍고 싶습니다.

g_text_translate.vi: Sở thích của tôi là chụp ảnh. Dạo này tôi muốn gửi ảnh cho bố mẹ và bạn bè nên tôi chụp ảnh nhiều hơn so với hồi ở quê. Những bức ảnh nói hộ tôi những điều mà tôi không thể diễn tả bằng lời nói. Gần đây tôi bận nhưng tôi vẫn chụp hai ba tấm mỗi ngày. Và tôi gửi chúng cho gia đình hoặc bạn bè. Việc gửi ảnh rồi nói về bức ảnh đó rất vui. Trong thời gian ở Hàn Quốc tôi muốn chụp nhiều bức ảnh thật ( ㉠ ).
g_text_translate.en: My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.it:
Il mio hobby è scattare foto. In questi giorni scatto più foto rispetto a quando ero a casa perché voglio inviarle ai miei genitori e ai miei amici. Le immagini parlano bene di cose che non posso raccontare a parole. In questi giorni, anche quando sono occupato, scatto due o tre foto ogni giorno. E li mando a parenti e amici. Inviare foto e parlarne è molto divertente. Voglio fare un sacco di belle foto mentre sono in Corea.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.fr:
Mon passe-temps est de prendre des photos. Ces jours-ci, je prends plus de photos que lorsque j'étais à la maison parce que je veux les envoyer à mes parents et amis. Les images parlent bien de choses que je ne peux pas exprimer avec des mots. Ces jours-ci, même lorsque je suis occupé, je prends deux ou trois photos chaque jour. Et je les envoie à ma famille et à mes amis. Envoyer des photos et en parler est très amusant. Je veux prendre beaucoup de jolies photos pendant que je suis en Corée.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.es:
Mi hobby es tomar fotografías. Estos días tomo más fotografías que cuando estaba en casa porque quiero enviárselas a mis padres y amigos. Las imágenes hablan bien de cosas que no puedo expresar con palabras. Hoy en día, incluso cuando estoy ocupado, tomo dos o tres fotografías todos los días. Y se los envío a familiares y amigos. Enviar fotografías y hablar sobre ellas es muy divertido. Quiero tomar muchas fotografías bonitas mientras esté en Corea.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.id:
Hobi saya adalah memotret. Saat ini saya mengambil lebih banyak foto dibandingkan ketika saya kembali ke rumah karena saya ingin mengirimkannya kepada orang tua dan teman-teman saya. Gambar berbicara dengan baik tentang hal-hal yang tidak dapat saya ungkapkan dengan kata-kata. Saat ini, bahkan ketika saya sedang sibuk, saya mengambil dua atau tiga gambar setiap hari. Dan saya mengirimkannya ke keluarga dan teman. Mengirim gambar dan membicarakannya sangatlah menyenangkan. Saya ingin mengambil banyak foto cantik saat berada di Korea.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.ja:
私の趣味は写真を撮ることです。最近は両親や友達に送りたいので、帰省していた時よりも写真を撮ることが多くなりました。言葉では伝えられないことを写真はよく伝えてくれます。最近は忙しくても毎日2、3枚は写真を撮っています。そして家族や友人に送ります。写真を送ったり、話したりするのはとても楽しいです。韓国に行ったら綺麗な写真をたくさん撮りたいです。

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.de:
Mein Hobby ist das Fotografieren. Heutzutage mache ich mehr Fotos als zu Hause, weil ich sie meinen Eltern und Freunden schicken möchte. Bilder sprechen gut für Dinge, die ich nicht mit Worten beschreiben kann. Heutzutage mache ich, auch wenn ich beschäftigt bin, jeden Tag zwei oder drei Bilder. Und ich schicke sie an Familie und Freunde. Bilder zu verschicken und darüber zu reden macht viel Spaß. Ich möchte viele schöne Bilder machen, während ich in Korea bin.

g_text_translate.zh-CN:
我的爱好是拍照。这些天我拍的照片比回家时更多，因为我想把它们发送给我的父母和朋友。图片很好地表达了我无法用语言表达的事情。这些天，即使很忙，我每天也会拍两三张照片。我把它们送给家人和朋友。发送图片并讨论它们非常有趣。我想在韩国的时候拍很多漂亮的照片。

#######

Мое хобби — фотографировать. Сейчас я делаю больше фотографий, чем когда был дома, потому что хочу отправить их родителям и друзьям. Фотографии хорошо говорят о вещах, которые я не могу передать словами. Сейчас, даже когда я занят, я делаю две или три фотографии каждый день. И я отправляю их семье и друзьям. Отправлять фотографии и говорить о них — это очень весело. Я хочу сделать много красивых фотографий, пока буду в Корее.

งานอดิเรกของฉันคือการถ่ายภาพ ทุกวันนี้ผมถ่ายรูปมากกว่าตอนกลับบ้านเพราะอยากส่งให้พ่อแม่และเพื่อนๆ รูปภาพสื่อถึงสิ่งที่ฉันไม่สามารถบอกเป็นคำพูดได้ดี ทุกวันนี้ แม้ว่าฉันจะยุ่ง ฉันถ่ายรูปสองสามภาพทุกวัน และฉันส่งพวกเขาไปให้ครอบครัวและเพื่อนฝูง การส่งรูปและพูดคุยเกี่ยวกับพวกเขาเป็นเรื่องสนุกมาก ฉันอยากถ่ายรูปสวยๆ เยอะๆ ตอนอยู่เกาหลี

I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.hi:
मेरा शौक तस्वीरें लेना है. जब मैं घर वापस आया था तब की तुलना में इन दिनों मैं अधिक तस्वीरें लेता हूं क्योंकि मैं उन्हें अपने माता-पिता और दोस्तों को भेजना चाहता हूं। तस्वीरें वो बातें बयां करती हैं जो मैं शब्दों में नहीं बता सकता। इन दिनों, जब मैं व्यस्त रहता हूं, तब भी मैं हर दिन दो या तीन तस्वीरें लेता हूं। और मैं उन्हें परिवार और दोस्तों को भेजता हूं। तस्वीरें भेजना और उनके बारे में बात करना बहुत मजेदार है। जब मैं कोरिया में रहूँगा तो मैं ढेर सारी सुंदर तस्वीरें लेना चाहता हूँ।

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.
g_text_translate.tr:
Hobim fotoğraf çekmek. Bu günlerde eve döndüğümde olduğundan daha fazla fotoğraf çekiyorum çünkü onları aileme ve arkadaşlarıma göndermek istiyorum. Kelimelerle anlatamadığım şeyleri resimler çok iyi anlatıyor. Bu günlerde meşgul olsam bile her gün iki veya üç fotoğraf çekiyorum. Ve onları aileme ve arkadaşlarıma gönderiyorum. Resim göndermek ve onlar hakkında konuşmak çok eğlenceli. Kore'deyken bir sürü güzel fotoğraf çekmek istiyorum.

#######

My hobby is taking pictures. These days I take more pictures than when I was back home because I want to send them to my parents and friends. Pictures speak well of things I cannot tell in words. These days, even when I'm busy, I take two or three pictures every day. And I send them to family and friends. Sending pictures and talking about them is a lot of fun. I want to take a lot of pretty pictures while I'm in Korea.

explain.ru:
Выберите тот, который соответствует содержанию в этом тексте.

1. Я могу передать то, что хочу сказать, через фотографии.
2. Чтобы сделать красивую фотографию, нужно приложить немало усилий.
3. Мои родители часто присылают фотографии, потому что они им нравятся.
4. Разговоры о картинках занимают много времени.

เลือกอันที่ตรงกับเนื้อหาในข้อความนี้

1. ฉันสามารถถ่ายทอดสิ่งที่ต้องการพูดผ่านรูปภาพได้
2. ต้องใช้ความพยายามอย่างมากในการถ่ายภาพให้สวย
3. พ่อแม่ของฉันมักจะส่งรูปภาพเพราะพวกเขาชอบพวกเขา

2. एक सुंदर तस्वीर लेने के लिए बहुत मेहनत करनी पड़ती है।
3. मेरे माता-पिता अक्सर तस्वीरें भेजते हैं क्योंकि वे उन्हें पसंद करते हैं।
4. तस्वीरों के बारे में बात करने में बहुत समय लगता है.
